Comment: Quickly into stride, raced in 3rd, 2 wide, 1 to 2 lengths back turning in, hit the front 250M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Jumped with them, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/2L turning in, peaked and headed 250M, weakened final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Taken back from gate 10, raced 2 wide at rear, 7 lengths back, same margin back on turn, passed some tired runners in straight.
Jumped well, raced in 2nd, a length or so back, same position on turn, finished off evenly.
Slightly slow out, raced towards rear on the inside, 7 lengths back, same position on turn, made no impression in straight.
Away with them, positioned 5 lengths behind the leader on the inside, 2 wide after passing 500M, same margin back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Out with rest, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, angled out 550M, 5-1/2L back turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame without threatening.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened and eased inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away well, raced 2 wide in midfield, 5 lengths back turning in, made some progress in straight.
Average to begin, raced better than midfield on the outside, 3 lengths or so back turning in, finished off well to take 2nd. (Lost left front plate after the race.)
From draw 13 caught wide no cover early stages, moved up to the lead nearing 1000M, challenged by rival top of straight, lost lead nearing 200M then weakened towards the line.
Settled ahead of midfield but raced very wide without cover throughout, 7th at 400M, kept on fairly to the line. Never a winning hope.

Set early pace before settling in a trailing spot behind leading pair, couldn't keep up with the main contenders passing 300M, weakened away. (Jockey : no explanation for the disappointing performance.)
Held up in mid-division along the fence, little change at the turn, had difficulty obtaining clear running 300M before finishing off fairly, gave ground late stages.
In touch behind leaders, held up for clear running from 450m to 250M then worked home well to get into the placings.
Maintained a midfield position 4Ls behind leader, had difficulty obtaining clear running early straight but the finishing response over final 300M was only fair. Never able to trouble leaders.
Given a waiting ride 5Ls back on settling, saved ground on the inside before running on mildly for 5th, not beaten far.
Jumped only fairly, settled in 2nd half of the field, badly held up between 450M-300M and dropped to last place, hit the line well once in the clear. Could do better.
Up with pace first 800M, shuffled back to midfield entering home turn, came up empty passing 400M, finished tailed out. (Mucus / Unacceptable Performance.)
Caught wide no cover down the back straight then pressed forward to join leader 800M, fought hard to take lead near 250M, dug deep final stages but was worn down by the fast finishing winner late.
Dropped back to race towards the rear, went wide from 700M, had task in hand top of straight, stayed on moderately to claim 4th.
Jumped only fairly then taken back to race at the rear, 7Ls off leader middle stages, swung widest into straight before producing a strong finish to get up close home.
Held up midfield in a slowly run race, came under pressure 500M, soon weakened and dropped out of contention.
Sat rear, held up entering the Straight, bumped at 300M, showed some dash after obtaining clear running near 250M.
Settled in front of midfield, traveled smoothly, closed off nicely.
Sat handy, made a wide Turn, lay in in the Straight (See Incident Report).
Sat towards rear, traveled comfortably, made good progress inside 200M.
Sat handy, gave ground notably in the Straight, faded (Heart Irregularity, Must BT, See Incident Report).
Jumped only fairly, sat midfield, no clear run near 150M, could not be fully tested.
Settled towards rear, traveled fairly, disappointed for a run near 300M, weakened thereafter.
Ridden hard to lead, weakened near 350M, gave ground gradually.
Sat worse than midfield, traveled okay, one pace to the finish.
Chased the leader, lay out rounding the Turn, closed off fairly.
Jumped awkwardly, settled in front of midfield, made the Turn wide, nothing in the Straight.
Chased the leader, traveled nicely, slightly weakened inside 250M, ran on evenly.
Waited with. Improved to chase leader from 150m out and led on line.
Raced in touch. Stayed on but lacked pace to challenge front two final 150m.
Soon prominent. Led outright from halfway and in front until collared final strides.
Disputed running against rail. Unable to maintain position under pressure from 300m out and weakened.
Tracked leading pair until hung right and outpaced from 250m out.
Waited with after awkward start. Driven from halfway and never on terms.

Began well from gate 12, unable to slot in, trapped wide slightly behind midfield, dropped towards rear after passing 1100M, 7 to 8 lengths back on turn, made very good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Began well, raced better than midfield on the inside, 2 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, kept on same pace in straight.
Bumped and unbalanced shortly after start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Jumped well, tracked leaders on the outside, 2 lengths or so back turning in, kept on well in straight without threatening.
Taken back from gate 13, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear, 7 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the inside, a bit closer in the middle stages, made good progress in straight to make frame.
Average to begin, raced prominently on the outside, took the lead near 1000M, travelled comfortably in the middle stages, peaked and headed 200M, ran on evenly to the line, finished 2nd.
Jumped well, took the early lead, headed near 1000M, 2nd in the middle stages, hit the front 200M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Bumped shortly after start, raced behind midfield on the outside, 6 lengths back, same margin back on turn, showed limited response in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Crowded shortly after start, raced 3 wide in midfield, no cover on turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Jumped with them, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside, 2 wide from 1000M, 6 to 7 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Settled in front of midfield 2 wide, made no impression.
Not the quickest out, settled towards the rear, passed some weakened rivals.
Caught 3 wide no cover near midfield, gave ground in the Straight. (Heart Irregularity)
Sat on pace 2 wide, weakened final 150M.
Settled midfield on the rail, one pace when asked.
Sat last, never a threat.
Sat towards the rear 3 wide, stayed on.
Sat behind midfield on the rail, saved ground, held up early part of the Straight, closed off nicely once in the clear.
Settled outside the lead, weakened final furlong.
Jumped on terms, settled behind midfield 3 wide with cover, closed off well to score.
Jumped well and led, kept on nicely until weakened final 100M.
Settled behind the leaders, checked at 200M, not tested afterwards.
Settled towards the rear 2 wide, raced keenly, limited response when asked.
Settled worse than midfield 2 wide, ran on nicely between horses.
Soon took up running setting a steady pace and with 2L to spare on home bend, unable to sustain effort and headed by eventual winner 300M out, folded up quickly.

Quickly recovered from moderate start to within 4L of pace in 5th, carried backward behind runners to midfield approaching home bend, snuck closer early in straight but unable to sustain effort 150M out.
Ridden early for a prominent position, settled mainly just over 2L back in 4th at around home bend, failed to quicken to challenge with the clear passage inside the 300M, swamped inside final 150M.
Ridden along after sluggish start and soon picked up to rear of the field, came to challenge under pressure on straightening and ran on steadily to the line.
Taken well back from a poor draw, encountered minor interferences around home bend, never seen with a chance.
Settled mainly in forward of midfield, kept on at the one pace without quickening under pressure in straight.

Crowded at start settling at the back and waited with, angled off the rail for a move around the backmarkers 700M out, ran on well under pressure down the centre of the straight despite inconvenienced 300M out,
Settled 3-wide towards rear from a poor draw, wider into straight and inconvenienced 300M out, fought on steadily without threatening.
Taken well behind from the widest draw travelling wide without cover, commenced move rounding home bend swinging one of the widest into straight, ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Settled just worse than midfield from a middle draw, lost some ground about 1000M out, towards rear in 9th into straight, ran on dourly between runners to just fail to get up on line.
Settled towards rear on rail, saved ground turning in for home, kept on at the one pace without quickening in straight.

Held up in 2nd after beginning from a wide draw tracking mainly within 2L of the pace, hit the front over 300M out kicking over 1L clear 200M out and flattered, just held off fast-finishing runner-up under pressure.

Settled wide without cover in 7th in midfield after beginning from a poor draw, made steady headway around home bend reaching 2L 4th into straight, kept on before folding up quickly inside final 200M.
Settled not far off in 3rd, came to challenge from a similar position into straight, held some chance briefly 200M out, swamped for a placing close to home.

Out with the line, soon pushed along to find the lead, tracked leader from 1000M, compounded in the straight and dropped out of the race. (Jockey : unsuited when crossed by rival in the early stages.)
From wide draw ridden positively, 3rd on settling, moved up to challenge 500M, couldn't get past leader, run ended mid-straight and faded out of contention.
Settled at the back of the field 7-8Ls off leader, had the job ahead 400M but failed to make any impression.

Settled towards the tail of the field, had big task in hand top of the straight, checked 250M when commencing to finish the race off, couldn't ridden out over final 100M when positioned behind a rival.
Began well then eased back to race in midfield, kept on fairly from 400M and couldn't muster the pace to challenge leaders.
From draw 1 obtained a position behind midfield, raced keenly after 700M, pushed along 500M but lacked the dash to launch a serious bid.
Jumped awkwardly and settled midfield 4Ls off the pace, little change at the turn, responded fairly and failed to get into the finish.
Bumped at the start, moved up to sit in the 4th spot, raced keenly middle stages, quickened up impressively 300M, led near 100M and won going away with something in hand.
Soon led, set good pace early stages, kept going well turning into straight, headed nearing 100M, held on for 2nd just.
Jumped fairly, waited with near the rear, 6Ls to make up 400M, ran on mildly to finish just behind the placegetters.
Restrained behind midfield 5Ls off the pace, worked into the race well from 500M and made steady progress in the straight, just missed 2nd but not able to trouble the runaway winner.
Away well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/2L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened gradually final 50M.
Out in line, positioned 2 wide, 3 lengths back, angled out approaching 500M, same margin back turning in, closed off well to take a place.
Began fairly from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, easy run to turn, not enough room early in straight, cleared 250M, finished off strongly to score.
Fast into stride, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, moved a bit closer on turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Away with them, positioned 2 wide, 1-1/2L back, same position on turn, finished off well to take 2nd, just beaten by a neck.
Out with rest, sent forward to race prominently, 3 wide throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Began only fairly, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out 500M, 5 lengths or so back turning in, made some progress in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide at rear, found rail near 700M, saved ground on turn, finished off well to make frame.
Shifted out at start, taken back to race at rear on the outside, 8 lengths back turning in, failed to make any progress in straight.
Moderately away, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made no progress in straight.
Shifted out at start, raced in midfield on the outside, 4 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, finished off well to be nearest on line.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, raced at tail, 8 lengths or so back, still well back on turn, passed some tired runners in straight.
Began smartly from gate 1, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, moved a bit closer on turn, hit the front 300M, kept on strongly to the line.

Jumped only fairly, raced towards rear on the inside, 6 lengths or so back, angled out after passing 500M, made some progress early in straight, blocked approaching 150M, cleared 50M, ran on well to make frame without threatening.
Bumped start, raced prominently, took the lead 900M, headed near 600M, peaked early in straight, shifted out abruptly and made contact near 300M, weakened and eased final furlong.
Bumped on jumping, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside, very wide into straight, finished off well to take a place without threatening.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide better than midfield, crowded near 900M, 3 lengths or so back turning in, hard ridden from 350M, no clear run 300M to 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Bumped on jumping, took the early lead, headed near 900M, retook the lead 600M, led by 3/4L turning in, peaked and headed 300M, weakened gradually final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well from gate 10, raced in midfield on the outside, 4 lengths back turning in, finished off well to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Away with them, tracked leaders, 3 wide, 2 wide from 850M, 2 lengths back turning in, hampered 300M, peaked on run 200M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, raced 3 wide behind midfield, 2 wide from 700M, commenced move 500M, made minor progress in the run home.
Bumped on jumping, positioned 4 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, weakened early in straight, eased final furlong. (Bled.)
Began awkwardly and bumped, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths back, found rail 700M, same margin back turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Started well and led/disputed lead. Weakened quickly once headed over 200m out.
Tracked pace. Short of room briefly before quickening between rivals to lead 150m out and responded well to hold off runner-up.
Held up. Short of room after ridden off bend before good late headway final 100m.
Recovered from sluggish start to race in mid-field. One paced under pressure and unable to challenge.
Keen in mid-field. Short of room 300m out and no impression after.
Held up from high draw. Good headway out wide in home straight but no further impression on leaders final 50m.
Across to dispute lead from wide draw. No extra and faded final 150m.
Failed to get a run for much of home straight after held up, notably final 150m when unable to be ridden out. Run best ignored.
Waited with towards rear of mid-field. One paced and unable to get on terms when running out of room closing stages.
Tracked pace. Had to wait for a run around 300m out before staying on to chase home first two.
Dropped in from wide draw. Twice briefly short of room against rail in home straight and never on terms.
Tracked leading pair three wide and a bit keen. Challenged and every chance from 300m out but faded final 150m.
Keen in mid-field. Didn't get clearest of passages towards rail in home straight and stayed on.
Raced on outer in mid-field. Quickened well to challenge from 200m out but unable to get past winner.
Crowded shortly after start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, finished off strongly to score by a nose.
Jumped awkwardly, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed some response early in straight, no clear run near 200M, ran on evenly to the line.
Taken back to race at rear, 10 lengths back, still 9 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Slightly show out and made contact, raced 2 wide towards rear, found rail approaching 800M, saved ground on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Shifted in at start and made contact, raced in 2nd, 1-3/4L back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, no clear run 300M to 250M, made good progress thereafter to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Began smartly, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-3/4L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed approaching 100M, weakened thereafter.
Crowded start, positioned 2-1/2L behind the leader on the inside, saved ground throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made contact at start, raced in midfield, 2 wide, angled out 500M, kept on same pace in straight.
Out in line, raced slightly better than midfield, 3-1/2L back turning in, showed good response in straight, took the lead approaching 100M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner on line.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 11 lengths back, still 9 lengths back turning in, made very good progress in straight to make frame.
Moderately away from a tricky gate, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, weakened early in straight when hard run took effect. (See Racing Incidents.)
Broke well from the 1 draw but caught on the inside rail early stages, switched 3-wide off the rail behind heels passing the 700M, found nothing.
Settled in rear of the main group on stands side, commenced move about 300M out switching towards the centre of the track, could only keep on at the same pace without quickening.
Jumped awkwardly losing ground, soon ridden to join last few of main group on stands side, had no more to give inside final 200M.
Settled just worse than midfield of main group on stands side, steadied and lost position 500M out, renewed effort down the centre of the track inside the 350M, kept on same pace without quickening.
Over 2L back in 5th of main group on stands side, kept on same pace without quickening inside final 200M.
Broke well settling in last few on stands rail, came to challenge under pressure inside the 400M, only produced modest impression in closing stages.
Always thereabouts when 3-wide off the stands rails, came to challenge under pressure inside final 400M but unable to quicken to threaten.
Slowly away but soon recovered to last few of main group on stands side, gained closer to 3L 6th of main group onto course proper, checked for a run just over 200M out, never recovered.
Jumped awkwardly from the 3 draw, travelled along inside rail in prominent position, found no extra under pressure from half-way out.
Broke well settling just over 2L off the pace in the main group near stands side, switched out onto stands rail passing the 300M, responded well under pressure inside final 200M, did best work late.
Broke well from the middle draw and soon took up running on the stands rails attempting to make all, just held off runner-up's strong late challenge closing stage.
Soon obtained stands rails run tracking race leader, gradually weakened inside final 300M.
Crowded at start, soon taken across to join the rear of the main group travelling without cover down the centre of the track, found no extra and detached inside final 300M.

Moderate start from a low draw, settled over 2L off the pace in 6th of the main group on stands side, slightly further back when coming under pressure onto course proper, kept on at the same pace without quickening.
Sat handy, traveled comfortably, briefly held up rounding the Turn, closed off strongly (See Incident Report).
Sat rear, traveled fairly well, made steady progress in the Straight.
Sat towards rear, traveled okay, lay in and stuck heels at the top of the Straight, finished off well (See Incident Report).
Settled worse than midfield, raced keenly in the early stages, stayed on well.
Ridden along to lead, lay out making the first Turn, weakened passing 150M.
Settled in front of midfield, joined the leader from 700M, gave ground quickly from 250M.
Sat midfield, traveled only fairly, limited response when asked (See Incident Report).
Sat towards rear, made forward move from 800M, raced wide, ran on evenly.

Dropped in after awkward start from wide draw and raced in last place. Still plenty to do off bend and good headway final 200m.
Tracked leading pair and keen. Had to wait for a run against rail over 300m out. Stayed on final 200m.
Improved from mid-field to hold every chance 150m out and found only winner too strong.
Waited with in rear. Came with sustained run down the outside from bend to lead final 100m.
Held up after sluggish start. Some headway early in home straight but unable to sustain.
Prominent off turn and every chance until no extra final 150m.
Started well from wide draw and across to dispute lead. Weakened 300m out.
Raced wide. Chased leaders off bend until weakening from over 200m out.
Raced in mid-field. Going well but unable to obtain clear run from 300m out to 100m out. Stayed on once clear and finished with running left. Promising debut.
Held up after sluggish start. Pushed along from halfway and no real impression.
Close up early but unable to hold position from halfway and dropped away home straight.
Jumped well from gate 1, raced 2wide better than midfield, there to turn, failed to close off in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowly away, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, there to turn, one-paced in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped only fairly, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, a bit closer in the middle stages, kept on well in straight to take 2nd, always held.
Began only fairly and bumped, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made no progress in straight.
Jumped well, raced better than midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
On jumping made contact with the left side of its barrier, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, 3 lengths or so back, angled out approaching 400M, finished off evenly.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, 7 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame, no threat to the first few.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide towards rear, 6 lengths back turning in, made no progress in the run home.
Jumped with them, raced behind midfield on the outside early, crowded near 1500M, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear in the middle stages, failed to close off in straight.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably in the middle stages, kept on well in straight, won by 1/2L.
Jumped with them, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Jumped only fairly, positioned 2 wide behind midfield, raced keenly in the early stages, 4-1/2L back turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Jumped well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, same position on turn, peaked on run 400M, weakened early in straight. (See Racing Incidents)
Jumped well, shared led on the stands' rail, kept on well to score.
Sat last, held up final furlong, never seriously tested.
Sat on pace, gave ground final furlong. (See Incident Report)
Settled midfield 1 off the stands' rail, closed off only fairly.
Sat at the rear, never a threat.
Settled in front of midfield 3 off the stands' rail, kept on nicely.
Settled in front of midfield 3 off the stands' rail, showed some dash but run peaked final 150M.
Sat on pace, weakened final 300M
Settled behind midfield 2 off the stands' rail, ran on nicely for 2nd.
Blundered on jumping, settled midfield near center, one pace when asked. (Substantial blood)
Settled midfield on the stands' rail, limited response in the Straight.
Settled towards the rear near center, ran on ordinarily.
Dispute lead, weakened final 75M.
Shared lead center field, weakened and faded final 2 furlong.
Broke well before settling over 2L back in 4th, further off the pace home bend, fought on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Settled in last few, made no impression in home straight.
Settled at the back and waited with, commenced move on rail 600M out sneaking up to 5L 6th into straight, baulked for a run until the 250M, sustained effort to take charge 100M out.
Well there on rail, crossed by race leader obtaining cover in 2nd onto home bend, unable to quicken under pressure in straight and swamped inside final 50M.
Soon dropped to last few and never seen with a chance.

Recovered steadily to 5L 5th after moderate start, in similar position on rail rounding home bend, quickened from a clear run about 300M out holding every chance at the 100M, found winner too good late.
Ridden positively from the widest draw of 9 to soon take up running wide on back straight, eventually obtained rails run in front over 700M out, led until overhauled inside final 150M.
Trapped 3-wide in joint 1L 2nd back straight, slightly further off in 3rd home bend, dropped quickly out of contention in home straight.
Settled just worse than midfield in 5L 6th becoming 7th into straight, hung in and a difficult ride until the 200M, finished off the race well to narrowly miss 3rd.
Dropped back to race near the rear, 3-wide home turn and held up for a short distance near 450M, ran on mildly under top weight but was never a winning hope.
Jumped only fairly, reserved at the rear of the field, last turning in and wasn't able to finish the race off.
Jumped on terms, pressed on to be 3rd on settling, fought hard to stay in contention early straight, run ended 100M.
Jumped awkwardly and shortly after the start was bumped, maintained a spot in second half of the field and raced keenly middle stages, failed to run on final 400M.
Held up 2-wide in midfield, driven 350M and had every chance, stayed on to go 3rd close home without troubling first two.

Caught wide no cover from draw 12, continued forward to lead to avoid covering additional ground, headed near 300M, refused to give in, fought hard until no extra late stages. Lost 3rd in photo finish.
Away well and soon in front, chased leader from 1000M, travelled well into straight and re-gained the lead 300M, kept on final stages only to be caught close home.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, ended up racing at the tail of the field, 4Ls behind leader 400M, lacked a kick to make an impact.
Shifted in at the start and became unbalanced, unable to slot in from a wide barrier, caught racing 4-wide without cover in mid-pack, had some work to do 400M and was just fair to the line.
From draw 1 always stayed close enough to the pace, loomed large behind leaders turning home, short of room mid-straight before getting clear run final 150M, sprinted quickly to get up near line.
Restrained to race behind midfield along the inside, failed to run on passing 400M, never a threat to leaders.
Settled down 3-wide in midfield, lost cover home turn, came up empty turning home then weakened to last. (Jockey : his mount changed stride after 550M and came under pressure soon after.)
Bumped start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out 650M, very wide into straight, finished off well, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Jumped with them, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, same position on turn, took the lead approaching 200M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner on line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began only fairly, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.
Jumped with them, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, one-paced in the run home.
Average to begin, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, awkwardly placed near 150M, made no progress thereafter.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, 6 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight.

Began smartly from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, traveled well in the middle stages, peaked and headed 200M, ran on evenly to the line.
Began well, raced 3 wide, 1 to 2 lengths back, 2 wide from 900M, there to turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 6 lengths back turning in, made some progress early in straight, no clear run final 150M.

Bumped start, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, peaked early in straight, weakened 300M, eased final 100M.
Average to begin, sent forward to take the lead, challenged by rival turning in, peaked and headed approaching 250M, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Bumped start, raced at rear on the outside, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out 500M, no clear run early in straight, made no impression thereafter.
Made contact at start, positioned 1 out 1 back, angled out 500M, hit the front 200M, kept on very well to the line and scored.
Jumped awkwardly, sat right behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Bumped start, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, very wide into straight, finished off well to take 2nd.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced behind midfield on the outside, there to turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Crowded start, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.
Began only fairly, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 500M, no clear run early in straight, made good progress thereafter to take a place

Made contact at start, positioned 2 wide slightly better than midfield, travelled keenly in the middle stages, 3 wide turning in, one-paced in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 5 lengths or so back turning in, made no impression in straight.
Moderately away from gate 1, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run until approaching final 100M, finished off evenly.

Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, angled out 400M, very wide into straight, made little progress in straight.
Taken back from gate 12, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and finished off evenly.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, commenced move 450M, finished off strongly to score by a narrow margin.
Average to begin, raced in midfield on the inside, angled out after passing 400M, finished off evenly.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first two late.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 8 lengths or so back, very wide turning in, made no impression in straight.
Average to begin, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, angled out 350M, short of room and hampered near 200M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Slowly away, raced 2 wide at rear, hard ridden after passing 500M, very wide into straight, made no progress in the run home.
Jumped well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, same position on turn, peaked and raced tight early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Unable to quicken off bend after racing close up and no extra final 100m.
Never better than mid-field. Under pressure from 300m out and little impression.
Soon prominent from wide draw but struggling to hold position 400m out and dropped away quickly. Found to be displaying an irregular heart rhythm.
Tracked pace. Gave chase to leader from top of home straight and went past final 50m.
Raced in touch with leaders. Lacked pace to challenge but stayed on steadily.
Pressed leader off bend after racing prominently but soon no extra and faded.
Soon prominent and led outright by halfway. Over two lengths clear 200m out but chased down by winner and passed final 50m. Finished clear of rest.
Raced in last place after awkward start and never out of rear.
Made headway from rear off bend and stayed on to get up for third late on. No danger to front two.
One paced from mid-field and never on terms with leaders.
Always in rear after sluggish start.
Pushed along towards rear of mid-field from 400m out and never a factor.
Sat rear, raced rear, failed to respond when asked (Substantial blood in trachea).
Settled rear, commenced to improve from 450M, made good progress in the Straight.
Settled worse than midfield, raced on the rail, held up until 100M, closed off okay.
Ridden hard to lead, traveled smoothly, until weakened notably near 200M.
Sat behind midfield, traveled okay, switched out in the Straight, stayed on well to win.
Sat handy, limited response when asked in the Straight, not much impression.
Settled midfield, switched out rounding the Turn, lay in near 200M, closed off nicely.
Sat in front of midfield, raced keenly in the early stages, hung out rounding the Turn, had every chance (See Incident Report).
Sat midfield, traveled fairly, weakened inside 100M (Substantial blood in trachea).
Settled midfield, raced wide since 700M, never a threat.
Settled in front of midfield, traveled okay, ran on evenly.
Jumped awkwardly, tracked leader, weakened entering the Straight (Disappointing Performance, Must BT, See Incident Report).
Tracked pace. Chased winner home from 200m out after briefly having to wait for a run on the bend.
In touch with leaders in mid-field. Improved to chase winner from top of home straight but no extra final 100m.
Raced in mid-field. Stayed on under pressure from 200m out and still closing at line.
Raced wide towards rear of mid-field. Stayed on from top of home straight despite tending to hang right.
Made running until headed 300m out and weakened.
Held up and never involved. Short of room 150m out.
Held up from wide draw. Made ground widest off bend and ran on strongly final 150m to go close.
Started well and disputed lead. Pushed along 300m out and weakened.
Tracked leaders three wide and keen. Led off bend and ran on well to line to hold on.
Mid-field. Came wide off bend and one paced when short of room 150m out.
Dropped in from high draw. Good run up rail off bend but unable to sustain headway.
One paced after racing in mid-field and unable to reach leaders.
Away well, tracked leaders, 2 wide, angled out 350M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, made no impression in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, 6 lengths or so back on turn, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home to take a place.
Bumped start, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, there to turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared after passing 200M, finished off well to make frame.
Shifted out at start and bumped, sat 1-1/2L behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, took the lead 150M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner final 50M.
Bumped start, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/4L turning in, peaked and headed 150M, weakened thereafter.
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, finished off evenly.
Began only fairly and bumped, raced at tail, 7 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to score.
Crowded on jumping, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths back turning in, no clear run early in straight, made some progress thereafter.
Jumped with them, raced better than midfield but trapped wide, sent forward after entering the back straight, raced in 2nd in the middle stages, peaked on run 400M, weakened early in straight.
Jumped with them, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, bumped near 150M, cleared 100M, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made contact at start, raced behind midfield on the inside, slightly improved along the rail on turn, hard ridden approaching 200M, bumped and unbalanced near 150M, kept on evenly to the line.
Settled in front of midfield 2 wide, one pace when asked.
Sat on pace early, moved to outside lead at 800M, kept on well to win.
Jumped on terms, sat worse than midfield 3 wide, ran on strongly.
Settled at the rear 3 wide, stayed on fairly.
Settled behind midfield on the rail, limited response in the Straight.
Sat behind the leaders, never ran on.
Settled midfield 2 wide, closed off nicely.
Settled midfield 3 wide, made little impression.
Sat at the rear, never in contention.
Sat towards the rear, never a threat (See Incident Report)
Ridden along early to lead, weakened final furlong. (See Incident Report)
Sat 3 wide no cover on pace, kept on fairly.

Settled in rear from a poor draw and waited with, improved one position to 10th over 800M out, commenced run under pressure around home bend going wide for a clear run into straight, ran on without pegging back the winner.

Held slender lead most of the way setting a steady pace, narrowly headed passing the 700M, renewed effort into straight but unable to peg back the race leader, swamped for a placing inside final 100M.
Began moderately, shared early pace briefly before gradually restrained to 5th over 2L back in back straight, kept on steadily without quickening in the final stretch.
Never better than midfield travelling on rails, did not find much room early in straight, made no further impression.
Broke well, settled in midfield, kept on in straight before producing good late impression closing stages.

Trailed the field, came under pressure from 700M out given reminders home bend, finished off the race strongly down the centre of the straight to snatch 3rd final strides despite inconvenienced 150M out.
Settled in last few, finished off the race well inside final 100M.
Worked his way forward early stages to reach 2-wide 2nd rounding the 1200M bend, came under to hold place 500M out, tight between runners inside final 150M, made no further impression.
Jumped awkwardly, refused to settle travelling keenly in 6th some 3L back, allowed to stride forward to lead 600M out, held advantage until swamped 50M out.

Settled towards rear in 9th, gained closer to 7th briefly some 3L off the pace at about 800M, commenced move under pressure wide rounding home bend, carried widest into straight, ran on resolutely to prevail close to home.
Began awkwardly from the widest draw, pressed forward to prominent 5th wide without cover, gained further closer to 3rd into back straight, kept on until overhauled inside final 50M.
Chased leaders on rail, came under pressure to hold position rounding home bend, swamped close to home.
Jumped only fairly, restrained to race near the rear 7Ls off the pace, stayed on well under big weight. Just missed 4th. (had some difficulty obtaining clear running over the concluding stages) .
Broke well, in 4th spot chasing leaders, came up empty passing 300M, soon out of contention.
Taken back to last from wide draw 8-9Ls off pace, had big task in hand 400M, ran past beaten horses but never a serious threat to leaders.
Jumped only fairly, settled 3-wide towards the rear, swung wide for home before closing off fastest to claim 3rd. Nearest finish.

Went forward from wide draw, raced keenly and refused to settle middle stages, in 2nd place home turn, soon weakened on straightening. (Trainer : races best when able to use its natural early pace in races.)
Held up behind mid-division, saved ground along the inside and waited with until top of straight, finished off fairly not able to trouble leaders.
Reserved in midfield 4-5Ls off leader, travelled well into straight, quickened to lead inside 200M, dug deep late and held on by diminishing short head.
Hard pressed to find the front, opened up a 2Ls lead top of straight but couldn't sustain run passing 200M, faded towards the line.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, taken across to the fence and settled towards the rear, had difficulty obtaining clear running 150M but the finishing response was only fair after.
Jumped on terms, settled down midfield 6Ls back and raced 3-wide no cover throughout, lay out on the home turn before closing off mildly in the straight.
Away well then restrained to sit behind midfield, driven wide passing 400M, closed off well late and was just denied. (Jockey warned for raising his whip arm above shoulder height concluding stages.)
Jumped cleanly from draw 1, settled in 3rd behind runaway leaders, poised to strike top of straight, moved up to challenge for lead 250M but run ended close home.
Taken back to race at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well in straight to make frame without threatening.
Jumped well, took the lead, travelled well to turn, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened and eased final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well, raced 2 wide behind midfield, steadied and dropped towards rear near 700M, 4 lengths back turning in, one-paced in the run home.
Crowded start, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 4 to 5 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to score.
Clean jump, raced 2 wide better than midfield, commenced move 450M, kept on well early in straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Shifted in at start and bumped, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide, same position to turn, took the lead early in straight, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner close home.
Slightly slow out, raced at rear on the inside, moved a bit closer after passing 1200M, raced in midfield on the middle stages, 3 lengths back turning in, finished off well without threatening
Jumped well, raced 2 wide in midfield, raced keenly in the middle stages, 3 lengths back turning in, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the outside, commenced move 450M, very wide turning in, finished off well to take a place.
Crowded shortly after start, raced behind midfield on the outside, hard ridden from 450M, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.
Began only fairly, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off well to take a place.
Average to begin, raced in midfield on the outside, 3 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, peaked early in straight, kept on same pace to the line.
Jumped awkwardly and made contact with the left side of its barrier, raced prominently on the inside, shared lead on turn, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner late.
Jumped well, raced in midfield, 3 to 4 wide, dropped towards rear 450M, failed to make any progress in straight.
Jumped with them, raced slightly behind midfield, 4 lengths back on turn, made some progress in straight.
Crowded shortly after start, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some headway in straight. (Lame right front leg next day.)
Began only fairly from a wide draw, raced at tail, 5 to 6 lengths back on turn, made no impression in straight.
Began well, raced slightly better than midfield, 3 wide, similar position on turn, one-paced in the run home.
Began well, raced better than midfield, 2 wide, outpaced halfway, eased early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back to race towards rear on the outside, 4 to 5 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to score by a neck.
Jumped with them, sent forward to race prominently, shared lead on turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well from a wide draw, took the lead, shared lead with rivals on turn, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Tracked leaders on inside, loomed a threat top of the straight, was held up for clear running 300M-150M before keeping on under top weight to claim 4th.

Heavily restrained after the start, ended up in detached last, had big task in hand 400M but gave limited response only. (Jockey was told he had restrained his mount too long in the early stages which resulted in it losing ground.)
Severely checked shortly after the start, ended up racing near last 7Ls back, raced keenly middle stages, no clear running 450M-250M before making some progress late.
Restrained after the jump, given a waiting ride towards the rear of the field, swung wide for home then kept on moderately to the line. Never a winning hope.
Jumped only fairly, slotted into a 2-wide position ahead of midfield, swung wide from 550M then closed off mildly for 5th.
Pressed forward, led from 1000M but was pressed by rivals from both sides, soon lost lead on straightening but fought hard to stay in contention, bumped 150M, no extra late.
Jumped on terms and chased leaders along the 2-path, kept on steadily over final 400M for 3rd but not going the pace to challenge first two.
Bumped on jumping, settled 5Ls back in second half of the field, stayed on moderately final 300M. (Jockey : raced greenly, hung in throughout and in the Home Straight proved difficult to ride out.)
Went forward pressing leaders, raced wide no cover for the majority of the event, checked 300M then weakened out of contention.
Crowded shortly after the start, maintained a position in midfield along the fence, failed to finish off passing 400M, couldn't be ridden out final 50M.
Badly crowded for room after the start, recovered to race in midfield, picked up well passing 400M, challenged for the lead 150M before gaining the upper hand final stages.
Quickly away from draw 1, prompted the pace along the fence, took over top of straight, fought well to hold the lead until conceding final 50M.
Sat towards rear, raced on the rail, closed off fairly (See Incident Report).
Sat rear, raced wide, stayed on well to grab 2nd.
Sat midfield, steadied rounding the Turn, one pace to the finish.
Settled midfield, commenced to improve from 700M, switched out in the Straight, ran on okay.
Slow out, tracked leader throughout, gave ground notably passing 200M (Disappointing Performance, Must BT, See Incident Report).
Sat handy and took the lead near 600M, lay out slightly making the Turn, closed off strongly.
Ridden hard to set on pace, raced wide and without cover, slightly weakened inside 200M.
Settled midfield, gave ground rounding the Turn, never a threat.
Settled handy, hung out near the 700M, not much impression in the Straight.
Sat towards rear, traveled fairly well, closed off evenly (See Incident Report).
Blundered on jumping, settled behind midfield on the rail, made steady progress in the Straight.
Settled in front of midfield, traveled fairly, weakened near 200M.
Mid-field after bumped at start. Wide off bend and ran on well from 300m line to lead late on.
Towards rear after slow start. Followed winner through after angled wide off bend and stayed on.
Stayed on from mid-field after not best of runs and switched 250m out.
Raced in mid-field against rail. Pushed along off bend and weakened.
Well positioned tracking leaders until no extra final 150m.
Raced in last place after slow start. Still plenty to do at top of home straight and stayed on well final 200m.
Towards rear of mid-field. Ran green and no impression.
Prominent until weakening from 300m line. Hampered 150m out.
Held up from high draw. Wide entering home straight and tended to hang right and race awkwardly. Late headway but never on terms.
Close up. Ridden and one paced from 300m out.
Soon prominent and led outright before halfway. Two lengths clear from top of home straight and run down by winner only late on.
Tracked pace. Ridden off bend and unable to quicken.

Moderately away from gate 14, raced prominently on the outside, took the lead 1100M, headed 900M, positioned 2L behind the leader on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside early, 2 wide from 900M, 3 lengths back turning in, finished off evenly.
Jumped well, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, angled out 550M, showed good response early in straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Taken back from gate 9, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Slowly away, raced at rear on the inside, 6 lengths back, same margin back on turn, made no impression in straight.
Moderately away from a wide draw, tracked leaders on the outside, took the lead 900M, led by 3/4L turning in, peaked and headed 200M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Clean jump, raced in midfield on the outside, 3 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, finished off well to take a place.
Bumped on the hindquarters on jumping, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, wider turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Jumped awkwardly, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, took the lead approaching 200M, kept on very well to the line.
Moderately away, raced in midfield on the outside early, sent forward after passing 950M, 2nd on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened and eased thereafter.
Crowded shortly after start, raced at tail, 8 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight.
Began well, took the early lead, headed near 1100M, positioned 2 wide, 1-1/2L back in the middle stages, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Began only fairly, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Settled midfield 2 wide, under pressure rounding the Home Turn, made no impression.
Sat at the rear on the rail, saved ground, showed some dash early in the Straight, one pace final 100M.
Sat outside the leader 2 wide, weakened final furlong.
Sat in front of midfield, closed off okay.
Sat behind the leaders, angled out rounding the Home Turn, showed some dash top of the Straight but soon weakened. (See Incident Report) (Roarer)
Settled worse than midfield, never a threat.
Jumped nicely, showed good early speed to lead, kept on well and won decisively.
Settled towards the rear 3 wide, stayed on.
Jumped slowly, sat last, made good ground late, held up near the finish.
Sat midfield 3 wide, weakened in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
Sat on pace 3 wide, limited response in the Straight.
Settled midfield on the rail, ran on nicely.
Gradually taken back from a wide draw and waited with at the back, went widest into straight, ran on well inside final 250M down the centre of the track to be nearest at finish.
Always in last few and never seen with a chance.
Soon took up running from a moderate start attempting to make all, unable to sustain effort under pressure inside final 100M.
Bumped and lost ground at start and crowded shortly after, keen when restrained in last few early stages, baulked for a run in straight until the 100M, did best work late.
Broker well from a poor draw, gradually settled some 2L back in 4th, kept on in straight until fading under pressure inside final 250M.
Taken back towards rear from the widest draw, keen at times in early stages, ran on in straight, never nearer.

Recovered steadily to rear of midfield after moderate start 2-wide alongside eventual race winner, keen at about the 900M, bumped and unbalanced early in straight, hit the front 100M out only to be caught close to home.
Chases leader in 3rd on rail, baulked for a run early in straight, made modest impression without quickening inside final 150M.
Settled in midfield in 6th on rail, commenced move rounding home bend, ran on under pressure with a clear passage 300M out, gained upper hand inside the 50M.
Tracked the leader 2-wide, held every chance early in straight, unable to sustain effort inside final 100M.
Settled in last few, inconvenienced 350M out and steadied 150M out, never nearer.
Settled in midfield 2-wide to straight, ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Emerged as leader 1000M, set steady pace to the straight, kept going well from 400M, joined by rivals 100M out, beaten to 3rd late.
Began only fairly, obtained a midfield position along the fence, raced keenly early stages, had difficulty obtaining clear running near 200M but ran home only fairly after.
Settled ahead of midfield and was never far off from leaders, 5th at 400M, had difficulty obtaining clear running from 300M to 250M, ran on fairly after.
Jumped awkwardly, ended up racing towards the rear on inside, switched out for clear running on straightening but was held until 150M, closed off the race well late stages. (Blood in trachea.)
Went forward from draw 9, caught racing 3 wide no cover outside the lead, fought hard early straight to stay in contention, no extra 150M.
Crowded for room shortly after the start, taken back to last 6-7Ls off leaders, failed to run on in the straight.
Away well, chased leaders on inside, responded well on straightening, joined leaders 100M and was just beaten in a close finish.
From draw 11 obtained a 3-wide spot in midfield, lacked a finish passing 400M, never a serious threat on his debut.
Jumped on fairly, reserved towards the rear along the 3-path, made good progress passing 350M, moved up to join leaders 100M, found extra late to get up near line.
Away fairly, settled in mid-division 4Ls from leaders, steadied near 250M losing momentum, never recovered.
Taken back from draw 12, settled near last 5-6s away, had some work to do 400M, closed off fairly well for 4th but without troubling top three. (Lay in in the home straight.)
Moved up to be racing with leaders, came under pressure 450M, weakened passing 200M.
Began only fairly, raced 2 wide towards rear, there to turn, kept on well in straight without threatening.
Jumped awkwardly, raced 3 wide in midfield, wider turning in, made minor progress early in straight, not enough room final 100M.
Jumped well, took the early lead, headed 900M, 2nd in the middle stages, kept on well in straight to make frame.
Made contact at start, raced prominently on the outside, took the lead near 900M, led by 3/4L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weakened final 50M.
Slowly away, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, showed some response early in straight, not enough room final 50M.
Taken back from gate 14, raced at rear on the inside, 2 wide in the middle stages, commenced move 500M, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to score.
Moderately away, positioned 2 wide, 1 to 2 lengths back, angled out 500M, showed very good response in straight, took the lead 150M, kept on well but unable to hold off the first two final 50M.
Slow to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out 450M, showed limited response early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Began awkwardly, positioned 3 wide, a length or so back, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Began well from a wide draw, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, crowded 200M, ran on evenly to the line.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 450M, no clear run early in straight, cleared approaching 200M, finished off well, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, a bit closer on turn, very wide into straight, made some progress early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened thereafter.

Crowded start, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear, bumped 900M, 4 lengths or so back turning in, no daylight early in straight, cleared approaching 200M, finished off strongly to be nearest on line.
Began smartly, tracked leaders on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out early in straight, cleared 300M, kept on well until approaching 50M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Bumped start, raced 3 wide with cover, 2 lengths or so back, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.

Taken back from gate 13, raced 3 wide slightly behind midfield, carried wider after passing 550M, showed good response in straight, took the lead 150M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner final 50M.
Made contact at start, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Jumped well from gate 14, raced better than midfield on the outside, a bit closer on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually close home.
Made contact shortly after start, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out 550M, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to score by a neck.
Jumped with them, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead 1050M, led by a length turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weakened final 100M.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, very wide into straight, made some progress in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Reared at the start and lost several lengths, raced at rear, 5 lengths back turning in, made good progress early in straight, no clear run final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out 450M, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, finished off evenly.
Began well from a wide draw, took the lead 1300M, headed 1050M, 2nd in the middle stages, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out after passing 550M, finished off well to make frame without threatening.
Taken back from gate 9, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide turning in, made good progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the early lead, headed near 1300M, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths back in the middle stages, showed limited response early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Began only fairly and crowded, raced at rear on the inside, 6 lengths back turning in, made little progress in straight.
Made contact shortly after start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out and made contact near 600M, very wide into straight, made no impression in the run home.
Began well from a wide draw, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, 3 wide from 500M, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Out in line, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Jumped with them, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, kept on well in straight to take 2nd.
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced prominently, took the lead 1150M, headed 900M, 2nd in the middle stages, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped on the hindquarters on jumping, raced at rear, 5 lengths back turning in, very wide into straight, made some progress in the run home.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced prominently, took the lead near 900M, led by 3/4L turning in, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Made contact shortly after start, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on the inside, saved ground throughout, hit the front 200M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 3 wide from 600M, peaked on run 300M, weakened gradually in straight.
Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, kept on well in straight to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Jumped with them, raced towards rear on the outside, moved closer after passing 600M, 2 lengths back turning in, kept on evenly in straight.
Settled at the back from a poor draw and waited with, commenced move 400M out obtaining a clear run shortly after straightening, quickened well to lead 50M, won cosily.
Soon taken well back, never seen with a chance.
Ridden forward to prominent position from the widest draw, gained 2nd alongside race leader passing the 1200M, folded up quickly inside the 750M. (Tactic questioned)
Began well from a wide draw, close up early before drifting backward to over 4L back in 6th 2-wide, renewed effort home bend swinging wide into straight, unable to quicken under pressure to threaten.
Settled in midfield on rail, checked by weakening runner 450M out, switched widest into straight, quicken well to hit the front 150M only to be caught by fast-finishing winner close home.
Settled in better than midfield in 5th, hampered and lost position passing the 600M, kept on from 3L 5th into straight until finding no extra inside final 150M.

Shared early pace from a poor draw, taken some 2L back to 4th into back straight, inconvenienced 650M out, soon recovered to hold some chance after straightening for home, unable to sustain effort inside final 150M.
Settled behind midfield, snuck closer saving ground on the rail turning in for home, unable to sustain effort inside final 200M.
Toward a rear throughout, never seen with a chance.
Well there from the one draw, took up running coming onto first bend, led until swamped inside final 200M.
Broke well gradually settling some 2L back in 4th or 3rd on rail, kept on same pace without quickening in home straight.
Broke well gradually settling in midfield 2-wide, angled out wider for a run into straight, ran on to hold some chance but unable to peg back race leader and lost 2nd late.
Ridden along to lead, traveled fairly well, but weakened notably in the Straight.
Sat worse than midfield, angled out making the Turn, minor progress made in the Straight.
Sat midfield, traveled smoothly, ran on well.
Sat behind midfield, raced wide and without cover from the middle stages, gave ground quickly inside 250M (Unacceptable Performance, Must BT).
Sat handy, raced keenly in the early stages, failed to finish off (See Incident Report).
Settled towards rear, made further move passing 750M, made good progress inside 200M.
Sat towards rear, raced 2 wide, switched out rounding the Turn, closed off nicely.
Sat midfield, raced wide until 800M, one pace to the finish.
Jumped only fairly, sat worse than midfield, limited when asked in the Straight.
Tacked leader, weakened slightly passing 200M, ran on evenly.
Sat rear, traveled fairly, lay in in the Straight, ran on fairly (See Incident Report).
Waited with after crowded at start. Stayed on under pressure final 200m and never nearer.
Tracked leader. Stayed in contention until weakening final 100m.
Driven along in mid-field from 400m out and one paced.
Raced in last place after crowded at start. Closed up final 100m.
Raced wide in rear. Driven bend and left behind from 200m out.
Chased leader from top of home straight and responded to pressure to lead 50m out despite that rival edging across him.
Raced in mid-field. Under pressure off bend before staying on well final 150m.
Held up. Stayed on after hanging wide off bend but never a threat to leaders.
Led and set good pace. Edged left and passed final 100m.
Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide towards rear, 7 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame, nearest on line.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths or so back turning in, made no progress in straight. (See Racing Incident.)
Shifted out at start and made contact, raced behind midfield on the inside, 6 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line. (Bled.)
Taken back from gate 8, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, failed to make any progress in straight.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, there to turn, finished off evenly.
Jumped well from gate 12, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Jumped with them, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made no impression in straight.
Commenced well, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground throughout, finished off well to take 2nd.
Slowly away, raced at tail, 10 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incident.)
Began smartly, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length in the middle stages, kept on well in straight and scored.
Made contact at start, raced in midfield on the outside, similar position on turn, finished off evenly.
Sat in front of midfield 2 wide, one pace when asked. (See Incident Report)
Sat one pace 3 wide no cover throughout, weakened final 150M.
Sat behind the leaders, travelled keenly, ran on nicely.
Not the quickest out, got crowded soon after, sat last, stayed on nicely.
Settled behind midfield on the rail, made some progress late.
Settled towards the rear early, improved along the back Straight, ran on okay.
Settled midfield 2 wide, closed off strongly once in the clear, impressive
Settled at the rear 2 wide, made no impression.
Sat midfield on the rail, unable to quickened. (See Incident Report)
Sat outside the leader, weakened final furlong. (See Incident Report)
Jumped well and showed good speed to lead, kept on for 3rd. (See Incident Report)
Settled worse than midfield 2 wide, stayed on fairly.
Bumped at start settling towards rear, ran on down the centre of the straight to be nearest at finish.
Broke well, well there on rail, unable to sustain effort inside final 200M.
Settled in midfield on rail after moderate start, lost position around home bend before sneaking back up by saving ground home turn, kept on same pace without threatening.
Ridden to just worse than midfield after moderate start from the widest draw, 3-wide rounding home bend, fought on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Soon took up running 2-wide, obtained rails run 600M out, soon headed on straightening, swamped for a placing close to home.
Settled in better than midfield, gained slightly closer to 2L 4th about 600M out, kept on in straight until finding no extra 100M out.
Settled mainly one-out-one-back, commenced move rounding home bend, hit the front over 200M out, drew clear under pressure.
Settled in 2L 4th, slightly further back in 5th leaving the 600M, kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Crowded at start from a poor draw settling wide in last few, remained well back to straight, never a danger.
Settled in last few, hampered and lost position 950M out, snuck closer on rail rounding home bend, fought on steadily without threatening in straight.
Settled in midfield, unbalanced making home turn, kept on steadily in straight until steadied close home.
Soon dropped to last few, tailed-off on straightening.
Began well then moved up to obtain a position outside the lead, came under pressure 400M, soon gave ground top of the straight.
Not hurried after the jump, switched off to race towards the rear 9Ls off pace, saved ground on inside to the straight before finishing off nicely to claim 4th.
From draw 1 stayed close enough to leaders in the 3rd spot, got outpaced passing 300M, dropped out of contention.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, ended up racing behind midfield further back than usual, failed to run on passing 300M. Never threatened.
Began fairly, chased leaders in 4th, challenged for the lead 450M, run ended 250M and dropped away. (Jockey : raced too keenly in the early and middle stages and gave ground in the Home Straight.)
Taken back to near last, caught wide no cover from halfway, moved closer to leaders 600M before producing a modest finish to get 5th in a busy finish for the minor placings.
Close up early, raced keenly mid stages and drifted back to midfield entering home turn, headway from 450M on outer, gained narrow lead near 200M but winner fought back to win in a close finish.
Obtained a midfield position soon after the start, 5-6Ls away on settling, under the pump home turn but couldn't finish off in the straight.
From wide draw dropped back to last early stages, over 10Ls behind leader on settling, made his move 600M round outside of the field, stayed on without troubling leaders.
Bustled along to find the lead, set good pace in first half of the race, headed nearing 200M but rallied back strongly to get the verdict by nose.
Restrained early stages, settled down midfield 4-5Ls off pace, switched away from inside from 400M then closed off the race steadily, not beaten far by first few.
Drifted back to race in second half of the field 7-8Ls away, checked 700M lost ground, had some work to do top of straight, closed off best down the outside to go 3rd near line.
Made contact shortly after start, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner close home.
Crowded shortly after start, raced at rear, 5 lengths or so back, same margin back turning in, made no impression in straight.
Began only fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on same pace in straight.
Bumped start, sent forward to race prominently, made contact near 1000M, 2nd in the middle stages, kept on evenly in straight.
Jumped with them, took the early lead, headed near 900M, sat right behind the leader on turn, kept on well in straight to make frame.
Bumped on jumping, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, there to turn, finished off evenly.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 lengths or so back, there to turn, finished off very strongly, led close home.
Moderately away, raced prominently early, checked and unbalanced near 1000M, raced behind midfield on outer in the middle stages, very wide into straight, weakened gradually in the run home.
Made contact shortly after start, raced 3 wide in midfield, there to turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on same pace in straight.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide at rear, moved closer after passing 500M, very wide into straight, finished off strongly to take a place, nearest on line.
Jumped well, raced prominently early, crowded and unbalanced near 1000M, positioned 3 wide, a length back in the middle stages, kept on well in straight without threatening.
Crowded start, raced at rear, 7 lengths back, same margin back on turn, made no impression in straight. (Lost right front plate.)
Taken back from the widest draw, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, failed to make any progress in straight.
Blundered badly shortly after start, raced at rear on the inside, hard ridden from 600M, 6-1/2L back turning in, made minor progress in the run home.
Jumped well, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, there to turn, finished off well to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Shifted in abruptly at start, raced prominently, 2 wide, there to turn, showed some response early in straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Moderately away, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.
Began smartly from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 750M, showed very good response in straight, took the lead 300M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Fast into stride, took the early lead, headed near 900M, allowed rival to cross approaching 750M, sat right behind the leader on turn, not enough room early in straight, ran on evenly thereafter.
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced prominently, took the lead near 900M, found rail approaching 750M, led by 1/2L turning in, peaked and headed 300M, weakened final furlong.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, 4 lengths back, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong. (Bled.)
Bumped start, unable to slot in, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover throughout, dropped towards rear 500M, made no progress in straight.
Began fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off strongly to be nearest on line.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide towards rear, 6 lengths back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Tracked leaders. Under pressure over 300m out but responded well and led 50m out.
Held up. Stayed on final 200m but never a threat to leaders.
Tracked pace. Troubled run against rail in home straight and unable to open up fully.
Waited with in mid-field. Good headway to challenge from 200m out after switched wide and every chance.
A bit keen in the lead. Headed and weakened from 150m out.
Never out of rear after dropped in from wide draw.
Raced wide in mid-field. Headway early in home straight but no extra and lost ground final 200m.
Held up after slow start. Stayed on well after briefly hampered 250m out and still gaining at line.
Tight for room on bend in mid-field and again short of room 200m out when trying to stay on. No impression after and eased.
Raced in mid-field. Ran into trouble when trying to improve for extended period 300m out and again 100m out. Not fully extended.
Prominent until weakening quickly from 300m out.
Tracked leaders. Improved to challenge 200m out and held every chance.
Held up. Still in rear and under pressure 300m out before staying on well final 150m.
Tracked leaders in wide position from high draw. Moved into contention at top of home straight before weakening final 200m.
Settled midfield, traveled smoothly, switched out rounding the Turn, ran on evenly.
Sat handy, traveled fairly, weakened quickly passing 200M (See Incident Report).
Sat midfield, traveled okay, held up inside 300M, ran on evenly.
Jumped awkwardly, sat midfield, raced wide, made steady progress over the concluding stages.
Settled behind midfield, traveled okay, held up rounding the Turn, closed off nicely.
Sat worse than midfield, no impression.
Sat midfield, traveled fairly, held up in the early Straight, one pace to the finish.
Jumped awkwardly, sat rear, closed off fairly.
Sat midfield, raced wide throughout, minor progress made (See Incident Report).
Ridden along to lead, traveled fairly, weakened inside 250M.
Sat towards rear, switched out rounding the Turn, made good ground.
Settled in front of midfield, limited response when asked in the Straight.
Sat worse than midfield, traveled comfortably on the rail, stayed on well to win.
Settled in front of midfield, gave ground notably in the Straight.
Very wide for first 400m before across to press leader on bend. Dropped away quickly final 200m.
Held up. Angled out at 300m line and stayed on to edge ahead final 50m.
Held up. Short of room in rear over 300m out before staying on.
Ridden forward from wide draw and prominent. No extra and lost ground final 150m.
Made running. Challenged from top of home straight and dropped away final 200m.
Ridden from stalls to take up position tracking pace. Weakened from 300m out.
Dropped out from widest draw and in last place off bend. Not best of runs 300m out and never nearer.
Made little impression from mid-field.
One paced having raced in touch and no threat to leaders final 200m.
Tracked pace three wide before improving to lead 200m out. Responded to pressure but edged out in tight finish.
Raced three off rail in mid-field. Stayed on well from 300m out and not beaten far in close finish.
Dropped in from high draw. Stayed on into mid-field from 300m out but never a danger.
Raced towards rear of mid-field. Three wide on bend and struggling under pressure for much of home straight before some late headway.
Stayed on at the one pace from mid-division and unable to reach leaders.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-3/4L turning in, hard ridden after passing 250M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner on line.
Bumped start, raced at rear, 7 lengths back, same margin back on turn, made some progress in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide into straight, made no impression in the run home.
Jumped with them, raced in midfield on the outside, 3 lengths or so back, wider turning in, finished off evenly.
Slowly away, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped with them, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced better than midfield on the outside, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Taken back to race 2 wide behind midfield, 4-1/2L back turning in, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, finished off well to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Bumped start, taken back to race at rear on the inside, 6 lengths back turning in, finished off very strongly to score by a nose.
Bumped start, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked on run 150M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Crowded start, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, wider turning in, showed limited response early in straight, eased final 300M. (See Racing Incidents.)

Shifted in at start and made contact, raced 2 wide better than midfield, angled out 500M, showed limited response early in straight, crowded near 250M, weakened gradually inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well, raced 2 wide in midfield, 4 lengths or so back, angled out 500M, finished off evenly.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress in straight.
Jumped well and showed good early speed to lead, travelled strong, kicked away in the Straight, won easing down, very impressive
Sat behind the leader, weakened in the Straight.
Sat last, held up top of the Straight, stayed on for 2nd.
Sat behind midfield, ran on nicely.
Settled towards the rear 2 wide, closed off okay.
Sat worse than midfield 2 wide, one pace when asked.
Settled midfield 2 wide, limited response when asked.
Sat on pace 2 wide, weakened final furlong.
