Broke well from the middle draw, took up running on rail 1200M out setting a sound pace, unable to sustain effort and swamped 150M out.
Jumped awkwardly losing ground, remained well back until sneaking up on rail passing the 900M, reached within 4L of pace in midfield rounding home bend but one-paced in straight.
Settled in midfield, slightly worse and wider into straight, ran on steadily under pressure near the centre of the track.
Ridden forward to prominent position 3-wide, tight between runners 1000M out drifting slightly backward home bend, ran on under pressure to gain upper hand close to home.

Soon taken back to last few from a poor draw travelling keenly off the rail, baulked for a run after straightening, persevered despite tight between runners and badly checked 70M out, never recovered. Jockey penalized.
Settled in midfield, drifted slightly further backward leaving the 1000M, gradually faded after straightening.

Broke well from a poor draw to vie for lead settling alongside leader 1200M out before drifted 1L back home bend, renewed effort to hold every chance early in straight despite bumped a few times, found no extra 150M out.
Held up some 2L off the pace 2-wide in 3rd or 4th, found no extra and faded inside final 250M.
Settled in last few dropping to last 700M out, ran on past beaten horses inside final 200M, never nearer.

Settled in forward of midfield on rail, gained slightly closer to within 3L of pace to 5th on rail home bend, did not find much behind runners the length of straight and hampered by checked runner 70M out.
Settled in better than midfield, tightened 1000M out, ran on under pressure to hit the front over 100M out only to caught shortly afterwards.
Settled wide behind midfield after beginning from a poor draw, steadied 1000M out drifting further back home bend to one from last into straight, ran past well-beaten horses closing stages.
Gradually taken backward to last from the widest draw, commenced move on home bend 700M out, ran on under pressure between runners in home straight to be nearest at finish.
Niggled at early settling some 2L back in 3rd on rail, baulked for a run until the 150M, finished off the race well.
Away well, up with early pace before settling down behind leaders, cruised to the lead early straight then kicked clear, continued on well final 200M for an authoritative win.

Quickly took up the lead, led fast first half of the race, soon headed on straightening, dropped away rapidly. (Jockey : his mount failed to respond to his riding in the Home Straight and raced in a disappointing manner.)
Pressed forward, settled outside the leader, soon outsprinted by winner on straightening, held 2nd to 150M, lost several places close home.
Taken back after the start, raced ungenerously early stages, swung wide for home before staying on mildly for non-threatening 4th.
Jumped only fairly, reserved at the back 5Ls off leader, held up briefly top of the straight before closing off well to go 2nd near 120M. Not reach runaway winner.
Bustled along to maintain a position in midfield, tried hard on straightening but lacked a big enough kick, faded late stages.
Settled down mid-division 3Ls off the pace, closed off steadily over final 400M. No threat to the runaway winner.
From draw 1 stayed close enough to leaders, raced keenly in the middle stages, in 3rd place passing 300M, outstayed by rivals final stages.
Away with them, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Fast into stride, tracked leaders on the inside, 2 wide on turn, took the lead early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Began well, raced 2 wide in midfield, wider turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened 250M, eased inside final furlong.
Taken back from gate 13, raced at tail, 9 lengths back in the middle stages, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home, no threat to the first few.
Average to begin, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 500M, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Bumped start, sent forward to race prominently, 2nd in the middle stages, challenged the leader from 500M, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Jumped awkwardly and bumped, raced 2 wide at rear, found rail near 750M, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, no clear run until final 75M, made no impression thereafter.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, 8 lengths back in the middle stages, finished off very strongly to be nearest on line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 3 wide turning in, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 150M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Jumped only fairly, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some headway in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well from the widest draw, sent forward to take the lead, challenged by rival turning in, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Taken back from gate 8, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide into straight, finished off well to take a place.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, a bit closer on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, failed to make any progress thereafter.
Jumped with them, raced in midfield on the outside, there to turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked on run 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Taken back from gate 11, raced 2 wide at rear, very wide into straight, made some progress in the run home.
Bumped on jumping, raced 2 wide behind midfield, wider turning in, failed to close off in straight. (Blood in trachea.)
Average to begin, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide from 600M, finished off very strongly to score.
Jumped awkwardly, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Jumped well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably in the middle stages, led by 1/2L turning in, peaked and headed 300M, weakened final furlong.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress in straight.
Moderately away from a wide draw, positioned 2 wide in midfield, angled out 500M, finished off well to take a place.
Jumped awkwardly and made contact with the right side of its barrier, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out 500M, made good progress in straight to make frame, no threat to the first few.
Quickly into stride, positioned a length behind the leader on the inside, 2 wide turning in, took the lead 300M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner final 50M.
Taken back to race 2 wide towards rear, commenced move after passing 550M, made some headway in straight.
Moderately away from the widest draw, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, peaked on run 500M, weakened final 300M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped shortly after start, raced towards rear on the inside, angled out 500M, finished off evenly.
Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Bumped shortly after start, raced towards rear on the outside, struggled from 600M, eased early in straight. (Lame left front leg.)
Made running. Very game when challenged by winner from 200m out and edged out only late on.
Raced in last place after hampered at start. Stayed on but never a threat to leaders. Ran out of room near line.
Held up. Short of room in rear and switched 300m out. Stayed on and never nearer.
Improved from mid-field to chase leaders from 300m out. No extra and lost ground final 100m.
Wide in rear. Stayed on home straight but unable to reach leaders.
Unable to quicken after tracking pace.
Tracked leader until weakening from 300m out.
Wide throughout from high draw. In rear off bend and little impression.
Under pressure off bend in mid-field and weakened.
Held up in rear and never nearer.
Raced in mid-field. Stayed on final 200m and not beaten far.
Raced in mid-field against rail. Under pressure from over 300m out and weakened final 150m.
Well placed tracking pace. Quickened to challenge 200m out and edged out runner-up after good duel.

Moderately away from a wide draw, raced prominently but trapped very wide in the early stages, 2 wide from 500M, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.) (Lame left front leg next day morning.)
Slightly slow out, raced 2 wide better than midfield, travelled keenly in the early stages, made contact near 550M, 2-3/4L back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Bumped shortly after start, taken back to race at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked on run 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 4 lengths back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Jumped well from a tricky draw, taken back to race behind midfield on the outside, very wide into straight, failed to make any progress in the run home.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, ran on evenly to take 2nd.

Moderately away from gate 1, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, angled out early in straight, finished off well to take a place without threatening.
Began well from a wide draw, raced prominently but trapped wide, dropped to midfield on turn, weakened early in straight when hard run took toll.
Jumped with them, raced 3 wide behind midfield, dropped towards rear 500M, 5 lengths back turning in, made minor progress in the run home.
Began smartly, tracked leaders on the inside, saved ground throughout, showed very good response in straight, took the lead 150M, kept on strongly to the line and scored. (Jockey dropped whip 100M.)
Bumped shortly after start, raced 3 wide better than midfield, made contact near 550M, dropped to midfield on turn, very wide into straight, kept on same pace in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside, 6-1/2L back turning in, made no impression in straight.
From wide draw pressed forward to track leaders, bumped near 600M and taken wider, hit the line well under top weight to be leading near 50M, held off runner up late.
Away well, tracked the pace on inside, moved up to 2nd spot early straight, battled on over final 200M but was out-finished late.
Crowded on jumping, went forward from a wide draw to be chasing leader, fought on well to the line, outpaced by first two final stages.
On jumping was crowded, checked near 1000M and shuffled back to near the rear, had some work to do top of straight, closed off steadily for 5th but posed little threat to first three.
Sped to the lead from draw 12, kept going well early straight, caught nearing 50M and faded to finish 4th.

From wide draw taken across behind runners, 7Ls behind leader on settling, closed off fairly on straightening, never a threat. (Jockey : did not travel well with the early stages being run inside of standard time.)
From draw 1 obtained a position ahead of midfield, raced keenly mid-stages, kept on same pace in the straight and was always held by leaders. (Jockey : made abnormal breathing noise during race.)
Settled down midfield, raced keenly in the middle stages, picked up fairly well final 300M, drove late and just missed.
Held up in midfield, driven wide into straight, kept on fairly to the line. Lay in closing stages and not ridden out to the finish.
Began fairly, reserved in second half of the field, bustled along home turn but lacked a finishing kick over final 300M.
Settled in back half of the field early stages, raced wide no cover and drifted back to last rounding the turn, already beaten top of straight.
Jumped only fairly, dropped back to last from wide draw, plenty to make up 400M but gave limited response only.
Ridden head to lead, raced two wide, slightly weakened inside 100M.
Sat behind midfield, traveled nicely, made good progress in the Straight, showed some dash inside 200M.
Settled behind midfield, traveled smoothly, minor progress made.
Sat in front of midfield, raced flat, failed to respond in the Straight (See Incident Report).
Sat rear, over-raced in the early stages, one pace to the finish.
Jumped only fairly, settled midfield, ran on evenly.
Sat rear, raced rear throughout, no impression.
Ridden along, shared the lead on the rail until 700M, kept on well to hold 2nd.
Settled behind midfield, raced wide throughout, no contention.
Settled handy, raced wide until 600M, raced tight over the concluding stages, closed off nicely.
Jumped only fairly, sat in front of midfield, ran on reasonably well.
Sat worse than midfield, making the first turn was checked, ran on fairly (See Incident Report).
Tracked pace three wide. Challenged and every chance 200m out but one paced final 100m.
Tracked pace and keen. Weakened 300m out.
Raced in mid-field. Came wide in home straight and strong run to lead 100m out.
Ridden early but unable to go forward and raced towards rear. Headway final 150m and never nearer.
Made headway wide from mid-field in back straight and chased leaders off final bend. No extra final 150m.
Headway from mid-field to chase leaders early in home straight. Weakened 150m out.
Held up and taken widest final bend. Finished off strongly final 150m to go close.
Made running. Headed 300m out but remained in contention until weakening final 100m.
Dropped in from high draw. Stayed on after brought wide final bend but never a threat.
Jinked right leaving stalls but recovered to track leading pair. Every chance from top of home straight but no extra final 50m.
Held up and never dangerous.
Pressed leader. Led under pressure 300m out until headed and no extra 100m out.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, there to turn, made good progress in straight without threatening. (Lame right front leg.)
Bumped start, raced towards rear on the inside, 5 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, inconvenienced near 100M, eased thereafter.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear, 6 lengths or so back, very wide into straight, made some progress in the run home.
Crowded start, raced 2 wide at rear, 7 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Jumped awkwardly, raced 3 wide with cover, 3 lengths or so back, there to turn, finished off well to take a place, nearest on line.
Bumped on jumping, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, difficult to settle in the early stages, 2-1/2L back turning in, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well from the widest draw, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weakened final 50M.
Bumped start, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground throughout, finished off well to take 2nd.
Shifted in at start and made contact, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, a length back turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked on run 150M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Bumped on jumping, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Taken back from gate 10, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, 4 lengths or so back, very wide into straight, finished off well to make frame without threatening.
Jumped well, raced in 3rd, 3 wide with no cover throughout, hard ridden after passing 300M, hit the front 150M, kept on very well to the line and scored. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well, ridden along to lead, kept on only fairly.
Sat just behind the leaders, hit the front at 200M, kept on, just got caught near the line.
Sat in front of midfield on the rail, one pace when asked.
Sat last, made some late ground.
Settled at the rear 2 wide, began to improve from the 600M, responded well under pressure, ran on well to score
Settled midfield 2 wide, made no impression.
Reared on jumping, settled behind midfield 2 wide, under pressure from 550M, stayed on.
Sat outside the leader, weakened final furlong. (See Incident Report)
Sat midfield on the rail, never a threat.
Sat towards the rear, eased down at 600M. (See Incident Report) (Performance unacceptable, must trial)
Sat near midfield 2 wide, limited response when asked.
Sat on pace 2 wide, hampered at the 150M and gave ground. (Bled and next day was lame left front)
Disputed early lead, shifted one-out-one-back rounding first bend for cover, came under pressure to challenge approaching home straight, failed to quicken to threaten and weakened inside final 150M.
Refused to settle in slow early tempo, yielded ground from home bend.
Shared early pace before gaining narrow lead on rail rounding first bend, kept on until swamped inside final 100M.

Made steady headway from the widest draw to reach 2nd onto first bend, alongside race leader into back straight, came under pressure home bend and given reminders 450M out, unable to sustain effort inside final 200M.
Settled well behind and waited with, went the widest into straight, ran on under pressure down the centre of the track and did best late.
Settled mainly in midfield over 3L back in 5th, came to challenge rounding home bend, kept on same pace without quickening under pressure in straight.
Settled in rear of midfield 3-wide without cover, commenced move over 800M out reaching 5th coming out of back straight, one of the widest turning in for home, one-paced under pressure

Niggled at after moderate start from a low draw, over 2L back in 4th rounding first bend, renewed pressure 800M out and given reminders, snuck up on rail home turn, fought on without threatening first two in straight.
Jumped fairly from a poor draw before settling well back and waited with, obtained a saloon passage on rail in straight, ran on well to take charge 100M out.
Travelled keenly behind runners in midfield on rail, given reminders over 400M out, inconvenienced over 200M out, ran home one-paced while hanging in.
Travelled keenly towards rear in 9th or 10th on rail, commenced move off the rail approaching final turn, bumped 200M out before running on well to be nearest at finish.

Settled well behind from a poor draw and waited with, gained two positions closer in 9th rounding first bend, made further headway to 8th over 800M out, unable to quicken under pressure after wide into home straight.

Reserved in second half of the field, got shuffled back to the rear over the home turn, lacked a finishing response on straightening. (Jockey : no explanation for the disappointing performance / No Vet findings.)
Away fast and led 1L on settling, tried hard passing 300m and maintained the lead until near 50M when winner battled past. Good effort.
Taken back from wide draw, settled near last early stages before moving closer to midfield passing 600M, wide into straight then drove hard to go 3rd near line.
Broke well, restrained to race behind midfield on settling, 4Ls to make up on leaders 400M, worked home steadily but always held by first few.
Slotted into a 3-wide position in midfield, worked into the race well passing 500M, let down well early straight and battled his way to the lead near 50M. Gamely prevailed.
Pressed on after the start to be chasing leader on outside, stayed in touch with leaders early straight but lacked a kick final stages and was safely held in the end.
Jumped fairly, settled at the back of the field, saved ground on the turn but showed no turn of foot on straightening. Never involved.
Jumped well enough from draw 1, chased leaders into straight, could not pick up well enough and just battled to the line.
Tracked leaders in 3rd place early, shuffled back passing 700M, failed to respond and drifted out of contention early straight.
Jumped awkwardly, settled towards the rear early stages, improved to midfield mid-race, came with a decent finish passing 300M to just miss 3rd in a tight photo finish.
Jumped on terms, caught racing wide without cover from draw 11, moved forward 550M to press leaders, fought hard to mid-straight but was overrun late.
A little slow to begin and ended up last on settling, raced keenly throughout the early and middle stages, swung wide into straight but the finishing response was only fair.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, angled out 350M, made good progress early in straight, peaked on run 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Taken back from gate 7, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, no clear run 200M, cleared after passing 150M, kept on evenly to the line.
Taken back from gate 12, raced 2 wide towards rear, there to turn, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Jumped well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, 8 lengths or so back turning in, taken wide in straight and finished off very strongly to take 2nd, nearest on line.
Moderately away, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out after passing 400M, finished off well to take a place.
Jumped well, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, there to turn, showed good response in straight, took the lead 150M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, challenged by rival turning in, headed early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Made contact at start, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover from 800M, a bit closer on turn, very wide into straight, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Made contact at start, sent forward to race in 2nd, challenged the leader turning in, took the lead early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear throughout, never a factor. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away well, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 wide from 850M, dropped towards rear 800M, 2 wide on turn, failed to close off in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began only fairly, raced at tail, 11 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home without threatening.
Taken back to race 2 wide towards rear, 3 wide from 500M, still 10 lengths or so back turning in, made good progress in straight to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Began well from a wide draw, raced in 3rd, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear, wider from 500M, 10 lengths back turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.
Out with rest, raced 2 wide behind midfield in the early stages, found rail near 900M, saved ground on turn, failed to close off in straight. (Mucus.) (See Racing Incidents.)

Made contact at start, sent forward to take the lead, enjoyed the easy lead in the middle stages, led by a length turning in, peaked and headed 200M, ran on same pace to take 2nd. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began smartly from gate 12, sent forward to race in 2nd, easy run to turn, hit the front 200M, kept on very well to the line, won easily.
Commenced well, raced in midfield on the inside, 7 lengths back, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually inside final 150M.
Made contact at start, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 850M, commenced move 400M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.

Began only fairly from a wide draw, trapped wide in midfield, a bit closer after entering the back straight, 6 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (Bled.) (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from gate 10, raced slightly behind midfield on outer, no cover from 900M, 8 lengths or so back turning in, kept on same pace in straight.
Began awkwardly and made contact, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Made contact at start, raced 3 wide behind midfield, 2 wide from 900M, commenced move 500M, 9 to 10 lengths back turning in, failed to make any progress in straight.
Settled well back, saved ground turning in for home, ran on between runners in straight to be nearest at finish.
Travelled wide in midfield to straight, soon weakened.
Settled towards rear in rail, snuck closer turning in for home, unable to sustain effort inside final 50M.
Settled at the back and waited with, did not get too much room early in straight, ran on well between runners inside final 200M to be nearest at finish. (Tactic questioned)
Always thereabouts, hit the front on straightening only to be caught close to home.
Settled mainly just over 2L off the pace, unable to sustain effort inside final 200M.
Settled in midfield, swung wider into straight and obtained a clear run shortly afterwards, fought on steadily without threatening.
Soon took up running and led until overhauled inside final 300M. (Tactic questioned)
Settled in last few, baulked until the 350M early in straight, fought on steadily.
Never better than midfield, very wide into straight, ran home one-paced.
Settled wide in last few, switched out for a run early in straight, ran on well inside final 250M.
Prominent and wide without cover to straight, folded up quickly.
Moderate start, settled in midfield, angled out for a clear run on straightening, ran on well to prevail close to home.
Close up on rail, baulked behind runners upon straightening, unable to sustain effort inside final 150M.
Joined the lead from 800M, weakened passing 200M, closed off okay (See Incident Report).
Tracked the leader, commenced to give ground rounding the Turn, one pace to the finish.
Sat worse than midfield, raced keenly, switched out rounding the Turn, made good ground over the concluding stages.
Sat midfield, traveled strongly, made good progress when asked.
Slow to jump, sat towards rear, no impression made.
Ridden along to lead, weakened in the Straight when asked (See Incident Report).
Sat in front of midfield, traveled okay, ran on evenly.
Settled rear, traveled smoothly, responded nicely inside 200M (See Incident Report).
Waited with in rear after sluggish start. Stayed on from 300m out and never nearer.
Fractious in stalls, slowly away and lost several lengths. Some headway into rear of main group of runners 400m out but unable to sustain.
Close up early. Lost position from halfway and dropped back through field.
Tight for room when under pressure in mid-field 200m out. One paced and unable to get on terms with leaders.
Stayed on from mid-field after switched off rail over 200m out.
Tracked leaders. Under pressure over 300m out and lost ground final 200m.
Raced prominently. Chased winner home from 300m out and held final 75m.
Raced towards rear of mid-field and no impression prior to weakening 200m out.
Struggling to hold position in mid-field by halfway and weakened.
Nudged along in rear and slightly adrift of main body of runners. Under firmer pressure 400m out and never dangerous.
Soon prominent. Led outright over 300m out and just pushed out late to score by clear margin.
Tracked pace towards outer. Weakened under pressure from 200m out.
Prominent on the outer until no extra final 100m.
Raced up with pace against rail until no extra final 200m.
Began only fairly and made contact, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Jumped only fairly, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, angled out after passing 600M, 3 to 4 lengths back turning in, finished off strongly, just beaten by a narrow margin.

Made contact with the right side of its barrier on jumping, sent forward to take the early lead, headed 1500M, 2nd in the middle stages, retook the lead 550M, kept on well in straight, just able to hold off the challenger.
Slowly away, recovered to race in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out early in straight, closed off well to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Began well, raced in 2nd early, positioned 3rd in the middle stages, hard ridden approaching 400M, kept on well early in straight, peaked on run 200M, ran on evenly to the line.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide towards rear, moved a bit closer after passing 800M, carried wider 600M, 6 lengths or so back turning in, made no impression in straight.
Made contact at start, raced better than midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 500M, kept on same pace in straight.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide in midfield, bumped and carried wider 1700M, found a 2 wide spot 1400M, 5 lengths back in the middle stages, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final furlong.
Made contact at start, raced at rear on the outside, very wide into straight, failed to make any progress in straight.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 6 lengths or so back turning in, made some headway in straight.
Shifted in at start and made contact, taken back to race towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made no progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)

Began well, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, angled out and bumped 1700M, sent forward 1650M, took the lead 1500M, led by 1L in the middle stages, peaked and headed 550M, weakened early in straight. (Roarer.)
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, there to turn, kept on evenly in straight.
Made contact at start, taken back to race at tail, 8 lengths or so back turning in, passed some tired runners in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well, showed good early speed to lead, weakened in the Straight. (See Incident Report) (Disappointing performance, must trial)
Caught 3 wide no cover midfield, gave ground in the Straight.
Sat worse than midfield on the rail, angled out in the Straight, showed a good dash, but run peaked final furlong.
Sat on pace 2 wide, weakened final furlong.
Sat last, stayed on fairly.
Sat midfield on the rail, closed off okay.
Jumped okay, settled midfield 2 wide, travelled strongly throughout, closed off well to score.
Settled towards the rear, stayed on despite traffic.
Sat worse than midfield 3 wide, made no ground.
Settled behind midfield 2 wide, made little impression. (lame left front due to an injury to left front fetlock)
Sat behind the leaders, weakened final 250M.
Sat in front of midfield 2 wide, ran home nicely, no threat to winner.
Settled towards the rear 3 wide, never a threat.
Settled at the rear on the rail, only able to pass weakened rivals.
Led or disputed lead on rail, kicked some 2L clear on straightening, caught late.
Prominent and wide to straight, unable to quicken to threaten.
Led or disputed lead to straight, folded up quickly inside final 250M. (Lame)
Well behind to straight, produced short-lived effort on rail early in straight.
Travelled better than midfield to straight, baulked briefly 300M out, soon found no extra.
Always well back and never seen with a chance.
Settled toward rear, ran on well in straight to be nearest at finish.
Well there 3-wide without cover, soon faded under pressure in straight.
Settled in rear of midfield, baulked and switched out for a run early in straight, produced good late impression.
Travelled 3-wide in midfield, ran on well down the centre of the track to prevail close to line.
Settled in midfield in rail, ran on in straight to reach 3rd briefly about 150M out.
Settled in last few to straight, ran on down the centre of the track to be nearest at finish.
Reared at start losing considerable ground, never a factor.
Chased leaders on rail to straight, unable to sustain effort inside final 200M.
Dropped back to last after the start, 8Ls off leader on settling, had big task in hand 400M, did best work late to go 4th near line.
Pressed leader on outside, fought hard to stay in contention early straight, no extra final 200M and faded away.
Jumped on terms, reserved near last 7Ls off the pace, had some work to do passing 400M, closed off nicely under confident riding, got up to beat the long time leader close home.
Away well to be tracking the pace, couldn't quicken enough in the straight. Posed no threat to leaders over final 200M.
Raced ahead of midfield 4th on settling, in touch with leaders home turn, finished off mildly over final 400M to claim 3rd.
From wide draw obtained a 2-wide spot in midfield, finished off moderately in the straight but was always held by leaders.
Sped to the lead and set fast early first 600M, still going well passing 400M, fought hard late but unable to hold off winner close home. (Lame next day.)
Not hurried after the start, settled in back half of the field 5Ls away , lay out home turn, driven inside 400M but found very little.
Slow to begin, bustled along to obtain a midfield spot along the fence, finished off fairly over final 300M, not beaten far but was always held by leaders.
Jumped with them, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the stands' side, hard ridden after passing 300M but only showed limited response, no clear run final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Fast into stride, sent forward to take the lead, found the stands' rail near 800M, headed after passing 500M, kept on well until approaching 150M, ran on evenly thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Out with rest, positioned a length behind the leader, nearer to the middle track, unable to maintain position 500M, weakened final 300M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began only fairly, raced at tail, 3 to 4 lengths back, made good progress after passing 400M, no clear run final 200M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, raced in midfield, 2 away from the stands' rail, made no progress final 400M.

Made contact with the right side of its barrier on jumping and lost ground, raced prominently, 2 away from the stands' rail, hard ridden from 350M but only showed limited response, weakened close home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away from gate 2, raced 2 lengths behind the leader on the middle track, made some progress after passing 400M, peaked on run 150M, weakened thereafter.
Jumped awkwardly, positioned a length behind the leader, 3 away from the stands' rail, peaked on run 400M, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began awkwardly, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the stands' rail, hard ridden after passing 300M, took the lead 200M, kept on very well to the line and scored.
Jumped with them, raced towards rear, 3 lengths or so back, moved a bit closer in the middle stages, hard ridden after passing 350M, finished off well without threatening.
Moderately away, raced prominently, nearer to the middle track, hard ridden from 300M, kept on well to take 2nd without threatening.
Jumped well, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead near 500M, peaked and headed 200M, weakened final 150M.
Bumped shortly after start, raced better than midfield on the outside, no cover throughout, showed limited response early in straight, crowded near 200M, weakened thereafter.
Shifted in at start and bumped heavily, raced 2 wide better than midfield, similar position on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M.
Bumped heavily on jumping, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Bumped on the hindquarters at the start and became unbalanced, raced in 2nd, 1/2L back turning in, took the lead 300M, peaked and headed 250M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked on run 200M, ran on evenly to the line.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Made contact at start, raced in midfield on the outside, there to turn, made good progress early in straight, no clear run final 150M, not able to test properly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from a wide draw, taken back to race behind midfield on the outside, 3 to 4 lengths back turning in, finished off well to take a place.
Began well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, peaked and headed 300M, weakened thereafter.
Began smartly from the widest draw, raced in 3rd, 3 wide turning in, hit the front 250M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner late.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the outside, 5 lengths or so back turning in, finished off very strongly to score.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear, 9 lengths or so back, still 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight.
Slightly slow out, raced at tail, 9 to 10 lengths back turning in, made very good progress in straight to make frame, nearest on line.
Made contact at start, raced behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, no clear run until final 100M, made no impression thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Dropped in from wide draw and raced in last position. Switched to the outer around the 300m mark and ran on well to the line to edge second.
Started well and disputed lead early before settled behind leader. Challenged and every chance 200m out before no extra.
One paced from mid-field and unable to challenge leaders.
Pushed along in rear from halfway. Kept going but never dangerous.
Tracked pace. Challenged at top of home straight but no extra and lost ground final 200m.
Tracked pace. No extra and held when short of room final 100m, eased.
Raced in rear of mid-field. Wide final turn and soon struggling.
Held up and never dangerous. Eased final 100m.
Keen towards rear early. Headway alongside placed horses from 300m out but no extra and flattened out late.
Chased leader. Led over 200m out before headed and weakened final 150m.
Stayed on from rear after widest into home straight but unable to get on terms with leaders.
Led outright after 300m and set good pace. Headed and weakened over 200m out.
Smooth headway into contention from mid-field 200m out. Driven ahead 100m out and kept going to score.
Raced in mid-field. Under pressure 600m out but sustained headway from top of home straight and not beaten far.
Began well, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, 3 wide turning in, kept on same pace in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)

Jumped only fairly and blundered shortly after the start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, found rail after passing 900M, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear run until final 100M, finished off strongly to score by a neck.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out 500M, 4 lengths or so back turning in, made little progress in straight.

Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 6 lengths or so back turning in, made some progress early in straight, peaked 100M, one-paced thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide into straight, one-paced in the run home.
Began smartly from a wide draw, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, no cover on turn, finished off evenly.
Away with them, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, a length back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length turning in, peaked and headed approaching 200M, weakened final 100M.
Average to begin, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, found rail 900M, saved ground on turn, took the lead approaching 200M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner close home.
Crowded start, raced at rear, 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Began fairly, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared 200M, kept on well to the line, bumped close home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Dropped in after slow start from wide draw. Still in rear off bend and never nearer.
Held up. Tight for room on a few occasions final 300m as he tried to improve and unable to be ridden out fully.
Improved from mid-field onto heels of leaders 200m out. Unable to sustain effort and no extra final 100m. Bumped 75m out.
Waited with in rear. Stayed on from 300m out but unable to reach leaders.
Involved in three-way battle for lead from wide draw. Weakened quickly 300m out.
Wide throughout and unable to get on terms from rear of mid-field.
Towards rear of mid-division. Stayed on final 250m, getting up for third close home.
Ran green in rear until headway final 150m.
Tracked leaders against rail and had to wait for a run over 300m out. Stayed on once clear but lacked pace to challenge.
In touch in mid-field. Switched for a run 300m out and stayed on well to lead late on.
Disputed lead with two others. Led off bend until headed and weakened 200m out.
Slowly away and raced in rear of mid-division. Unable to improve position under pressure from 400m out and never a threat.
Involved in three-way battle for lead. Did best of that trio and no extra only final 50m.
Tracked leaders. Led from 150m out until passed by winner late on.
Jumped only fairly, sat worse than midfield, held up in the early Straight, stayed on well to win.
Settled midfield, raced keenly, weakened after 250M, one pace to the finish.
Sat midfield, lay in in the Straight, no impression made.
Jumped only fairly, traveled fairly, was checked near the 300M when raced tight, finished off fairly.
Settled in front of midfield, lay in over the concluding stages, had every chance (See Incident Report).
Sat midfield, race keenly from 700M, held up entering the Straight, held up in the Straight, not fully tested.
Jumped only fairly, settled towards rear, switched out rounding the Turn, ran on okay.
Jumped only fairly, sat rear, made good ground inside 150M.
Chased the lead, traveled smoothly, kept on well.
Sat on pace, traveled fairly, failed to respond when asked (Substantial amount of mucus, See Incident Report).
Settled behind midfield, was crowded and checked near 350M, gave ground thereafter.

Ridden along to lead, weakened notably inside 300M, faded.

Dropped in from wide draw and never a threat.

One paced from mid-field and unable to improve position.
Made running and four lengths clear mid-race. Came back to field and headed 300m out. Weakened.
Tracked clear leader. Asserted after leading 200m out and cosy winner.

Headway from 400m out after racing in mid-field. Stayed on but unable to reach front two.
Recovered from slow start to take up mid-field position. Making little impression under pressure when short of room and steadied final 75m.
Stayed on from mid-field but lacked pace to challenge.
Pushed along turning into home straight after racing in touch. Stuck to task but one paced and unable to challenge leaders.

Jumped with them, raced 2 wide better than midfield early, inconvenienced near 1100M, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on rail in the middle stages, a bit closer turning in, kept on well in straight to take a place.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide at rear, there to turn, made minor progress in the run home.
Jumped well from gate 11, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, no cover from 1000M, moved closer on turn, 3 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Shifted in abruptly at start and bumped, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked on run 125M, weakened gradually close home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Out with rest, tracked leaders, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, slightly inconvenienced near 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Bumped on jumping, raced slightly better than midfield but trapped 3 wide early, 2 wide from 1000M, 3 to 4 lengths back turning in, made some progress early in straight, no clear run final 75M.
Bumped on jumping, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 5 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 300M, made some progress thereafter.
Moderately away, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, hard ridden after passing 350M, showed very good response, took the lead 75M, kept on strongly to the line.
Taken back from gate 13, raced at rear on the outside, 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, made minor progress in straight.

Clean jump, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, hard ridden from 400M, struck the running rail 300m becoming unbalanced, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner final 75M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Lifted front feet on jumping and away tardily, raced at rear on the inside, 7 lengths back turning in, made good progress early in straight, no clear run final 75M.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide behind midfield early, travelled keenly for some distance after passing 1000M, 3 wide from 900M, a bit closer on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Settled behind the two run away leaders, tracked up at the 500M, kept on fairly.
Sat towards the rear, under pressure from 800M, never a threat.
Tracked leader, kept on until weakened final 100M. (See Incident Report)
Jumped well and ridden along to lead, weakened final 75M.
Settled behind midfield 2 wide, held up early in the Straight, quickened up well once in the clear, won comfortably.
Not the quickest out, settled towards the rear 2 wide, stayed on.
Settled worse than midfield 2 wide, ran on evenly.
Settled at the rear on the rail, ran on nicely on the inside.
Jumped on terms, settled midfield on the rail, switched out at the 200M, closed off well for 2nd.
Sat in front of midfield on the rail, limited response when asked.
Settled in front of midfield 2 wide, made no impression
Soon took slender lead on rail after beginning from the 2 draw, joined by eventual runner-up rounding home bend before headed about 200M out, kept on under pressure for a placing.
Shared early pace before taken back to 1.5L 3rd onto home bend, renewed pressure after straightening for home but unable to quicken to threaten.
Broke well from the widest draw and gradually taken backward, towards rear 4-wide rounding home bend and one of the widest into straight, made no further impression.

Prominent early from a middle draw, gradually drifted backward towards midfield to joint 7th 3-wide, widest runner into home straight, one-paced under pressure.
Never far off travelling 3-wide without cover, in similar position into straight but could only produce moderate progress under pressure in closing stages.

Taken back from a poor draw for rails run, made swift progress thereafter reaching 8th some 6L back when baulked 700M out, angled out for a run 400M out but could only keep on at the same pace without quickening.
Began with others but soon dropped well behind whilst jockey lost the use of the iron. Ignore run.
Bumped on jumping, settled ahead of midfield in 5th, within touching distance passing 450M, driven hard to chase leaders, all out final 200M but was held.
Tracked leader on outside, kept going well early straight and maintained 2nd place inside 200M, had no extra final 100M losing several places near line.
Jumped on terms, stayed close to leaders in 4th spot, found another gear passing 300M, quickened to lead mid-straight and kept on well late stages to hold off 2nd and 3rd.
Not hurried early stages, improved to mid-division halfway, saved ground on inside throughout, ran home fairly over final 400M and not posing serious threat to leaders.
Jumped only fairly, settled down midfield 5-6Ls off the pace, just battled home over final 400M. Never looked like troubling leaders.

Jumped only fairly and obtained a position behind midfield, switched wide from 600M, buffeted for room 350M-250M and held up for clear running, couldn't make up ground late stages. (Blood in trachea.)

From wide draw elected to drop back, settled in last 10Ls off the good early pace, had some work to do top of straight, held up to 250M then finished off strongly to take 2nd. (Jockey questioned re his tactics.)
Chased leaders but couldn't sustain run passing 300M, soon drifted out of contention.
Began well from draw 1 before settling down 2-wide in a midfield position, angled out into clear passing 400M, worked home well but was always held by leaders.
Reserved behind midfield, caught wide no cover home turn, failed to close off the race passing 400M. (Jockey : raced in a disappointing manner.)
From draw 3 ended up racing 3-wide with no cover in midfield, failed to finish off in the straight. (Jockey : disadvantaged by racing wide and without cover for the majority of the race.)
Soon led, took them along at good pace first half of the race, had 1L advantage going into final 400M, headed nearing 200M, faded towards the line.
Taken back from wide draw, settled near last 9Ls off leader, made heavy contact with a rival between 350M to 200M then stayed on well enough final stages to just miss 4th.
Jumped with them, positioned 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 3 wide from 600M, kept on well early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Taken back to race towards rear on the inside, angled out approaching 500M, 5 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight.
Began well from gate 13, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably in the middle stages, kept on very well in straight, won by 1-1/2L.
Began only fairly, raced 2 wide behind midfield, similar position on turn, made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away well, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide after passing 600M, 2 lengths back turning in, no clear run in straight, not able to test properly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from the widest draw, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened final 100M.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the outside, slightly improved on turn, very wide into straight, closed off well to take a place.
Began well from a wide draw, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, kept on evenly in straight.
Slowly away, raced at rear on the outside, 6 to 7 lengths back turning in, weakened early in straight.
Jumped well, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, finished off well to take 2nd, no threat to the winner. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and made minor progress.

Moderately away from gate 1, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear run early in straight, cleared after passing 150M, made some progress thereafter.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide, 3 lengths or so back, 3 wide after passing 600M, 2-1/2L back turning in, unable to obtain clear run in straight.

Taken back from gate 9, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, 4Ls or so back, closer on turn, very wide into straight, made some progress early in straight, peaked 100M, ran on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from gate 9, raced towards rear, 3 wide, 5 lengths or so back turning in, made some progress in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.) (Blood in trachea.)
Made contact at start, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, hard ridden from 300M, took the lead 150M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner late.

Shifted out at start, raced better than midfield but trapped wide, travelled keenly from 1000M, moved closer on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.) (Lost right front plate.)
Shifted out at start and made contact, raced at tail, 7 to 8 lengths back turning in, made very good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Jumped well, in touch, 2 wide, there to turn, kept on same pace in straight.

Bumped on jumping, raced at rear on the inside, 7 lengths or so back, angled out 550M, showed very good response in straight, blocked near 150M, cleared 100M, finished off strongly to score by a neck, impressive debut.
Jumped awkwardly, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the outside, 5 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, made minor progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began smartly from a wide draw, positioned 3 wide, 2 lengths or so back, there to turn, finished off evenly.
Began only fairly and made contact, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced 3 wide behind midfield, there to turn, bumped 300M, ran on evenly to the line.
Knuckled over on jumping and became unbalanced, raced in midfield, easy run to turn, made good progress in straight to take a place, nearest on line.
Bounded on jumping and lost ground, raced towards rear, 2 wide, 5 lengths or so back turning in, made no impression in straight.
Held up. Some headway up rail from 400m out but run had flattened out when running out of room final 100m.
Tracked pace. No extra and lost ground final 200m.
Keen in rear early and waited with. Still plenty to do 400m out and never nearer.
Raced wide in rear and never a factor.
Held up. Headway from final bend and stayed on after briefly short of room 100m out.
Under pressure in mid-field from 500m out and soon weakened.
Keen in wide position and headway to chase leaders at halfway. Dropped back through field from 300m out.
Tracked pace. Quickened to lead 200m out and soon in command despite edging right, winning very readily.
Stayed on final 400m after held up but unable to reach leaders.
Across from wide draw to press leader. Weakened 200m out.
Made running. Headed by winner 200m out and weakened.
Wide into home straight after racing in rear. Some headway from 400m line but run flattened out.
Pushed along in mid-field from 400m out and little impression.
Raced in mid-field. No match for winner from 300m out but stayed on to take second final 100m.

Shifted in at start and made contact, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 wide from 600M, closer on turn, very wide into straight, made some progress early in straight, peaked 100M, ran on evenly to the line.

Moderately away, raced towards rear on the outside, sent forward after passing 700M, a length back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M. (Bled.) (Lame right front leg next day.)

Away with them, raced in 2nd early, 2 wide, allowed rival to cross 900M, sat 1-1/2L behind the leader in the middle stages, found rail approaching 650M, saved ground on turn, kept on well in straight to make frame.
Jumped only fairly, positioned 2 wide in midfield, commenced move after passing 600M, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Began well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, commenced move after passing 550M, 3 wide turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 50M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped awkwardly and made contact, raced at rear, 8 lengths or so back, a bit closer after passing 600M, very wide into straight, made no impression in the run home.
Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 600M, 2-1/2L back turning in, no clear run early in straight, cleared 150M, finished off strongly to score.
Jumped well from the widest draw, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first two close home.
Made contact shortly after start, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, taken wide in straight and made some progress.

Jumped well, raced better than midfield on the inside, dropped towards rear 650M, 3 lengths back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, eased final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.) (Blood in trachea.)
Average to begin, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide after passing 850M, angled out 400M, very wide into straight, finished off strongly to take 2nd, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Out with rest, raced better than midfield on the outside, moved closer after passing 1150M, 2nd in the middle stages, peaked early in straight, kept on same pace to the line.
Away in line, chased leaders along the 2-path, poised to strike 400M, quickened to lead mid-straight but couldn't hold off first two closing stages.
Taken back to a rearward position, swung widest for home and had plenty to do top of straight, stayed on well and just missed out on the 4th spot.
From wide draw taken back to last, about 8Ls to make up 400M, ran past well beaten horses only.
From draw 1 maintained a position ahead of midfield, close enough to leaders at 400M, kept on same pace in the straight. Never looked likely.
Fast away but soon restrained to race ahead of midfield, closed off well after moving into clear 300M, led nearing 100M and gamely held off runner up in a driving finish.
Jumped on terms, settled down in mid-division 3-4Ls back, swung wide for home before closing off the race fairly.
Jumped fairly, obtained a position behind midfield, swung wide passing 400M, kept on steadily to take 4th.
Away well, soon restrained to race towards the rear, wide into straight and failed to run on final 300M.

Briefly led passing 1000M then allowed rivals to cross when the pace was inside standard, couldn't go on passing 300M, soon weakened. (Jockey : his horse races best when being able to dictate the lead.)
Caught wide after jumping from draw 10, pressed forward and eventually joined leader on outside, battled on one paced early straight, no extra final 200M.
Raced keenly in the early stages, pressed forward to cross runners to his inside to avoid racing wide, held slim lead entering straight, soon no extra and dropped out to finish last.
Jumped fairly then taken across behind runners, settled in mid-division 4Ls off pace, closed off fairly well from top of straight but was always held by winner final 100M.
Sat towards rear, badly held up entering the Straight, finished off reasonably well (See Incident Report).
Bumped at the start, sat in front of midfield, traveled comfortably, switched out rounding the Turn, responded nicely to win.
Sat rear, traveled fairly, ran on evenly.
Jumped only fairly, sat towards rear, no impression made.
Ridden hard to lead until 800M, weakened making the Turn, gave ground quickly.
Settled midfield, raced wide and without cover throughout, weakened rounding the Turn (See Incident Report).
Bumped at the start, sat behind the lead, hung in under pressure, did not finish off (See Incident Report).
Sat in front of midfield, raced wide from 600M, one pace to the finish.
Sat behind midfield, under pressure from 500, held up near 200M, ran on nicely.
Chased the leader, crossed the lead from 550M and raced on the rail, gave ground notably in the Straight (See Incident Report).
Sat midfield, race keenly throughout, failed to respond in the Straight.
Settled worse than midfield, traveled strongly, held up near the 250M, lay in under pressure.
Held up last and taken widest final bend. Stayed on home straight but never a threat to leaders.
Raced in touch. Three wide in back straight/final bend. Stayed on home straight but lacked speed of winner.
Raced against rail throughout. Stayed on after headway from mid-field final bend but lacked speed to challenge.
Dropped away home straight after racing in mid-field and disappointing.
Waited with in rear. Quickened through between horses to challenge home straight and led final 50m, winning cosily.
Tracked clear leader. Unable to quicken under pressure from 400m out.
Dictated pace. Two lengths clear off final turn before run down by winner final 50m.
In touch in mid-field. Outpaced and lost place 400m out. Never dangerous after.
Away well, raced better than midfield on the outside, 1-1/2L back turning in, peaked on run 200M, short of room and eased close home.

Bumped on jumping, sent forward to race prominently on the inside, allowed rival to cross near 800M, sat right behind the leader in the middle stages, 2 wide from 350M, kept on well in straight to make frame without threatening.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced 2 wide in midfield, similar position on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, ran on evenly thereafter.
Began well from a wide draw, raced prominently on the outside, challenged the leader turning in, took the lead 300M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner final 25M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run in straight, not able to test properly.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced 2 wide at rear, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to take a place.
Jumped with them, raced towards rear on the outside, commenced move approaching 400M, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to score.
Moderately away, sent forward to take the lead, found rail near 800M, challenged by rival turning in, headed 300M, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, 6 lengths back turning in, taken wide in straight and finished off strongly to be nearest on line.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out 450M, 3-1/2L back turning in, one-paced in the run home. (Lame right front leg next day.)
Away with them, raced 3 wide in midfield, no cover on turn, commenced move 450M, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Sat last, minor headway late. (See Incident Report)
Sat on pace, weakened final furlong.
Sat midfield 2 wide, made no ground.
Showed good speed to lead, kept on fairly.
Settled midfield on the rail, angled out in the Straight, closed off nicely to score.
Settled at the rear, never a factor. (See Incident Report)
Sat behind midfield, stayed on nicely.
Settled worse than midfield 2 wide, made no impression.
Settled in front of midfield on the rail, only one pace when asked.
Settled near the rear 2 wide, switched out rounding the Home Turn, closed off okay.
Raced in front of midfield 2 wide, ran on evenly.
Tracked leader 2 wide, kept on well for 2nd.

Jumped fairly and sluggish early stages, improved under pressure to joint 8th some 5L back about 600M out, baulked for a run after straightening and until the 200M, quickened well to narrowly miss a placing.
Chased leader to straight, kept on in straight before folding up quickly inside final 100M.
Taken well back from a poor draw, obtained rails run over 800M out, raced keenly between 650M and 500M, obtained a clear run inside the 200M near the centre of the track, did best work late.
Taken back gradually from a poor draw, wide in last few rounding home bend and last into straight, made no further impression.
Ridden positively to soon take up running 3-wide, obtained rails run about 700M out, kicked some 3L clear about 150M out only to swamped closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly losing ground, recovered steadily in back straight to reach 8th some 5L back 3-wide onto home bend, responded well inside final 200M and did best work late.
Broke well from a middle draw and soon taken back to midfield, commenced move home bend reaching 3L 4th into straight, quickened well to asset authority 50M out.
Began well from a poor draw travelling better than midfield wide without cover, faded steadily after straightening.

Began well from the widest draw and gradually taken back reaching last 700M out, checked when keen behind runners 600M out, saved ground turning into home straight, made significant progress to snatch 3rd final strides.
Broke well before taken back towards rear, dropped to rear 600M out, made no impression from wide into straight.
Ridden along in midfield near the rail, inconvenienced behind runners about 600M out, snuck up on rail turning in for home, faded under pressure inside final 200M.
Ridden along the rail to be one back in 3rd on rail, in similar position into straight, faded steadily under pressure.
Quickly into stride, led early stages before easing back to 3rd, responded well under pressure in the straight, went 2nd inside 200M but couldn't hang on late. (Jockey : instructed to find cover.)
Slow out, settled in mid-division, 3Ls off leader 400M, checked 200M losing momentum, couldn't make up ground final stages.
Bumped on jumping, obtained a spot in midfield but raced wide no cover throughout, failed to run on from top of straight.
From a wide draw shifted across behind runners, raced near last 9-10Ls off pace, responded fairly passing 400M. No impression.
Jumped fairly, reserved in second half of the field 6Ls off pace, gave limited response on straightening. Never threatened.
Chased leaders in the 4th spot, driven passing 450M, battled on to take 4th in a close finish for the minor placings.
Led from 1400M and dictated the pace, kicked home strongly passing 300M soon opening up a comfortable lead, kept going well late and maintained that advantage to the line.
Jumped only fairly, maintained a position behind midfield, driven out 500M and came with a short-lived effort early straight, held ground final 200M. (Jockey reminded to ride out to the finish.)
Chased leader in a steadily run race, all out final 300M but not going the pace to challenge leader, lost 2nd inside 200M but rallied back to re-take 2nd spot near line.
Settled down midfield 5Ls off leader, raced keenly from 750M and raced wide no cover after, hung in in the home straight, not fully tested final stages but still managed to take 3rd.
Taken across from wide draw, reserved near last 8-9Ls back, swung wide for home, never going the pace to challenge.
From a wide draw shifted across behind runners, raced as the back-marker from 1200M, struggled to go with them home turn, soon beaten top of straight.

Average to begin, unable to slot in, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, very wide into straight, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Fast into stride, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first two late.
Crowded start, raced 2 wide at rear, travelled keenly in the early stages, steadied off heels 550M, found rail 400M, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Began only fairly from the widest draw, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, hampered near 550M, a length back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, crowded 500M, kept on well early in straight, crowded and no clear run close home.
Away with them, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 500M, unable to obtain clear run in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear, 8 lengths back, closer on turn, very wide into straight, made some progress late but set an impossible task.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear, commenced move 400M, 3 to 4 lengths back turning in, made little progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Out in line, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 wide from 450M, not enough room early in straight, made contact 200M, closed off well to take 2nd, just beaten by a head.
Slowly away, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and made some progress, no clear run 100M, cleared 50M, ran on well to the line.
Commenced well, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide from 500M, moved a bit closer on turn, kept on well in straight to make frame.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out 500M, 2 lengths or so back turning in, made contact 200M, finished off strongly, led final strides.
Out in line, raced 3 wide better than midfield, 1 to 2 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 7 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight.
Began well, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared approaching 100M, finished off evenly.
Average to begin, positioned 2-1/2L behind the leader, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Jumped well, took the early lead, headed 1050M, sat right behind the leader in the middle stages, retook the lead 250M, kept on well but unable to hold off the first two final 25M.
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced better than midfield on the outside early, took the lead 1050M, led by a length on turn, peaked and headed 250M, weakened final 100M.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, made good progress thereafter to take 2nd.

Taken back to race behind midfield on the outside, difficult to settle in the early and middle stages, 3 lengths back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Commenced well, raced prominently on the outside, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 200M.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, raced 2 wide towards rear, 6 lengths or so back, 3 wide from 700M, 4 lengths back turning in, finished off strongly to score by a neck.
Away with them, raced in midfield on outer, 2 lengths or so back turning in, made good progress early in straight, peaked on run 150M, weakened final 50M.
Began awkwardly, taken back to race towards rear on the inside, 2 wide from 700M, unable to obtain clear run until approaching final 100M, made some headway thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from gate 12, raced at rear on the outside, 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, made some progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken well behind from a poor draw, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, did not find much room in straight.
Well there from a poor draw travelling wide without cover, obtained 2-wide position onto home bend, unable to sustain effort and faded under pressure inside final 300M.
Jumped awkwardly losing ground, travelled 3-wide in rear of midfield gaining slightly closer home bend, went wider into straight and soon weakened.
Sluggish at start before ridden forward along the rail to midfield, gained slightly closer approaching home turn, unable to quicken under pressure to threaten.
Always in last few, one-paced under pressure in home straight.
Settled worse than midfield travelling keenly behind runners on home bend, baulked for a run early in straight and steadied 200M out, ran on under pressure and did best work late.
Settled just over 2L off the pace in 6th, became 5th 3-wide rounding home bend, fought on under pressure to reach 2nd 150M out, just held on narrowly for the placing.
Chased behind leaders early dropping to 2L 4th 1000M out, 3-wide into straight, fought on steadily but lost 3rd late.
Tailed-off to straight, made no show.
Close up, travelled keenly behind race leader rounding home bend, faded steadily under pressure upon straightening.
Settled 3-wide just worse than midfield, went widest and worse into straight, ran on well under pressure inside final 200M.
Settled mainly just better than midfield, baulked for a run early in straight until the 200M, ran on steadily without threatening.

Settled well back from a poor draw, made headway along the rail leaving the 1300M to reach 10th briefly 1000M out, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, soon weakened under pressure inside final 300M.
Ridden to soon take up running making all, driven clear over 200M out and never troubled.
Chased the leader, traveled smoothly, responded nicely when asked.
Crowded on jumping, sat rear, limited response when under pressure. (See Incident Report).
Jumped awkwardly, sat worse than midfield, no impression made.
Sat in front of midfield, slightly weakened from 250M, ran on fairly.
Settled midfield, failed to respond when asked, never a danger.
Settled worse than midfield, improved from 400M, closed off nicely.
Sat midfield, traveled nicely, ran on evenly.
Led on the stand's rail, traveled strongly, made good ground over the concluding stages.
Settled in front of midfield, raced greenly and gave ground from 350M, never a threat.
Sat worse than midfield, weakened notably from 250M, faded.
Stumbled on jumping, raced towards rear, failed to respond (See Incident Report).
Blundered badly on jumping, sat towards rear, raced keenly, finished off okay.
Sat handy, traveled fairly, gave ground inside 200M.
Tracked leader. No extra and lost ground final 150m.
Waited with after sluggish start. Stayed on final 200m without reaching leaders.
Raced wide in mid-field. Headway from 400m line to lead 100m out and stayed on to hold off runner-up.
Mid-field. One paced after coming under pressure 400m until staying on well final 100m to take third close home.
Chased pace from wide draw. Quickly dropped away final 200m.
Held up and keen. Last off bend and never out of rear.
Raced wide from highest draw. Headway to chase leaders into home straight. One paced final 200m.
No impression from mid-field. Briefly crowded and short of room 150m out.
Made running and a bit keen. Two lengths clear 200m out but headed and no extra final 100m.
In touch with leaders until weakening final 200m.
Raced in mid-field against rail. One paced under pressure and unable to improve position final 200m.
Keen in wide position in rear. Still wide as he chased winner home from 400m line and finished clear of rest.
Dropped in from wide draw. Hung right under pressure from final turn and never dangerous. Ran out of room final 50m.
Towards rear of mid-field and troubled passage towards rail in first half of home straight. Some headway final 150m but never a threat.
Jumped only fairly, raced in midfield on the outside, 2 to 3 lengths back turning in, made good progress early in straight, peaked 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Jumped with them, raced in midfield on the inside, angled out 600M, 3 lengths back turning in, unable to obtain clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, finished off evenly.

Began well from gate 1, tracked leaders on the inside, 2 wide from 550M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.) (Blood in trachea.) (Roarer.)
Began smartly, sent forward to race in 2nd, a length back turning in, peaked 300M, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began smartly from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, peaked and headed 200M, weakened final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Lifted front feet on jumping and away tardily, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out early in straight, finished off well to take a place. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began only fairly, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, angled out approaching 500M, made very good progress in straight to take 2nd.
Taken back to race behind midfield on the outside, 6 lengths back turning in, failed to close off in straight. (Lost right front plate.)
Slightly slow out, raced at tail, 8 to 9 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight.

Average to begin, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, showed good response in straight, hit the front 200M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Taken back from gate 9, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out 450M, failed to make any progress in straight.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside early, found rail near 750M, saved ground on turn, made some headway in straight.
Settled towards the rear, never a threat.
Sat midfield 3 wide, closed off fairly.
Settled towards the rear 3 wide, closed off nicely, just got ran down final stride.
Midfield on the rail, never quickened.
Showed good pace to lead, kept on until weakened final 50M.
Sat just behind the leaders, ran on evenly.
Sat last, stayed on well to score, impressive.
Midfield, fallen in the Straight.
Sat just off midfield 2 wide, ran on okay, best stride late.
Sat on pace 2 wide, kept on for 4th.
Sat in front of midfield 3 wide, weakened in the Straight.
Settled behind the leader, limited response in the Straight.
Soon taken back just worse than midfield, wide in last few into straight, ran on steadily down the centre of the track without threatening.
Settled in midfield after moderate start, made no impression in straight.
Soon recovered from slow start improving to 10th along the rail approaching first turn, switched out for a run entering straight, ran on steadily and did best work late.

Well there and wide in back straight from a poor draw, obtained 2-wide position alongside race leader 1000M out while travelling keenly, held every chance early in straight only to be over-shadowed over 200M out.
Taken well back from the widest draw, remained there throughout and never seen with a chance.
Prominent 3-wide without cover early, obtained one-out-one back position in 4th coming onto home bend, held some chance early in straight but unable to sustain effort inside final 300M.
Recovered quickly from moderate start for 3rd on rail, chased the leaders to straight, could only keep on at the same pace without quickening.
Soon took up running from the middle draw, obtained rails run in front 1000M out, joined by eventual runner-up into straight, soon weakened.
Settled in last few from a poor draw, last into the straight, ran on steadily near the centre of the track past well-beaten runners.
Settled in rear of midfield, unable to quicken under pressure in straight.
Trailed the field throughout after sluggish start despite niggling along.

Prominent and wide early from a poor draw, gradually taken back for cover in 5L 7th approaching first turn, angled wide for a run entering straight, quickened well to assert authority over 200M out, won convincingly.
Began well from a low draw settling just over 3L off pace in 5th or 6th on rail, chased leaders in similar position into straight, ran home one-paced.
Began well before gradually settling some 4L off the pace in 6th, tightened between runners 300M out, hung in and a difficult ride inside the 200M, fought on steadily for 3rd.
Dropped back to near the rear, held up for clear running 350M-100M, had too much to make up when in the clear final stages. Could do better.
Jumped only fairly, held up at the rear, raced keenly 600M and shifted out 3-wide, ran on without threat to leaders, run ended 100M from home.
Always in touch, in 3rd place turning for home, fought hard final 400M but was always held.
Jumped well, restrained to race in midfield, waited with along the inside, quickened well passing 250M, led 80M out and won going away.
