Chased leader, took over 350M, led until 80M, faded late and lost 2nd near line.
Settled down behind midfield, moved to a striking position 400M, fought on fairly well to go 2nd close home but not able to challenge winner.
Taken back to near the rear, last turning for home but failed to run on.
Pressed forward and crossed to the lead passing 900M, headed 350M, soon no extra and weakened to last.
Made contact shortly after start, raced 2 wide towards rear, 8 lengths or so back turning in, made no progress in straight.

Bumped start and unbalanced, taken back to race at rear on the outside early, found rail 900M, angled out 550M, not enough room early in straight, peaked on run 200M, hampered by the fallers approaching 150M, eased final 100M.
Average to begin, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off well to take a place.
Crowded on jumping, taken back to race at rear on the outside, 8 to 9 lengths back, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home, no threat to the first few.
Out with rest, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, 3 wide from 650M, peaked early in straight, hampered by faller approaching 150M, weakened gradually thereafter.

Bumped start, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 600M, no clear run early in straight, cleared 300M, kept on evenly until went amiss in the left front leg and fell approaching 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well, raced 3 wide in midfield, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M, hampered by the fallers approaching 150M, quickly pulled up.
Made contact at start, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, travelled well to turn, finished off well to score, won by 3/4L.
Away with them, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear, 7 lengths back turning in, made some progress in straight.

Made contact shortly after start, positioned 6Ls behind the leader on the inside, angled out 550M, 4-5Ls back turning in, made some progress early in straight, brought down by fallers approaching 150M. (Lame left front leg next day.)
Moderately away from the widest draw, raced behind midfield on the outside, 7 lengths back turning in, finished off evenly.
Made contact at start, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably in the middle stages, led by 1-1/2L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 50M.

Bumped start, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out after passing 600M, 3 lengths back turning in, made some progress early in straight, peaked 200M, brought down by faller approaching 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out 550M, very wide into straight, showed limited response early in straight, hampered by the fallers approaching 150M, one-paced thereafter.
Jumped with them, raced 3 wide slightly better than midfield, found rail 900M, sat right behind the leader on turn, kept on same pace in straight.
Began only fairly, positioned 2 wide, 4 lengths back, inconvenienced near 900M, same margin back on turn, no clear run early in straight, made minor progress thereafter.
Bumped start, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first two final 50M.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide in 3rd, 3 wide from 600M, hard ridden from 250M, showed very good response, took the lead 50M, kept on well to the line and scored.

Began only fairly from gate 1, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, inconvenienced near 900M, 3 lengths back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, ran on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.) (Roarer.)
Jumped awkwardly and made contact, raced 3 wide towards rear, moved a bit closer in the middle stages, carried wider 500M, kept on well in straight to make frame.
Out with rest, raced 3 wide in midfield early, 2 wide on turn, angled out 500M, unable to obtain clear run until final 100M, finished off strongly to take 2nd, nearest on line.
Away with them, raced 3 wide behind midfield early, inconvenienced and dropped towards rear 900M, crowded 800M, 5 lengths back on turn, made little progress in straight.
Crowded start, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, 1/2L back turning in, kept on evenly in straight.
Taken back from gate 11, raced behind midfield on the outside, dropped towards rear 700M, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, made minor progress in the run home.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and made good progress to be nearest on line.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 6 lengths or so back, still last turning in, made no progress in straight.
Tracked pace. Briefly short of room against rail 300m out before weakening. Eased final 50m.
Held up. Some headway early part of home straight but never dangerous.
Raced three wide in mid-field. Chased leaders off bend before weakening final 200m.
Raced in a clear lead and set good pace. Came back to field bend. Headed 300m out and weakened final 150m.
Never out of rear.
Chased clear leader. Led 300m out but headed and no extra as front two went clear final 100m.
Quickened through from mid-field to challenge 150m out and went clear with rival, shifting out and bumping that one after edging ahead final 50m. Finished first, placed second.
Keen under restraint in rear and last off bend. Some headway out wide but flattened out and no further impression final 150m.
Tracked pace. Well placed but no extra from 200m line and faded.
Improved from mid-field to challenge 200m out and went clear with rival final 75m, bumped and unbalanced closing stages. Finished second, placed first.
Three wide in mid-field. Struggling from top of home straight and dropped away. Bled.
Towards rear of mid-field. Had to angle out for a run over 200m out and finished off well.
Dropped in from wide draw. Troubled passage between 400m and 200m. Stayed on well.
Slow to commence and towards rear of mid-field. Dropped away final 300m and well beaten.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, dropped towards rear 600M, 7 lengths back turning in, made no progress in straight.
Slowly away, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M.
Crowded shortly after start, positioned 2 wide, 3 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, finished off very strongly to score.
Crowded shortly after start, raced in 2nd, travelled well to turn, hard ridden approaching 300M, kept on well early in straight, peaked on run 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Moderately away, showed no early speed, raced at tail, 13 lengths back turning in, eased early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out 400M, finished off well to take 2nd.
Out in line, raced behind midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, 8 lengths or so back turning in, failed to make any progress in straight.
Out with rest, raced in midfield on the outside, 6 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame.
Began well from a wide draw, raced better than midfield on the outside, no cover throughout, 2-1/4L back turning in, kept on evenly in straight.

Quickly into stride, sent forward to take the lead, led by 2 lengths turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.) (Lame left front leg.)
Crowded shortly after start, raced at rear throughout, never a factor. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from the widest draw, raced towards rear on the outside, 6 lengths or so back, found rail near 550M, same margin back turning in, made some headway in straight.
Soon outpaced in rear and detached. Never out of last place.
Started well and across to press leader from high draw. Led 350m out and drew five lengths clear. Closed down by runner-up final 50m but always holding on.
Pressed in front and passed by winner at top of home straight. Dropped right away final 200m.
Driven along from stalls to take up mid-field position. One paced home straight and never a threat to leaders.
Three wide in prominent position. Pushed along off bend and weakened 200m out.
Tracked pace. Weakened over 200m out.
Stayed on at the same pace after racing touch with leaders. Run out of third close home.
Chased leaders into home straight after racing in touch. Stayed on to take third close home but front two well clear.
Held up and pushed along from an early stage. Never dangerous.
Raced wide in rear from high draw and never a factor.
Slow to commence and driven along. Some progress from rear home straight but never dangerous.
Headway from mid-field off bend and moved into second over 100m out after winner had gone clear. Closed on that rival final 50m and well clear of rest.
Settled midfield, failed to respond when placed under pressure (See incident report).
Sat handy, raced on the rail, traveled fairly, one pace to the finish.
Sat towards rear, improved rounding the Turn, made good progress in the Straight, stayed on well.
Settled in front of midfield, traveled smoothly, responded nicely when asked.
Ridden hard to lead from 800M, traveled fairly, weakened notably inside 150M.
Sat handy, raced wide and without cover, minor progress made in the Straight.
Sat behind the lead, traveled okay, made steady progress over the concluding stages.
Jumped only fairly, sat towards rear, no contention.
Settled worse than midfield, traveled only fairly, never a threat.
Settled in front of midfield, made the Turn wide, gave ground quickly inside 200M. (See Incident Report).
Jumped only fairly, raced rear, limited response when asked.
Jumped only fairly, sat worse than midfield, ran on evenly.
Tracked pace. Moved to front off final bend. Headed 200m out and no extra.
Bounded and jinked left as stalls opened and unseated rider (see Racing Incident Report).
Some headway from mid-field final bend but soon little impression and dropped away over 200m out.
Chased leader. Under pressure back straight and quickly lost place final bend. Dropped away and eased.
Raced in last pair after slowly away and hampered by loose horse. Driven to make headway wide final bend. Stayed on but never dangerous.
Raced in touch with leaders in mid-field. Smooth headway to lead 200m out and asserted readily under largely hands and heels.
Soon across to race prominently from high draw and led outright after 500m. Challenged and headed entering home straight. Weakened final 300m.
Held up. Limited headway after driven over 400m out and well held final 200m.
Tracked pace against rail. Under pressure from 700m out. In trouble and lost place final bend. Well beaten.
Mid-field. Unable to improve position under pressure from 400m out and weakened final 200m.
Dropped out from wide draw. Struggling 400m out and never a factor.
Towards rear of mid-field after slow start. Stayed on from top of home of home straight but never a threat to leaders.
Started awkwardly and unseated rider (see Racing Incident Report).
Mid-field before headway three wide to chase leaders final bend. Unable to match winner final 200m but stayed on for second.

Slightly slow to stride, raced 4 wide slightly behind midfield, inconvenienced near 700M, dropped towards rear on turn, bumped near 500M, very wide into straight, weakened early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start and unbalanced, sent forward to take the early lead, headed approaching 800M, 2nd in the middle stages, peaked 500M, weakened final 300M. (Lost left front plate.)
Evenly away, raced towards rear on the inside, angled out and moved a bit closer approaching 600M, 6 lengths or so back turning in, made no impression in straight.
Began only fairly from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Jumped well, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths back, same margin back on turn, finished off evenly.
Average to begin, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead approaching 800M, led by 1-1/4L turning in, peaked and headed near 300M, weakened thereafter.
Moderately away from the widest draw, taken back to race at rear on the outside, inconvenienced 600M, still well back on turn, made very good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Commenced well, raced prominently on the outside early, slightly taken back 900M, raced 3 wide better than midfield on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening.
Bumped start, positioned 2 to 3 wide, a length or so back, found rail after passing 700M, saved ground on turn, hit the front 300M, kept on very well, easily scored.

Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the outside, inconvenienced near 650M, 7 to 8 lengths back turning in, made very good progress in straight to take 2nd, nearest on line. (See Racing Incidents.)

Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, raced 3 wide slightly behind midfield, inconvenienced and lost position near 700M, bumped 500M, very wide turning in, showed nothing in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well from a wide draw, trapped very wide in midfield, 4-1/2Ls back turning in, kept on same pace in straight.
Sat on pace 2 wide, closed off nicely, had every chance.
Settled worse than midfield 3 wide, weakened in the Straight. (Unacceptable performance, must trial)
Sat towards the rear, never a threat. (Unacceptable performance, must trial)
Jumped well and showed good speed to lead, headed at 300M, fought gamely and won drawing away.
Raced behind midfield 2 wide, weakened final furlong.
Sat in front of midfield on the rail, made no impression.
Sat behind the leaders, one pace when asked.
Settled midfield on the rail, limited response in the Straight.
Caught very wide throughout, midfield, gave ground from 500M. (Unacceptable performance, must trial) ( See Incident Report)
Sat midfield 2 wide, under pressure from 700M, soon weakened and gave ground. (Unacceptable performance, must trial) ( See Incident Report)
At rear, never in contention. (Unacceptable performance, must trial)
Settled near the rear on the rail, made some ground.
Tracked leader, kept on okay, nothing extra final furlong.
Settled towards the rear 3 wide, stayed on fairly.
Settled well behind from a poor draw, trailed the field into straight, made no further impression.
Settled within 3L of pace in 6th after moderate start, became 7th in a similar position 850M out, closer to pace when tempo slackened approaching home turn, found on extra in straight.
Began well from the widest draw of 9 before taken over 3L back to 7th, commenced move inside the 750M joining race leaders on top of home bend but run ended shortly after straightening.

Ridden forward to share pace 3-wide after moderate start, remained similar rounding home bend gaining narrow advantage into straight, kicked some 1L clear over 150M out only to be caught final strides.
Given reminders after sluggish start settling some 4L back in 8th on rail, commenced move rounding home bend and the widest into straight, ran on dourly under pressure to just get up on line.
Well there to home straight, folded up quickly. (Irregular heart rhythm) (Lame next day)

Well there early stages before taken one back close to the rail, carried backward by tiring race leaders approaching final turn, switched out for a run entering the straight 400M out, fought on steadily without threatening.
Ridden along among race leaders early stages before drifting over 1L back 4-wide, renewed effort to dispute lead into straight but unable to sustain effort shortly afterwards.
Began well from the one draw leading or disputing lead under pressure, unable to sustain effort over 500M out and weakened noticeably in straight.
Chased leader, fought hard under top weight passing 300M, briefly reached the lead 100M but was out-finished by first three closing stages.
Settled down 3-wide behind mid-division, switched wider home turn, finished off strongly down the outside and got the better of the runner up closing stages.
From draw 12 caught racing wide no cover in midfield, came under serious pressure 600M, soon weakened and finished tailed out. Unacceptable Performance.
Settled ahead of midfield, in 4th spot 600M, closed off nicely on straightening, just failed to hold off winner in a driving finish.
Chased leaders in 3rd but found disappointingly little on straightening, dropped away rapidly mid-straight. (Jockey : resented the kickback and did not fully stretch out.)
Fast into stride and soon crossed to the lead, had 2Ls advantage top of the straight but run ended passing 150M and faded away.
Jumped awkwardly, did not show early pace and ended up detached last, over 10Ls to make up 400M but failed to run on. (Jockey : did not appreciate racing on the "Wet Slow" track conditions.)
Jumped only fairly, recovered to race behind midfield, 6Ls to make up 400M but gave limited response only. Not reach leaders.
Jumped only fairly, settled down behind midfield 5Ls back, ran home same pace over final 400M. Posed no threat to leaders.
Not hurried early stages, settled near last 10Ls off the pace, already beaten top of the straight. (Jockey : did not appreciate racing on the "Wet Slow" track conditions.)
From draw 1 obtained a midfield position along the fence, quickened up 300M and ran on well for 3rd.

Began smartly, sent forward to take the early lead, headed 1050M, allowed rival to cross 850M, sat 1-2Ls behind the leader in the middle stages, angled out 550M, 3w turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Crowded on jumping, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, commenced move 550M, 4 lengths back turning in, finished off well to make frame without threatening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well, raced prominently, 2 wide, took the lead 1050M, found rail 850M, led by 3/4L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first two final 100M.
Slowly away, raced at tail, 10 lengths or so back, slightly improved on turn, made some progress in straight.
Began well, raced 3 wide better than midfield, carried wider 450M, showed good response in straight, took the lead approaching 100M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, hard ridden after passing 500M but only showed limited response, weakened gradually in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made contact at start, raced behind midfield on the inside, 5 lengths or so back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, 3-1/2L back turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Evenly away from a wide draw, unable to slot in, trapped wide in midfield, no cover throughout, weakened from 450M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside, 7 lengths back turning in, made very good progress in straight to take 2nd, nearest on line.
Began fairly from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the outside, slightly improved on turn, very wide into straight, made some headway in the run home.
Jumped with them, raced prominently but 3 wide in the early stages, 2 wide from 900M, 3/4L back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, unable to maintain position after passing 800M, emptied 500M, eased early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 10 lengths or so back, still well back on turn, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, angled out 450M, finished off well to take a place.
Taken back from gate 10, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear, commenced move 500M, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide at rear, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Moderately away, raced in midfield on the outside, travelled keenly in the early stages, no cover for the majority of the race, peaked 500M, weakened early in straight.
Bumped on jumping, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared after passing 300M, made minor progress thereafter.
Began smartly, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, angled out 550M, hit the front 300M, kept on very well to the line and scored.
Slightly slow out, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped with them, positioned 3 wide in midfield, no cover from 800M, carried wider 550M, made some progress early in straight, peaked on run 150M, weakened gradually close home.
Jumped well from gate 12, sent forward to race prominently on the inside, allowed rival to cross near 800M, sat right behind the leader on turn, no clear run in straight, eased final 100M.
Bumped start, raced better than midfield on the outside, moved closer after passing 1000M, shared lead on turn, peaked and headed 300M, weakened inside final furlong.

Began well from a wide draw, sent forward to race prominently, 2 wide, took the lead approaching 1200M, found rail near 800M, shared lead with rival on turn, peaked and headed 300M, weakened final 200M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped on jumping, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, there to turn, no clear run early in straight, made good progress thereafter to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Began well from the widest draw, raced prominently, 3 wide, slightly taken back after passing 1200M, 1 out 1 back from 900M, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Not far off from leaders but caught racing 3-wide without cover, dropped out of contention passing 300M, soon weakened to last. (No Vet findings.)
Away with them, moved forward to be vying the lead on inside, no extra 300M and weakened rapidly.
Vied for early lead before easing off to sit behind the pace, worked into the race well 300M, quickened to the lead near 100M before holding off a strong challenge late stages.
Jumped only fairly, caught racing 3-wide towards the rear, wide into straight before running on mildly for a non-threatening 6th.
Jumped on terms, obtained a position ahead of midfield never far off from leaders, responded well when asked on straightening, charged at winner late, just held.
Fast away, restrained to a midfield position, raced keenly in the middle stages, 4Ls off leader 400M, stayed on without troubling first few.
Pressed forward from wide draw to be vying for lead on the outside, took over 350M, kept on well and only gave way to first two 100M. Promising debut.
Began fairly, settled near last 6Ls back, had plenty to do top of straight, failed to make any progress.
Jumped only fairly, settled near last and not hurried early stages, had some work to do 400M, made some progress without posing threat to leaders.
Jumped awkwardly, held up in mid-division along the fence, failed to run on in the straight. Never threatened.
Jumped fairly, from wide draw switched off to last 7-8Ls off the pace, had task in hand 400M then closed off best to take 4th.
From draw 1 moved up to track leaders on inside, couldn't sustain run from 200M, weakened towards the line.
Chased the leader, traveled nicely, switched out and improved rounding the Turn, made good ground under whip.
Sat in front of midfield, traveled smoothly, kept on well to hold 2nd.
Settled behind midfield, traveled only fairly, failed to respond when asked.
Settled midfield, limited response when asked, never a threat.
Sat rear, raced rear, made some progress when asked.
Jumped only fairly, settled behind midfield, raced keenly in the early and middle stages, weakened inside 250M.
Sat handy, traveled okay, slightly weakened passing 200M, closed off reasonably well.
Bumped at the start, settled towards rear, made the Turn wide, one pace to the finish.
Settled midfield, raced on the rail, no impression made.
Jumped only fairly, settled in front of midfield, directed out to obtain clear run in the Straight, made good progress inside 200M.
Bumped at the start, ridden along to lead, raced keenly, weakened from 250M (See Incident Report, Disappointing Performance, Must BT).
Sat towards rear, raced on the rail, very minor progress made.
Travelled well. Smooth headway from mid-field to lead 200m out and ran on strongly to assert.
Across from widest draw to lead and two lengths clear at halfway. Came back to field and headed 300m out. Weakened.
Keen early from wide draw and chased leader. Weakened 200m out.
Tracked pace. Raced in restricted room final 200m and unable to quicken.
Held up. Pushed along in last place at top of home straight and never out of rear.
Towards rear of mid-field before headway out wide on bend. Outpaced by front two 300m out. Stayed on well late.
Keen in mid-field and no impression.
Raced in mid-field. Angled out to chase winner from 300m out. Held by that rival final 100m and just held onto second.
Waited with towards rear. Stayed on down the outside without reaching leaders.
No impression from rear after held up.
Towards rear after slow start. Pushed along from halfway and well held home straight.
Tracked pace. Ridden from halfway and one paced.
Slow start from wide draw and held up. Some headway into mid-field but never a threat.
Chased leader three wide. Every chance 200m out. No extra.
Taken back from gate 9, raced 3 wide towards rear early, 2 wide approaching 800M, 6 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame.

Shifted out at start and made contact, raced in midfield on the inside, angled out approaching 450M, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, closed off well to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Began well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, difficult to settle in the early and middle stages, angled out 500M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Made contact at start, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, no clear run final 100M.
Average to begin, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, kept on well early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Commenced well, raced prominently, 2 wide, slightly taken back 1050M, 2 lengths back in the middle stages, finished off well to take 2nd, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Began smartly from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, hard ridden from 250M, kept on well to hold off the challenger late.
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced in midfield, 4 lengths or so back turning in, one-paced in the run home.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, raced behind midfield on the outside, 6 lengths back turning in, made no progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made contact with the right side of its barrier on jumping, raced towards rear, 2 wide, unable to maintain position after passing 900M, emptied 550M, eased 500M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well from a wide draw, sent forward to race prominently but 3 wide, 2 wide on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear, 10 lengths back, a bit closer on turn but still 7 to 8 lengths behind, taken wide in straight and made minor progress.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some headway in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, 8 lengths or so back turning in, made very good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Settled midfield 2 wide, limited response when asked.
Sat outside the leader, one pace when asked
Settled midfield 3 wide, ran on nicely.
Sat on pace, kept on okay.
Led, weakened and faded in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
Caught wide on pace early, weakened in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
Sat in front of midfield 3 wide, hit the front at 200M, nothing extra final 50M. (See Incident Report)
Settled midfield on the rail, held up until final furlong, made some ground.
Sat at the rear, closed off nicely, just missed.
Not the quickest out, sat last, stayed on well to score.
Raced very wide on pace, under pressure from 600M, soon gave ground. (See Incident Report) (Performance unacceptable, must trial)
Settled worse than midfield on the rail, no clear run until 250M, stayed on late.
Sat just behind the leaders, unable to quickened. (See Incident Report)
Sat midfield on the rail early, moved to 3 wide rounding the Home Turn, made no impression. (See Incident Report)
Jumped fairly from a poor draw, wide without cover in midfield early stages, eventually found cover in last few approaching home bend, switched out to challenge entering straight but soon weakened.
Broke well to soon take up running on rail holding narrow advantage, went some 1L clear from 1100M out but joined into straight and narrowly headed 300M out, plugged on for 3rd.

Soon taken back from the widest draw for rails run, made steady headway to share 7th just over 5L back onto first bend, snuck closer on the inside turning in for home, unable to quicken under pressure in straight.

Prominent and wide early from a poor draw, taken back for cover in last few leaving the 1600M, switched widest in last entering straight, finished off the race well inside final 250M and did best work late.
Began awkwardly losing ground, 3-wide just worse than midfield travelling keenly most of way, kept on same pace under pressure without quickening in straight.
Soon taken back to last few, saved ground on inside turning in for home, fought on steadily under pressure without threatening,
Taken well back from a poor draw, trailed the field off the rail, commenced move 4-wide rounding home bend sharing 6th some 3L back into straight, fought on under pressure without threatening.
Gradually settled in midfield on rail some 4L off the pace, saved ground turning in for home, produced good late impression inside final 100M.
Began fairly, improved to join race leader passing the 1600M, drifted some 1L back onto home bend, renewed effort entering straight and hit the front 300M out, just held on to the line.
Jumped fairly before picking up along the rail for 3rd some 2L back, switched out for a run on straightening and ran on under pressure to just fail to peg back the winner.
Broke well from a poor draw, travelled wide without cover most of the way despite shifting steadily back from prominent position onto midfield, inconvenienced early in straight and then weakened.
Travelled keenly in first few, just over 2L back in 4th rounding home bend, soon faded in straight.
Jumped awkwardly and crowded, worse than midfield racing keenly most of the way in back straight, baulked for a run after straightening until the 350M, ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Travelled in forward of midfield racing keenly around home bend from 1200M out, one-paced under pressure in home straight.
Taken back from wide draw, settled near last 8Ls off leader, had some work to do top of straight, made some progress but never looked likely.
Quickly into stride and soon took up running, kept going well early straight, headed 150M then faded to 4th.

Settled towards the rear with cover 6Ls back, 3-wide throughout, picked up strongly passing 400M, hit the front 70M out and gamely held on from runner-up in a driving finish. (Trainer questioned re improved performance.)
Jumped only fairly, raced towards the rear 6Ls off pace, closed off well final 300M, threw everything at the winner late stages, just missed.
Ridden along early, settled ahead of midfield but slightly further back than anticipate, failed to finish off on straightening.
Away in line then moved up to a spot not far from leaders, kept on same pace early straight, weakened 200M from home.
Obtained a position behind midfield, 4Ls to make up top of straight, lay in 400-300M then finished off the race fairly well for 3rd without matching for the first two.
Switched off to race at the rear, 6Ls off pace at 400M, came with a moderate finish only and couldn't reach contention.
Raced keenly in the early stages, moved forward approaching the turn to be tracking leaders, fought well to go 3rd mid-straight but couldn't sustain run over final 150M.
Jumped only fairly, recovered to race in mid-division, saved ground on inside, kept on steadily final 300M but never able to challenge leaders.
Bumped on jumping, moved forward gradually to be racing outside leader, weakened passing 300M and dropped away to finish last.
Bumped on jumping, settled down midfield 4Ls back, came with a promising looking run early straight, briefly in front 150M but run ended soon and lost several places near line.
Shifted across behind runners and dropped back to last 8-9Ls off the pace, little change in position home turn, brought wide on straightening but closed off only fairly. (Blood in trachea.)
Moved up to be tracking leaders, in 3rd place top of straight, couldn't keep up 200M and faded away.
Bumped shortly after start, raced prominently, 2 away from the stands' rail, hard ridden after passing 400M but only showed limited response, bumped approaching 200M, weakened thereafter.
Made contact at start, raced behind midfield on the middle track, failed to make any progress final 400M.
Jumped well from gate 14, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length at 400M, peaked and headed near 200M, weakened final 100M.
Jumped awkwardly, raced towards rear, 2 away from the stands' rail, made minor progress final 400M.
Made contact at start, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Made contact shortly after start, raced in midfield on the middle track, hard ridden approaching 300M, finished off well to take 2nd.
Taken back to race towards rear on the stands' side, a bit closer in the middle stages, unable to obtain clear run until approaching 200M, finished off very strongly to score.
Made contact shortly after start, positioned a length behind the leader on the middle stages, hard ridden after passing 400M, closed off well to take a place.
Made contact shortly after start, raced prominently, hard ridden from 350M, kept on well until approaching 100M, ran on evenly thereafter.

Crowded shortly after start, raced in midfield, 2 away from the stands' rail, hard ridden after passing 400M and made some progress, bumped approaching 200M, peaked on run 100M, kept on evenly to the line.
Crowded shortly after start, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the stands' rail, hard ridden approaching 300M, took the lead near 200M, peaked and headed 100M, kept on evenly to the line.

Bumped shortly after start, raced prominently on the stands' side early, a length or so back in the middle stages, hard ridden after passing 400M but only showed limited response, weakened gradually final 100M.
Away with them, raced behind midfield on the stands' side, one-paced final 400M.
Made contact shortly after start, raced at rear on the middle track, made minor progress final 400M.
Jumped well, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out after passing 550M, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, made some progress in straight.
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced prominently, 2 wide, a length back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Taken back to race at rear on the outside, 6 lengths or so back, 2 wide from 750M, angled out 550M, made minor progress in the run home.
Taken back to race 2 wide at rear, 6 lengths or so back, found rail near 800M, angled out after passing 550M, same margin back turning in, finished off very strongly, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/2L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first two close home.
Away well, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, easy run to turn, kept on well in straight to make frame without threatening.
Bumped on jumping, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, finished off very strongly, won by a narrow margin.
Jumped only fairly, raced towards rear on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, very wide turning in, failed to make any progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well from gate 12, raced prominently but trapped 3 wide, peaked on run 500M, weakened final 250M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced at tail, 8 lengths or so back, very wide into straight, made some headway in the run home.
Began well, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, angled out approaching 500M, 4 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Held up. Struggling in rear from bend and well beaten.
Held up. Pushed along off bend and always in rear.
Reared as stalls opened and lost many lengths. Caught up to main body of runners after 300m. Under pressure from 400m out and little impression.
One paced under pressure after racing in mid-field and unable to get on terms with leaders.
Tracked leading pair. Bumped twice 400m out. Stayed on.
In touch with leaders from wide draw. Improved to challenge 150m out and every chance. Held by winner final 50m.
Held up last. Under pressure and well held final 300m.
Tracked leading pair against rail. Bumped rival twice 400m out. No extra final 75m.
Made running until headed by winner 300m out. Weakened final 200m.
Wide in mid-field from high draw. Unable to improve position under pressure home straight.
Raced in mid-field. Ridden along off bend and stayed on well final 200m.
Started quickly from wide draw and pressed leader. Moved to front 300m out and responded well to hold off runner-up final 100m.
Waited with towards rear and little impression under pressure.
Recovered from sluggish start to race mid-division. Stayed on but never going pace to challenge.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 8-1/2L back turning in, made some progress in straight.
Taken back from gate 11, raced towards rear on the outside, 7 lengths back turning in, finished off very strongly to take 2nd, nearest finish.
Broke well, raced in 2nd, 1-1/2L back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.

Began only fairly and made contact, raced 2 wide better than midfield, difficult to settle in the early stages, found rail near 650M, 2-1/2L back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Away well, taken back to race behind midfield on the outside, bumped and unbalanced near 550M, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight.
Bumped shortly after start, raced behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 550M, 6 to 7 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to take a place.
Bumped shortly after start, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover from 600M, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out after passing 400M, 4 lengths back turning in, made good progress early in straight, peaked 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Began well from a tricky draw, prominent on outer, raced wide and without cover until near 600M, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths back in the middle stages, kept on evenly in straight.
Slightly slow out, raced 2 wide towards rear, bumped near 550M, moved a bit closer on turn, finished off evenly.
Began smartly, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/2L turning in, kept on very well in straight and scored.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, dropped towards rear from 500M, 5 lengths or so back turning in, one-paced in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Broke well, soon dropped over 2L back to 4th 3-wide without cover despite ridden early, weakened in straight.
Began well from the widest draw travelling very wide without cover around midfield, lost position when wide into straight, made no impression under pressure.
Very slowly away, remained in last few to straight, saved ground turning in for home, ran on under pressure on rail without threatening.
Ridden early gradually settling in forward midfield on rail some 3L off the pace, commenced move entering straight and ran on well under pressure inside final 150M to snatch victory final strides.
Recovered steadily from a moderate start to reach1.5L 2nd 2-wide 800M out, chased leader into straight, unable to quicken to threaten under pressure.
Crowded at start settling in last few, gained slightly closer 750M out, inconvenienced over 350M out, kept on steadily without threatening.
Crowded after start settling just worse than midfield on rail, saved ground turning in for home, ran on well under pressure in straight for slender defeat.
Ridden to lead from a moderate draw setting a sound pace on rail, held over 1L advantage early in straight but unable to sustain effort and swamped close to home.

Ridden forward from a moderate start settling one back on rail, became 3rd in a similar position 800M out, saved ground turning in for home, kept on under pressure only to be swamped for a placing close to home.
Soon taken well behind from a poor draw, trailed the field to home straight, went wide making home turn and inconvenienced 200M out, kept on same pace without quickening.
Settled mainly 2-wide in midfield after beginning from a poor draw, came under pressure to hold position rounding home bend, folded up quickly in straight.
Chased the leader, switched out rounding the Turn, kept on okay.
Ridden along to lead, weakened entering the Straight, finished off fairly (See Incident report).
Sat towards rear, traveled smoothly, lay in in the Straight, responded nicely when asked.
Settled in front of midfield, traveled fairly, weakened notably from 100M (Substantial blood in trachea).
Sat towards rear, switched out rounding the Turn, made some progress when asked.
Sat behind midfield, under pressure in the early stages, gave ground notably in the Straight (See Incident report).
Settled midfield, raced ungenerously in the middle stages, ran on evenly.
Sat worse than midfield, traveled okay, steadied and directed out to obtain clear run over the concluding stages, finished off reasonably well.
Settled handy, raced very wide, failed to respond in the Straight (See Incident report).
Settled midfield, traveled on the rail nicely, made good progress under whip, closed off well.
Sat handy, lay out making the Turn, shifted ground and weakened entering the Straight.
Jumped only fairly, sat rear, limited when asked.
Held up and in last position off final bend. Short of room and didn't obtain clear run until 150m out. Finished strongly despite tending to edge right and just failed.
Mid-field. Briefly short of room under 300m out. Stayed on at the one pace and unable to challenge.
Keen in rear. Good run though in home straight and every chance final 100m.
Wide in mid-field with no cover. Weakened from 300m out and well held.
Waited with towards rear. Wide off final bend and stayed on.
Tracked pace against rail. Challenged 150m out. No extra.
Mid-field. Headway and briefly threatened 200m out but unable to sustain effort.
Strong run from mid-field down the outside to lead 100m out and just held on.
Tracked leaders and keen. Lost ground when short of room 300m out. Unable to quicken and no impression after.
Across from wide draw to press leader. Weakened quickly home straight.
Made running. Challenged 200m out. Headed and lost ground final 150m.
Tracked leading pair three wide. Faded final 150m.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear, 8 lengths or so back turning in, made very good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Moderately away from a wide draw, taken back to race towards rear on the outside, 8-1/2Ls back turning in, made no impression in straight.
Jumped with them, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, 2 to 3 lengths back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out after passing 400M, finished off very strongly to score.
Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.

Made contact at start, raced behind midfield on the inside early, slightly improved along the rail in the middle stages, showed some response early in straight, no clear run 200M, ran on evenly thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away with them, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, very wide into straight, made no impression in straight.
Away well, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 4 lengths back turning in, kept on well in straight to take a place.
Fast into stride, sent forward to take the lead, led by 2 to 3 lengths turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 50M.
Began only fairly, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed some response early in straight, no clear run final 150M.
Moderately away from gate 10, unable to slot in, trapped wide in midfield, no cover throughout, weakened 400M when hard run took effect. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back to race 2 wide at rear, 7 lengths back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Settled in front of midfield, did not quickened in the Straight.
Settled at the rear, showed some dash top of the Straight, one pace final 150M.
Dispute lead 2 wide, weakened in the Straight.
Settled midfield on the rail, made good ground until run peak final 75M.
Settled midfield 2 wide, made no impression.
Sat worse than midfield on the rail, made no ground.
Settled near the rear on the rail, stayed on fairly.
Sat towards the rear 2 wide, closed off okay.
Sat on pace, hit the front at 200M, kept on, nothing extra final 75M.
Settled at the rear, stayed on nicely.
Settle worse than midfield 2 wide, angled out in the Straight, closed off well to score.
Led, weakened and faded final 300M.
Jumped awkwardly travelling full of running in forward of midfield in 6th or 5th on rail, obtained a clear run 150M out and responded well to take charge shortly after.
Close up early gradually drifting over 2L back in 4th, became 5th in a similar position 800M out, came under pressure rounding home bend but could make no impression in straight.
Hampered at start settling in last few and waited with, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, fought on steadily without threatening.

Travelled wide without cover in 7th in midfield, made headway past the 900M to share 3rd 750M out, came under pressure rounding home bend but could only keep on at the same pace early in straight, found no extra 100M out.
Taken back to last few from a poor draw, commenced move on top of home bend swinging widest into straight, went past well-beaten horses under pressure.
Soon came to chase the leader after moderate start travelling keenly throughout back straight, hit the front turning in for home gaining 1L advantage 200M out but caught 100M out.
Soon ridden to lead, steadied up the pace early in back straight, led until headed upon straightening, folded up quickly.
Soon recovered from slow start to 3rd some 2L back, switched out to challenge entering straight but soon weakened under pressure.
Crowded at start settling just worse than midfield, obtained a clear run over 200M out and ran on well without troubling the winner.
Began moderately from a poor draw and soon dropped to last trailing the field to straight, ran on well between runners inside final 150M to be nearest at finish.
Jumped awkwardly settling behind midfield in 9th on rails, commenced move inside 400M sneaking up on the inside early in straight, unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Ridden early before travelling 3-wide in midfield, lost cover from approaching home bend and running widest into straight, kept on one pace under pressure closing stages.
Away in line, restrained to race in mid-division, caught racing wide no cover throughout and was left without a finishing effort in the home straight.
Obtained a midfield spot early, raced keenly throughout the middle stages and got shuffled back 700M, 5Ls off 400M but couldn't finish off.
Jumped only fairly, ended up towards the rear, raced keenly early and middle stages, failed to respond on straightening, soon left behind 200M from home.
Jumped on terms, lost ground when checked 1100M and shuffled back to race near last, had some work to do 400M, ran past beaten horses only.
Chased leaders in 4th spot, worked into the race well 400M, quickened to the lead inside 200M, kept on well late stages to hold off challengers from both sides.
Slow to begin, raced as the back marker 7Ls off pace, swung wide into straight before running home fairly. No threat to leaders.
Tracked leaders on inside, loomed a threat top of the straight, kept battling towards the line for a moderate 4th.
From draw 1 stayed close enough to leaders, switched away from fence 500M, came with a good finish from 300M and got up for 2nd late, nearest finish.
Chased leader, fought hard to stay in contention early straight, faded passing 200M.
Soon crossed to the lead and led uncontested, headed passing 200M, fought hard but weakened towards the finish.
Jumped only fairly and restrained to race in second half of the field, saved ground on inside, closed off fairly well final 300M to claim 3rd beaten less than 1L.
Settled down 2-wide in midfield, little change in position entering the turn, brought wide 400M, ran on only fairly. Never a winning hope.

Crowded start, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 5 lengths or so back, steadied near 500M, commenced move 400M, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home to take a place. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back to race 2 wide behind midfield, improved after passing 600M, very wide turning in, made good progress early in straight, peaked on run 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Away well, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 500M, finished off well to take 2nd, just held.
Out in line, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out 500M, very wide turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Away with them, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide approaching 500M, 2 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, steadied 200M, weakened thereafter.
Began well, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed good response in straight, took the lead approaching 100M, kept on well to hold off the challengers.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide at rear, 8 lengths or so back, moved closer on turn, 4-1/2L back turning in, no clear run early in straight, made minor progress thereafter.
Shifted in at start, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length, travelled well to turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed approaching final 100M, weakened thereafter.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 6 lengths back turning in, kept on same pace in straight, no clear run final 50M.
Average to begin, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Taken back from gate 9, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground to turn, 2 wide from 400M, made minor progress in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from gate 1, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)

Jumped well, raced prominently on outer early, slightly taken back after passing 1200M, positioned in midfield in the middle stages, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.) (Blood in trachea.)
Average to begin, raced 3 wide better than midfield, similar position on turn, finished off evenly.
Shifted in at start and made contact, positioned 2 wide, 1-1/2L back, there to turn, angled out early in straight, kept on same pace to the line.

Jumped awkwardly, raced 2 wide towards rear, travelled keenly in the early stages, 4 lengths or so back turning in, unable to obtain clear run early in straight, cleared after passing 300M, finished off strongly to take 2nd.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced in midfield on the inside, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, no clear run early in straight, made minor progress final 100M.

Bumped start and unbalanced, positioned 4 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, hit the front 100M, kept on well to the line and scored. (See Racing Incidents.)

Bumped shortly after start, took the early lead, headed near 1050M, raced prominently 3 wide in the middle stages, retook the lead approaching 200M, peaked and headed 100M, ran on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 6 lengths or so back in the middle stages, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight to take a place.

Bumped shortly after start, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead near 1050M, challenged by rival from 500M, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed approaching 200M, weakened final 100M.
Out with rest, unable to slot in, trapped wide behind midfield, very wide into straight, failed to make any progress in the run home.
Knuckled on jumping and bumped, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, no clear run early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped shortly after start, tracked leaders on the inside, challenged the leader 500M, kept on well early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened gradually thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (Bled.) (Lame right front leg next day.)
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced 3 wide at rear, travelled keenly near 800M, wider turning in, made no progress in straight.
Waited with in rear. Good headway to challenge at 200m line. Led 125m out and soon asserted, winning comfortably.
Tracked pace on outer. Under pressure over 300m out and weakened final 150m.
Held up against rail and had to switch widest 200m out for clear run. Finished off well and just failed to get up for second.
Pressed leader. Crowded against rail final 150m and bumped on a number of occasions. One paced.
Held up. No impression under pressure from over 300m out and never out of rear.
Made running. Passed by winner 125m out and just held onto second.
Chased leader. Dropping back through field when short of room and eased final 50m.
Chased leaders. Short of room when trying to challenge final 200m and unable to be ridden out fully.
Sat midfield, raced keenly making the Turn when raced in restricted room, finished off fairly.
Sat towards rear, raced on the rail, no clear run int eh Straight, could not be fully ridden out.
Jumped nicely, ridden along to lead, traveled okay, weakened inside 200M (See Incident Report).
Sat behind midfield, raced wide, never a danger.
Jumped only fairly, settled worse than midfield, limited when asked.
Settled in front of midfield, no clear run in the Straight, could not fully tested (See Incident Report).
Sat rear, switched out making the Turn, showed some dash inside 150M, closed off nicely.
Chased the leader, traveled nicely, closed off reasonably well.
Sat midfield, raced wide, gave ground quickly inside 300M (See Incident Report).
Settled in front of midfield, raced two wide, ran on evenly.
Settled worse than midfield, raced greenly, no impression.
Sat rear, no clear run in the early Straight, made some ground after obtained clear running from 200M.
Jumped only fairly, sat midfield, raced keenly in the middle stages and lay out, no clear run until 250M, battled to the finish.
Sat towards rear, made the Turn wide, minor progress made when asked.
Raced in mid-field. Outpaced 300m out. Stayed on final 150m.
Tracked pace. Challenged and led briefly 200m out. Every chance.
Held up. Struggling and left behind final 300m.
Held up. Stayed on but lacked pace to get on terms with leaders.
Raced prominently and upsides leader off bend. Weakened final 200m.
Raced against rail and chased leaders into home straight. Angled out to challenge 300m out but unable to sustain run and lost ground final 150m.
Tracked leaders. Pushed along from top of home straight and weakened over 200m out.
Across from wide draw to make running. Headed and weakened 200m out.
Towards rear in wide position. Stayed on well final 200m and sustained run to line.
Raced wide. Chased leaders bend but weakened quickly and well beaten.
Raced very wide in mid-field. Lost ground and held from 300m out.
Taken back from wide draw and last off bend. Ran green initially under pressure before strong finish final 150m. Promising.
Good headway from mid-field to challenge at 200m line and got on top despite running green/hanging right, winning cosily.
A bit keen in mid-field. One paced under pressure and no real impression. Had to be steadied briefly 150m out.
Began smartly, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, travelled well to turn, hit the front 300M, kept on strongly to the line and scored.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, peaked and headed 300M, weakened gradually final 150M.
Began only fairly, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out 450M, no clear run early in straight, cleared 250M, closed off well to make frame without threatening.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out approaching 450M, finished off well to take 2nd without threatening the winner.

Moderately away from gate 1, positioned slightly behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared near 200M, finished off strongly to take a place, nearest on line.
Began well, positioned a length behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Crowded on jumping, raced in midfield, moved a bit closer on turn, finished off evenly.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, raced 2 wide towards rear, 3 wide from 600M, made minor progress early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Stumbled start, taken back to race at tail, 7 lengths back, closer on turn but still the last turning in, made no progress in straight.
Raced in midfield 2 wide, never in contention.
Settled behind midfield 2 wide, never a threat.
Settled in front of midfield on the rail, ran on strongly to score.
Sat on pace, weakened and gave ground at 300M. (See Incident Report)
Sat at the rear, stayed on fairly.
Raced towards the rear, passed some weakened rivals.
Sat on pace on the rail, ran on evenly.
Settled near midfield 2 wide, closed off okay.
Settled midfield 3 wide, stayed on.
Tracked leader 2 wide, kept on nicely for 2nd.
Led, weakened at 300M.
Jumped awkward, settled worse than midfield, made no impression. (See Incident Report)
Caught 3 wide no cover in front of midfield, weakened in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
Settled midfield on the rail, one pace when asked.

Began quickly from the one draw settling off the pace in 5th evading the speed battle, clipped heels losing some 2L 850M out, renewed effort into straight obtaining a clear run 300M out, finished strongly convincing victory.

Began well settling just off the pace in 3rd on rail, came to challenge entering straight holding some chance early on, only to be over-shadowed by the powerful finish of the winner and miss 3rd late.

Travelled keenly in first few between runners around first bend, remained keen and tight alongside eventual winner in back straight, lost position when close to heels 800M out, baulked briefly 400M out, ran home one-paced.

Pressed forward from a poor draw, wide around first bend to lead into back straight setting a fast tempo, steadied pace home bend before kicking 1L clear early in straight, unable to sustain effort inside final 150M.

Pressed forward before settling within 2L of pace in 4th in back straight, became 5th in a similar position rounding home bend and 6th into straight, produced good late finish inside final 100M to snatch 2nd late.
Settled towards rear, commenced move 4-wide onto home bend reaching 2L 4th into straight, unable to sustain effort upon straightening but kept on at the one pace to the line.
Settled well back, commenced move 4-wide on home bend 850M out, some 3L back in 7th turning into straight, kept on one pace under pressure without quickening.
Settled well back from the widest draw, inconvenienced about 800M out, switched wide in last into straight, one-paced under pressure.
Broke well but soon taken back to worse than midfield on rail, closer up when tempo slackened on home bend and saved ground turning in for home, unable to quicken under pressure to threaten.

Jumped awkwardly from a poor draw losing ground, wide in midfield rounding first bend, made headway 1500M out joining race leader 1300M out, folded up quickly shortly after turning into home straight.
Caught wide no cover in mid-division, struggled to keep up 600M, weakened rapidly on straightening.
Away well enough, stayed close to leaders, had every chance from 400M but the finishing response was only fair. No threat to leaders from 200M.

Urged along early and moved up contesting the lead along the inside, soon headed turning home, battled on to 200M then weakened. (Jockey : raced keenly in the lead and was left without a finishing effort.)
Dropped back from wide draw and crossed to a rail position near last, had 7Ls to make up 400M, ran past well beaten horses only.
Began fairly, dropped back to race behind midfield, waited with on the inside, quickened up nicely 250M when a gap opened up, tried hard late but held by winner in a driving finish.

Not far from leaders early, eased back to race in midfield middle stages, ran on one paced early straight, weakened and eased mid-straight. (Jockey concerned something amiss from 200M and didn't fully ride it out to the finish.)
Positively ridden, vied for lead on outside, had narrow lead from top of straight, caught by rivals nearing 200M then weakened out of contention.

Jumped fairly, recovered to race in midfield, pushed along 500M but found less than expected, kept on fairly final 300M without posing threat to leaders. (Jockey unable to explain for the disappointing performance.)
Began awkwardly, ended up towards the rear, had big task in hand top of straight, switched out to challenge 300M then closed off fastest to take 4th, nearest finish.
Held up in mid-division 5-6Ls off pace, gave positive response on straightening, stayed on mildly for 5th. Passable return after lengthy absence.
Jumped on terms, settled in midfield early stages, got shuffled back to near the rear home turn, failed to finish off on straightening.
Taken back from outside draw, raced as the rear over 8Ls off the pace, still last turning home, couldn't pick up pace.
Went forward chasing leading pair, well placed to strike 400M but jockey waited with until 250M, accelerated well when asked and soon in front, had enough up in tank to fight off runner-up late.
Moved up to track leaders after jumping from a low draw, held up for clear running 450-350M before closing off nicely for 3rd.
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced prominently, 2 wide, 3/4L back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Taken back from gate 11, raced towards rear on the outside, travelled keenly in the early stages, moved a bit closer on turn, made some progress in straight.
Made contact shortly after start, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, kept on strongly in straight, won by 2-3/4L.
Made contact with the left side of its barrier on jumping, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out 500M, made some headway in the run home.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside, very wide turning in, one-paced in the run home.
Slowly away, raced at tail, 7 lengths back turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 3 lengths back turning in, finished off evenly.
Made contact shortly after start, raced in midfield on outer, no cover on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening.
Average to begin, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out early in straight, kept on same pace in the run home.
Taken back to race 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 5 lengths back turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Jumped well, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on evenly in straight.
Out with rest, raced better than midfield on the outside, 2 lengths back turning in, kept on well in straight to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Moderately away, raced in 3rd, 1 o 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.

Made contact with the left side of its barrier on jumping, positioned 3 wide, 2 lengths or so back, checked near 900M, 4 wide on turn, weakened early in straight when hard run took effect. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped with them, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared approaching 200M, finished off strongly to score.
Bumped start, raced behind midfield on outer, 4-1/2L back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Burst out of stalls, raced prominently, 2 wide, there to turn, showed good response early in straight, led narrowly 150M, peaked and headed 50M, ran on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began only fairly, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, one-paced in the run home.
Jumped awkwardly, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, there to turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 300M, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced prominently on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, kept on same pace in straight.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3-1/2L back turning in, angled out early in straight, made contact 300M, closed off well to make frame without threatening.

Moderately away from a wide draw, raced in midfield on outer, 3 lengths back, inconvenienced near 800M, same margin back on turn, showed limited response in straight, bumped 300M, weakened inside final furlong.
Average to begin, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L in the middle stages, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed near 150M, weakened final 50M.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced 2 wide at rear, 6 lengths or so back, same margin back turning in, no clear run early in straight, cleared near 250M, made good progress thereafter.
Away well, positioned 4 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced 2 wide towards rear, 4 lengths or so back, angled out after passing 500M, made very good progress in straight to take 2nd, nearest on line.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, 6 lengths or so back, very wide turning in, made little progress in straight.
Moderately away, raced in 4th, saved ground on turn, angled out early in straight, finished off evenly.
Taken back to race at rear, 4 lengths or so back turning in, finished off well without threatening.
Fast into stride, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner on line.
Began well, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader, a bit closer on turn, finished off strongly to score by a nose.
Average to begin, raced in midfield early, slightly improved after passing 700M, 3/4L back turning in, kept on well in straight to take a place.
Jumped only fairly and then was badly crowded between rivals, maintained a midfield position along the fence, chased hard under 135lb in the home straight but was always held by leaders.
Slow to begin, given a waiting ride at the back of the field, 10Ls behind leader making the turn for home, ran past well beaten horses only. Never involved.
Slow to begin, held up in mid-division 6-7Ls off pace, hard pressed 500M, closed off nicely making good ground to go 4th near line.
Up with early pace before sitting back to track leader, raced keenly in middle stages, launched a strong challenge on leader from top of straight, led near 150M before losing out to winner late.
Given a waiting ride, towards the rear throughout, driven 400M, stayed on mildly without threatening leaders. (Jockey : instructed to ride in a conservative manner early stages.)

Jumped only fairly from a wide draw, taken back to near last over 10Ls away, had task in hand 400M but failed to make any progress. (Jockey : difficult to make up ground due to slow pace middle stages.)
Jumped only fairly, settled down behind midfield, little change in position to the straight, found nothing when asked. (Jockey : travelled only fairly during race and did not finish the race off.)
In 4th spot stayed close enough to leaders throughout, came with a sustained challenge on straightening and surged past leader close home.
Began on terms, restrained to race in second half of the field, 8Ls to make up home turn but failed to respond when placed under pressure.
Led from 2000M, enjoyed a comfortable lead throughout, kept going well early straight, caught 150M out, weakened late but managed to hold on for 3rd.
Away well, eased back to race ahead of midfield, pressed along nearing 500M, laid in under pressure and kept on same pace to line. (Jockey stopped riding and straighten his mount passing 100M.)
Jumped well, tracked leader 2-wide, came under serious pressure 500M, soon gave ground.
Ridden along to lead, traveled smoothly, failed to respond in the Straight (Disappointing performance, Must BT, See Incident Report).
Settled in front of midfield, traveled okay, one pace to the finish.
Sat handy, traveled nicely, responded well under whip, kept on well to win.
Sat towards rear, traveled smoothly, improved from 500M, made good ground over the concluding stages.
Sat midfield, not much impression made (Substantial blood in trachea).
Sat handy, weakened entering the Straight, limited response when asked.
Jumped awkwardly, settled rear, held up near 150M, ran ok okay.
Settled worse than midfield, switched out rounding the Turn, closed off nicely.
Settled towards rear, held up near the 200M, not fully tested (See Incident Report).
Ridden from stalls and held up. Didn't get best of runs 200m out when trying to improve and never on terms with leaders.
Raced wide in mid-field. Effort 300m out before fading.
Held up and keen. Never out of rear.
Across from wide draw to lead. Challenged off bend and weakened over 200m out.
Niggled along early and gradually dropped back towards rear in back straight. Wide off bend and finished strongly final 150m.
Held up. Came wide off bend and stayed on well final 200m.
In touch with leaders and a bit keen. Clear run up rail final 200m but lacked pace to challenge.
Never better than mid-field and little impression once ridden over 200m out.
Tracked leader. Led 200m out. Stayed on after headed 100m out.
Keen in mid-field. Stayed on steadily from 150m out and not beaten far.
Raced in touch with leaders and headway to challenge from 200m out. Led 100m out and held on in tight finish.
Tracked leader. Weakened under pressure final 250m.
Taken back to race 2 wide behind midfield, 4 lengths or so back, a bit closer on turn, no clear run until 150M, bumped near 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Began well from gate 1, positioned 1-3/4L behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened and eased final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/4L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 50M, beaten by a narrow margin.
Away well, raced in midfield on the outside, commenced move 400M, finished off very strongly to score.

Out in line, raced 3 wide slightly better than midfield early, moved a bit closer after passing 1200M, 2nd in the middle stages, 2 wide, 1-3/4L back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Out with rest, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground throughout, kept on well early in straight, peaked on run 100M, weakened final 50M.
Taken back to race at rear on the outside, 5 lengths or so back, a bit closer on turn, very wide into straight, finished off strongly to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Began only fairly, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made no impression in straight.
Jumped well, raced better than midfield, 2 wide, commenced move 500M, peaked early in straight, bumped near 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Settled midfield, had some trouble rounding the Home Turn, hung in the Straight, switched out at 200M and closed off strongly, won going away, impressive
Sat on pace 3 wide, showed some dash early, but one pace final furlong.
Sat just behind the leaders on the rail, limited response in the Straight.
Sat last, under pressure from 750M, stayed on.
Sat midfield on the rail, never a threat. (See Incident Report)
Sat on pace, raced keenly, weakened in the Straight.
Jumped on terms, showed good speed to lead, kept on only fairly. (See Incident Report)
Caught wide early, improved outside lead, kept on nicely.
Sat towards the rear on the rail, made some very late ground. (See Incident Report)
Caught 4 wide no cover, weakened and faded.
Settled in front of midfield 2 wide, closed off nicely, no match to winner.
Sat worse than midfield 2 wide, ran on ordinarily.
Settled behind midfield, switched widest into straight, kept on steadily without quickening.

Broke well from a low draw settling just better than midfield in 4th, inconvenienced and became 5th over 1000M out, closer to lead in slackened pace over 800M out, ran on under pressure to just fail to get up on line.
Settled in midfield, came under pressure to challenge 400M out, kept on same pace without quickening.

Ridden positively from a poor draw to soon take up running, raced keenly going over 3L clear early in back straight, steadied up the pace and came back to field over 750M out, swamped inside final 300M.
Broke well from the one draw settling just off the pace, close up in 2nd in slackened tempo over 750M out, came to challenge 2-wide entering straight but unable to quicken to threaten, faded late.
Began awkwardly settling in last few, gained slightly closer in slackened tempo rounding home bend, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, found nothing form 5L 9th into straight.

Settled just better than midfield in distant 5th, became 4th over 1000M out gaining further closer to slackened pace over 800M out, challenged from 4-wide into straight and hit the front over 150M out, just held on to the line.
Settled in midfield on rail, came under pressure entering home straight, folded up quickly inside final 200M.
Soon taken well behind, never seen with a chance.
Settled in last few after moderate start shifting wide into straight, ran on well under pressure down the centre of the track to be nearest at finish.

Pressed forward from the widest draw settling in 2nd or joint 2nd, over 3L off the pace early in back straight, hit the front shortly after turning in for home 3-wide, worn down by the eventual winner over 150M out.
Jumped awkwardly settling well behind, came under pressure from home bend but could only run past well-beaten horses in straight.
Unable to slot in from draw 8, obliged to race three wide in midfield throughout the race, lay in and finished the race off only fairly.
From draw 1 moved up to track the pace in 3rd, fought hard in the straight throughout, only lost 3rd 150M, beaten to 7th in a blanket finish for the minor placings.
Jumped only fairly, settled towards the rear along the fence, failed to close off the race passing 400M.
Bumped shortly after the start, moved up to chase leader, travelled well into straight, let down strongly to hit the front passing 150M. Won convincingly.
Caught racing wide no cover in a position ahead of midfield, ran on mildly final 300M, not beaten far behind 2nd and 3rd in a blanket finish for the minor placings.
Settled in mid-division 2-wide 4Ls off the pace, little change in position home turn, fought on steadily final 300M, claimed 4th in a blanket finish for the minor placings.
Jumped well and soon found the lead, led uncontested, kept going well on straightening, headed passing 150M, faded late to finish 5th.
Close up in 4th, loomed a threat top of straight, responded well and kept battling to take 3rd in a busy finish for the minor placings.
Dropped back from wide draw, held up in last 6-7Ls off the pace, had difficulty obtaining clear running 350-250M before making some progress final stages.
Jumped awkwardly, restrained to race near last, 6Ls to make up 400M, ran on well to go 2nd close home in a busy finish for the minor placings.
Crowded for room after the start, obtained a position in midfield, couldn't go on passing 300M, weakened to last.
Bumped start, raced in 2nd, easy run to turn, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening.
Slightly slow out and crowded, raced towards rear, 10 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, made minor progress in the run home.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, trailed 12 lengths back turning in, given an impossible task but made good progress in straight.
Began well from gate 1, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, 6 lengths back turning in, kept on well in straight without threatening.
Began well, raced in 3rd, 5 lengths or so back on turn, finished off very strongly to score.
Began only fairly, raced towards rear, 10 lengths back turning in, taken wide in straight and finished off strongly to make frame, nearest finish.
Out with rest, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 8 lengths back turning in, made contact and unbalanced near 350M, made minor progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Bumped start, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3 lengths turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner close home.
Bumped shortly after start, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, no cover throughout, one-paced in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.)

Jumped with them, raced in midfield on the inside, awkwardly placed near 600M, saved ground on turn, made contact 350M, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.) (A small wound to the right front leg.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, 11 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jockey unbalanced at start, raced in midfield, 2 wide, similar position on turn, failed to close off in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)

Commenced well, positioned 2 to 3 lengths behind the leader, 2 away from the stands' rail, hard ridden from 300M but only showed limited response, weakened gradually final 100M. (Lame right front leg next day.)
Jumped only fairly, raced towards rear on the stands' side, moved closer in the middle stages, unable to obtain clear run until final 100M, finished off strongly to take 2nd. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from gate 1, raced slightly behind midfield, nearer to the middle track, 3 to 4 lengths back at 400M, hard ridden 300M but showed no response, weakened thereafter.
