Jumped well, sent forward to race prominently, a length or so back at 400M, peaked on run 250M, weakened gradually final furlong.
Crowded shortly after start, raced behind midfield, kept on same pace final 400M.
Fast into stride, tracked leaders on the stands' rail, ridden after passing 400M but not enough room, weakened gradually from 250M, inconvenienced 150M, eased final 100M.
Stumbled as stalls opened and missed break, raced at rear throughout, never a factor. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well, positioned a length behind the leader on the stands' side, hard ridden after passing 400M, kept on well until approaching 100M, weakened gradually close home.
Began only fairly, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the stands' side, no clear run until final 200M, finished off evenly.
Slowly away, raced towards rear of the main group, 6 lengths back at 400M, made no progress thereafter.
Slightly slow out, raced towards rear, made no progress final 400M.
Made contact with the left side of its barrier on jumping, always outpaced and behind.
Moderately away, raced better than midfield, hard ridden approaching 350M, kept on well to take a place without threatening.
Average to begin sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably in the middle stages, hard ridden after passing 250M, showed very good response, easily scored, impressive.
Close up early, took up running 2-wide passing the 1000M, remained one off the rail in front and joined into straight, unable to sustain effort and swamped inside final 50M.
Settled in rear from a poor draw and waited with, baulked for a run approaching home straight, ran on well inside final 250M despite hanging in to just fail to get up on line.

Began only fairly but soon recovered to rear of midfield on rail, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, baulked for a run early in straight until the 200M, quickened well to assert authority over 50M out.
Settled well back after moderate start from a poor draw, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, obtained a clear run inside final 150M, produced modest headway without threatening.
Held up in prominent 5th on rail, shifted one out 2-wide rounding home bend, baulked for a run early in straight and lost position 150M out, never recovered.
Broke well settling in midfield 3-wide, baulked for a run early in home straight, fought on steadily inside final 150M without threatening.
Ridden along to hold pace early stages but soon dropped to last few 3-wide, went wider into straight, only ran past well-beaten horses.
Soon taken across for rails run towards rear, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, snuck closer early in straight but steadied 200M out, soon recovered and fought on well to the line.
Ridden forward after moderate start, settled one back in 2nd on rail rounding home bend, came under pressure to hold place upon straightening but faded inside final 200M.
Broke well from the widest draw settling wide without cover over 2L back in 6th, became 5th rounding home bend and similar into straight, kept on under pressure before fading inside final 150M.
Prominent early before settling in midfield, found nothing under pressure in straight.
Travelled keenly pulling forward to prominent position early stages, among the line of first four turning into home straight, dropped away quickly inside final 100M. (Blood in trachea)
Settled towards rear, 3-wide rounding home bend and wider into straight, ran on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Broke well from a poor draw gradually taken some 1L back 3-wide without cover, shared pace 4-wide rounding home bend and into straight, held every chance until fading inside final 100M.
Settled midfield, raced wide until 1000M, strode forward to lead, weakened quickly near the 250M.
Sat towards rear, held up near the 200M, closed off only fairly.
Ridden along to lead until 1000M, traveled comfortably, ran on nicely.
Sat midfield, raced keenly in the early and middle stages, no clear run near the 100M, could not be fully tested.
Sat rear, improved rounding the Turn, made some ground over the concluding stages.
Tracked the leader, traveled okay, limited response when asked.
Sat worse than midfield, traveled okay, responded well when asked.
Settled midfield, switched out entering the Straight, ran on evenly.
Settled behind midfield, raced wide and without cover from 1000M, could not be quickened in the Straight.
Sat behind midfield, held up over the concluding stages, minor progress made.
Bumped at the start, sat towards rear, held up near the 100M, ran on okay.
Started fast and made running. Challenged over 150m out and headed only 50m out.
In touch with leaders in mid-field. Improved 300m out and stayed on for close third.
Bumped at start and raced in rear. Left behind home straight.
Tracked leading pair against rail. Quickened to challenge from 200m line and every chance, leading briefly before winner swooped late.
Pressed leader until weakening from 300m out. Held when short of room and unable to be ridden out final 100m.
Wide throughout. Ridden at 400m line and no response. Dropped away.
Drawn widest and dropped in. Never nearer, briefly short of room 75m out.
Unable to quicken from mid-field and get involved. Briefly short of room 150m out.
Keen in mid-field. Headway from 400m line and stayed on well to lead close home.
Dropped in from wide draw. Still plenty to do at 300m line. Stayed on but unable to reach leaders.
Towards rear after slow start. Steady headway final 200m. Encouraging.
Tracked leading pair and keen. Challenged 200m out but unable to sustain effort and faded.
Held up towards rear and little impression.
Raced three wide in mid-division. Stayed on but one paced.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear, 5 lengths or so back turning in, made minor progress in the run home.
Crowded start, raced in midfield on outer, no cover for the majority of the race, showed limited response and made contact early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made contact at start, raced behind midfield on the outside, 3 to 4 lengths back turning in, made minor progress early in straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Average to begin, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, finished off strongly to score by a neck.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, angled out 500M, made contact early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Shifted out at start and made contact, raced towards rear, 6 lengths back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, no clear run 200M to 150M, one-paced thereafter.
Crowded start, raced 2 wide in midfield, steadied near 650M, 4-1/2L back turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame without threatening.
Began well from gate 1, sat right behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, closed off well to take 2nd.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced 2 wide, a length or so back, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Fast into stride, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 75M, weakened gradually close home, finished 3rd.
Began only fairly and bumped, raced towards rear on the inside, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, made minor progress in the run home.
Crowded on jumping, raced slightly better than midfield but trapped 3 wide early, 2 wide from 1000M, angled out 500M, 2 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear throughout, never factor.
Sat behind midfield on the rail, angled out in the Straight, stayed on.
Sat last, never in contention.
Sat on pace 3 wide, weakened in the Straight.
Jumped slow, hard ridden, raced keenly throughout, gave ground from the 500M. (See Incident Report)
Settled in front of midfield on the rail, closed off okay.
Sat towards the rear 2 wide, only able to pass weakened rivals.
Settled near midfield 2 wide, one pace when asked.
Jumped nicely, showed good speed to lead, kept on until weakened final 100M.
Sat box seat, travelled nicely throughout, closed off along the rail, kept on.
Raced at the rear, never a threat.
Sat just behind the leaders, nothing in the Straight.
Settled midfield 2 wide, ran on nicely.
Settled worse than midfield 2 wide, stayed on fairly.
Sat outside the leader, weakened final furlong.

Began well from a poor draw gradually settling over 3L back in 5th, further back in 6th 3-wide when tempo quickened approaching home bend, quickened well in straight to hit the front over 250M out only to be collared close home.
Ridden along very wide in first few from the widest draw, settled 1L back 2-wide in 2nd 1100M out chasing the leader into straight, kept on until fading under pressure inside final 100M.

Settled in midfield on rail, over 5L off the pace in 8th 1200M out, travelled keenly on heels approaching home bend, switched out to challenge on straightening, finished off the race well inside final 200M.

Crowded at start, soon recovered to just worse than midfield in 10th on rail, lost position when tempo increased passing 1400M, carried further behind 1100M out, fought on past well-beaten horses closing stages.
Gradually settled around midfield on rail in 6th or 7th, snuck closer to pace turning in for home, quickened to hold place chance inside final 250M but unable to sustain effort closing stages.

Jumped awkwardly, gradually recovered to midfield travelling keenly, over 6L away in 9th 3-wide 1200M out, swift progress leaving 1100M to reach 2L 3rd over 900M out, remained wide without cover home bend, kept on until 200M.
Broke well from a poor draw, gradually settled some 2L back in 3rd 1300M out, became 5th onto home bend, baulked for a run early in straight, failed to quicken to challenge inside final 200M.

Settled well behind from a poor draw and waited with, made first move to 11th 3-wide onto home bend, baulked for run after straightening, quickened well inside final 250M down the centre of track to snatch victory close home.
Began awkwardly and soon taken back to last few, made good progress from last into straight but unable to sustain effort inside final 200M.
In last few and waited with, baulked for a run early in straight, ran on well inside final 180M to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield, switched wide into straight to challenge running on steadily under pressure, could find no extra inside final 100M.
Soon dropped to last few, made short-lived effort out wide passing the 1100M reaching over 4L back in 8th onto home bend, widest into straight and soon weakened.
Prominent from a poor draw, took up running out wide about 1450M out, obtained rails run about 1200M out, steadied up the pace in front home bend, overhauled inside final 300M.

Well there from a poor draw, gradually taken over 2L back in 4th 1300M out, pulled closer rounding home bend, angled out to challenge on straightening, held every chance until swamped inside final 180M. (Tactic questioned)
Chased leader 2-wide, took over on straightening, fought well under 7lb claimer, led until 70M when headed by fast finishing winner.
Settled behind midfield 4-5Ls back, in similar position turning for home, ran home only fairly and was never a threat to leaders.

Settled ahead of midfield never far off from the pace, raced keenly in the middle stages, in 3rd spot passing 400M, fought hard but not going the pace of first two 200M, run ended close home dropped to 6th.
From wide draw dropped back to a rearward spot 6Ls off the pace, ran on mildly over final 400M for a non-threatening 5th.
Jumped only fairly, given a waiting ride at the rear, 7Ls off the pace in middle stages, hung in under pressure in the home straight and responded only fairly to riding. Never involved.
Jumped only fairly, restrained to race in midfield 4Ls back, showed good turn of foot when shifted out to challenge early straight, ran on strongly to get up near 70M.
Away in line, maintained a midfield position 3-4Ls off pace, into clear passing 400M, did best work late to claim 3rd.
Caught wide in the early stages then dropped back and conserved near the rear, had some work to do 400M, made some progress up to 100M but was then held up and not ridden out to the line.
From draw 1 obtained a midfield spot early before improving to track leaders home turn, fought on steadily over final 400M, just missed 3rd in a driving finish.

Lacked sufficient pace to cross runners on inside, ended up racing wide no cover throughout, came under serious pressure 500M, soon weakened out of contention. (Jockey : didn't fully stretch out in the straight.)
Jumped on terms, soon took up the lead setting a steady pace, headed top of the straight but refused to give in, peaked on its run 200M and faded towards the line.
Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress in straight to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Bumped start, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground to turn, kept to inside after straightening and finished off strongly, led close home.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide towards rear, travelled keenly in the early stages, angled out 900M, very wide into straight, made minor progress in the run home.
Crowded start, raced behind midfield on the inside, raced keenly near 1500M, saved ground on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Jumped with them, raced behind midfield on the outside early, moved closer after passing 1500M, 2nd from 1050M, peaked 450M, weakened gradually final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.) (Mucus.)

Out with rest, raced towards rear on outer early, moved closer after passing 1500M, positioned midfield in the middle stages, 3Ls back turning in, made minor progress early in straight, weakened gradually final furlong.
Began only fairly, raced in midfield on the inside, angled out 550M, 3 to 4 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide at rear, 3 wide from 1300M, moved a bit closer in the middle stages, very wide into straight, made no impression in straight.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 wide from 500M, no clear run in straight.
Out in line, raced 2 wide better than midfield, angled out approaching 500M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)

Quickly into stride, sent forward to take the lead, headed near 1200M, sat right behind the leader on turn, retook the lead approaching 350M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner close home.
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, took the lead near 1200M, found rail 900M, led by 3/4L turning in, peaked and headed approaching 300M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Crowded shortly after start, raced at rear on the inside, a bit closer on turn, angled out after passing 550M, finished off very strongly to score.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, dropped towards rear 600M, 8 lengths back turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.

Average to begin, raced 3 wide at rear, difficult to settle throughout, dropped to tail after passing 800M, 9 lengths back turning in, showed no response early in straight, eased thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner close home.
Shifted out at start and bumped, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, a bit closer on turn, hard ridden from 350M but only showed limited response, weakened gradually final 100M.
Began only fairly, positioned 4 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, finished off strongly to take a place, nearest on line.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, steadied near 900M, 3 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Bumped shortly after start, raced at rear on the outside, 6 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Crowded and unbalanced shortly after start, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide, a length back turning in, peaked 300M, kept on evenly to the line.
Made contact at start, raced in midfield on the outside, difficult to settle throughout, 4 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began only fairly, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out 450M, very wide turning in, made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well, sat a length behind the leader on rail, there to turn, showed good response in straight took the lead 200M, kept on well to the line, just held on.
Crowded shortly after start, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Began smartly, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, peaked and headed 200M, weakened final 100M.
Made contact at start, trapped wide in midfield early, moved a bit closer after passing 1600M, 2 lengths or so back in the middle stages, peaked on run 500M, weakened final 400M.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide in midfield, weakened from 550M, eased early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away well, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 wide from 500M, very wide into straight, one-paced in the run home.

Jumped awkwardly, made contact with the left side of its barrier and lost ground, positioned 4 to 5 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, taken wide in straight and finished off well to take a place.
Began only fairly, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on the inside, there to turn, finished off strongly, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Made contact shortly after start, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, dropped towards rear from 550M, eased early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Tight for room at times in home straight after waited with, particularly final 50m when jockey forced to ease off.
Tracked pace. Leaned on by rival 200m out but still every chance. Lacked pace of winner.
Settled in mid-field. Picked up well to lead 100m out and asserted, winning cosily.
Held up. Laboured under pressure from top of home straight and never involved.
Had to wait for a run 150m out after improving from mid-field. Ran on well once clear final 75m.
In rear after slow start and under pressure 400m out. Never a threat, though staying on when running out of room closing stages.
Tracked leader until leading early in home straight. Headed 150m out and weakened.
Headway from mid-field to challenge 150m out before one paced late on. Rider lost whip 100m out.
One paced under pressure after racing in touch.
Made running. Hung right after headed over 200m out. Weakened final 100m.
Held up. Headway when short of room over 100m out. Ran on after but unable to reach leaders.
Towards rear. Stayed on final 100m and never nearer.
Sat towards rear, traveled okay, responded nicely under whip.
Sat midfield, traveled fairly, one pace to the line (See Incident Report).
Jumped only fairly, settled behind midfield, could not be fully tested when disappointed for clear run near the 200M (Right hind plate refitted in the saddling stalls).
Settled towards rear, switched out rounding the Turn, steadied near the 350M, finished off nicely.
Ridden along to lead, traveled okay, slightly weakened inside 150M (See Incident Report).
Settled in front of midfield, raced keenly, gave ground quickly over the concluding stages (See Incident Report).
Sat handy, limited response when asked entering the Straight.
Sat in front of midfield, traveled smoothly, made good ground over the concluding stages.
Settled rear, raced rear, no impression made (See Incident Report).
Raced in mid-field. Had to angle out for a run when making headway 200m out and forced to switch back inside when crossed 50m out. Stayed on.
Waited with towards rear. No meaningful headway under pressure.
Tracked pace. Ridden to challenge off bend. Every chance until no extra final 50m.
Mid-field. Driven up to challenge 150m out and ran on well.
Raced in touch with leaders. Caught behind leader on rail from 200m out to 100m out. Stayed on.
Towards rear. Driven 300m out. Stayed on but never going pace to challenge.
Made running. Challenged from 200m out and responded well to pressure to hold on.
Held up. Taken widest off bend and some good headway final 100m. Never nearer.
Dropped in from wide draw and raced in last position. Short of room 150m out. Headway after and never nearer.
Tracked pace until weakening 150m out.
Held up. No impression under pressure final 200m.
Chased leader. Brief challenge early in home straight. Faded.
Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide into straight, finished off strongly to score by a narrow margin.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 6 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, very wide into straight, made good progress in straight to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Made contact at start, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked on run 100M, ran on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made contact at start, taken back to race at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run until final 100M, made minor progress thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, raced 3 wide behind midfield early, 2 wide from 800M, a bit closer in the middle stages, angled out 350M, finished off strongly to take 2nd, always just held. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Made contact shortly after start, raced 2 wide behind midfield early, found rail near 800M, saved ground on turn, made minor progress early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened and eased final 100M.
Taken back to race 2 wide towards rear, difficult to settle in the early stages, 5 lengths back on turn, angled out 350M, kept on same pace in straight.
Made contact shortly after start, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, made minor progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Began only fairly from a wide draw, trapped wide in midfield early, found a 2 wide spot near 700M, 2 lengths back on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Made contact at start, raced 3 wide, a length or so back, similar position on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 150M, not enough room near 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Made contact at start, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Settled in front of midfield 2 wide, improved nicely at the 700M, responded well when asked, ran on strongly to the line.
Sat on pace, one pace when asked.
Jumped well and showed good speed to lead, kept on until weakened final 150M.
Settled midfield 2 wide, closed off okay.
Sat behind midfield on the rail, checked to avoid runners near 500M, made some late ground.
Tracked leader, gave ground quickly from the 750M. (Unacceptable Performance, must trial)
Sat at the rear 2 wide, badly unbalanced entering the Straight, never tested. (Unacceptable Performance, must trial)
Sat towards the rear, swung wide in the Straight, stayed on, still green.
Settled towards the rear, made no impression.
Sat at the rear, never involved.
Sat midfield on the rail, weakened from the 700M.
Sat worse than midfield 2 wide, made some ground early, one pace final 100M.
Settled in forward of midfield some 3L back in 5th, steadied between runners 200M out, fought on steadily to the line without threatening. (Lame next day)
Broke well before settling in 6th over 3L off the pace, came under pressure into straight but unable to quicken to threaten.
Settled 3-wide towards rear, commenced move rounding home bend swinging widest into straight, hit the front narrowly under pressure 200M out while hanging in, headed near finish.
Took up running shortly after the start, obtained rails run leaving the 900M, maintained narrow advantage until headed into straight, soon weakened.
Began moderately settling in last few, kept on same pace without quickening. (Questioned for disappointing performance)
Hard ridden from the widest draw, pressed forward 3-wide before settling alongside race leader over 700M out, hit the front briefly into straight only to be swamped shortly afterwards.
Broke well, held up just off the pace in 3rd 2-wide, became 4th in similar position rounding home bend, renewed effort on straightening and fought on dourly to clinch victory on the line.
Taken backward to last from a wide draw and waited with, commenced move 450M out swinging one of the widest into straight, made no impression.
Broke well but soon taken some 2L back to 4th on rail, remained similar into straight hugging inside rail, held every chance the length of the straight only to be pipped at post.
Jumped awkwardly losing ground settling in rear, never seen with a chance.
Jumped awkwardly, obtained a position ahead of midfield and never far off leaders in a slowly run race, responded well passing 300M, kept on steadily for 3rd under top weight.
Settled in mid-division 3-4Ls back in a slowly run race, travelled well into straight, came with a strong looking challenge passing 250M. Nearest finish.
Jumped only fairly from draw 12, taken back to last and well off the pace early stages, pushed along 600M but failed to pick up pace. Never a threat to leaders.

Restrained after the start, settled near last early stages before making mid-race move from 1000M to take advantage of its light weight, caught wide no cover chasing leaders, run ended 200M, no extra late.
Obtain a position behind the lead without being pressured to do so, travelled well enough in a slowly run race, placed under pressure 500M but responded only fairly, outpaced by rivals 200M.

From draw 11 taken across behind runners and settled near last, raced greenly when placed under pressure early straight, had difficulty obtaining clear running 200-100M before doing best work late stages.
Jumped on terms, restrained to race in mid-division, swung wide into straight before staying on moderately for 4th.
On jumping was checked when badly crowded between rivals, raced keenly in second half of the field, came under pressure home turn, steadied 300M, soon left behind.
Held up towards the rear in a slowly run race, 6-7Ls behind leader on settling, ran home only fairly over final 300M. Never a winning hope.
Crossed to the lead 1400M taking them along slowly, enjoyed uncontested lead throughout, headed inside 300M, faded towards the finish.
Tracked leader in a slowly run event, challenged for the lead nearing 400M, soon took over early straight, kept battling well to the line holding rivals at bay.
Shifted out at the start and was bumped heavily, tracked leaders in 3rd, struggled to keep up home turn, weakened out of contention early straight.
Average to begin, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, kept on well in straight to take a place, just beaten by a neck.
Shifted out at start and made contact, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, 5 lengths or so back turning in, made no progress in straight.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide in midfield, 4 lengths back turning in, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made contact at start, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.
Began well from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner close home.
Jumped well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, a length or so back turning in, finished off strongly to score by a neck.
Began awkwardly and bumped, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, taken wide in straight and made some progress.
Moderately away, raced towards rear on the outside, 8 lengths back turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Crowded shortly after start, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on same pace in straight.

Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, 5 lengths or so back turning in, passed some tired runners in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well from gate 10, tracked leaders, 3 wide, there to turn, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 150M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.
Shifted out at start and made contact, taken back to race behind midfield on the inside, 4-1/2L back turning in, no clear run until 250M, ran on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from a wide draw, raced in midfield on the outside, a bit closer on turn, finished off well to take a place.
Away with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 lengths or so back, angled out approaching 500M, no daylight early in straight, cleared 250M, finished off evenly.
Bumped start and unbalanced, sent forward to race prominently, 2 wide, there to turn, weakened early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.) (Irregular heart rhythm.)
Began well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Out with rest, sat right behind the leader on the inside, same position on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M.
Average to begin, raced 3 wide with cover slightly behind midfield, wider turning in, made some progress in straight to make frame.
Commenced well, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 150M.
Slightly slow out, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground throughout, made no progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths back turning in, failed to make any progress in straight.

From wide draw and elected to settle towards the rear, had some work to do 400M, stayed on moderately despite hanging in when placed under pressure. (Jockey: may appreciate being stepped up in trip next start.)
Jumped on terms, settled in second half of the field, steadied 550M, found nothing when asked top of straight, soon beaten.
Jumped only fairly from draw 11, settled long way back near last, had plenty to do top of straight, closed off fastest to get up by the narrowest margin.
In the early stages raced keenly when trying to obtain cover but unable to do so, raced wide and without cover in midfield throughout, ran on well towards the finish beaten less than 1L on debut.
Shifted out at the start and was bumped, bustled along to obtain a trailing position behind leaders, unable to quicken early straight, soon weakened and faded away.
Knuckled on jumping, sat rear, raced rear, never a threat.
Settled in front of midfield, traveled fairly, minor progress made (See Incident Report).
Sat in front of midfield, raced wide, weakened notably entering the Straight.
Sat towards rear, traveled okay, held up near the 250M, ran on evenly.

Raced close up. Weakened from 300m line.
Across to lead from wide draw. Headed over 200m out. Weakened final 150m.

One paced under pressure after racing in mid-field and little impression.
Taken back from wide draw. Pushed along in last place off final bend. Stayed on past several rivals from 200m out and never nearer.
Wide in mid-division. Effort 300m out but unable to sustain final 100m.
Waited with towards rear. Wide off final bend and stayed on to take third late on.
Tracked pace and keen. Weakened over 200m out
Towards rear of mid-field. Pushed along final bend. Some headway but never dangerous.
Began well, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, peaked on turn, weakened early in straight, eased final 250M. (See Racing Incidents.) (Bled.) (Lame right front leg.)
Began only fairly and made contact, raced behind midfield on the inside, 6 lengths or so back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Crowded start, raced 4 wide towards rear, no cover throughout, failed to close off in straight.
Moderately away, raced 3 wide behind midfield, 7 lengths or so back turning in, kept on same pace in the run home.
Bumped start, raced in 2nd, 1-3/4L back turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked on run near 150M, weakened gradually close home.

Broke well from a poor draw, gradually dropped to last few despite niggled along, made no impression in home straight.
Jumped well from draw 1, chased leaders in 3rd, loomed a threat top of straight but finished the race off in a one-paced manner under top weight.
Jumped well, restrained to race behind midfield, travelled well into straight 3Ls to make up, quickened up impressively to lead near 150M, won going away.
From wide draw taken back to a rearward spot 5Ls back, made some progress early straight but run ended 100M from home. (Jockey:did not run out a strong 1200M.)
Jumped only fairly, ended up a long way back in last, 6Ls to make up 400M, took time to pick up before doing best work late to claim a non-threatening 4th.
Unhurried after the jump, gradually improved to midfield, ran on only fairly final 400M. Never a threat to leaders. (No Vet findings.)
Went forward soon taking up the running, led slowly before quickening things up 450M, kept going well to the line, headed 150M but held 2nd comfortably.

Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out after passing 500M, no clear run early in straight, cleared 250M, ran on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 300M, finished off strongly to score.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened gradually close home.

Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on same pace in straight.
Average to begin, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.

Began only fairly and bumped, raced at rear on the inside, 6 lengths back, saved ground on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear, very wide into straight, finished off strongly to take 2nd.
Began well from the widest draw, raced prominently but trapped wide early, 2 wide from 850M, a length back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Bumped shortly after start and unbalanced, raced in midfield on the outside, very wide into straight, showed limited response early in straight, checked near 300M, weakened thereafter.
Blundered shortly after start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out after passing 500M, made minor progress in straight.

Taken back to race towards rear on the outside early, moved a bit closer 1400M, positioned in midfield in the middle stages, no cover for the majority of the race, 2-1/2L back turning in, kept on well in straight to take a place.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, there to turn, finished off well to take 2nd.
Shifted in at start and bumped, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened final 50M.
Began only fairly, raced at rear, 5 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, taken wide in straight and finished off very strongly to score.

Jumped only fairly, raced 2 wide behind midfield, travelled keenly in the early and middle stages, 4 lengths or so back turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on rail, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened 300M, eased final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)

Jumped with them, raced behind midfield on the outside, 3 to 4 lengths back turning in, failed to close off in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well, raced 2 wide, a length or so back, similar position on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened gradually final 50M.
Out with rest, raced better than midfield on the outside, moved a bit closer after passing 1350M, shared lead from 700M, peaked on run 500M, weakened final 300M.

Bumped start, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, travelled keenly early, raced in midfield on turn, 3Ls back turning in, showed some response early in straight, no clear run 200M, cleared 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Average to begin, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final furlong.
Three wide towards rear of mid-field and keen. Soon struggling under pressure home straight and dropped away.
Recovered from slow start to race in mid-division. Sustained run to lead 150m out and stayed on well to the line.
Made running. Joined 300m out. Stayed in contention until no extra final 100m.
Waited with in rear. Pushed along 300m out and no impression.
Pushed along in mid-field from 400m out and no real impression.

Tracked leaders against rail. Opened up for him 400m out but unable to take advantage and weakened.
Tracked leaders. Lost place under pressure final 300m.
Recovered from slow start to race in mid-division. Headway to challenge 200m out and every chance. Stayed on.

Chased leaders into home straight and every chance at 200m line. No extra final 100m.

Began well from the widest draw, raced in midfield on the outside, 4 lengths or so back turning in, made minor progress in straight.

Away well, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out 350M, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Average to begin, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead near 700M, led by 1/2L turning in, peaked and headed 200M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.) (Blood in trachea.)
Jumped with them, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced at rear, 5 lengths or so back turning in, made no progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowly away, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on outer, 5 lengths or so back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Began only fairly, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 350M, finished off well to take a place.
Jumped well, raced 3 wide slightly better than midfield, no cover for the majority of the race, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Moderately away from gate 1, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, angled out 350M, finished off evenly.
Bumped at start, chased leader on rail to straight, held place chance until inside the 150M.
Travelled wide without cover in first few, gradually faded in home straight.
Restrained in last but refused to settle until half-way, commenced move out wide rounding home bend and widest into straight, ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Settled well back and waited with, very wide into straight, only went past beaten horses closing stages.

Pressed forward from a wide draw settling one back 2-wide, came to challenge under pressure from 500M out and hit the front 250M out, soon drew clear from tiring place-getters.
Always in last few and never seen with a chance, one-paced in straight. (Blood in trachea)
Always in last few and never a factor.

Sat rear, raced tight over the final 100M, could not be fully ridden out.
Sat in front of midfield, crowded near the 250M, made steady progress (See Incident Report).
Sat midfield, raced wide, weakened passing 200M.
Settled behind midfield, traveled fairly, slightly hung out making the Turn, limited response when asked.
Settled midfield, traveled okay, ran on evenly.
Sat rear, raced wide, switched out rounding the Turn, made good progress under whip.
Sat on pace, traveled okay, responded only fairly when placed under pressure (See Incident Report).
Settled worse than midfield, no impression made (See Incident Report).
Jumped awkwardly, settled rear, held up for clear running in the Straight, not fully tested.
Settled worse than midfield, traveled smoothly, stayed on well to win.
Ridden along to lead, raced tight near 250M, weakened notably thereafter (Fractious in the barriers, Must stalls test).
Bumped at the start, shared the lead, weakened entering the Straight (See Incident Report).
Mid-field. Headway from 200m out and ran on strongly to lead late on, winning cosily.
Mid-field. Pushed along 300m out and unable to quicken. Weakened final 100m.
Struggling in rear and detached over 400m out. Well beaten.
Held up from high draw. Ran on well final 200m, getting up for third close home.
Tracked pace. Every chance from 200m out. Stayed on without being able to quicken.
In rear after crowded at start. Pushed along bend. Some late headway down the outside but never a threat to leaders.
Fast start and led. Joined at 200m line and faded final 100m.

Keen early towards rear. Headway up rail on bend. Unable to sustain and weakened over 150m out.
Across from outside draw to track leader. Led 150m out. Pressed by winner final 75m and passed late on.
Headway mid-race to race in touch with leaders. Unable to sustain effort and lost ground final 100m.
Prominent early. Chased leading pair into home straight and challenged at 150m line. No extra after very briefly crowded 50m out.
Commenced well, raced in 2nd, a length behind the leader, easy run to turn, kept on well in straight but always held.
Began well, raced 2 wide in midfield, went amiss and was retired from the race 1100M.

Slowly away, raced behind midfield on the inside, crowded near 1300M, 6 lengths or so back in the middle stages, saved ground throughout, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Away with them, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, peaked on turn, weakened early in straight.
Began well from gate 1, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, closed off well to take a place without threatening the first two.

Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the outside, checked near 1100M, 8 lengths or so back on turn, made minor progress in straight. (Lame right front leg next day morning.)
Not the quickest out, sat last, ran on ordinarily.
Jumped well, settled in front of midfield, closed off strongly to score.

Caught 4 wide with cover behind midfield, never a threat.

Sat towards the rear, stayed on fairly.
Sat in front of midfield 3 wide, never a chance. (See Incident Report)
Crowded at the start, hard ridden to recover, caught wide and gave ground. (See Incident Report)

Tracked leader, kept on nicely.

Average to begin, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared 250M, finished off very strongly to score.
Slightly slow out, raced 2 wide in midfield, difficult to settle for the majority of the race, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Out in line, raced towards rear on the outside, 6 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, made very good progress in straight to take a place, nearest on line.
Moderately away from gate 1, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, a bit closer on turn, finished off well to take 2nd. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, raced better than midfield on the outside, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Gradually settled wide without cover in last few after beginning from a poor draw, widest runner into straight, made no further impression.
Travelled keenly at the back early, baulked for run until the 300M in straight, ran on well but never troubled the winner.

Began well but soon taken some 3L back to 5th, further away from pace when tempo increased approaching first turn, angled out to challenge entering home straight, fought on dourly under pressure to gain upper hand 50M out.

Broke well and amongst leaders early, gradually settled over 2L back in 2nd off the strong pace approaching first turn, chased race leader into straight, kept on until finding no extra inside final 150M.
Settled not far off the pace in 3rd, over 4L back in 3rd onto home bend, commenced move on straightening, hit the front narrowly over 200M out only to be caught inside the 50M.
Jumped best and soon took up running setting a strong pace, held over 2L advantage rounding home bend after travelling keenly, headed when found no extra over 200M out.
Jumped moderately and blundered settling in last few, only ran past well-beaten horses under pressure in straight.
Jumped well and in front early, ceded lead from strong pace for 3rd and then over 4L back in 4th approaching home bend, renewed pressure upon straightening but had nothing to give.
Sat worse than midfield, traveled okay, held up rounding the Turn, raced in restricted room over the concluding stages.
Sat towards rear, gave ground and never a threat.
Jumped only fairly, settled midfield, failed to respond when asked (See Incident Report).
Settled in front of midfield, raced two wide, one pace to the finish.
Settled in front of midfield, raced wide throughout, gave ground notably after 250M.
Sat on pace, weakened near 250M, no clear run.
Knuckled over badly as the start was effected, sat rear, switched out rounding the Turn, showed some dash over the concluding stages (Must BT, See Incident Report).
Settled midfield, raced three wide, made good progress when asked.
Sat behind midfield, raced wide, responded fairly well when asked, closed off okay.
Ridden along to lead, weakened entering the Straight, closed off fairly.
Jumped only fairly, settled behind midfield, raced keenly, slightly held up near the 300M and again near the 50M, could not be ridden out.
Sat behind the lead, traveled strongly, kept on well to win.
Settled towards rear, traveled fairly, not much impression made.
Settled midfield, crowded and was checked near the 300M, faded thereafter.
Tracked pace. Stayed on to edge second place but unable to reach winner.
Mid-field. Keen mid-race. No real impression under pressure final 300m, tight for room on a couple of occasions.
Held up. Limited impression under pressure when short of room 100m out.
Pressed leader. Weakened 200m out.
Made running. Two lengths clear off bend and comfortably maintained advantage. Unchallenged.
Tracked pace three wide. One paced under pressure.
Mid-field. Ridden and weakened 300m out.
Tracked pace. Unable to challenge winner home straight but stuck to task. Lost out in battle for second final 50m.
Poorly placed off bend, wide and towards rear. Stayed on steadily.
Raced in mid-field. Stayed on without being able to quicken. Short of room closing stages.
Waited with and always in rear.
Always about the same position in mid-field.
Dropped in from widest draw and plenty to do. Some late headway but never a threat.
Held up. Still plenty to do 400m out and never nearer.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide at rear, angled out 600M, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, made very good progress in straight to make frame, nearest on line.
Crowded start, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear run until approaching final 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Made contact at start, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, similar position on turn, made good progress in straight.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide in midfield, dropped towards rear 550M, showed no response early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Fast into stride, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first two final 50M.
Away with them, unable to slot in, trapped 4 wide in midfield, moved a bit closer after passing 900M, raced 3 wide, 1-1/2L back on turn, weakened early in straight when hard run took effect.
Shifted in at start, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M. (Lame right front leg.)

Lifted front feet on jumping and away tardily, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, finished off strongly, just beaten by a narrow margin. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, failed to make any progress in straight.
Began well, in touch in midfield, 2 wide, there to turn, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well from gate 13, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, 2 wide on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, very wide turning in, failed to close off in straight.

Moderately away from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, right behind the leader on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 250M, took the lead 50M, kept on well to the line, just able to hold off the challenger late.
Settled midfield on the rail, severely checked at 450M, lost every chance.
Sat on pace 2 wide, crowded at 450M, never really tested. (See Incident Report)
Settled behind midfield on the rail, checked at the 450M, ran on okay.
Sat at the rear, never a threat. (See Incident Report)
Settled worse than midfield 2 wide, closed off nicely.
Caught 3 wide on pace, weakened final 150M.
Settled at the rear, made some late ground.
Settled towards the rear, no clear run early part of the Straight, ran on strongly once in the clear, closest finish.
Settled near the rear, angled out rounding the Home Turn, stayed on well to score.
Sat behind the leaders, made no impression.
Not the quickest out, ridden along early to lead, kept on only fairly.
Sat 3 wide with cover midfield, closed off nicely, just couldn't hold off winner. (See Incident Report)
Settled in front of midfield 2 wide, only one pace when asked.
Hard ridden to sit outside the lead, under pressure at 600M, gave ground quickly. (Unacceptable performance, must trial)
Jumped quickly settling some 4L back in 6th off the slow pace, slightly closer when tempo slackened around final bend, inconvenienced 300M out, unable to quicken to threaten.
Well back to straight, saved ground turning in for home on the rail, did not find much room early in straight and steadied inside the 200M, fought on well to the line.
Pressed forward from a poor draw, settled one back in 2nd on top of first bend, came to join race leader 500M out, faded under pressure inside final 200M.
Travelled 3-wide without cover behind midfield, faded steadily inside final 300M.
Made running from the one draw setting a sedate pace, joined by others turning in for home, swamped under pressure inside final 150M.
Travelled 3-wide prominently, came to join the leaders entering home straight, weakened inside final 200M.
Settled at the back and waited with, swung widest in last entering home straight, finished off the race strongly inside final 200M to just fail to get up on line.
Held up just worse than midfield, snuck closer in slackened tempo home bend, did not find much room under pressure early in straight, fought on steadily to the line.
Settled in last few from a poor draw, came under pressure rounding final bend, never seen with a chance despite nearer at finish.
Settled just behind midfield, baulked behind runners early in straight until the 300M, fought on steadily to the line.

Held up in midfield travelling keenly in the slow tempo in back straight, came under pressure approaching home turn, quickened well inside final 300M but unable to peg back the winner and lost 2nd late.
Settled in midfield on rail mainly about 4L off the slow pace, closer when tempo slackened further onto home bend, unable to quicken under pressure in straight.
Travelled 3-wide without cover mainly in 5th about 4L off the slow pace, in similar position into straight, faded steadily inside final 300M.
Settled just off the pace on rail mainly in 4th, saved ground making home turn, improved steadily to hit the front from tiring pace-setter over 100M out, just held on to the line.
Led from 1100M, set steady pace to the straight, kept going well under top weight final 300M, comfortably held off pursuing rivals.
Blundered on jumping, taken across behind runners, towards the rear making the home turn, kept on without threat in the straight.
Settled down midfield, difficult to obtain clear running 450M-300M, did best work late for 5th.
Stayed in touch behind leaders, battled on same pace on straightening and never looked a winning hope.
Unable to slot in, caught 3-wide in midfield, failed to make progress on leaders in the straight.
Settled at the tail of the field, 6Ls to make up 400M, elected to take an inside run, briefly held up 200M before closing off well final stages to claim 3rd.
Tracked the pace, fought hard chasing leader final 200M, nearest finish.
Always close up behind leaders, had every chance on straightening, ran on fairly well for 4th.
Caught racing 3-wide towards the rear, had some work to do 400M, failed to run on.
Jumped fairly, raced keenly early stages, settled down in midfield, couldn't pick up in the straight, left behind by rivals passing 200M.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, caught wide early stages then pressed forward to track leader on outside, kept battling to 150M, faded close home.
Bumped after the start, ended up towards the rear 6Ls back, already beaten top of straight, soon left behind.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide in midfield, difficult to settle in the early stages, found rail 700M, angled out early in straight, finished off very strongly to score.
Made contact at start, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared near 200M, finished off well to take a place.
Shifted out at start, raced in midfield on the outside, peaked on turn, weakened early in straight.
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 4 lengths or so back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, angled out 500M, passed some tired runners in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped on jumping, raced at tail, 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening. (See Racing Incidents.)

Began well, raced prominently on the inside early, 2 wide after passing 700M, challenged the leader turning in, took the lead 350M, kept on well until 100M, peaked and headed approaching 50M, ran on evenly to take 2nd.

Bumped start, raced 3 wide better than midfield early, moved a bit closer after passing 1000M, 1-1/2L back on turn, showed some response early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, challenged by rival turning in, peaked and headed 350M, weakened final furlong.
Average to begin, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, there to turn, no clear run until 150M, finished off evenly.
Taken back from gate 7, raced 2 wide towards rear, 6-1/2L back, very wide turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Away well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 2 to 3 lengths back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Jumped only fairly, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, eased final 100M.
Made contact shortly after start, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out 500M, 4-1/2L back turning in, no clear run until approaching 100M, made minor progress thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)

Average to begin, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield early, 3 wide from 1000M, 2 lengths back turning in, showed very good response in straight, took the lead 200M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Jumped with them, raced 3 wide behind midfield, wider turning in, made minor progress early in straight, peaked 200M, ran on evenly to the line.
Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Made contact shortly after start, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, kept on same pace to the line.
Moderately away, raced in 3rd, saved ground on turn, no clear run until 150M, eased final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced prominently, 2 wide, shared lead from 600M, peaked and headed 200M, weakened final 100M.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, no clear run early in straight, cleared near 250M, finished off very strongly to take a place.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, very wide turning in, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened thereafter.
Away with them, raced behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, no clear run early in straight, cleared after passing 250M, finished off strongly to take 2nd, nearest on line.
Commenced well, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 wide on turn, made some progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)

Jumped well, raced better than midfield on the inside, blundered near 1200M, 2 wide from 1000M, a length or so back turning in, showed no response early in straight, eased final 300M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Out with rest, sent forward to take the lead, shared lead with rival from 600M, peaked and headed 400M, weakened final 300M. (See Racing Incidents.)

Commenced well, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 3 wide after entering the back straight, hard ridden from 500M, very wide turning in, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 150M. (Blood in trachea.)
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, raced towards rear on the inside, 7 to 8 lengths back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, no clear run 150M, eased thereafter.
Moderately away, raced 3 wide better than midfield, moved closer after passing 1200M, raced in 2nd from 1050M, 2 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 9 lengths or so back turning in, made very good progress in straight to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, raced 2 wide towards rear, 8-1/2L back turning in, failed to close off in straight.

Bumped start, positioned 2 wide, 1-1/2L back in the early stages, 2 to 3 lengths from 800M, 3 wide turning in, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened gradually close home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped only fairly, positioned 4 lengths behind the leader on the inside, 2 wide after passing 450M, not enough room early in straight, made good progress thereafter to take a place.
Bumped start, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Average to begin, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably in the middle stages, led by 2 lengths turning in, kicked clear early in straight, ran on strongly to the line and scored.
Began well from a wide draw, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, no cover on turn, showed limited response early in straight, one-paced thereafter.

Moderately away, raced 2 wide, 6 lengths or so back, 3 wide after entering the back straight, same margin back on turn, taken wide in straight and made good progress to make frame.

Held up. Driven halfway. Hung left bend and well held.
Held up from wide draw and no impression.
On the outer in mid-field. Driven from top of home straight. Made some late ground but never dangerous.
Made running. Headed 400m out. Weakened quickly.
Recovered from bump at start to track pace. Challenged 300m out but unable to stay with leading pair and faded.
Always towards rear.
Tracked pace. Chased leader from top of home straight and got on top final 75m.
In rear after slow start. Tight for room 650m out. One paced under pressure and never a threat.
Stayed on at the one pace from mid-field. No danger to leaders final 300m.
Waited with. Ridden off bend. Stayed on for clear third but no danger to front two.
Soon prominent. Led 400m out. Found winner too strong final 75m but clear of rest.
Settled worse than midfield, traveled oaky, made steady progress.
Settled midfield, raced three wide, closed off okay.
Settled worse than midfield, improved rounding the Turn, made good progress when placed under pressure.
Jumped only fairly, sat towards rear, one pace to the finish.
Jumped only fairly, sat rear, switched out rounding the Turn, had every chance.
Settled worse than midfield, failed to respond, no contention.

Sat in front of midfield, raced on the rail, ran on evenly.
Sat handy, gave ground notably passing 200M, never a danger.
Settled handy, traveled smoothly, responded nicely when asked after 200M, ran on well.
Jumped awkwardly and made contact with the right side of its barrier, sat towards rear, failed to respond when asked.
Chased the leader, raced wide throughout, weakened quickly in the Straight (Lame right hind on the day after racing).
Sat behind the leader, traveled strongly, kept on nicely to hold 2nd.
Ridden along to lead from 1000M, gave ground passing 200M, could not finish off (See Incident Report).
Disputed lead. Weakened home straight.
In touch in mid-field. Good headway off bend and ran on strongly to lead 100m out and go clear.
Disputed lead until faded final 200m.
Held up. Driven off bend. Some headway into mid-field but never dangerous.
Mid-field. Driven over 300m out and followed winner through. Unable to match that rival but stayed on for second.
Crowded at start, soon under pressure and behind. No impression.
Prominent. Led 400m out. Headed 100m out and no extra. lost two places late on.
Raced wide throughout. Under pressure over 300m out and no impression.
Mid-field. Headway up rail 200m out. One paced.
Mid-field. Lost ground under pressure from bend.
Prominent early. Chased leaders bend. Short of room early part of home straight. Driven and one paced after.
Tracked pace. Unable to match winner 200m out but stayed on for pressure.
Away with them, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 3 lengths back, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line. (Lost right front plate.)

Moderately away, raced at rear on the inside, 6 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and finished off very strongly to score. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from gate 12, raced 3 wide better than midfield, no cover throughout, kept on well in straight without threatening.
Crowded shortly after start, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 250M, finished off well to take 2nd.
Jumped well from a wide draw, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide, shared lead from 500M, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the challengers close home.
Average to begin, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, 1-3/4L back turning in, closed off well to take a place.
Began awkwardly, raced 2 wide towards rear, 4-3/4L back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from gate 10, raced towards rear on the outside, 6-1/2L back turning in, made some headway in straight.
Began well from gate 1, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.

Sat at the rear, limited response when asked.
Settled just behind the leaders, switched out in the Straight, ran on very nicely.

Settled midfield on the rail, stayed on fairly, no threat to top 3.
Settled in front of midfield, weakened final furlong.
Raced in front of midfield 2 wide, made no impression.
Sat at the rear 3 wide, never in contention.
Jumped nicely, showed good speed to lead, weakened slightly final 100M, held 3rd.
Tracked leader 2 wide, kept on well.
Settled worse than midfield 2 wide, hampered in the Straight, ran on ordinarily.
Settled towards the rear 2 wide, one pace when asked. (See Incident Report)
Settled behind midfield on the rail, hung out in the Straight, made some late ground.
Sat last, never a threat. (See Incident Report)
Sat on pace 2 wide, ran on evenly.
Jumped best from a poor draw but soon dropped to midfield while 4-wide, dropped further back to 9th onto home bend, kept on steadily under pressure in straight without threatening.
Gradually picked up to 7th in midfield, wide without cover and lost position rounding home bend and worse in 10th into straight, made no further impression.
Not far off in 4th on rail, drifted some 4L off the pace to 5th on top of home bend, dropped out tamely after straightening. (Jockey said horse may be better suited to turf surface)
Ridden along atter awkward start, settled some 2L back in 5th before crowded drifting further off the pace around home bend, kept on steadily without quickening from 3L 4th into straight.
Made narrow running early stages and ceded advantage 850M out, folded up quickly under pressure inside final 250M. (Tactic questioned)
Always thereabouts, drifted over 3L off the pace briefly on top of home bend, quickened under pressure to hit the front 300M out, won confidently.
Soon taken back from the widest draw, never seen with a chance.

Settled in last few early stages, made steady headway on rail from the 950M reaching 8th onto first bend, commenced move between runners early in straight and forced to switch 300M out, sustained good progress to the line.
Settled in last few after beginning from a poor draw remaining in 10th onto final turn, baulked for a run early in straight but finished off the race well inside final 250M.
Gradually taken back from a wide draw, dropped to last over 600M out despite niggled along, tailed-off into straight but ran on past well-beaten horses inside final 200M.

Settled in forward of midfield in 6th on rail, steadied off heels about 700M out, weakened under pressure inside final 250M. (Abnormal breathing noise)

Jumped only fairly, settled slightly further back than intended, got shuffled back to the rear entering home turn, failed to make up ground in the straight.
Jumped on terms, settled down 3-wide behind midfield, moved a bit closer to leaders home turn, responded well final 250M and was closing on leader every stride, just denied in a photo finish.
Failed to show pace to hold a more forward spot, ended up racing ahead of midfield, came under pressure 550M, failed to finish off the race.
Set early pace before settling down behind leader from 1300M, held 2nd place to 150M, faded late but hung on for 4th.
Given a waiting ride, settled towards the rear 6Ls off the pace, swung wide for home then closed off nicely in the straight, nearest finish.
Chased leaders in 3rd spot, driven along 500M, kept battling throughout final 350M but was always held by leaders.

Dropped back from wide draw, no closer than 3-wide and raced without cover early and middle stages, crept closer to leaders home turn, battled hard to stay in contention early straight, run ended 150M from home.
Jumped on terms, held up behind midfield 4-5Ls back, little change in position middle stages, found nothing when asked 400M, weakened to last. (No Vet findings.)
Soon taken across to the fence, settled behind midfield, held up making the home turn and got shuffled back to near last 400M, took a while to get going, ran on fastest final 200M. Nearest finish.
Switched off to race at the rear 7-8Ls back, switched to 3-wide home turn and brought widest on straightening, unable to finish off.
From wide draw dropped back to a rearward spot, 7Ls off leader on settling, switched away from fence top of the bend then closed off mildly over final 300M.

Crowded on jumping, trapped wide in midfield, no cover throughout, made some progress early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened gradually close home.
Taken back to race 2 wide at rear, 5 lengths or so back turning in, made very good progress in straight to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
Taken back to race at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, passed some tired runners in straight.
Began well, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length turning in, peaked early in straight, headed 250M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)

Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 10 lengths or so back in the middle stages, moved a bit closer on turn, 8 to 9 lengths back turning in, made some progress in straight.

Shifted out at start and bumped, raced prominently, 2 wide, allowed rival to cross near 800M, hard ridden approaching 500M, 3 wide turning in, kept on well early in straight, led briefly 100M, peaked and headed 50M, ran on evenly.
Away well, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened 200M, eased final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the outside, moved a bit closer after passing 1100M, 3 wide behind midfield on turn, kept on same pace in straight.

Began well from gate 1, took the lead, travelled keenly in the early and middle stages, shared lead on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened final 50M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Stood flat-footed as the start was effected and lost ground, raced towards rear on the inside, 6 lengths back turning in, finished off strongly to take 2nd.

Jumped only fairly, waited with at the rear, travelled well into straight and gave immediate response when asked passing 300M, soon quickened clear for a dominant victory.
Chased leader, going well passing 400M, briefly in front mid-straight but was quickly brushed aside by the winner over final 200M.
Jumped only fairly, dropped back to the rear, lay in under pressure in the straight and finished the race off only fairly.
Stayed in touch with leaders, failed to respond on straightening, first to be beaten.
From draw 1 pressed forward to the lead, headed inside 300M then faded towards the line.
In 3rd spot, commenced to race keenly 800M and raced wide no cover after, kept on fairly in the straight. Never going the pace to challenge.
Settled towards the rear, ran on mildly to take 3rd but was never a threat to the runaway winner.
Sat worse than midfield, traveled only fairly, gave ground notably passing 250M.
Ridden along to lead, traveled strongly, responded well to win.
Jumped awkwardly, sat towards rear, raced very keenly, crowded rounding the Turn, not much impression made.
