Settled about 3L off the pace in 4th early, closer to speed just 2L back from 1300M out, commenced move entering straight, ran on under pressure without threatening.
Settled in 5th on rail mainly about 3L off the pace, came under pressure to challenge upon straightening but never threatening. (Jockey said slow pace did not suit.)

Jumped well but soon taken well back, trailed the field to straight saving ground on home turn, did not find much room early in straight, finished off the race strongly inside final 100M. (Tactic questioned)
Chased leader 2-wide gaining slightly closer approaching home turn, unable to sustain effort inside final 250M.
Broke well to lead and make all setting moderate pace, kicked clear under pressure in straight to keep runners-up at bay.
Jumped moderately settling in 6th some 5L off the pace, remained well back into straight, ran on well inside final 300M without threatening.
Ridden to 3rd on rail within 2L of pace, made modest progress without quickening.
Travelled in a midfield position along the 2-path, fought hard under a big weight in the straight but couldn't quite match for leaders in the closing stages.
Settled down in second half of the field, made mild progress early straight, checked 200M and not going the pace to challenge leaders final stages.
Settled down midfield from draw 2, pushed along 500M, responded fairly well early straight and looked one of the winning hopes mid-straight, kept on steadily closing stages for a respectable 4th.

From draw 3 obtained a more forward position behind leaders, came under pressure 500M, soon beaten. (Jockey : better suited ridden in a conservative manner in the early stages to allow it to finish the race off.)
Chased leaders in a race run at good tempo, kept on same pace early straight, unable to sustain run over final 200M.
Held up in mid-division, raced keenly middle stages, failed to respond on straightening, soon left behind by rivals.
Made early use to hold the lead and was disadvantaged by being pressured by a rival, struggled to keep up 350M, weakened towards the line.
Went forward from draw 14 and pressed leader on outside in a fast run race, briefly led early straight, caught nearing 200M, no extra late stages.
Bumped at the start, dropped back to the rear from a wide draw, had some work to do top of straight then closed off fastest final 400M to take 2nd in a busy finish.

Jumped awkwardly, ended up at the rear racing keenly early stages, waited with on the inside, held up 350-250M behind a weakening rival then failed to respond under soft riding. (Jockey questioned re his vigour from near the 200M.)
Never far off from leaders, in 5th place entering home turn and looked to be travelling well passing 400M, driven to lead mid-straight but run ended close home and lost several places near line.

Towards the rear, raced keenly early stages, made good progress over final 350M to take 3rd. (Jockey : instructed to ride his mount in a conservative manner in the early stages to allow the horse to finish off.)
Held up towards the rear in a fast run race, 10Ls off the pace at one point, raced greenly in the straight and proved difficult to ride, stayed on final 400M without posing threat to leaders.
Bumped at the start, from draw 11 obtained a position behind midfield, out into clear 300M then closed off strongly to lead 50M from home. Won in pleasing style.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, finished off well to take a place. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 7 lengths back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter, eased final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped with them, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight to make frame, nearest on line.

Taken back from gate 11, raced at rear on the inside, travelled keenly in the early and middle stages, saved ground on turn, made good progress early in straight, no clear run 150M to 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Moderately away, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Out with rest, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, finished off strongly, led close home.
Made contact shortly after start, raced 2 wide, 1 to 2 lengths back, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Taken back from gate 12, raced 2 wide at rear, 10 lengths back turning in, made very good progress in straight, no clear run final 50M.
Began well, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weakened gradually final 50M.
Jumped well from gate 10, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 3 lengths back, there to turn, finished off well, not quite able to challenge.

Moderately away from a wide draw, raced better than midfield on the outside early, sent forward after passing 1000M, 2nd on turn, 2 wide, took the lead 150M, ran on well but unable to hold off the winner close home.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, travelled keenly in the early stages, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Crowded shortly after start, raced towards rear on the inside early, 2 wide from 900M, 8 lengths or so back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Jumped well from gate 11, raced better than midfield on the outside, no cover on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Made contact at start, taken back to race at tail, 6 to 7 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, carried wider 550M, made some progress early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide turning in, finished off strongly to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
Away well, raced 2 wide in midfield, wider turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Bumped start, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide approaching 500M, no clear run early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Jumped well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/2L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and made good progress to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Taken back to race at rear on the inside, angled out 600M, 6 lengths or so back turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.
Began awkwardly from gate 1, raced better than midfield, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 200M.
Made contact at start, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide into straight, made some progress early in straight, peaked 250M, weakened inside final furlong.
Bumped start, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, 1-1/2L back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final furlong. (Jockey dropped whip 300M.)
Began well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, angled out 550M, 3 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Shifted in at start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, commenced move 550M, very wide into straight, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 150M, kept on strongly, easily scored.
Began well from the widest draw, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide, a length behind the leader turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on very well to the line and scored.
Out with rest, raced 2 wide, 3 to 4 lengths back, 3 wide from 450M, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final furlong.
Began only fairly, positioned 7 lengths behind the leader on rail, same margin back on turn, angled out early in straight, bumped 250M, no clear run until 150M, made some progress thereafter.
Jumped well, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back to race 2 wide behind midfield, there to turn, angled out 350M, bumped 250M, ran on evenly to the line.
Away with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, 5 lengths or so back, commenced move 400M, very wide into straight, finished off well to take a place.
Jumped only fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight to make frame without threatening.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Away well, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, closed off well to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, easy run to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M.(See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from gate 11, raced at tail, 9 lengths or so back, still last turning in, taken wide in straight and made good progress to be nearest on line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well from draw 1 then eased back to a midfield position, briefly held up 250M before closing off the race well under top weight to claim 2nd. Nearest finish.
Caught wide without cover from draw 11, pushed forward from 700M to race outside the lead, couldn't sustain run 250M, faded towards the line.
Restrained to race near the rear, raced too keenly in the early and middle stages, failed to run on in the straight. (Blood in trachea.)
From outside draw dropped back to the rear, swung wide from home turn before staying on to finish a non-threatening 6th.
Set pace, slipped away early straight and opened up 2L lead, kept on well late stages to hold off pursuing rivals.
Jumped on terms, settled 4-5Ls back in mid-division, raced wide without cover from 600M, soon weakened top of straight and beaten.
Began awkwardly, settled towards the rear a little further back than intended, ran on well final 250M to take 3rd. (Jockey questioned regarding riding in the home straight- tactics reasonable.)
Jumped fast, chased leader on settling, held 2nd from 300M to 60M, weakened late and was eased close home when crowded for room.
Jumped on fairly, held up behind mid-division, ran past beaten horses final 300M. Never able to challenge leaders.
Bumped at the start, with blinkers being applied took up a more forward position chasing leaders, couldn't quicken on straightening, soon out of contention.
Jumped on terms, settled ahead of midfield, kept on final 300M without posing serious threat to leaders.
Dropped back to the rear 6-7Ls off the pace, pushed along home turn but failed to make up ground. Never in the picture.
Settled midfield, traveled okay, raced in restricted room near 150M, could not be fully tested.
Sat handy, weakened near the 300M, never a danger (See Incident Report).
Settled behind midfield, crowded entering the Straight, not much impression (See Incident Report).
Settled worse than midfield, held up in the early Straight, no clear run (See Incident Report).
Sat towards rear, traveled smoothly, made forward move from 600M, closed off nicely.
Settled in front of midfield, traveled nicely, made good progress when asked, just missed.
Sat towards rear, made forward move from 700M, lay in under pressure, one pace to the finish.
Tracked leader, weakened quickly entering the Straight (See Incident Report).
Slow to begin, sat towards rear, ran on evenly to the line.
Sat in front of midfield, traveled okay, responded reasonably well from the Turn.
Stumbled on jumping, sat rear, held up at the top of the Straight, raced tight until 150M (See Incident Report).
Ridden along to lead, traveled fairly, failed to respond when asked (Disappointing Performance, Must BT, See Incident Report).
Held up in last pair and keen, wide into home straight, little impression.
Tracked leading pair, chased winner home straight but always held by comfortable margin.
In rear after crowded from stalls and hampered 800m out, never dangerous but some late headway after angled out at 100m line.
Tracked pace, unable to quicken 200m out, no extra final 100m.
Mid-field after crowded at start, driven 300m out, stayed on steadily.
Made running, kicked two lengths clear off bend, comfortable winner.
Green and keen in wide position towards rear, struggling 300m out and dropped away.
Three wide in mid-field, headway halfway, stayed on but lacked pace to challenge winner.
Across from wide draw to chase leader, ridden 200m out, weakened.
Mid-field after bumped at start, unable to quicken from 200m out.
Held up in last pair, ridden off bend, no impression.
Crowded shortly after start, towards rear, never nearer.
Fast into stride, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, failed to close off in straight.
Bumped and unbalanced shortly after start, sent forward to take the lead, led by 2 lengths turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 50M.
Crowded shortly after start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 50M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped shortly after start, raced in midfield, 4 lengths or so back turning in, finished off very strongly to score.
Shifted out at start, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 150M, stayed on evenly to take a place.
Crowded shortly after start, raced at rear on the outside, 7 to 8 lengths back on turn, made some headway in straight.
Taken back from gate 9, raced at tail, 8 lengths or so back turning in, made no impression in straight.
Crowded shortly after start, raced behind midfield on the outside, 5 lengths or so back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Jumped only fairly, raced towards rear, 7-1/2L back turning in, bumped near 250M, made no impression in straight.
Settled midfield on the rail, closed off nicely when asked.
Jumped well and led, weakened in the Straight.
Sat last, made little impression. (See Incident Report)
Settled worse than midfield 4 wide, stayed on fairly.
Caught 3 wide no cover in front of midfield, weakened from 400M.
Sat behind the leader on the rail, ran on nicely.
Hard ridden early but show little speed, taken back towards the rear, never a threat. (See Incident Report)
Sat on pace, kept on well, just can't hold off the winner.
Settled behind midfield 2 wide, limited response when asked. (See Incident Report)
Sat at the rear on the rail, one pace when asked.
Settled in front of midfield, closed off okay, just one pace final 100M.
Sat midfield 2 wide, ran on evenly.
Never far off on rail reaching 3rd 700M out, baulked for a run rounding home bend before angled out for a run into straight, gained slender advantage shortly after only to be pipped at post.

Settled well back from the widest draw, came under pressure when last 550M out, improving when forced to steady off heels on straightening, switched in for a clear run inside the 150M out but could make no further impression.

Jumped best to lead early stages from a low draw, ceded advantage for 2nd on rail 1100M out, inconvenienced and dropped to 4th inside the 700M, weakened under pressure out of contention inside final 200M.
Settled at the back from a poor draw, made rapid progress between runners from the 700M to reach joint 4th 4-wide rounding home bend, unable to sustain effort and folded up quickly in straight.

Settled in forward of midfield on rail, shuffled back behind runners on rail rounding home bend, snuck back up entering straight, ran on to hold some chance 150M out but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Settled in last few on rail, commenced move rounding home bend, obtained a clear run over 150M out in straight, quickened well to prevail by the narrowest of margins.

Pressed forward from a poor draw travelling one back 3-wide around first bend, gained 3rd approaching back straight, disputed lead rounding home bend holding every chance in straight until finding no extra inside final 100M .

Driven forward from a poor draw, led 2-wide 1100M out setting a fast pace which was questioned, obtained rails run over 800M out, came under pressure home bend, found no extra and headed soon after straightening.
Soon taken back wide behind midfield, shifted further back rounding first bend for cover, commenced move very wide home bend, made up ground down the centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Prominent early stages settling over 2L back in 5th into back straight, came under pressure to hold place 3-wide around home bend, made no further impression inside final 200M.
Jumped moderately from a low draw settling in midfield, commenced move out wide rounding home bend and wide into straight, kept on steadily without threatening.
Settled in rear of midfield, hampered and lost position over 600M out, steadied again over 400M out dropping to last, went widest into straight and finished off the race well inside final 100M.
Went forward and vied for lead until 1000M, chased leader into straight, couldn't sustain run inside 200M, faded towards the line.
Began well from draw 1, tracked leaders on settling, challenged for the lead passing 400M, led 250M and kept going well to the line.

From draw 10 pushed along to find the lead but unable to cross, caught wide until 1100M, hard run took its toll and weakened from 400M. (Stewards advised jockey he had made an error judgement early stages.)
Restrained behind midfield, had 6Ls to make up 400M, stayed on beating tired horses. No threat to leaders.
Bumped on jumping, raced keenly in midfield, into the clear 250M then ran on mildly final stages without troubling leaders.
Taken back from wide draw, settled in last spot until passing 600M, made up good ground on straightening to take 2nd before line.
From draw 2 settled down in midfield along the inside, travelled well into straight and kept up the chase on winner throughout, went 2nd from 50M until one stride before line.
Jumped only fairly, settled towards the rear, came under pressure 500M but failed to respond to riding. Never in the hunt.
Instructed to go forward, settled in 4th in a fast run race, couldn't finish off in the straight. (Jockey : may be better suited by being ridden in a conservative manner in early stages.)
Went forward vying for lead, became clear leader from 1000M, under siege top of straight, fought hard but no extra and faded final 200M to finish 4th.
Bumped at the start, given a waiting ride near the rear, 8Ls to make up 400M, swung widest into straight, ran past well beaten horses only.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight to take a place. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped awkwardly and blundered shortly after the start, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 8 lengths back turning in, made some progress in straight.
Crowded start, raced 2 wide, 7 lengths back, commenced move 500M, very wide into straight, kept on same pace in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slightly slow out and bumped, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out 400M, 5-1/2L turning in, finished off evenly.
Made contact shortly after start, taken back to race towards rear on the outside, 6 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight.
Bumped start, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead near 1000M, led by 3/4L turning in, peaked and headed 150M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began smartly, took the early lead, headed near 1000M, 2nd in the middle stages, 3/4L back turning in, showed good response in straight, hit the front 150M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out 350M, crowded near 300M, ran on evenly to the line.
Bumped start, raced better than midfield on the inside, moved a bit closer on turn, angled out early in straight, closed off well to take 2nd.
Shifted out at start and made contact, raced 2 wide behind midfield, commenced move 500M, 4 lengths back turning in, finished off well to make frame without threatening.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, kept on evenly in straight.
Average to begin, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the stands' side, hard ridden after passing 350M but only showed limited response, weakened final furlong.
Jumped only fairly, taken back to race at rear on the stands' rail, 2-3/4L back at 400M, finished off very strongly to take 2nd, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Began awkwardly and made contact, raced towards rear, 3 lengths or so back, failed to make any progress final 400M.
Made contact at start, positioned 1-3/4L behind the leader on the stands' rail, hard ridden approaching 300M but only showed limited response, ran on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped awkwardly, sent forward to race prominently, 1/4L back at 400M, peaked 300M, weakened close home.
Began well, sent forward to race prominently on the stands' rail, led by 1/4L at 400M, kept on well to the line and scored by a narrow margin.
Settled in second half of the field 3-4Ls off the pace, held up 250M-150M, couldn't make up ground final stages.
Bumped at the start, held on-pace position just behind leaders, couldn't quicken passing 400M, faded final 200M. (Roarer.)
Jumped awkwardly, always stayed close enough to the pace but ran home one paced final 400M. Never a winning hope.
Settled behind midfield along the stand's rail, made smooth progress from 300M, finished off strongest final 100M to take 3rd beaten a short head.
Jumped well and showed good speed to track leader, pushed along 400M but not quickened, steadied when crowded 250M, faded final stages.
Went forward and raced just behind leader, couldn't sustain run 300M, weakened towards the line. (No Vet findings.)

Jumped well, tracked leader along the stand's rail before shifting out 350M to challenge, all out final 200M and was just held in a driving finish. (Jockey warned for using his whip in a backhand manner forward of the shoulder.)
In mid-division early stages, made rapid headway from 500M, loomed a threat 250M, kept on well to the line and was only beaten 0.5L in a busy finish involving first six horses.
From draw 1 quickly moved across to the stands' side and led, kept going well inside 250M, was tackled by rivals on both sides closing stages but managed to hold on in a busy finish.
Jumped only fairly, settled towards the rear, held up 250M-150M when wasn't beaten, lost every chance.
Slow to begin, settled near last 5Ls back, directed to center of track to secure clear running passing 300M, made good progress towards the finish. (lay in when placed under pressure.)
Jumped only fairly and was shifted across behind runners in the early stages, raced near last 5Ls back, failed to run on final 400M.
In midfield towards the stands' side, did best work final 100M, raced in restricted room late and being buffeted near line. Beaten a neck in close finish.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, soon recovered to race in midfield, move up to challenge for the lead 300M, hung under pressure but fought well to the line just beaten a neck.
Settled in front of midfield, raced on the rail, gave ground quickly passing 200M.
Sat towards rear, held up between 200M to 50M, no clear run.
Led, traveled smoothly, made good progress, closed off nicely (See Incident Report).
Sat in front of midfield, traveled fairly, one pace to the finish (See Incident Report).
Sat behind midfield, raced wide and without cover throughout, minor progress made.
Sat rear, switched out rounding the Turn, made steady progress over the concluding stages.
Settled midfield, traveled fairly well, closed off okay.
Jumped awkwardly, settled towards rear, failed to respond when asked (See Incident Report).
Tracked leader, raced 2 wide, responded nicely when asked.
Sat handy, switched out entering the Straight, ran on evenly.
Slow to jump, sat worse than midfield, not much impression made.
Sat towards rear, traveled fairly, limited response when asked (See Incident Report).
Close up in chasing group behind clear leader, no match for winner final 300m but stayed on to get up for second late on.

Under pressure in mid-field over 300m out, one paced until no extra final 100m.

Always towards rear and never dangerous.

Wide in mid-field, lost place off bend and well held.
Mid-field, under pressure over 300m out, one paced.
Slowly away and hampered early, recovered to race in mid-field, stayed on at the one pace.
Keen in front and set strong pace, 4 lengths clear halfway, headed 150m out after starting to tire, weakened and lost second late on.
Keen in rear, under pressure over 200m out, no impression.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, 8 to 9 lengths back turning in, made good progress early in straight, peaked on run 150M, ran on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Jumped only fairly, taken back to race at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress in the run home.

Taken back to race 2 wide behind midfield, 6 lengths or so back turning in, made some headway early in straight, peaked 150M, kept on same pace to the line.

Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight to take a place.
Jumped well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 to 4 lengths back turning in, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 100M, kept on well to the line, won by 3/4L.

Settled towards the rear 3 wide, made some late ground.

Sat on pace 2 wide, one pace when asked.

Tracked leader 2 wide, kept on okay, no threat to top 2.
Sat at the rear, only able to pass weakened rivals.
Settled midfield 2 wide, made no impact.
Sat behind the leaders, under pressure from 600M, gave ground quickly. (See Incident Report)
Ridden along early to lead, weakened final 300M.
Sat near the rear on the rail, made no impression
Settled in front of midfield 2 wide, limited response when asked.
Settled midfield on the rail, stayed on okay.
Jumped on terms, settled 3 wide no cover in front of midfield, ran on nicely when asked. (See Incident Report)
Settled worse than midfield 2 wide, raced greenly, showed some late response. (See Incident Report)
Began well before settling in midfield, baulked for a run early in straight, ran home one-paced.

Close up early settling mainly in joint 3rd within 2L of pace, slightly further back rounding home bend, renewed effort into straight but hampered 200M out and dropped out of contention. (Mucus in trachea)
Moderate start, shared lead on rail before taken one back over 1000M out, weakened under pressure out of contention soon after straightening. (Blood in trachea)

Travelled wide without cover in midfield after beginning from the widest draw, slightly worse and wider around home bend, widest of all into straight, made modest headway under pressure to be nearest at finish.

Well there, gained narrow advantage over 1100M out kicking over 1L clear on top of home bend, went further away in front after straightening but unable to sustain effort and swamped inside final 200M.

Began well from gate 14, raced towards rear on the stands' side, moved to the middle track after passing 400M, made no progress thereafter.

Bumped start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 4 lengths or so back turning in, finished off strongly to take 2nd, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Knuckled on jumping, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.

Jumped well from a wide draw, raced prominently on the outside early, found rail near 950M, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Shifted in at start and made contact, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out approaching 450M, made very good progress in straight to take a place, nearest finish.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and made some progress.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, hit the front 250M, kept on well, just able to hold off the challengers late.
Dropped in from wide draw and lot to do, stayed on but never on terms with leaders.
Held up in last pair from high draw, never a factor.
Tracked pace, no extra when tight for room 200m out, weakened.
Keen towards rear, little impression under pressure for much of home straight, made some late ground but never a threat.
Made running, three lengths clear halfway, closed down from 200m line, headed 100m out, no extra.
Tracked pace, keen, weakened 300m out.
Towards rear of mid-field, stayed on home straight, never nearer.
Mid-field, good headway under pressure from 400m out, led 100m out and responded well to hold off runner-up.
Raced wide in mid-field, headway 300m out, every chance final 150m and beaten only by narrow margin.
Recovered from slow start to race in mid-field, short of room early part of home straight, one paced under pressure until no extra final 100m.
Waited with towards rear, three wide, stayed on home straight, unable to quite reach front two.
Held up, pushed along before halfway, left behind home straight, well held.
Quickly recovered from slow start to race in mid-field, headway 400m out, no further impression final 100m.
Tracked clear leader, hung right under pressure over 200m out, no extra final 100m.
Crowded on jumping, taken back to race 2 wide at rear, 8 lengths back turning in, taken wide in straight and made good progress to be nearest on line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped with them, raced in midfield on the outside, 3 lengths or so back turning in, finished off very strongly to score.
Began smartly from the widest draw, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first two final 50M.
Crowded shortly after start, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, no extra final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, 3/4L back turning in, peaked early in straight, steadied near 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced at rear on the outside, 8 lengths or so back turning in, made no impression in the run home.
Moderately away from gate 1, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well in straight but always held.
Made contact shortly after start, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, 2-1/2L back turning in, finished off evenly.

Began well, taken back to race behind midfield on the inside, 5 lengths back on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked on run 100M, weakened gradually thereafter. (Jockey dropped whip 100M.)

Moderately away, raced 2 wide behind midfield, difficult to settle in the early stages, 5 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame.
Waited with towards rear, hampered 700m out, under pressure 300m out, little impression.

Wide in rear and keen, rapid headway to go prominent 750m out, weakened over 200m out.

Led, headed 750m out, chased leaders into home straight, weakened 150m out.
Tracked leaders and keen, led 200m out, headed 100m out, no extra.

Settled in front of midfield, traveled fairly, limited response when asked (See Incident Report).
Ridden along to lead, traveled smoothly, closed off strongly.
Tracked leader, raced two wide, weakened passing 200M.
Jumped only fairly, sat towards rear, crowding entering the Straight, could not finish the race off (See Incident Report).

Sat rear, traveled nicely, made good ground over the concluding stages.

Settled midfield, traveled okay, ran on evenly.

Tracked pace three wide, unable to quicken from 300m out and lost ground.

Tracked pace against rail, bumped 150m out, no extra.
Held up, keen under restraint, pushed along 300m out, no impression.
Fast start and soon in front, found plenty for pressure from 200m out, won going away.
Raced wide, pushed along towards rear over 300m out, left behind final 200m.
Held up, under pressure 300m out, stayed on late but unable to reach leaders.

Made contact at start, sent forward to take the lead, travelled keenly in the early stages, led by 1-1/2L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked 100M, headed and weakened approaching final 50M, weakened thereafter.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced at tail, 11 lengths back, moved closer along the rail on turn but still 8 to 9 lengths behind, taken wide in straight made reasonable progress.
Jumped only fairly and made contact, raced 2 wide in midfield, carried wider after passing 700M, no cover on turn, closed off well to make frame without threatening.
Jumped well, taken back to race 2 wide towards rear, 8 lengths or so back turning in, taken very wide in straight and made some progress.

Jumped with them, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide after passing 700M, 4 lengths or so back turning in, made good progress in straight to take a place.
Jumped well, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, commenced move 400M, 3 lengths back turning in, finished off well to take 2nd.
Began only fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, 7 lengths back, 2 wide from 400M, one-paced in the run home.
Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the outside, 8 lengths or so back, 6 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening the first few.
Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, 3 lengths back, peaked on run 600M, dropped towards rear on turn, emptied early in straight. (Lame right front leg next day morning.)
Sat just in front of midfield on the rail, just one pace when asked.
Sat last, never in contention. (See Incident Report) (Performance unacceptable, must trial.)
Sat outside the lead, weakened in the Straight.
Sat towards the rear 2 wide, angled out in the Straight, made some ground.
Jumped well and led, kept on okay.
Sat behind midfield on the rail, stayed on fairly.
Settled midfield 2 wide, closed off strongly when asked, won going away.
Sat on pace 2 wide, responded nicely in the Straight, no match to winner. (See Incident Report)
Sat at the rear, never a threat

Among leaders early stages gradually shifting 2L back to 5th, became 6th some 3L back onto home bend, slightly further back when inconvenienced early in straight, responded well to snatch victory final strides.
Broke well from the middle draw and soon taken back, raced keenly in midfield in back straight and steadied about 750M out, one of the widest swinging for home, kept on well.
Jumped fairly from the one draw but soon took up running attempting to make all, headed narrowly upon straightening for home but fought on steadily to just clinch a placing.
Settled well back wide without cover from a poor draw, made steady headway from the 800M travelling wide in 9th around home bend, fought on steadily down the centre of the straight.
Travelled behind midfield after slightly slowly away, keen when steadied off heels 900M out, snuck closer on rail turning into straight, ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.

Held up just behind leaders in 5th on rail, checked off heels on 1000M bend when keen, continued to race keenly in back straight chasing leaders onto home turn, tightened on rail 200M out, kept on at the one pace.
Soon taken back to midfield but unable to obtain much cover 3-wide, commenced move passing the 700M sharing 2L 3rd 3-wide into straight, fought on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Settled well back from a poor draw, never seen with a chance.
Recovered quickly from moderate start settling towards rear, drifted backward to 10th onto home bend, fought on steadily in straight, never nearer.
Well there 3-wide early, gradually settled 1L back in 2nd becoming 3rd over 700M out, 2L off the pace around home bend, soon weakened after straightening.

Began well from the middle draw sharing pace 3-wide, obtained position alongside leader in 2nd passing the 600M gaining slender advantage into straight, fought on steadily only to be caught close home.

Showed superior early speed to lead as expected, had 2-3L margin over rivals 400M, quickened up again to increase his lead and was well in control over final 200M. Impressively.
Hampered after the jump, moved up to chase the pace 2Ls back, went 2nd inside 300M, tried hard couldn't get closer to the runaway winner.
Settled down behind midfield, had plenty to make up on runaway leader 400M, was making mild progress when raced tight over final 100M and not able to be ridden out to the line.

Moderately away from a wide draw, taken back to race 2 wide towards rear, moved a bit closer on turn, 6 lengths back at 400M, very wide into straight, finished off strongly to make frame, nearest on line,
Taken back from the widest draw, raced 2 wide at rear, 8 lengths back turning in, made some progress in straight.

Crowded start, raced in midfield on the outside, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, peaked 500M, weakened early in straight.

Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide towards rear, 7 lengths or so back, commenced move 550M, 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Dropped back to near last, got shuffled back to the rear 600M and had plenty to do on straightening, ran past beaten horses only.
Jumped only fairly, ended up racing near last, had big task in hand 400M, failed to run on.

Very slow to begin, sat rear, made some ground when asked (Must Stalls Test).

Sat towards rear, one pace to the finish (See Incident Report).
Settled midfield, traveled fairly, not much impression made (Noted to be lame in its right front leg on the next day, See Incident Report).

Mid-field, under pressure over 200m out, stayed on, closed on leaders final 50m.
Waited with towards rear, short of room between 400m out and 300m out, hung right when clear and no impression.

Towards rear of mid-field, under pressure 400m out, no real impression.
Waited with towards rear, wide off final bend, steady headway until no further impression final 50m.

Average to begin, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield early, dropped to midfield in the middle stages, commenced move 600M, 2 lengths back turning in, took the lead 150M, kept on well to the line and scored.

Began well, trapped 4 wide with no cover, 1 to 2Ls back, found cover after entering the back straight, positioned 2 wide, 3 lengths back from 1000M, commenced move 550M, made good progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Slightly slow out and crowded, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out near 550M, 3 to 4 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to take a place, nearest finish.

Taken back from a wide draw, difficult to settle in the early stages, raced towards rear on the inside, angled out near 500M, 5 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 10 lengths back, improved along the rail on turn, made some progress early in straight, no clear run 150M.

Jumped well from gate 1, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 200M, ran on evenly to the line.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, moved closer after passing 750M, 3 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, kept on evenly in the run home.

Settled in front of midfield 2 wide, closed off nicely, just got there on the line.
Tracked leader, kept on well, weakened final few strides.
Settled midfield 2 wide, closed off fairly.
Settled behind midfield on the rail, never a threat.
Jumped nicely and led, weakened in the Straight. (See Incident report)
Settled midfield on the rail, one pace when asked.
Settled at the rear, made no impression.
Missed the start, settled towards the rear, stayed on. (See Incident report)
Sat behind the leaders, kept on nicely, just missed.
Settled worse than midfield 2 wide, made little impression.
Broke well travelling wide with the leaders, shifted one back 2-wide coming onto first bend, folded up quickly after straightening.
Settled in 5th some 3L off the pace, shifted 4-wide without cover rounding home bend, kept on steadily without quickening for a place in the run to the line.
Travelled in rear after sluggish start, made steady headway 3-wide rounding home bend and wider into straight, fought on steadily in the centre of the straight, never nearer.
Soon took up running setting a steady pace, drew clear inside final 300M for a convincing victory.
Broke well from the one draw settling one back on rail in 3rd, unable to quicken under pressure in straight.

Niggled along but gradually settled wide without cover just behind midfield, dropped to tail-end rounding home bend and never seen with a chance thereafter.

Jumped awkwardly, lacked early pace and ended up near last, came under pressure home turn and failed to make any progress in the straight.

Away in line, settled down 3-wide in midfield, hard driven from top of straight, did best work final 250M, just prevailed in a 3-way photo.

Pressed along after the start to be tracking leaders, fought on one paced on early straight, was already out of contention when steadied 50M losing momentum.

Jumped fairly from draw 12, taken back to second half of the field, struggled to keep up 600M, soon ended up in last and out of contention.
Dropped back from wide draw, towards the rear early stages before shifting back to last entering home turn, plenty to do 400M but failed to respond.
Reserved behind midfield, saved ground on inside throughout, made headway from 300M, briefly held up 150M before running on well towards the line beaten less than 1L.
Average to begin, sent forward to take the lead, challenged by rival turning in, peaked and headed approaching 300M, weakened final furlong.
Began well from a wide draw, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, challenged the leader turning in, took the lead approaching 300M, kept on well to hold off the challengers.

Jumped with them, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, showed some response early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Out with rest, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 300M, finished off well to take a place.

Moderately away, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Jumped only fairly, raced at tail, 6 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, passed some tired runners in straight.

Made contact shortly after start, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 lengths or so back, there to turn, closed off well to take 2nd, nearest on line.
Taken back to race 2 wide behind midfield, 4 lengths back turning in, no clear run early in straight, found daylight approaching 250M, finished off evenly.
Bumped start, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, allowed rival to cross near 900M, 1 out 1 back on turn, hit the front 250M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner close home.
Fast into stride, sent forward to take the lead, shared lead on turn, peaked and headed 250M, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Commenced well, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 2-1/2L back turning in, finished off very strongly to score.
Began well from a wide draw, raced better than midfield on the outside, 2 lengths or so back, no cover on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final furlong.

Began well from gate 1, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide after passing 550M, 3 lengths or so back turning in, no clear run early in straight, cleared 250M, finished off well to take place.

Crowded shortly after start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths back turning in, finished off well to take 2nd.

Jumped with them, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Moderately away, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening.

Bumped on the hindquarters on jumping, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, a length or so back turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened final 100M.

Jumped only fairly, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight to make frame without threatening.
Fast into stride, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, showed good response early in straight, led briefly 150M, peaked and headed 75M, weakened thereafter.
Settled within 3L of pace in 4th early stages, closer to speed when 5th just inside the 800M, came under pressure rounding home bend but weakened steadily after straightening.
Pressed forward from a poor draw to soon reach one back 2-wide in 2nd, came to join the leader on top of home bend and hit the front over 200M out, hung on well under pressure.
Settled in rear of midfield on rail, came under pressure inside the 600M, baulked for a run entering home straight, kept on at the one pace without quickening.
Settled just better than midfield in 5th or 6th on rail, became 7th some 3L off the pace 700M out, fought on steadily without quickening in straight.
Soon taken back to last from a poor draw racing keenly early stages, came under strong pressure rounding home bend but never threatening.
Settled just off the pace in 3rd on rail, became 4th in similar position over 700M out, came under pressure when tempo quickened around home bend, weakened under pressure after straightening.

Settled in midfield in 6th on rail, came under pressure 700M out, made no further impression after swinging wide into straight.
Crowded at start settling just behind midfield, came under pressure inside final 600M after tempo quickened, one of the widest into straight, kept on steadily under pressure past well-beaten horses.
Soon took up running setting a sedate early pace, quickened up the tempo inside the 900M holding some 1L advantage before joined around home bend, headed 200M out and weakened under pressure.

Travelled wide without cover in last few after beginning from a poor draw, made headway from around first bend to reach within 2L of pace in 3rd over 700M out, slightly closer into straight but never able to trouble the winner.
Sat in front of midfield, shifted in to obtain clear running in the Straight, closed off okay.
Settled midfield, traveled fairly, not much impression made.
Sat worse than midfield, gave ground rounding the Turn, no contention.
Sat in front of midfield, traveled nicely, had every chance.
Chased the leader, weakened near 300M, limited when asked thereafter.
Jumped only fairly, sat rear, minor progress made in the Straight.
Sat worse than midfield, could not handle the Turn, checked near the 1000M, held up in the Straight.
Sat in front of midfield, raced wide throughout, improved rounding the Turn, kept on well to win.
Settled midfield, raced very wide, failed to make ground.
Ridden along to lead on the rail, traveled nicely, was heavily bumped near 200M, again checked to avoid heels near 100M, ran on okay.
Sat rear, raced rear, never a threat.
Settled towards rear, very limited when placed under pressure.
Mid-field, short-lived headway on bend, little impression final 200m.
Chased pace, led before halfway, challenged from 200m out, headed 50m out but stuck on well.
Hampered start and raced in last place, green under pressure over 200m out, some late headway.
Four wide in mid-field, no extra under pressure 150m out.
In touch with leaders but very wide throughout, quickly beaten 300m out.
Chased leaders three wide, stumbled near the 700m, stayed on at the one pace.
Wide in rear. Headway when not much room final 150m.
Tracked pace, tight for room between horses 300m out, stayed on.
Held up, headway up rail bend, stayed on final 200m but lacked pace to challenge.
Rail position throughout, headway from mid-field to challenge at 200m line, sustained effort to lead 50m out.
Mid-field, driven 200m out, no real impression.
Led early, headed before halfway but remained prominent, stuck to task.
Began well, raced 2 wide in 2nd, 1-1/4L back turning in, kept on well in straight to make frame, always held.
Made contact shortly after start, raced 2 wide in midfield, 4 lengths back on turn, finished off very strongly to take 2nd, nearest on line.

Bumped shortly after start, raced towards rear on the outside, difficult to settle in the early stages, steadied near 1000M, no cover from 700M, 7 lengths back on turn, made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Crowded shortly after start, raced behind midfield on the outside, difficult to settle in the early stages, steadied near 750M, 5 lengths back on turn, finished off evenly.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, hard ridden from 300M but only showed very limited response, eased final 100M.
Average to begin, raced better than midfield on the inside, 2-1/2L back turning in, finished off evenly.
Began smartly, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/4L turning in, kept on well in straight to hold off the challengers.
Made contact at start, raced in midfield on the inside, 4 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, made minor progress early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened final 100M.
Bumped shortly after start, raced at tail, 9 lengths back on turn, passed some tired runners in straight.
Crowded shortly after start, raced behind midfield on the inside, 6 lengths back, same position on turn, made some progress in the run home.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced 2 wide at rear, 7 lengths or so back, there to turn, failed to close off in straight.
Jumped well from gate 10, raced 2 wide better than midfield, angled out after passing 400M, 2 lengths or so back turning in, closed off well to take a place.
Sat just off midfield on the rail, switched out in the Straight, closed off nicely to score.
Sat last, never a threat. (See Incident Report)
Sat midfield on the rail, limited response when asked. (See Incident Report)
Sat on pace 2 wide, ran on fairly.
Showed good early speed to lead, kept on well until weakened final 75M.
Settled at the rear, angled out top of the Straight, stayed on well.
Sat in front of midfield on the rail, never a threat. (See Incident Report)
Sat outside the lead, weakened final 150M.
Settled in front of midfield 2 wide, closed off okay.
Sat behind midfield 2 wide, made no impression. (See Incident Report)
Caught 3 wide no cover midfield, weakened in the Straight.
Sat near the rear, ran on ordinarily.

Lost ground after crowded at start, ridden to soon recover to over 3L back in 5th on rail, gained closer to pace over 800M out and further nearer on straightening, kept on same pace without quickening.
Settled well back from the widest draw, saved ground on rail turning in for home, faded after straightening.
With leaders early, took up running over 1100M out and rails run into back straight, led until finding no extra over 200M out.
Amongst leaders early stages before taken over 2L back to 4th early in back straight, kept on same pace without quickening from a similar position into straight.

Began well from a poor draw, prominent and wide without cover before becoming 2-wide 2nd into back straight, soon came to challenge in home stretch and hit the front narrowly over 200M out only to be caught at the 100M.
Settled just worse than midfield, commenced move 3-wide rounding home bend and wider into straight, ran on under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Began well from the two draw settling one back in 3rd on rail, tracked the leader to straight and hit the front under pressure 100M out, just held on to the line.
Settled in last few, commenced move rounding home bend swinging widest into straight, ran on under pressure without threatening.
Unbalanced at start settling in last few, gained closer to pace rounding home bend, responded quite well in straight and never nearer.
Lost considerable ground at start and tailed-off throughout, never a factor.
From draw 10 taken back to a position behind midfield, swung wide for home before finishing off well under top weight to win with ease.
From wide draw taken across behind runners, in last spot well off the pace making the turn for home, made some progress final 300M without troubling leaders.
Pressed along on jumping from draw 1, lacked early pace and settled back towards the rear, found nothing passing 400M, weakened away.
Driven forward and crossed to the lead passing 800M, opened up 2Ls lead early straight, no extra passing 100M, weakened to 3rd.
Intended to lead but not fast enough to hold out rival, tracked leader in a race run at even tempo, found disappointingly little passing 300M, faded final 200M. (Blood in trachea / Roarer.)
Jumped on terms, stayed close enough to leaders, ran on mildly from top of straight but not finishing as well as first few. (held up near 100M.)

Caught racing wide no cover in midfield, made steady progress early straight but not finishing as well as the winner final 200M, bumped by that rival final stages.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground then taken back from draw 12, settled towards the rear 6Ls off leader, wide into straight before making limited progress over final 300M.

Slowly away, raced at tail, 14 lengths back in the middle stages, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn but still 9 to 10 lengths behind, kept to inside after straightening and made some progress.

Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide towards rear, hard ridden after passing 500M, 7 lengths or so back on turn, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home to take a place, no threat to the first two.

Average to begin, raced prominently on the outside early, took the lead 1300M, led by 2 lengths in the middle stages, challenged by rivals turning in, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Out in line, raced prominently, 2 wide, made contact near 1350M, found rail 1100M, positioned 3rd in the middle stages, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 100M.

Jumped only fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.

Moderately away, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 wide from 500M, one-paced in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, peaked and headed 350M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the outside, a bit closer in the middle stages, 2-1/2L back turning in, finished off evenly.
Average to begin, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, one-paced in the run home.
Began well from gate 1, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, hit the front 350M, kept on strongly to the line, won by 1-1/2L.
Mid-field, under pressure 300m out, one pace and no real impression.
Mid-field, stayed on well up rail from 200m out, taking second 50m out, promising debut.

Made running, headed 200m out, no extra and lost three places final 100m.
Rail position, tracked leaders, quickened through to lead 200m out and soon in command, shifted left closing stages.
Wide throughout, chased leaders into home straight, soon weakened.
Early speed to get across and press leader from wide draw, weakened 300m out, dropped away.
Chased leaders, weakened 150m out.
Mid-division, hung right under pressure from 300m out, unable to quicken.
Towards rear of mid-field, wide off bend, some headway before flattening out final 150m.
Waited with, wide bend, no impression.
A bit keen in mid-field, lacked pace to challenge but stayed on.
Waited with towards rear, checked 300m out and again 150m out when making ground, stayed on to grab third close home.
Sat on pace, traveled comfortably, made good progress when asked, just missed.
Sat in front of midfield, raced on the rail, minor progress made in the Straight.
Settled in front of midfield, gave ground in the Straight, no impression.
Settled worse than midfield, traveled fairly, failed to respond under pressure.
Settled in front of midfield, traveled only fairly, never a threat.
Sat behind midfield, checked when endeavoured to obtain a narrow run entering the Straight, never a threat.
Settled rear, improved rounding the Turn, responded reasonably well when asked (See Incident Report).
Sat on pace, traveled okay, slightly weakened passing 200M.
Settled towards rear, traveled fairly, limited response when asked.
Sat towards rear, held up entering the Straight, ran on from the back (Noted to have sustained abrasions to the right hind fetlock).
Sat midfield, raced wide and without cover, gave ground quickly in the Straight (See Incident Report).
Sat midfield, held up near 300M, not much impression made.
Ridden along to lead, traveled fairly, one pace to the finish (See Incident Report).
Sat worse than midfield, raced three wide, lay in under pressure in the Straight, showed some dash over the concluding stages.
Wide in rear, brief headway bend, soon weakened and held, eased 200m out.
Waited with in mid-field, had to switch out for clear run over 200m out, ran on well, just failed.
Mid-field, quickened 300m out, unable to sustain effort and weakened 150m out, eased final 50m.
Made running, headed over 200m out, no extra final 150m.

Waited with in rear, pushed along off bend, short of room 300m out, late headway without threatening.

Held up after slightly hampered at start, pushed along 400m out, stayed on but unable to quite reach leaders.
Began smartly, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, 2 to 3 lengths back turning in, showed very good response in straight, hit the front approaching 250M, kept on strongly to the line.

Shifted in at start and bumped, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 4 lengths or so back, travelled keenly in the early and middle stages, checked near 900M, 3 wide on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Began well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length, travelled well to turn, peaked and headed approaching 250M, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)

Crowded start, raced 2 wide at rear, 4 lengths or so back turning in, made some progress in straight.
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.

Jumped nicely and led, kept on well, no match for winner

Travelled keenly in 6th within 3L of pace, dropping to 7th inside the 1100M while continued to race keenly, kept on in home straight until weakening out of contention inside final 200M.

Began well from a poor draw sharing early pace, gained outright advantage 4-wide before crossing to the rail inside 1100M, narrowly headed early in home straight but fought back inside 50M to prevail in the bobbing of heads.

Settled wide in midfield within 4L of pace early stages, commenced move on top of home bend reaching just over 3L back in joint 6th into straight, weakened out of contention under strong pressure inside final 300M.

Settled two off the rail some 1L back, commenced move into straight hitting the front narrowly over 350M out, headed just inside the 100M and brushed about 50M out, fought back well only to be pipped at post.

Niggled at 4-wide in prominent position traveling keenly and without cover at times, 3-wide without cover in 4th rounding home bend and within 2L of pace into straight, faded under pressure inside final 300M.

Crowded at start losing ground, soon recovered along rail to midfield after first 300M and further closer to 6th just over 2L back before first turn, kept on early in home straight until weakening under pressure inside final 200M.

Settled in last few on rail, gradually shifted off the rail for a run approaching final turn, did not find much room early in straight until the 200M, fought on steadily near the centre of the track closing stages without threatening.

Close up early, travelled keenly when taken back to 4th within 2L of pace inside the 1000M, slightly further back in 5th rounding home bend, weakened gradually inside final 300M.

Crowded from a poor draw, very wide but with cover early stages before taken further back to last few over 1250M out, last on home bend but saved ground on rail into straight, made good impression in the run to the line.

Gradually settled just worse than midfield, drifted slightly further back to 10th onto home bend, ran on steadily under pressure inside final 250M near the centre of the track to be nearest at finish.
Settled down in second half of the race, appeared to travel well about 4Ls to make up top of straight, buffeted for room 300M and failed to respond afterwards.
Slow to begin, settled towards the rear, badly crowded for room 300M before running on nicely towards the finish, not beaten far by higher rated rivals.
Dropped back to near last early stages, improved to midfield passing 1200M, badly crowded for room 300M, went amiss 250M when it sustained an injury to its LF leg.
Given a patient ride at the rear, raced keenly in the middle stages, swung wide into straight then closed off fastest to take 2nd close home. Not reach winner.
Stayed close to leaders throughout, loomed up outside leaders 500M, soon quickened to the lead and drove clear for an authoritative victory.
Settled in midfield, in 5th spot for much of the journey, saved ground on the inside before finishing off nicely over final 400M to claim 3rd.
Soon led, raced too keenly and refused to settle in the lead, caught by rivals nearing 400M, weakened away.
Held up near last in a evenly run race, shuffled back to last turning for home, couldn't finish off.
Maintained a midfield position 2-wide, driven along 500M, stayed on fairly well to claim 4th at the finish.
Began well enough to be chasing leaders along the inside, battled on at same pace from top of the straight, faded late stages.
Positively ridden to be chasing leader in a race run at even pace, briefly took over early straight but soon outpaced by winner, held 2nd spot to near 80M from home, faded to 5th near line.
Jumped with them, raced 3 wide in midfield, no cover for the majority of the race, peaked early in straight, weakened and eased final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.) (Roarer.)
Moderately away, raced behind midfield on the inside, a bit closer on turn, showed very good response in straight, took the lead approaching 200M, kept on strongly to the line.

Made contact at start, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, peaked early in straight, headed approaching 200M, weakened final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made contact at start, raced 3 wide better than midfield early, 2 wide from 1000M, carried wider 500M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Jumped with them, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Began well from the widest draw, taken back to race towards rear on the outside, angled out 450M, made good progress early in straight, peaked on run 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Bumped start, raced in midfield on the inside, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared approaching 200M, kept on evenly in straight.
Moderately away, showed no early speed, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Away with them, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, 1/2L back turning in, peaked 250M, weakened inside final furlong. (Blood in trachea.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out 500M, 6 to 7 lengths back turning in, made some progress in the run home.
Began well from a tricky draw, raced in midfield on the outside, 3 to 4 lengths back turning in, kept on evenly in straight.

Jumped only fairly, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening, showed very good response, took the lead approaching 100M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and made minor progress.
Began smartly, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/4L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 100M.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, angled out after passing 500M, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Began well, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, there to turn, hard ridden approaching 250M, kept on well in straight to take a place, always held.
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced 3 wide better than midfield, 3 lengths or so back, there to turn, peaked early in straight, checked near 300M, weakened final furlong.

Jumped only fairly, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 150M, made some progress thereafter to make frame, no threat to the first few.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths or so back turning in, one-paced in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, 1-1/4L back turning in, kept on evenly until crowded approaching final 50M.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the outside, travelled keenly in the early stages, 6 lengths or so back on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear, 2 wide, 7 lengths back turning in, made some headway in straight.
Slightly slow out, raced at tail throughout, never a factor. (See Racing Incidents.)
Commenced well, raced 2 wide in midfield, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Away well, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 200M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Average to begin, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out early in straight, finished off strongly to take 2nd.
Taken back from gate 9, raced at tail, 6 lengths back, same margin back on turn, inconvenienced early in straight, made no impression final 200M.
Jumped well, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place, no threat to the first two.

Well there early stages, took up running onto first bend, led until narrowly headed early in home straight and weakened under pressure.
