Well there settling one back on rail in 3rd in back straight, came under pressure rounding final bend, baulked for a run upon straightening and soon weakened out of contention. (Blood in trachea)

Travelled 3-wide without cover in midfield, commenced move on top of home bend reaching 2L 5th 4-wide into straight, ran on to hold every chance closing stages only to be denied in the bobbing of heads.
Settled in last few from a poor draw, in similar position into home straight, ran past well-beaten horses closing stages.

Pressed forward from the widest draw, 3-wide in 3rd onto first bend before gaining 1L 2nd into back straight, gained narrow advantage briefly after straightening for home only to be swamped inside final 200M.
Settled in midfield in 6th some 4L off the pace, ran on steadily under pressure in straight to be nearest at finish.
Soon taken well back, never seen with a chance.
Settled in worse than midfield in 9th, came under pressure to hold position inside the 600M, swung wide into straight, weakened inside final 150M.
Settled in second half of the field 7Ls off the pace, failed to finish off in the straight. (Jockey : made a respiratory noise during the race. / No Vet findings.)
Obtained a position ahead of mid-division, briefly held up 200M before doing best work late to be nearest at the line.
Chased leaders along the inside, travelled well enough going into straight, fought on steadily to the line, just missed out on 3rd.
Settled down 2-wide ahead of mid-division, hard driven nearing 400M but only gave limited response in the straight. Never dangerous.
Went forward prompting the pace on outside, responded well to riding and hit lead inside 200M, kept on late stages to hold the pursuing 2nd at bay.
Jumped awkwardly, settled towards the rear, struggled to keep up home turn, soundly beaten.
Chased leaders 2-wide, close enough 400M but failed to quicken under pressure. Ran home one paced.
From wide draw obtained a midfield position 5Ls back, failed to make ground on leaders over final 300M. Never threatened.
Jumped fairly, ended up near last 9Ls behind leader, ridden along 500M but couldn't quicken under pressure.
Soon led, took them along at a good tempo, fought hard in the straight but couldn't hold off winner inside 200M, lost 2nd near line.
From wide draw taken back to the rear, 10Ls off the pace on settling, still last at top of the straight, couldn't pick up speed and never in the picture.
From draw 1 settled back in midfield, made steady progress from 300M, no clear run 150M and not fully tested over final 100M. Could finish closer.
Jumped well from the widest draw, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, took the lead approaching 800M, led by 1/2L on turn, peaked early in straight, headed 200M, weakened final 100M.
Jumped awkwardly, raced towards rear on the outside, raced keenly in the middle stages, 6 lengths or so back on turn, made good progress in straight to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Out with rest, raced in midfield on outer, no cover from 700M, 3 to 4 lengths back turning in, weakened early in straight when hard run took effect.
Away well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, wider turning in, finished off evenly.
Moderately away, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M.
Began well, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out 350M, made some progress in straight to take a place.

Began smartly from gate 1, positioned a length behind the leader on the inside, angled out after passing 400M, showed very good response in straight, took the lead 200M, kept on strongly to the line and scored.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, raced keenly in the early stages, 5 lengths back turning in, one-paced in the run home.
Slightly slow out, raced at rear on the inside, eased after passing 600M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away with them, sent forward to take the early lead, headed approaching 800M, 1/2L back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear, 7 lengths or so back on turn, made some headway in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from gate 11, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.
Jumped well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, carried wider 500M, peaked early in straight, made contact 350M, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Moderately away, raced in midfield on the inside, 4 lengths or so back, there to turn, one-paced in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Out with rest, raced behind midfield on the outside, 7 lengths back, no cover for the majority of the race, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Fast into stride, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, 2 wide from 550M, finished off well to take 2nd, always held.
Taken back to race behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began awkwardly and made contact, raced 2 wide, 6 lengths back, same margin back on turn, made reasonable progress in straight.
Commenced well, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length, travelled well to turn, challenged by rival after turning in, headed near 350M, kept on evenly to take a place.
Jumped well, sent forward to race in 2nd, a length back, challenged the leader after turning in, took the lead near 350M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Jumped only fairly, positioned 2 wide, 5 lengths or so back, angled out 500M, 4 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame without threatening.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, 4 lengths back, similar position on turn, made contact 350M, finished off evenly.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced towards rear on the inside, 7 lengths back turning in, made some headway in straight.

Taken back from gate 9, raced 2 wide towards rear, travelled keenly in the middle stages, checked near 750M, 3 wide on turn, 8 lengths back turning in, made some progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away from gate 1, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, 3 lengths back, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.
Bumped start, raced at tail, 8 lengths back turning in, passed some tired runners in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bounded on jumping and lost ground, raced keenly towards the rear early stages, didn't have clear running for some distance passing 150M before running on well to go 2nd close home.
Slow to begin, ended up racing as the back-marker, ran past a few well beaten horses passing 400M, no extra to offer final stages.
Restrained to race in 2nd half of the field, was along the stand's rail until 400M when switching to center of track to challenge, closed off steadily and wasn't beaten far in 5th.
Settled in mid-division, travelled only fairly and had to be urged along nearing 500M, couldn't run on. (Jockey : better suited by being stepped up in distance.)
Jumped awkwardly, stayed close enough to the pace, came under pressure halfway, soon outpaced by leaders in the run home.
Settled down midfield, couldn't go on passing 400M. Never involved.
Obtained a midfield position 4-5Ls off pace, weakened passing 300M and finished last.
Given a waiting ride towards the rear, driven along midway but responded only fairly to the line under 10lb claimer. Never threatened.
Went forward as expected, set even pace and enjoyed uncontested lead, caught by rivals passing 200M, no extra late and faded to finish 6th near line.
In midfield early and middle stages, responded only fairly passing 400M, never a threat to leaders.
Bumped on jumping, handily placed behind the leader, responded well 400M to be vying for the lead, was held by winner final 100M, lost 2nd close home.
Always in touch behind leader, driven to the lead nearing 150M, kept on well late stages to hold off pursuing rivals.
Jumped only fairly, held up towards the rear, struggled to keep up 500M, soon beaten.
Jumped awkwardly, raced along the stand's rail and always close up behind leader, worked home steadily over final 300M to take 4th. Pleasing debut.
Settled midfield 3 wide with cover, commenced to improve rounding the Turn, stayed on well.
Sat towards rear, never in contention.
Sat rear, wide entering the straight, responded nicely under whip.
Sat on pace 3 wide with no cover, ran on evenly.
Sat towards near on the rail, unable to quicken.
Sat worse than midfield, never a threat.
Commenced to lead while traveling strongly, held on well.
Settled midfield 2 wide, unable to ride out when eased over the final 100M (See Incident Report).
Sat on pace 2 wide, one pace to the finish.
Settled midfield on the rail, not much impression made, held up passing 100M (See Incident Report).
Sat worse than midfield 3 wide, responded fairly when asked.
Sat in front of midfield on the rail, weakened over final furlong.
Ridden along to lead, chased the leader on the rail, closed off okay.
Sat towards near 3 wide, never involved.
Mid-field, weakened 400m out, eased when well beaten final 200m.
Prominent in chasing group behind clear leader, one paced under pressure.
Held up from wide draw, sustained headway from 400m out, ran on well and closing on winner at line.
Waited with in rear, headway wide 400m out, stayed on but never a danger.
Bounded leaving stalls and slowly away, some headway into mid-field off final bend, no further impression from 200m out.
Dropped out from wide draw, struggling over 600m out, never involved.
Wide throughout towards rear, outpaced and detached 400m out.
Led and set fast pace, five lengths clear back straight, headed 200m out, weakened and lost several places, eased final 75m.
Waited with in mid-field, under pressure over 400m out, no impression.
Mid-field, chased leaders from top of home straight, stayed on to lead 100m out.
Rear of mid-field, no impression under pressure from top of home straight, well held final 200m.
Mid-field, wide early, stayed on but lacked pace to challenge.
Chased clear leader, passed that rival and led 200m out, headed 100m out, weakened.
Rail position in mid-field, pushed along 600m out, stayed on but lacked pace to challenge.

Moderately away from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 300M, took the lead approaching 250M, kept on very well, easily scored.
Out with rest, positioned 3 wide, 2 lengths or so back, dropped to midfield 600M, angled out 500M, no clear run early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the inside, 5 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared near 200M, made some progress thereafter.
Jumped with them, sent forward to race prominently, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began awkwardly and made heavy contact, sent forward to race prominently, 3 wide, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened and eased thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 6-1/2L back turning in, taken wide in straight and made minor progress.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 2 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 200M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped shortly after start, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear run until approaching final 200M, finished off well to take 2nd.

Moderately away, unable to slot in, trapped very wide in midfield early, moved a bit closer after passing 1050M, 2 lengths or so back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (Blood in trachea.)
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide into straight, showed limited response early in straight, kept on same pace to the line.
Taken back from gate 11, raced 2 wide, 5 lengths or so back, there to turn, unable to obtain clear run until 200M, made good progress thereafter to make frame, no threat to the first few.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide into straight, made some progress in the run home.
Away with them, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, peaked early in straight, headed approaching 250M, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Out in line, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 lengths back, same position on turn, angled out early in straight, finished off well to take a place without threatening.
Settled in front of midfield 2 wide, closed off okay.
Sat outside the leader, lay in in the Straight, limited response. (See Incident Report)
Sat box seat, switched out in the Straight, ran on, just no match for winner.
Sat just in front of midfield 2 wide, weakened in the Straight.
Settled midfield 3 wide, closed off strongly, won going away, impressive. (See Incident Report)
Sat towards the rear, ran on evenly.
Settled behind midfield on the rail, made no impression. (See Incident Report)
Settled in front of midfield on the rail, never a threat.
Jumped nicely and showed good speed to lead, kept on until weakened final 100M
Settled midfield on the rail, one pace when asked.
Settled worse than midfield 2 wide, stayed on fairly.
Sat last, never travelled. (See Incident Report)
Settled in last few, gained slightly closer to 8th onto home bend, commenced move 500M out and the widest into straight, ran on well under pressure.

Taken back from the widest draw settling 3-wide in last few, came under pressure to hold place rounding home bend but dropped to the last leaving the 600M, ran on past well-beaten horses closing stages.
Shared pace early, gained outright lead 1100M out travelling keenly onto home bend, headed by eventual winner over 250M out and soon weakened.
Broke well settling one back in 3rd on rail, kept on same pace under pressure in home straight until swamped inside final 100M.
Settled well back trailing the field to home bend, given reminders approaching home turn, finished off the race well inside final 150M, did best work late.

Very wide among first few before taken back to midfield rounding first bend, made swift headway in back straight joining 3rd 900M out, unable to sustain effort and weakened steadily upon straightening.
Pressed forward from a poor draw travelling very wide around first bend before settling 2-wide in 2nd into back straight, came under pressure after home turn but soon weakened.
Gradually settled in last few, fought on steadily between runners in home straight without posing any serious threat.

Began well from a poor draw gradually settling 3-wide in 4th into back straight, steadied to 5th when shifted in for cover 1050M out, renewed effort upon straightening and hit the front 200M out, hung on well under pressure.
Began well settling in midfield on rail, came under pressure rounding home bend, ran on steadily under pressure between runners in straight, did best work late.

Began well, gradually taken back to midfield, steadied behind runner 1050M out, quickened well from over 3L back in 6th into straight to hold every chance closing stages but unable to peg back the winner throughout.
Began well, eased off slightly to be tracking leaders on settling, into clear 400M, quickened up well under top weight to lead inside 150M, proved no match for winner late.
Quickly into stride, led at good pace, kept on well early straight, caught by rivals inside 150M then faded towards the line.
Moved up to press leader on outside, fought hard to stay in contention early straight, but couldn't hold off first three final stages. (Jockey : instructed to go forward stepping up to 1400M.)
Jumped only fairly, recovered to race in midfield, had no clear running 300M-200M before finishing off strongly to lead near 70M. Could have won by further.
Began awkwardly, soon caught racing 3-wide without cover, moved up to join leaders entering home turn, couldn't go on passing 200M, weakened towards the line.
Settled down 2-wide in mid-division, 4Ls to make up 400M, stayed on fairly well final 250M to be beaten 0.8L. Nearest finish.
Jumped on terms, restrained to race towards the rear, had 5Ls to make up 400M, made limited progress towards the finish.
Dropped back to race near the rear, in similar spot turning for home, ran on only fairly and was never a threat to leaders.
Began only fairly from draw 1, chased leaders along the inside fence, soon lost touch with leaders on straightening, weakened rapidly.
From draw 8 dropped back to race at the rear, 6Ls off leader home turn, closed off final 400M fastest to claim 3rd. Nearest finish.
Raced keenly early stages when being steadied to obtain a position with cover, raced 3-wide in midfield on settling, weakened rapidly on straightening and finished tailed off. (Bled.)
Began smartly, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length in the middle stages, kept on well in straight to hold off the challengers.
Bumped start, taken back to race at rear on the outside, very wide into straight, made some progress in the run home.
Raced tight shortly after start, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened thereafter.
Away well, raced in midfield on the inside, 3 lengths back, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, angled out 600M, 5 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 lengths or so back, there to turn, made good progress in straight to make frame, nearest on line.
Jumped with them, raced in midfield on outer, no cover on turn, kept on evenly in straight.
Made contact at start, taken back to race behind midfield on the outside, 4 lengths or so back turning in, made no impression in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away from gate 1, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared after passing 300M, kept on well to the line.
Began fairly, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Out with rest, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, angled out 450M, finished off well to take 2nd, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Began only fairly from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out early in straight, bumped near 250M, made some progress thereafter.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear, 6 lengths or so back, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, kept to inside after straightening and made good progress, blocked close home.
Slowly away, raced at rear throughout, never a factor. (See Racing Incidents.) (Epiglottic entrapment.)
Jumped well from gate 12, tracked leaders on the outside, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final furlong.
Jumped well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide on turn, kept on well in straight but always held.
Made contact at start, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 3 lengths or so back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide better than midfield, angled out approaching 450M, peaked early in straight, bumped near 250M, kept on evenly thereafter.
Jumped with them, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, there to turn, made good progress in straight to make frame.
Bumped start, raced towards rear on the outside, 6 lengths back, same margin back on turn, made no impression in straight.
Bumped start, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, 2 lengths or so back turning in, finished off well to take a place.
Made contact at start, sent forward to take the lead, found rail near 900M, led by 1/4L turning in, kept on well to the line and scored.
Away well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, dropped to midfield 600M, checked near 400M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)

Moderately away from the widest draw, raced in midfield on the outside, moved a bit closer after passing 800M, found a 2 wide spot 600M, 2 lengths back turning in, kept on well in straight to take a place.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 wide from 700M, 3-1/2L back turning in, made good progress in straight to take 2nd.
Taken back to race behind midfield on the outside, 6 lengths or so back, a bit closer on turn, very wide into straight, one-paced in the run home.
Out with rest, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably in the middle stages, kept on well in straight to hold off the challengers.
Out in line, raced towards rear on the inside, crowded and made contact near 600M, saved ground on turn, kept on same pace in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped with them, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide, 1/2L back on turn, kept on evenly in straight.
Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, 3 lengths or so back on turn, angled out 350M, finished off evenly.
Average to begin, raced behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide approaching 700M, wider turning in, made no progress in straight.
Began well, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, commenced move 400M, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame, nearest on line.
Bumped shortly after start, raced at rear on the inside, inconvenienced near 600M, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never far off in 3rd on rail, some 2L back turning into straight, failed to quicken under pressure to challenge.
Began well settling just over 2L off the pace in 4th mainly 2-wide, carried wider turning in for home, ran on steadily under pressure to reach 2nd late.
Crowded at start dropping to last, saved ground on inside turning in for home, running on when baulked for a run inside final 150M, not fully tested.
Soon dropped to 5th over 3L back on rail despite ridden along, switched wide for a run into straight, responded well to assert authority over 50M out.
Chased the leader 2-wide, weakened steadily upon straightening. (Mucus in trachea)
Broke well from the widest draw of 7 but gradually settled in rear off the rail, went widest into straight, ran on well and never nearer.
Broke well to lead off the rail, obtained rails run just before first turn over 600M out holding 1.5L advantage into straight, found no extra and swamped inside final 50M.
Settled towards the rear on the rail, made some progress inside final furlong.
Tracked the leader 2 wide, hung in during the Straight, kept on okay.
Sat box seat, weakened in the Straight.
Sat midfield on the rail, responded fairly when asked.
Settled in front of midfield 2 wide, commenced to improve rounding the Turn, hung out but stayed on well.
Sat behind midfield 2 wide with cover, squeezed near the final 100M (See Incident Report).
Sat behind midfield on the rail, driven out in the straight, ran on for fourth.
Sat near rear 2 wide, driven out rounding the Turn, responded nicely under pressure.
Sat midfield 3 wide no cover, struggled rounding the Turn, never a factor.
Settled towards the rear, driven out rounding the Turn, but kept on fairly.
Jumped well and made good progress to lead, made no impression in the Straight.
Sat midfield 3 wide with cover, never a threat.
Tracked pace, pushed along 500m out, stayed on home straight but lacked speed to challenge.
Mid-field, outpaced 300m out, stayed on but never dangerous.
Made running, headed 300m out, weakened, eased final 100m.
Tracked pace, pushed along over 400m out, knuckled down for pressure and led 50m out.
Tracked leader, quickened to lead over 300m out, headed 50m out, stayed on.
In last place after crowded at start, headway wide 750m out to chase leaders, stayed on.
Mid-field, pushed along and dropped to rear 500m out, headway up rail 200m out, no further impression final 50m.
Slightly slow out and crowded, raced at rear on the inside, angled out 400M, closed off well to take 2nd.
Jumped awkwardly, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, 5 lengths back turning in, failed to close off in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, kept on well early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Fast into stride, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Jumped well from the widest draw, sent forward to race in 2nd, a length back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)

Moderately away, raced better than midfield on the outside, no cover from 800M, 1 to 2 lengths back turning in, showed good response in straight, took the lead 100M, kept on well but unable to hold off the first two close home.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 lengths back, 3 wide from 500M, same margin back on turn, finished off well to make frame.
Made contact at start, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Moderately away from gate 1, positioned 4 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 4 lengths or so back on turn, very wide into straight, finished off strongly to score by a neck.
Crowded shortly after start, raced 2 wide at rear, 6 lengths back, same margin back on turn, kept on evenly in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away, raced towards rear on the outside, 6 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled in front of midfield on the rail, made some ground.
Sat behind midfield on the rail, never in contention.
Sat on pace 2 wide, limited response when asked.
Sat at the rear, switched out rounding the Turn, stayed on fairly.
Settled near the rear 2 wide, never a threat.
Sat midfield 2 wide, stayed on.
Settled in front of midfield 2 wide, closed off nicely.
Showed good early speed to lead, raced greenly in the Straight, kept on fairly.
Settled behind the leaders, one pace when asked.
Caught 3 wide no cover midfield, did not run on.
Jumped on terms, ridden to be outside leader, kept on well to score. (See Incident Report)
Settled towards the rear, made no impression.
Soon took up running after beginning from a poor draw, caused interferences crossing to rail on 1000M bend, led in a sound pace and hung on well to the line.
Well there, forced to check on rail turning into back straight, chased leaders in 4th to home turn, fought on steadily without troubling the winner.
Settled in 7th some 3L off the pace on rail, saved ground turning in for home, ran on under pressure without threatening.
Jumped awkwardly losing ground travelling in last few, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, kept on steadily without quickening.
Jumped best, soon taken over 2L back to 6th 3-wide, gained slightly closer to 5th 750m out before making steady headway rounding home bend, widest in joint 5th into straight and ran home one-paced.
Settled well behind, saved ground on the rail turning in for home, produced good impression in straight.
Soon pulled forward to rear of midfield, lost position and dropped to 8th over 3L back 700M out, came under pressure rounding home bend, kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Soon taken back from the widest draw and difficult to settle in early stages, trailed the field to the 100M, finished off the race well inside final 100M.
Well there early stages, hampered and lost position to 6th 850M out, baulked behind runners early in straight, ran home one-paced.
One back 3-wide without cover early stages, gained 2-wide position in 2nd early in back straight, in a similar position turning in for home, kept on steadily without quickening under pressure.
Very wide without cover in 2L 5th in early stages, gained slightly closer to joint 2nd 800M out, swung wide into straight and soon weakened.
Soon dropped to last few, never a danger.
Went forward, emerged as leader 1300M, set steady pace to home turn, couldn't quicken with rivals approaching home straight, faded towards the finish.
Towards the rear in early stages, made a forward move 800M when the pace steadied, wide into straight before finishing off the race fairy.
Held a more forward position without being pressured to do so, chased leaders 2-wide, couldn't go on passing 400M, weakened to last.
From wide draw taken back to the last spot, moved closer to mid-division from 700M, closed off one paced on straightening.
Away on terms, from draw 2, obtained a 2-wide spot ahead of midfield, moved closer to leaders 600M before quickening up to lead nearing 200M, caught by winner close home.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, settled towards the rear further back than intended, failed to run on final 300M.
Restrained in mid-division, travelled well into home turn then closed off final 400M fastest to get up near line.
Given a waiting ride near last, 7-8Ls off leader in middle stages, drifted back to last home turn, stayed on final 300M without threatening. (Jockey : instructed to ride in a conservative manner.)
Moved up to press leader on outside, took over nearing 400M, kept on steadily under pressure, lost lead mid-straight but battled on to hold 3rd.
Began well from inside draw to be chasing leaders, got shuffled back by the weakening leader home turn before closing off the race mildly.
Settled down in midfield 4Ls off the pace, shifted away from fence home turn before closing off the race reasonably well to finish 5th.
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced better than midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, showed limited response early in straight, kept on same pace to the line.
Began awkwardly, sent forward to take the lead, challenged by rival approaching 400M, peaked and headed 250M, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made contact shortly after start, positioned 3 wide in midfield, a bit closer on turn, very wide into straight, one-paced in the run home.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide, a length or so back, challenged the leader approaching 400M, hit the front 250M, kept on very well to the line and scored.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 2 lengths back turning in, closed off well to take 2nd.
Commenced well, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, there to turn, closed off well to make frame without threatening.
Taken back to race at rear on the outside, commenced move approaching 600M, 3 to 4 lengths back turning in, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home to take a place.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, 3 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, kept on same pace to the line.
Average to begin, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed some response early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened gradually thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back to race 2 wide at rear, 5 lengths or so back, very wide turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Began only fairly, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, very wide into straight, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, showed some response early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, similar position on turn, made some headway in straight to make frame without threatening.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the inside, 7 lengths back turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.
Clean jump, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide, challenged the leader turning in, took the lead early in straight, kept on very well to the line and scored.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Taken back to race towards rear on the outside, 6 lengths or so back turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Began well, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, 2 wide from 500M, kept on well in straight to take 2nd, always held.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced 2 wide behind midfield, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened 300M, eased inside final furlong.
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back to race towards rear on the inside, 6 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, showed no response early in straight, eased final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began only fairly, positioned slightly behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress in straight to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, 7 lengths or so back turning in, made no impression in straight.
Began well, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length, challenged by rival turning in, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Began fairly, raced 2 wide in midfield, 4 lengths or so back, 3 wide turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Wide in mid-field, one paced under pressure, flattened out final 100m.
Tracked pace, pushed along 400m out, weakened final 200m.
Mid-field, ridden along over 400m out, stayed on to edge third but never a threat to winner.
Mid-field, stayed on up rail home straight but unable to reach leaders.
Chased pace, nudged along from halfway, stayed on, closed on winner final 100m but always held.
Mid-field, under pressure over 400m out, weakened.
Stumbled at start, raced wide, tracked pace, weakened quickly home straight.
In rear, wide throughout, last off bend, stayed on and passed several rivals final 200m.
Held up in rear, wide into home straight, no impression.
Chased leader, unable to go on with that rival over 300m out, weakened final 150m.
Held up, stayed on final 250m, never nearer.
Made running, kicked clear over 300m out and soon in control, still 3 lengths clear 100m out.
Tracked the leader 2 wide, made some progress in the Straight, but weakened in the final furlong.
Sat towards rear of midfield, 3 wide with cover, stayed on well to claim third.
Sat in front of midfield 2 wide, made no impression in the Straight.
Settled midfield on the rail, weakened in the Straight.
Settled midfield, raced very wide and without cover, found nothing in the Straight.
Settled midfield 4 wide without cover, never in contention.
Settled towards the rear, angled wide rounding the turn, made good late progress under pressure.
Settled towards the rear on the rail, one-paced in the Straight.
Showed clear intent to lead, kept on well to score.
Sat box seat, weakened in the final 200M.
Sat rear after being slow into stride, closed off strongly in the Straight.
Sat rear, driven out round the Turn, never dangerous.
Mid-field, ridden along 500m out, lost place and held from 300m out.
Slowly away, waited with towards rear, headway on inside final bend, short of room and had to wait for run briefly 300m out, stayed on at the one pace after.
In touch with leaders, chased winner 300m out but unable to quicken with that rival, stayed on.
Across from wide draw to chase leader, the first under pressure 600m out, lost place 400m out and dropped away.
Held up in last pair after awkward start, still in rear entering home straight, no real impression.
Wide in mid-field and a bit keen, ridden over 400m out, weakened over 200m out.
Tracked pace, quickened to lead 300m out, soon in command, at least two lengths clear of runner-up when eased closing stages.
Towards rear of mid-field, wide off final bend, struggling and held home straight.
Held up in last pair, still plenty to do and wide final bend, stayed on and made up plenty of places final 300m.
Keen and led, headed halfway but still prominent, weakened 400m out and soon dropped away.
Three wide in mid-field, headway early part of home straight, flattened out and no extra final 200m.
In touch with leaders before headway to lead at halfway, headed 300m out, no extra final 150m.
Held up, wide off final bend, stayed on to go second over 50m out, closed on eased-down winner closing stages.
Rail position in mid-field, headway onto heels of leaders 400m out, faded final 200m.
Jumped awkwardly, sent forward to race prominently on the stands' side, took the lead 300M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner final 150M, finished 2nd.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Away with them, raced at rear on the stands 'side, one-paced final 400M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped shortly after start, sent forward to take the lead, peaked and headed 300M, weakened gradually final furlong.
Out with rest, positioned a length behind the leader, 2 away from the stands' rail, hard ridden approaching 300M but only showed some response, peaked 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Jumped with them, positioned 2-1/2L behind the leader on the middle track, hard ridden from 250M, finished off evenly.
Out in line, raced in midfield on the stands' side, hard ridden after from 400M but only showed limited response, weakened gradually inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped shortly after start, positioned a length behind the leader on the middle track, hard ridden approaching 300M, kept on well to take a place without threatening the first two.
Jumped well, raced prominently on the stands' rail, hard ridden after passing 250M, took the lead 150M, kept on very well to the line.
Began only fairly and made contact, raced in midfield on the stands' rail, 1-3/4L back at 400M, kept on evenly final 400M.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced towards rear on the middle track, hard ridden after passing 350M but failed to make any progress.
Bumped on jumping, raced towards rear on the stands' side, 4-1/2L back in the middle stages, made no progress final 400M.
Made contact at start, raced behind midfield on the stands' side, 3 lengths or so back in the middle stages, kept on same pace final 400M
Bumped shortly after start and unbalanced, positioned 2 lengths or so back, 2 away from the stands' rail, kept on same pace final 400M.
Tracked leader, weakened final furlong. (See Incident Report)
Settled midfield 2 wide, limited response when asked.
Settled behind midfield 3 wide, made some late ground.
Settled at the rear, crowded top of the Straight, closed off nicely.
Sat just behind the leaders, angled out in the Straight, hit the front at 170M, kept on, just missed.
Not the quickest out, settled towards the rear 2 wide, stayed on strongly to score.
Settled in front of midfield on the rail, switched to 2 wide rounding the Turn, one pace when asked. (See Incident Report)
Settled midfield on the rail, blundered at the 650M, never a threat.
Show intent and hard ridden to lead, weakened and gave ground final 150M.
Raced 3 wide no cover midfield, ran on okay.
Taken back from wide draw, sat last, saved ground, stayed on.
Sat in front of midfield 2 wide, taken wider on the Turn, no response in the Straight.
Ridden forward to join the leaders, shifted one-out-one-back onto home bend, kept on from 3rd into straight until folded up quickly inside final 250M.
Jumped well settling in midfield on rail in 6th, shifted off the rail for a run entering straight but did not find much room until the 250M, ran on well under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Never better than midfield, wide around home bend and into straight, never a danger.
Settled wide without cover behind midfield, lost position and the widest entering home straight, soon dropped quickly out of contention.
Settled in forward of midfield in 5th just some 4L off the pace, commenced move entering home straight, ran on well under pressure until forced to steady late.
Ridden along from a wide draw to be up with the pace, gained narrow advantage briefly rounding home bend, kept on at the one pace from 2nd into straight before folded up quickly inside final 200M.
Broke well from the middle draw sharing early pace, obtained rails run onto home bend before kicking 1L clear, went further clear gaining over 3L advantage 200M out only to be caught final strides.
Never better than midfield, weakened under pressure in straight.
With the leaders on rail, taken just over 1L back behind leaders rounding home bend, weakened upon straightening.
Began fairly, settled in last few on rail and saved ground turning in for home, ran on strongly under pressure to snatch victory final strides.
Jumped awkwardly from the widest draw settling well behind near the rail, commenced move shortly after straightening and ran on well inside final 200M.
Badly blundered shortly after start losing ground, tailed-off most of the way and never seen with a chance.
Stayed close to leaders throughout, responded well from 400M and advanced to the 2nd spot 250M, fought hard under top weight but couldn't quite reel in the leader.
From draw 10 caught racing 3-wide near the rear, had big task ahead top of straight, failed to finish off.
From draw 1 obtained a position ahead of midfield, not quickened under pressure in the straight. No impression on leaders.
Jumped only fairly, obtained a midfield spot but raced keenly throughout, ran home steadily final 400M and just missed out on 3rd at the line. Not able to challenge first two however.
In mid-division along the fence, ran on mildly from top of the straight but was never a threat to first two who were well clear from others.
Bumped on jumping, soon took up running setting slow pace in early and middle stages, kicked 2Ls clear early straight, showed no signs of tiring late stages holding off the runner-up bravely.
Moved up to chase leader from draw 13, couldn't go on passing 250M, faded towards the finish. (Irregular Heart Rhythm.)
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, settled down behind midfield 5-6Ls back, kept on same pace in the straight. Never a threat to leaders.
Jumped on terms, settled down behind midfield 7Ls back, stayed on final 400M without posing serious threat to leaders.
Eased back from wide draw, settled near last 8Ls off leader, finished off final 400M fastest. Not ridden out late stages when it improved close to a rival.
Bounded on jumping and lost ground, taken across to the fence and moved closer to a midfield spot on settling, failed to quicken on straightening.
From draw 11 jumped only fairly, in the middle stages raced keenly when being steadied to obtain cover at the rear of the field, ran past a couple of well beaten horses in the straight only.
Not hurried after the start, dropped back to near last 8Ls off leader middle stages, still plenty to do 400M, failed to make any progress.
Bumped at the start moved up to track leaders, not going the pace of first two from 300M, fought on to hold 3rd just. (Jockey: instructed to hold a handy position.)
Moderately away from gate 12, raced in midfield on outer, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Slightly slow out, recovered to race better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening.
Bumped on jumping, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, there to turn, taken wide in straight and finished off strongly to be nearest on line.
Began only fairly, raced at tail, 6 lengths back turning in, made no progress in straight.

Jumped awkwardly and made contact with the left side of its barrier, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead 900M, challenged by rival turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weakened final 100M.
Fast into stride, took the early lead, headed near 900M, 2nd in the middle stages, challenged the leader from 400M, took the lead 150M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Away well, raced 2 wide, 2 lengths back, same position on turn, peaked early in straight, ran on same pace to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slightly slow out, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, 3 lengths or so back turning in, kept on well early in straight, no clear run final 100M.
Taken back to race 2 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths or so back, there to turn, made no impression in straight.
Jumped only fairly, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on evenly in straight.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, difficult to settle in the early and middle stages, 3 lengths back turning in, finished off well to take 2nd.
Began awkwardly, raced 3 wide better than midfield, no cover on turn, weakened early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from gate 1, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on same pace in straight.
Began only fairly, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run in straight, not able to be properly tested.
Began well, raced 2 wide in midfield, travelled keenly in the early stages, angled out after passing 500M, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly to the line.

Moderately away from a wide draw, taken back to race towards rear on the outside, bumped near 700M, closer on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (Left front tendon injury on the day after racing.)
Out with rest, raced better than midfield on outer, no cover for the majority of the race, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Bumped start, raced 3 wide with cover slightly behind midfield, moved a bit closer in the middle stages, wider from 550M, finished off well to take 2nd.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear, commenced move 500M, very wide into straight, made good progress in straight to take a place.
Began well, sent forward to race prominently early, raced 2 wide better than midfield in the middle stages, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced 2 wide at rear, found rail 800M, saved ground on turn, made no impression in straight.
Taken back from gate 9, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and made some progress.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on outer, very wide turning in, made some headway in straight.
Jumped only fairly, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 4 lengths or so back turning in, kept on same pace in straight.
Began well, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, 2 wide on turn, challenged the leader from 450M, took the lead 350M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Bumped start and unbalanced, sent forward to take the lead, challenged by rival from 450M, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner close home.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, 2 lengths or so back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped shortly after start, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, there to turn, made minor progress in straight.
Began awkwardly, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 4 lengths or so back, same position on turn, kept on same pace in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 7 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, passed some tired runners in straight.
Bumped shortly after start, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, difficult to settle in the early stages, commenced move 400M, finished off evenly.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 2-3/4L back turning in, finished off well to take a place without threatening the first two.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the inside, 6 lengths back, saved ground on turn, made no progress in straight.
Began well, positioned 4 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began smartly, raced 3 wide better than midfield, no cover on for the majority of the race, 1-1/2L back turning in, finished off strongly to score by a narrow margin.
Jumped awkwardly, taken back to race towards rear on the outside, 6 lengths or so back turning in, taken wide in straight and made good progress to be nearest on line.
Jumped well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, a length back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Dropped back to near last early stages, driven 500M swinging wide for home, failed to run on under top weight.
Settled down 2-wide in midfield, came under serious pressure 500M and failed to make any impression. Never in the hunt.
From draw 2 settled down in midfield along the inside, kept on evenly final 300M to claim 3rd. No threat to the runaway winner.
From draw 1 made some use early stages to hold an on-pace position, responded only fairly to pressure passing 400M, never a winning hope.
Restrained in a position behind midfield 6-7Ls off the pace, swung wide home turn before running on mildly in the straight. Always held by leaders.
Obtained a position in second half of the field early stages, fell back to the rear 700M, finished off the race reasonably well, made some ground without threatening.
Jumped on terms, restrained to race ahead of midfield, driven wide into straight, tried hard over final 300M but couldn't get closer to the winner.
From draw 12 taken back to last, 10Ls off the pace on settling, had big task in hand 400M and failed to finish off the race.
Sent forward to settle in prominent 3rd, pressed along inside 400M but lacked a kick and was safely held in the end.
Jumped only fairly, made some early use to cross to the lead, tired mid-straight and was overrun in the latter stages.
Guided to the fence after the jump, held up behind mid-division 7Ls back, stuck to the inside passing 400M, ran on mildly but wasn't good enough to challenge the runaway winner.
Moved up to track leader, travelled very well into home straight, quickened and took over nearing 200M, continued on strongly late stages for a dominant victory.
Settled midfield, traveled fairly, raced flat (See Incident Report).
Settled midfield, gave ground rounding the Turn, no contention.
Sat towards rear, traveled okay, commenced a forward move near 800M, made good progress when asked.
Ridden hard to lead, weakened entering the Straight.
Sat on pace, failed to respond in the Straight (See Incident Report).
Jumped only fairly, crowded shortly after, settled towards rear, held up at the Turn and top of the Straight, closed off okay (See Incident Report).
Sat behind midfield, switched out and commenced a forward move, raced keenly thereafter, one pace to the finish.
Jumped only fairly, sat rear, raced rear, not much impression made.
Settled in front of midfield, traveled okay, ran on evenly.
Sat rear, traveled comfortably, showed some dash inside the last 150M.
Led until near 1100M, raced keenly in the early stages, closed off reasonably well.
Jumped only fairly, eased down when rider concerned about his mount's action (See Incident Report).
Raced wide, headway into mid-field back straight, made effort off final bend, stayed on.
Mid-field, short of room when trying to improve 200m out, clear 100m out, unable to get on terms with leaders.
Rear of mid-field, quickened into contention up rail 300m out, led 200m out, stayed on well.
Keen in the lead, headed 200m out, weakened.
Raced wide in mid-field and keen, widest final bend, stayed on.
Mid-field, under pressure to hold position 600m out, short of room 200m out, one paced.
Held up in rear from wide draw, had to angle wider 150m out, stayed on, unable to reach leaders.
Dropped out last from high draw, pushed along 400m out, wide home straight, stayed on and made up several places final 150m.
Rail position tracking pace, every chance 200m out, no extra final 100m.
Tracked pace, under pressure over 300m out, weakened 150m out.
Waited with in rear, outpaced over 400m out, well held home straight.
Tracked pace, moved into contention three wide off final bend, every chance, stayed on.
Jumped well, raced 2 wide better than midfield early, found rail near 600M, 2-1/2L back turning in, finished off well to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
Bumped start and unbalanced, taken back to race at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, failed to close off in straight.

Bumped start, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, took the lead 600M, found rail near 500M, led by a length turning in, peaked and headed 200M, weakened final 100M. (Blood in trachea.) (Lost left front plate.)
Out with rest, sent forward to race prominently, 2 wide, allowed rival to cross approaching 600M, 2nd on turn, took the lead 200M, peaked and headed 150M, weakened final 100M.
Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, steadied near 500M, 4 lengths back turning in, finished off evenly.
Crowded on jumping, raced behind midfield on outer, moved a bit closer on turn, made some progress in straight.
Jumped with them, raced towards rear on the outside, 4 to 5 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home without threatening.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced 2 wide at rear, 5 lengths back turning in, passed some tired rivals inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well, raced better than midfield on the outside, 2 lengths or so back turning in, showed good response in straight, hit the front 150M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 lengths or so back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Began only fairly, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight to take a place.

Bumped start, raced prominently on the inside, allowed rival to cross near 500M, right behind the leader turning in, showed no response early in straight, weakened thereafter. (Blood in trachea.) (Irregular heart rhythm.)
Sat on pace 2 wide, ran on nicely, just got there on the line.
Settled towards the rear, made some late ground.
Settled midfield on the rail, closed off okay.
Sat behind midfield 3 wide, never a threat. (See Incident Report)
Sat midfield 2 wide, held up top of the Straight, made no ground.
Caught 3 wide no cover near midfield, made little impression. (See Incident Report)
Showed good early speed to lead, kept on well, got beat on the line.
Settled behind midfield 3 wide, stayed on fairly.
Tracked leader 2 wide, ran on, had every chance.
Sat behind the leaders, one pace when asked. (See Incident Report)
Settled worse than midfield on the rail, limited response when asked.
Sat last, never in contention.
Improved steadily from moderate start to rear of midfield on rail, in similar position rounding home bend saving ground turning into straight, fought on steadily without threatening.
Settled well behind from the widest draw, trailed the field most of the way to the 200M, ran on well past well-beaten horses closing stages.
Broke well from the one draw to lead on rail attempting to make all, unable to sustain effort while hanging in in straight, overhauled inside final 250M.
Settled in last few from a poor draw, never seen with a chance.
Well there, tracked leader 2-wide, came to challenge entering home straight, fought on dourly under pressure to just get up on line.
Travelled 3-wide without cover in 5th about 3L off the pace, slightly further back coming onto home bend, went wide into straight, ran on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Settled towards the rear, widest turning into home straight, never a danger.
Broke well before settling over 2L back in 3rd 2-wide, commenced move entering straight gaining slender advantage on straightening only to be pipped at post.
Began fairly settling 2-wide in 6th in midfield, came under pressure rounding home bend, ran on under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Began well, settled some 3L back on rail on rail in 4th, came under pressure home bend and saved ground turning into straight, ran home one-paced.
Settled 3-wide in midfield after moderate start, lost position dropping to 8th just inside the 800M, one of widest in last few turning for home, produced good late impression closing stages.
Soon dropped to last few from a poor draw, never seen with a chance.

Switched off to last 10Ls off the pace, held up near 200M when making headway, switched out and closed off well for DH 4th. (Jockey suspended for failing to ride out to the satisfaction of the Stewards.)
Sent forward to lead as expected, set good pace first 800M, soon headed on straightening, weakened when placed under pressure.
Raced keenly early stages in a midfield position along the fence, finished off well enough final 300M but always held by first few.
From draw 1 moved up to track leader on inside, pace fast first 800M, found nothing when asked on straightening. (Jockey : didn't run out a strong 1650M / No Vet findings.)
Settled back in the field 8-9Ls off the pace, little change in position home turn, had big task in hand but ran home only fairly. (Jockey : didn't appreciate racing between horses in home straight.)
Taken back to near the rear 8Ls off the pace, waited with until 300M then closed off the race strongly to get up close home. Impressive win.
Settled ahead of midfield, within touching distance from leaders home turn, ran on well and challenged for the lead mid-straight, briefly in front 50M but no match for winner late.
Stayed close enough to leaders throughout, in 5th spot from 800M, had his chance but ran home only fairly.
Jumped only fairly, restrained in a position behind midfield, pushed along 400M before running on moderately towards the finish.
Began well, caught wide early stages then strode forward to be tracking leader, took over on straightening, fought well to 100M before conceding to first two late stages.
Restrained in mid-division, raced keenly in the early stages, had nothing to offer turning home, weakened to last.
Settled behind midfield along the fence, 6Ls to make up 400M but gave limited response only. Never a threat to leaders. (No Vet findings.)
Began smartly, took the early lead, headed 950M, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader in the middle stages, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear, 5-1/2L back turning in, taken wide in straight and finished off evenly.
Bumped shortly after start, positioned 3 wide, 1-1/2L back, no cover from 700M, same margin back turning in, kept on evenly in straight.
Made contact shortly after start, raced 3 wide with cover, 3 lengths or so back, there to turn, finished off well to take a place, nearest on line. (See Racing Incidents.)

Moderately away from a wide draw, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, took the lead 950M, found rail 600M, led by a length on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weekend final 100M.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, commenced move 400M, very wide into straight, finished off strongly to take 2nd, just beaten by a head.
Jumped with them, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped awkwardly, raced 2 wide better than midfield, similar position on turn, no clear run early in straight, found daylight 200M, finished off evenly.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 7-1/2L back on turn, taken wide in straight and made good progress to be nearest on line.
Jumped only fairly and shortly afterwards became unbalanced and lost ground, raced at rear on the inside, 6 to 7 lengths back turning in, made some progress in straight.
Away with them, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, showed good response in straight, took the lead 150M, kept on well to hold off the challengers.

Began well, raced in 3rd, 1-1/2L back, same margin back on turn, showed good response in straight, took the lead 100M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner close home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Crowded on jumping, raced in midfield on the outside, moved a bit closer turning in, made some progress early in straight, peaked 200M, ran on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped with them, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, 2 wide turning in, no clear run early in straight, made minor progress thereafter.
Crowded on jumping, raced at tail, 7 lengths back, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, made some headway in straight.
Moderately away, raced towards rear on the outside, 4-1/2L back turning in, one-paced in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, not enough room early in straight, cleared 150M, finished off strongly to score by a neck.
Away with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 wide turning in, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, made some progress thereafter.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide towards rear, 4 lengths or so back turning in, kept on same pace in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out after passing 700M, 2 to 3 lengths back turning in, kept on evenly in straight.
Jumped well, raced in 2nd, a length behind the leader, easy run to turn, kept on well in straight to take a place, always just held.
Shifted in abruptly at start and made contact, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened thereafter.
Settled in 2nd on rail just inside the race leader, took up running narrowly 700M out before joined by others early in straight, folded up quickly inside final 150M.
Niggled along improving steadily to 5th just over 2L back 1000M out, steadied off heels dropping to 6th 800M out, ran on from 5th into straight to take charge 150M out.
Jumped fairly, gradually recovered to 1.5L 3rd, travelling keenly when steadied off heels 900M out, one-paced from 3L 5th into straight, weakened inside final 250M.
Ridden to lead down the centre of back straight, crossed to 2-wide position coming onto home bend, lost advantage 700M out, plugged on until finding no extra inside final 150M.
Soon taken well behind from the widest draw, never a danger.
Soon dropped towards rear after moderate start, made steady headway off the rail rounding home bend, tight between runners after straightening, ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Close up early settling within 2L of pace mainly in 3rd 2-wide, in similar position entering home straight, kept on same pace without quickening .
Travelled 3-wide in midfield, inconvenienced when crossed 800M out, 4-wide without cover rounding home bend, looked a difficult ride in the run to the line.
Soon taken back from a poor draw and waited with, ran on well under pressure inside final 150m to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield on rail some 5L off the pace, tight behind runners early in home straight and forced to steady at around the 150M, made no further impression closing stages.
Soon taken back to worse than midfield, lost cover 3-wide rounding home bend dropping to last into straight, kept on under pressure past well-beaten horses.
Slightly slow out but quickly recovered to just worse than midfield, steadied and lost position about 700 metres out, ran on well from last few into straight to fail to get up on line.
Travelled wide amongst the leaders early, taken some 3L back to 6th 3-wide without cover home bend, dropped further back into straight, ran home one-paced.
Soon taken back to last few, saved ground on rail rounding home bend, steadied and switched out for a run 250M out, fought on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Bumped at the start, sat worse than midfield, was checked near 600M, gave ground in the Straight.
Settled behind midfield, steadied near 600M, ran on evenly.
Sat rear, raced rear, switched out rounding the Turn, ran on from the back.
Jumped awkwardly, settled midfield, no clear run in the early Straight, unimpressive.
Jumped only fairly, traveled fairly, could not be quickened.
Sat in front of midfield, improved from the Turn, made steady progress.
Jumped awkwardly, settled towards rear, made the Turn very wide, not much impression made.
Settled in front of midfield, very limited response when asked.
Settled midfield, switched out rounding the Turn, lay in slight when placed under pressure, closed off okay.
Sat handy, traveled fairly, weakened quickly from 200M (See Incident Report).
Ridden along to lead, traveled strongly, kept on well, had every chance.
Bumped on jumping, sat towards rear, failed to respond.
