On jumping bumped, sat on pace, raced keenly in the early stages, one pace to the line.
Tracked pace, edged ahead 200m out, asserted final 100m and comfortable at line.
Keen in touch, chased leaders from top of home straight, stayed on for pressure until flattening out final 50m.
Waited with towards rear and a bit keen at times, driven over 300m out, one paced.
Tracked leader, keen, weakened 300m out, hung right.
Slowly into stride, held up last, pushed along 300m out, stayed on late, unable to reach leaders.
Made running, keen, headed 200m out, stuck to task but held by winner final 100m.
Mid-division, stayed on from 200m out but lacked pace to challenge.
Started slowly, in rear, under pressure 300m out, no impression.
Away well, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out after passing 600M, 3-1/2L back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began awkwardly, taken back to race 2 wide at rear, angled out 500M, failed to make any progress in straight.

Made contact shortly after start and unbalanced, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and made good progress to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Jumped well from the widest draw, tracked leaders on the outside in the early stages, 2nd in the middle stages, a length back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually thereafter.
Began awkwardly and made contact, raced 3 wide towards rear, very wide turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Average to begin, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Shifted in at start and made contact, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out 550M, very wide into straight, kept on evenly in straight.
Began well, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, very wide into straight, made some progress early in straight, peaked on run 150M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Slightly slow out and crowded, raced at rear on the inside, a bit closer along the rail on turn, made no progress in straight.

Began well from a wide draw, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead 1050M, led by a length turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from gate 13, raced 2 wide better than midfield, peaked on turn, weakened early in straight.
Bumped start, raced 3 wide in midfield, 2-1/2L back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.) (A Cut to the right hind leg.)

Shifted in at start, sent forward to race prominently, allowed rival to cross near 1000M, sat right behind the leader on turn, hard ridden approaching 300M, took the lead 150M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Sat behind the leaders, angled out in the Straight, ran on, just one pace final 100M. (See Incident Report)
Sat in front of midfield, weakened in the Straight.
Showed good speed to lead, kept on nicely, no threat to winner.
Sat midfield on the rail, under pressure from 600M, weakened in the Straight.
Sat rear, picked off a few weakened rivals.
Settled midfield 2 wide, switched out to improve rounding the Home Turn, closed off reasonably well.
Settled towards the rear, made no impression
Settled at the rear 3 wide, limited response when asked. (See Incident Report)
Sat rear, never a threat.
Tracked leader, challenged the lead at 250M, ran on well to score.
Sat on pace, kept on okay, nothing extra final 50M.
Sat towards the rear, never in contention.
Settled behind midfield 3 wide, stayed on fairly.

Settled well behind from a poor draw, trailed the field near rail rounding home bend, saved ground on the inside turning for home, baulked for a run in straight until the 200M, produced good late impression closing stages.
Travelled keenly at times in forward of midfield on rail, came under pressure to challenge upon straightening, tightened 200M out and weakened under pressure.

Ridden forward from a poor draw to be up with the pace very wide in back straight, gradually shifted across for 2-wide position one back in 3rd coming onto home bend, kept on early in straight before weakening inside final 300M.
Travelled keenly in forward of midfield, inconvenience and lost position 900M out, dropped further behind into straight and never recovered.

Jumped well from a poor draw before travelling very wide 2L back in 5th, improved around home bend to join race leader before hitting the front briefly 400M out, soon dropped out of contention in straight.
Gradually settled mainly 3-wide in last few, came to challenge under pressure entering straight, finished off the race well inside final 200M near the centre of the track.
Well there gradually settled 2L back in 4th on rail, obtained a run off the rail 300M out but could find nothing under pressure.
Settled in worse than midfield, inconvenienced for a run 350M out, responded well to take charge 200M out, won readily.

With leaders early, shifted some 3L back to 5th inside the 1000M and slightly further back to 6th rounding home bend, baulked for a run in straight until the 250M, fought on dourly between runners without troubling the winner.
Gradually taken back to wide in midfield after beginning from the widest draw, shifted steadily backward to 10th rounding home bend, ran on steadily under pressure in straight without threatening.
Jumped moderately settling behind midfield, inconvenienced and lost position 850M out, towards rear into straight, obtained a clear run 300M out and fought on steadily without quickening.

Began well from a poor draw and soon taken back to midfield 3-wide, commenced move rounding home bend gaining 5th within 3L of pace into straight and sharing the lead briefly 250M out, weakened inside final 150M.

Soon taken well behind onto the rail from a poor draw, ridden 800M out gaining slightly until baulked, renewed effort on the inside on straightening, improving when forced to steady over 200M out, made no further impression.

Began awkwardly from a poor draw and soon took up running near the centre of the back straight, crossed for rails run in front coming onto home bend, soon headed on straightening and folded up quickly.
In midfield early stages, moved closer to leaders when pace quickened halfway, travelled strongly behind leading trio 500M, took over 300M and ran away late stages to claim the Triple Crown.
Switched off to last after the jump and raced as the back-marker until 500M, stayed on mildly to take 5th in a busy finish for the minor placings.
Held an on-pace position early stages, raced keenly when rival moved up on outside middle stages, vied for lead from 1000M, couldn't hold off winner 300M, held 2nd until late stages when no extra.
Tracked leaders early stages, drifted back to midfield when pace quickened middle stages, waited with until 350M, ran on steadily to take 3rd but unable to trouble the winner.
Near last early stages, made mid-race move 1300M, vied for lead setting fast pace to straight, no match for winner 300M, battled on and faded late to finish 6th.
Emerged as leader 2000M, steadied the pace once in front, was taken on for the lead by rivals from 1000M, couldn't sustain run passing 400M, weakened to last.
Jumped awkwardly, held up towards the rear 8Ls off leader early stages, remained in similar position 600M, made steady headway from 450M to claim 2nd late. No threat to runaway winner.
Badly crowded after the start, settled in second half of the field, driven along 700M but never going the pace to challenge leaders.
Obtained a position behind midfield, came under serious pressure 900M, driven along home turn but failed to muster speed, quickly beaten.
Tracked leader in the first half of the race, struggled to keep up when pace quickened from 1000M, fought on one paced final 400M. Never dangerous.
Jumped well from gate 12, positioned 3 lengths or so back on the stands' side, hard ridden 300M, finished off well to take a place.
Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield, nearer to the middle track, peaked 400M, made contact 300M, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Blundered at the start, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader, nearer to the middle track, hard ridden approaching 300M but only showed limited response, weakened inside final furlong.
Bumped on jumping, raced towards rear, nearer to the middle track, 5 lengths back at 400M, made contact and unbalanced near 300M, made some progress thereafter.
Bumped start, in touch, hard ridden from 300M but only showed limited response, ran on evenly to the line.
Began only fairly from gate 14, raced in midfield on the stands' rail, weakened final 300M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Out with rest, sent forward to take the lead, found the stands' rail approaching 750M, led by 1/2L at 400M, kept on very well to the line, easily scored.
Slightly slow out and made contact, raced at rear, 6 lengths back in the middle stages, switched to centre of track approaching 400M, kept on same pace to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped on jumping, raced behind midfield, 4 to 5 lengths back at 400M, made contact 300M, kept on same pace to the line.
Jumped with them, sent forward to race prominently, 1/2L back at 400M, hard ridden from 300M, peaked on run 150M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Knuckled on jumping, raced slightly behind midfield, 2 away from the stands' rail, made no progress final 400M.
Jumped awkwardly and became unbalanced. positioned 2 to 3 lengths back, 3 away from the stands' rail, hard ridden from 300M but only showed limited response, weakened gradually final 100M.
Moderately away, raced at rear on the stands' rail, moved a bit closer after passing 500M, not enough room 300M to 250M, made good progress thereafter to be nearest on line.
Bumped start, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on the stands' side, commenced move 300M, kept on well to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
Taken back to race at rear, 8 lengths or so back, moved a bit closer after passing 1000M, 5 lengths back on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Moderately away from a wide draw, taken back to race towards rear on the outside, peaked on turn, weakened early in straight, eased final 250M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened and eased inside final furlong.
Crowded on jumping, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground throughout, failed to close off in straight. (Jockey reported his mount made a respiratory noise during the race.)
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out 600M, 3-1/2L back turning in, showed some response early in straight, made contact 200M, one-paced thereafter.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out 500M, no clear run until final 100M, made little progress thereafter.

Made contact at start, raced 3 wide towards rear, sent forward 1200M, raced 3 wide better than midfield on turn, peaked early in straight, made contact 200M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began smartly, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 2-1/2L back turning in, not enough room early in straight, ran on well to take a place without threatening the first two. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, not enough room early in straight, peaked 200M, kept on same pace to the line.

Jumped with them, raced 3 wide behind midfield, 6 lengths back, moved a bit closer after passing 1050M, 3 to 4 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, made minor progress in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, enjoyed the easy lead in the middle stages, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 50M, finished 2nd.
Began well, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, easy run to turn, hard ridden after passing 400M, finished off strongly to score.
Clean jump, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M.
Wide in mid-field, in touch with leaders bend, soon weakened.
Tracked leader, quickened to lead 300m out, headed soon after, faded final 200m.
Tracked pace, quickened to lead 200m out, joined by winner 100m out, edged out but clear of rest.
Rail position in mid-field, headway 400m out, unable to sustain and one paced final 200m.
Wide early, tracked leader, weakened quickly 400m out, eased.
Mid-field, wide into home straight, weakened 200m out.
Awkward start and made contact with side of stall, keen in rear, short of room 400m out, limited progress once clear.
Mid-field, briefly had to wait for run 400m out, headway after, stayed on at the one pace final 200m.
Held up, still in rear and wide entering home straight, stayed on from 300m out, unable to reach leaders.
Across from wide draw to lead, keen, headed 300m out, weakened.
Slowly away, rear of mid-field, tight for room when making headway 300m out, flattened out final 150m.
Mid-field, headway onto heels of leaders 200m out, unable to match first two but stuck to task.
Waited with towards rear, wide into home straight, quickened impressively into contention, edged ahead final 100m, cosy.
Started slowly, outpaced in last place, stayed on but never dangerous.
Away with them, raced 2 wide better than midfield, travelled well to turn, showed good response in straight, took the lead 150M, kept on strongly to the line and scored.
Average to begin, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader, saved ground on turn, kept on well in straight to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Jumped well, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, finished off well to take a place.

Commenced well, raced behind midfield on outer, 5 lengths or so back turning in, peaked early in straight, kept on same pace to the line. (See Racing Incidents.) (Lame right front leg next day morning.)
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced 2 wide at rear, 7 to 8 lengths back turning in, one-paced in the run home.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside, 7 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide towards rear, 6 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Away well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/2L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well, raced in 2nd, 1-1/2L back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)

Rail position, tracked pace, chased home first two from top of home straight, stuck to task.

Soon prominent, joined leader halfway, headed 200m out, stuck to task, held by winner final 50m.

Settled towards rear, raced on the rail, hung in and could not be ridden out.

In rear after awkward start, angled wide off bend, stayed on late.

Tracked pace, challenged early in home straight, weakened over 150m out.
In touch with leaders, wide on bend, stayed on.

Rear of mid-field, troubled passage when making headway 200m out, stayed on, again short of room closing stages.
Chased leader, led 200m out, just held on in tight finish.
Raced in last place after slow start, still plenty to do top of home straight, stayed on and never nearer.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on strongly in straight, won by 2-1/4L.

Moderately away from the widest draw, raced towards rear on the outside, sent forward 800M, raced 3 wide in midfield on turn, very wide into straight, closed off well to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Out with rest, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, dropped to midfield in the middle stages, angled out 400M, very wide turning in, made some progress in straight, no threat to the first few.
Began well, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 wide from 700M, moved a bit closer on turn, very wide into straight, failed to made any progress in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.)

Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, finished off evenly.

Out in line, raced 2 wide in midfield, dropped towards rear 700M, 5 lengths back on turn, made no impression in straight.

Away with them, raced in midfield on the outside, moved a bit closer after passing 650M, 2-1/2L back turning in, showed some response early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened gradually thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)

Settled off the pace in rail, hampered dropping to 6th in midfield approaching back straight, slightly further back rounding home bend, weakened further in straight.

Settled in last few and waited with, ran on well inside final 100M, forced to check late.

Jumped awkwardly settling in last, swung home the widest, responded well inside final 200M to take charge close to home.

Pressed forward from a poor draw settling 2-wide in 2nd, came to join race leader rounding home bend disputing lead into straight, unable to sustain effort and swamped by fast-finishers closing stages.
Pressed forward from a poor draw to take up running over 1350M out, led the field until joined on straightening, swamped under pressure inside final 50M.

Slightly slow out settling in 5th just better than midfield, came to challenge under pressure entering home straight, ran on from 2L back to hold place chance inside final 150M only to be swamped close to home.
Began well settling one back in 3rd on rail, became 4th coming onto home bend, kept on until weakening inside final 150M.
Travelled wide without cover improving from midfield early to 3-wide in 2L 4th 1100M out, made short-lived effort rounding home bend and dropped away quickly on straightening.
Taken back from draw 12 and settled towards the rear on inside, 5Ls to make up on leader 400M, finished off only fairly, not ridden out late stages when held up behind a rival.
Jumped awkwardly, given a conservative ride 6Ls off the pace, made some progress final 300M without seriously threatening.
Went forward from draw 1, pressed by rival from 1200M setting a quicker pace middle stages, hung on to the lead until 150M then faded to finish 4th.

Caught racing wide no cover in midfield from draw 11, moved up to press leaders halfway, kept on steadily final 300M for 3rd.

Tracked leaders, raced keenly and hung out throughout the early and middle stages, responded fairly on straightening, couldn't go on with leaders passing 200M.
Crowded at the start, settled down behind midfield 4Ls off the pace, tracked eventual winner into home straight, ran on well to take 2nd but couldn't get closer to winner final 200M.
Settled in midfield along the fence, came under pressure 600M, soon outpaced and fell back to the rear, well beaten.
Caught wide no cover early stages before improving to race outside leader 1200M, disputed for lead middle stages, fought hard final 300M but couldn't hold off pursuing rivals last 150M.
Bumped at the start, switched off to race as the back marker 7-8Ls off leader, had task in hand early straight but couldn't finish off.

Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, similar position on turn, showed some response early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened final 50M.

Jumped well from the widest draw, showed limited early speed, taken back to race at tail, 7 lengths or so back on turn, showed some response early in straight, no extra final 100M, eased close home.

Jumped only fairly, raced 2 wide towards rear, 6 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, made very good progress in straight to be nearest on line.

Commenced well, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, 3 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Bumped shortly after start, taken back to race at rear, 6-1/2L back turning in, made no impression in straight.

Began only fairly, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well in straight to make frame without threatening. (See Racing Incidents.) (Lame left front leg.)
Made contact at start, taken back to race 2 wide behind midfield, there to turn, finished off evenly.
Failed to show early pace and settled back in the field, held up from top of the straight to 200M before running on fairly under top weight. (Mucus / Roarer.)

Crowded shortly after the start, recovered to race ahead of midfield, failed to pick up speed on straightening, no threat passing 300M.
Pressed forward but unable to cross, travelled wide no cover outside leaders, fought on same pace early straight, no extra final 200M.

Made contact shortly after start, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, showed very good response in straight, took the lead 100M, kept on very well to the line.
Bounded on jumping, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out 550M, very wide turning in, failed to close off in straight. (Irregular heart rhythm.)
Slightly slow out, raced at tail, 6 to 7 lengths back turning in, made some progress in the run home.
Began fairly, raced better than midfield on the outside, no cover on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final furlong.
Out with rest, raced behind midfield on the outside, peaked on turn, weakened early in straight, eased final 300M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Made contact shortly after start, sent forward to take the lead, headed 950M, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader in the middle stages, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 250M.

Made contact with the left side of its barrier on jumping and lost ground, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out 450M, no clear run early in straight, cleared near 250M, finished off evenly.

Began smartly from a wide draw, taken back to race 3 wide with cover in midfield, commenced move after passing 550M, very wide into straight, made some progress early in straight, peaked 250M, kept on same pace to the line.
Began well from the widest draw, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out 550M, 5 lengths or so back turning in, made some progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)

Jumped well, raced prominently on the outside, took the lead 950M, shared lead with rival on turn, headed 500M, showed no response early in straight, eased final 300M. (See Racing Incidents.) (Irregular heart rhythm.)
Began well, raced prominently, 2 wide, allowed rival to cross 900M, 1 out 1 back on turn, hit the front 250M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner final 100M.

Jumped only fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out approaching 500M, 4 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (Lacerations to the right hind pastern.)

Jumped well from gate 11, raced better than midfield but trapped very wide early, sent forward after passing 1000M, shared lead with rival on turn, led by a length 400M, peaked and headed 250M, stayed on evenly to take a place.
Tracked leader, box seat, one-paced to the finish.
Sat rear, never in contention.
Made clear intent to lead, headed narrowly in the Straight, but fought back to score.
Tracked leader 2 wide, took a narrow lead in the Straight, had every chance.
Settled in front of midfield on the rail, kept on well, but not able to challenge.
Sat rear 2 wide, driven out rounding the turn, kept on fairly.
Sat midfield 2 wide, driven out rounding the turn, made some progress in the Straight without threatening.
Settled behind midfield 2 wide with cover, angled wide rounding the turn, stayed on well to take fourth.
Bumped the barrier at the start and began slowly, sat rear on the rail, switched wide entering the Straight but failed to make an impression (See Incident Report).
Sat midfield on the rail, no impression made in the Straight.
Sat in front of midfield 2 wide, weakened under pressure in the Straight.
Towards rear early, made steady headway on rail to be midfield home bend, in similar position into straight, ran on gamely between runners inside final 250M to just prevail on line.
Moderate start, gradually settled in 6th near forward of midfield, made no impression in home straight.
Broke well from a poor draw but gradually shifted back to rear of midfield 3-wide, further back in 8th rounding home bend, hung in and a difficult ride in straight and made no impression.
Jumped fairly from a poor draw gradually drifting back to last onto home bend, came under pressure upon straightening, produced good late impression closing stages.

Jumped awkwardly racing keenly at times just worse than midfield, hampered and lost position 600M out and tight between runners upon straightening, inconvenienced just inside the 150M, kept on well to the line.
Niggled along 3-wide in first few, dropped over 2L back in 5th coming onto home bend, kept on same pace without making any serious impression in the run to the line.
Broke well gradually settling just off the pace, one back one off the rail in 3rd rounding home bend, gained slender advantage when hung in badly inside final 200M, pipped at post.
Taken back from the widest draw, remained rear and wide without cover throughout, never seen with a chance. (Blood in trachea and swollen fetlock).

Began moderately and soon dropped to last, remained well back in last few rounding home bend, saved ground on the rail turning in for home, produced good late impression inside final 150M, did best work late.
Soon took up running and led on rail, joined rounding home bend, fought on under pressure until gradually overhauled inside final 100M.
Settled within 2L of pace in 4th on rail, in similar position into straight, did not find much close to home.

Broke well from a poor draw travelling wide without cover sharing 2L 4th, made headway to join race leader rounding home bend holding every chance early in straight, weakened after crowded over 250M out.
Began only fairly, ended up racing 3-wide towards the rear, wide into straight before closing off moderately under top weight for an encouraging 4th.
Bumped at the start, rushed forward to be chasing leader from 1000M, not quickened on straightening, run ended and faded final 200M.
Jumped well, prominent behind leaders, briefly led 300M and had his chance, no extra final 150M.
Taken back from wide draw, waited with at the rear of the field, still last 300M, ran home strongly down the outside to get up last stride.
From draw 10 obtained a 3-wide position behind midfield, battled hard to stay in contention early straight, couldn't go on passing 200M.
Stayed close enough behind leaders, held up behind rivals 300M to 200M and again over final 150M. Could not be ridden out to the finish.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, ended up towards the rear, had difficulty obtaining clear running 450M to 300M before closing off nicely to claim 3rd without troubling first two.
Positively ridden, emerged as leader from 1000M, lost lead passing 300M, gave ground final 150M, eased near 50M when crowded by rival.
Began well enough, restrained to race in midfield on settling, into clear 400M and quickened up smartly to lead 200M, continued on well late stages just failed to hold off winner at the post.
Settled towards the rear along the fence, kept to the inside on straightening, responded fairly and not going the pace to challenge leaders. Not ridden out final stages when racing tight.
Caught wide no cover chasing leaders, kept on well early straight to stay in contention but not going the pace of first few over final 150M.

Moderately away, taken back to race at rear on the inside, 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, angled out early in straight, made some headway but was inclined to hang in final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 4-1/2L back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Began awkwardly, made contact with the right side of its starting gate and lost ground, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Began well from gate 9, raced 2 wide in midfield, wider turning in, only showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back to race behind midfield on the outside, commenced move 500M, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Jumped awkwardly, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Away well, positioned 1-1/4L behind the leader on the inside, same position on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 200M, ran on evenly to the line.
Began only fairly from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Commenced well, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, carried wider 500M, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Began smartly, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/4L, travelled well to turn, kept on strongly in straight, easily scored.

Jumped with them, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, angled out approaching 500M, 3 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight and was inclined to hang in, one-paced final 150M.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide in midfield, similar position on turn, kept on evenly in straight.
Out with rest, raced slightly behind midfield on outer, 5 lengths or so back turning in, kept on same pace in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, there to turn, hard ridden approaching 300M, finished off very strongly to score by a neck.

Began smartly, raced in midfield on the inside early, dropped towards rear after entering the back straight, raced behind midfield in the middle stages, saved ground on turn, made some progress in straight.

Began well from gate 1, raced behind midfield on the inside early, dropped towards rear after entering the back straight, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight to make frame, nearest on line.
Jumped with them, raced in midfield on the outside, moved a bit closer after passing 1200M, 4-1/2L back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually thereafter.
Began awkwardly, raced at rear on the inside early, 2 wide after entering the back straight, 7 lengths back turning in, failed to close off in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from gate 13, raced at tail, 7 to 8 lengths back turning in, failed to close off in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, headed near 900M, 2nd in the middle stages, retook the lead approaching 400M, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first two late.

Moderately away from a wide draw, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, allowed rival to cross approaching 800M, 3rd in the middle stages, 2-1/4L back turning in, finished off well to take 2nd, just beaten by a neck.
Bumped and unbalanced shortly after start, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide into straight, made some headway in the run home.
Moderately away, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out early in straight, finished off evenly.

Slightly slow out, raced behind midfield on the outside, sent forward after passing 1200M, took the lead 900M, led by 3/4L in the middle stages, headed 400M, kept on well early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened thereafter.
Tracked pace three wide, effort 400m out, faded final 200m.
Crowded from stalls, in rear and outpaced, struggling final bend, eased over 300m out.
Keen under restraint in rear of mid-field, had to wait for run 300m out, stayed on.
Dropped in from wide draw, keen, tight for room when still in rear over 300m out, no impression after.
Held up from wide draw, bumped top of home straight, no impression under pressure.
Raced very wide throughout, chased leaders into home straight, soon weakened.
Close up, quickened clear 200m out, soon in control.
Wide early, led after 400m, headed 300m out, weakened.
Mid-division, stayed on steadily to edge tight finish for second, no threat to winner.
Led early, headed after 400m, remained close up, had to wait for run over 300m out, no extra under pressure.
In touch with leaders, shuffled back into mid-field halfway, short of room briefly 300m out, weakened 150m out.
Tracked pace, moved into second and chased winner 200m out, always held by that rival and no extra final 50m.
Mid-field, keen and shuffled back mid-race, had to wait for run 400m out, clear over 300m out, stayed on.
Rear of mid-field, shuffled back halfway, headway widest final bend, stayed on, no further impression closing stages.

Made contact at start, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield early, dropped to midfield after entering the back straight, bumped near 450M, 3 lengths back turning in, closed off well to take 2nd without threatening the winner.

Began well from gate 1, raced prominently on the inside, allowed rival to cross 1400M, 2 wide from 1100M, took the lead 600M, led by 3/4L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened late.
Slightly slow out and made contact, raced towards rear on the outside, commenced move 800M, 2 lengths or so back on turn, finished off strongly to score. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide on turn, bumped near 450M, made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)

Jumped with them, raced 2 wide better than midfield, moved closer 650M, 3/4L back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, commenced move 500M, very wide turning in, made no progress in straight.
Jumped only fairly, raced in midfield on outer, dropped towards rear 800M, 5 lengths or so back on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Slightly slow out and bumped, raced behind midfield on the inside, 5 lengths back turning in, made some progress early in straight, no clear run final 100M.
Made contact at start, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground to turn, no clear run early in straight, kept on same pace thereafter.

Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, commenced move after passing 800M, 3 lengths or so back on turn, made good progress in straight to take a place without threatening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Shifted in at start and bumped, sent forward to take the lead, found rail near 1400M, led by 3/4L in the middle stages, headed and dropped towards rear 600M, hampered near 500M, eased thereafter.

Shifted out at start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, moved closer after entering the back straight, positioned 3 wide, a length or so back on turn, showed some response early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened close home.
Settled mainly in forward of midfield, saved ground in a similar position into straight, kept on same pace under pressure without quickening.
Settled in last few from the widest draw, never seen with a chance.
Jumped awkwardly travelling keenly 3-wide mainly in rear of midfield, commenced move rounding home bend, ran on dourly under pressure inside final 200M to snatch victory late.

Wide towards rear early from a poor draw, circled the field onto first bend to be one-out-one-back into back straight, became 2nd over 800M out and similar into straight, kept on same pace without threatening.
Prominent early, just over 2L back sharing 4th early in back straight dropping to 5th over 800M out, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, made no impression thereafter.

Wide in last few from a poor draw, 3-wide in 6th rounding first bend, gained further closer to 2L 4th 3-wide without cover 900M out, in similar position turning in for home, unable to sustain effort in straight.
Close up early, gradually settled just worse than midfield, swung wide entering home straight, made no further impression.
Soon taken back behind midfield on rail, commenced move rounding home bend, obtained a clear passage about 250M out, fought on steadily without threatening.
Settled in last few from a poor draw, travelled 3-wide in back straight and wider when ridden around home bend, ran past well-beaten horses.

Led early stages travelling keenly, ceded advantage for cover rounding first bend, remained in a similar position to straight saving ground turning in for home, unable to sustain effort in the run to the line.
Soon dropped to last few, became last rounding home bend and tailed-off into straight.
Very wide in midfield early, took up running coming onto first bend obtaining rails run inside the 900M, led the field until headed over 50M out.
Jumped only fairly, sat towards rear, switched out rounding the Turn, closed off fairly.
Settled in front of midfield, crowded near 1000M, lay out slightly making the Turn, gave ground (See Incident Report).
Sat on pace, traveled nicely, kept on well to hold 2nd (Lost stirrup).
Sat on pace, gave ground quickly from 600M (Unacceptable Performance, Must BT).
Settled midfield, raced on the rail to save ground, responded okay under whip.
Sat on pace, traveled okay, not much impression in the Straight.
Ridden hard to lead, traveled smoothly, stretched out nicely.
Slow to jump, sat rear, raced rear, made some ground inside 200M.
Jumped awkwardly, settled midfield, raced ungenerously in the middle stages, ran on evenly.
Sat behind midfield, raced wide, limited response when asked.
Sat worse than midfield, traveled fairly, raced tight inside 50M (See Incident Report).
Settled in front of midfield, raced wide from 600M, failed to respond when asked (See Incident Report).
Held up, headway widest final bend, in contention 150m out, unable to sustain effort.
Rail position in mid-field, angled out and briefly short of room entering home straight, improved to hold every chance 100m out, unable to stay with front 2 final 50m.
Waited with towards rear, lost touch from final bend and well held.
Tracked pace, keen, ridden 300m out, no extra final 150m.
Held up, last and pushed along 400m out, stayed on out wide in home straight, unable to reach leaders.
In touch with leaders, blocked off when going for run up rail 200m out, dropped away after.
Pressed leader, led 250m out, headed 100m out, no extra.
Made running, pressed by rival, headed under 300m out, weakened.
Mid-division, bumped 300m out, good headway to challenge 150m out, sustained run and just edged out runner-up.
Tracked leading pair, tight for room against rail 200m out, no extra.
Wide throughout from high draw, mid-division, weakened over 200m out.
Held up, good headway between runners to hold every chance 100m out, ran on well and only narrowly denied.

Made contact at start, raced 3 wide in midfield early, moved a bit closer after passing 800M, no cover throughout, 2 lengths back turning in, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped shortly after start, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear, 3 to 4 lengths back turning in, no clear run early in straight, kept on evenly to the line.
Began well from gate 1, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, easy run to turn, hard ridden after passing 250M, finished off very strongly to score.

Slightly slow out and made contact shortly after start, raced 3 wide with cover, 2 to 3 lengths back, wider after passing 500M, made minor progress early in straight, peaked 100M, ran on evenly to the line.(Blood in trachea.)
Moderately away from a wide draw, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide, 3/4L back turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped and unbalanced shortly after start, raced behind midfield on the outside, moved closer in the middle stages, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened and eased thereafter.
Fast into stride, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Made contact at start, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 50M, weakened and dropped to fourth close home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Crowded on jumping, raced towards rear on the inside, angled out 400M, unable to obtain clear run until 150M, finished off strongly to take 2nd.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 6 lengths or so back, moved a bit closer after passing 600M, 4 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, made no impression in the run home.
Settled in front of midfield 2 wide, kept on fairly under pressure.
Sat behind midfield 2 wide, made some progress late but never a threat.
Sat rear 3 wide with cover, switched very wide on the turn and stayed on well to grab second.
Sat behind midfield 3 wide with no cover, no response under pressure.
Made clear intent to lead from a wide gate, hard ridden in the Straight but weakened in the final 150M.
Settled midfield 2 wide, no impression made, weakened inside final furlong.
Settled box seat, kept on fairly in the Straight, weakened in the final 50M and was narrowly denied second.
Settled in front of midfield on the rail; driven out on the turn and scored comfortably.
Tracked leader 2 wide, bumped in the Straight, lost momentum and weakened thereafter (See Incident Report).
Settled midfield on the rail, found nothing in the Straight, never in contention.
Sat rear on the rail, out-paced rounding the final 550M, never a factor.
Sat rear 2 wide, made good ground along the rail in the Straight to take fourth.
Soon took up running from a poor draw attempting to make all, unable to sustain effort under pressure and swamped shortly after straightening.
Settled in midfield, made steady headway 3-wide from 900M out reaching 3rd over 600M out, one-paced from wide into straight.
Settled well back after beginning from the widest draw, never seen with a chance.

Pressed forward from a poor draw reaching 2nd 2-wide passing the winning post the first time, came under pressure in a similar position over 700M out but lost position when tight entering straight, never recovered.
Chased leader within 2L of pace on rail, saved ground turning in for home holding every chance until the 50M, found no extra.
Began awkwardly travelling wide without cover behind midfield, made short-lived effort inside the 800M, very wide in midfield around home bend before dropping out of contention into straight.
In rear to straight, saved ground turning in for home, produced some late impression.
Pressed forward from a poor draw settling over 2L back in 4th, lost position when tempo increased 700M out but saved ground on the inside turning into home straight, weakened under pressure.
Soon taken back from a poor draw travelling keenly early stages, never seen with a chance.
Well there early before taken over 3L back in 5th on rail, lost position when tempo increased over 800M out, saved ground turning in for home but soon weakened in straight.
Jumped awkwardly losing ground travelling keenly towards rear, commenced move inside the 400M swinging wide into straight, fought on steadily without threatening.
Settled in midfield from a low draw, switched off rail to make a move passing the 800M gaining 5th very wide rounding home bend, sustained effort in the run to the line to snatch victory 50M out.
From draw 1 moved up to track leader, responded well under top weight passing 350M, got up near 150M pulling away from the runner-up late. First two drew well clear from rest.
From wide draw shifted across behind runners, settled down behind midfield 5-6Ls off the pace, hard driven 450M but not picking up pace. No extra final 200M.
Restrained to race towards the rear 6-7Ls off leader, had task in hand 400M but failed to finish off the race.
Reserved near last early and middle stages, 4-wide and improving position from 600M, stayed on moderately final 300M without threatening top two.
Stayed close enough to leaders early stages, in a midfield spot from 800M, stayed on mildly over final 300M, got up for 3rd late but was well behind first two.
Began well enough, moved up to track leader 2-wide, outpaced by first two passing 300M, lay in final 250M and proved difficult to ride out. Lost 3rd late stages.
From a wide draw taken back to last 7-8Ls back, in similar position turning home, made limited progress final 300M. Never a serious threat.
Settled down behind midfield, raced tight between rivals home turn before running on mildly over final 300M. (Jockey - his horse not entirely comfortable on Good to Yielding surface.)
From wide draw caught racing 3-wide in midfield, came under pressure 500M, struggled to keep up and gave ground passing 200M.
Went forward but pace fast early stages and unable to cross, caught wide no cover behind leaders, couldn't quicken on straightening. (Jockey: may not have been suited by Good To Yielding surface.)
Obtained a midfield position along the fence, came under pressure 450M and didn't respond to riding in the home straight. (Jockey : may not have appreciated the Good To Yielding surface.)
Emerged as leader soon after the start, had uncontested lead going into the straight, fought hard but couldn't hold off winner 150M. Finished well clear from remainders.
Jumped only fairly, raced better than midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 550M, angled out 400M, made good progress early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Jumped with them, raced towards rear on the outside, found rail approaching 450M, 6 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Jumped only fairly, raced 2 wide better than midfield, carried wider after passing 550M, very wide into straight, finished off strongly to take 2nd.
Began smartly, sent forward to race prominently on the inside, took the lead 450M, challenged by rivals after turning in, kept on well but unable to hold off the first two final 50M. (Dead-heat 3rd.)
Jumped with them, raced towards rear on the inside, 8 lengths or so back turning in, kept to inside after straightening and made some progress.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide in 3rd, 3 wide on turn, challenged the leaders after turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first two final 50M. (Dead-heat 3rd.)
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 lengths or so back, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.
Bumped on jumping, raced behind midfield on the inside, 4 lengths or so back, angled out 400M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Crowded start, raced behind midfield on outer, 5 lengths or so back on turn, failed to close off in straight.

Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield early, found rail after entering the back straight, moved closer along the rail on turn, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 50M, kept on strongly to the line and scored.
Crowded on jumping, raced at tail, 8 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, made no impression in straight.

Shifted in at start and bumped, sent forward to race prominently, took the lad 1050M, led by 1/2L in the middle stages, challenged by rivals on turn, headed near 450M, peaked 350M, weakened early in straight, eased final 150M.

Out with rest, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, commenced move 600M, 3-1/2L back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, kept on same pace to the line. (Wound to left hind leg) (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, wider turning in, failed to close off in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from gate 9, raced towards rear on the inside, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, made some progress in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide at rear, 5 lengths or so back turning in, no clear run early in straight, cleared approaching 200M, made some progress thereafter.
Bumped start, raced better than midfield on outer, 2 lengths or so back, there to turn, finished off well to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced prominently, 2 wide, a length back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on the inside, travelled keenly after passing 800M, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Bumped start, read behind midfield on outer, 5 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, made some progress in straight. (Rider dropped whip near 250M.)
Fractious in the starting gates and jumped awkwardly, positioned 3 to 4 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Average to begin, positioned 2-1/2L behind the leader on the inside, checked near 700M, 2 wide from 650M, angled out early in straight, closed off well to take a place.
Clean jump, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on very well in straight, won by 1-1/4L.
Taken back from gate 12, raced at rear on the outside, 6 lengths or so back, very wide into straight, made some headway in the run home.
Bumped from stalls, caught wide tracking pace, weakened 400m out.
Still plenty to do 400m out after held up, stayed on out wide, never nearer.
Waited with in rear, had to wait for run 400m out, some headway into mid-field but never dangerous.
Dropped in from widest draw, plenty to do, pushed along 500m out, little impression.
Mid-division, headway 400m out, one paced final 200m.
Forced pace, joined 200m out, responded gamely to maintain narrow lead, held off that rival but headed by fast-finishing winner on line.
Prominent early, hung left on bend, quickly dropped away home straight.
Chased leader, joined that rival 200m out, stayed on for pressure but narrowly held, dropped to third close home as winner finished strongly.
Crowded shortly after start, rear of mid-field, stayed on well final 150m, unable to reach leaders.
Rail position, in touch with leaders, chased leading pair 300m out, closed from 150m out, led post.
Towards rear, a bit keen, headway over 300m out, soon flattened out.
Mid-field, nudged along from an early stage, weakened 400m out, soon well held.
Settled midfield, traveled okay, no clear running until 150M, just missed (See Incident Report).
Ridden along to lead, raced smoothly, closed off strongly (See Incident Report).
Jumped awkwardly, sat towards rear, limited response when asked.
Settled midfield, weakened quickly inside 200M.
Jumped awkwardly, sat behind midfield, gave ground in the Straight.
Sat on pace, traveled nicely, could not be fully tested when positioned close to heels over the concluding stages.
Sat handy, one pace to the finish.
Sat rear, traveled only fairly, no contention.
Jumped awkwardly, settled worse than midfield, raced keenly in the early and middle stages, closed off okay.
Settled midfield, traveled okay, ran on evenly.
Settled midfield, raced keenly in the early stages when racing tight, not much impression made.
Settled in front of midfield, raced wide and without cover, minor progress made.
Settled behind midfield, switched out rounding Turn, lay out under whip over the final 200M.
Sat in front of midfield, lay out in the Home Straight, proved difficult to ride out.
Across from wide draw to track leader, led off final bend, headed over 300m out, weakened.
Tracked pace, challenged top of home straight, weakened 300m out.
Across from wide draw to force pace, headed final bend, weakened quickly, found to be displaying an irregular heart rhythm.
Mid-division, pushed along 400m out, lacked pace to get on terms with leaders.
Mid-division, improved to track leaders into home straight, quickened to lead 300m out and soon in control.
Tracked pace, short of room towards rail final bend, ridden over 300m out, stayed on at the one pace.
Waited with in rear, headway widest final bend, stayed on but no further impression on leaders final 200m.
Slowly away, recovered to race mid-field, had to wait for run off final bend and shuffled back, one paced.
Mid-field, chased winner home from 300m out, clear of rest but unable to close gap on winner.
In rear after slow start, headway 400m out, flattened out final 150m.
Held up, last into home straight, ridden 400m out, late headway but never dangerous.
Towards rear, headway and still going well over 300m out, stayed on at the one pace under pressure.
Waited with in rear, ridden 400m out, no impression.
Wide in mid-field, chased leaders off final bend, no extra final 150m.
Crowded start, raced at rear on the stands' rail, checked near 600M, 7 lengths back near 400M, one-paced thereafter. (A laceration to the right front cannon.)
Jumped awkwardly, sent forward to race in 2nd, 1-3/4L back in the middle stages, hard ridden from 350M, kept on well to the line, always just held.
Jumped only fairly, raced in midfield on the middle track, peaked 400M, weakened final furlong.
Shifted in at start and bumped, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the stands' rail, same position in the middle stages, hard ridden after passing 400M, kept on evenly to the line.
Shifted in at start, raced in midfield, 3 lengths or so back in the middle stages, hard ridden approaching 400M, peaked on run 200M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Severely checked at start, raced towards rear of midfield, 2 away from the stands' rail, 5 lengths back at 400M, made no progress thereafter.
Crowded start, raced behind midfield on the stands' side, passed some tired runners final 400M.
Away with them, raced better than midfield nearer to the middle track, hard ridden from 400M, kept on well until 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Fast into stride, showed good speed to take the lead, led by 1-3/4L in the middle stages, hard ridden from 300M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Bumped start, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the stands' side, hard ridden approaching 300M, finished off well to take a place.
Began well, raced better than midfield, 2 away from the stands' rail, dropped towards rear in the middle stages, failed to make any progress final 400M.
Out with rest, raced in midfield on the middle track, hard ridden 400M but only showed limited response, one-paced to the line.
Crowded shortly after start, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.

Jumped with them, raced behind midfield on middle track, 5 lengths back in the middle stages, hard ridden approaching 400M but only showed limited response, weakened inside final furlong. (Lame left front leg next day morning.)
Made clear intent to lead from a wide gate, weakened in the final 300M.
Settled at the rear on the rail; made good ground along the inside of the Straight but never posed a threat.
Slow to begin, settled rear 3 wide with cover, kept on only evenly in the Straight.
Sat box seat, shifted out entering the Straight, kept on well but was narrowly denied victory.
Raced at the rear throughout, never in contention.
Sat towards rear of midfield, ridden along but failed to make an impression.
Settled midfield on the rail, had difficulty securing a clear run near the 300M, but kept on well once clear to win.
Sat rear 4 wide with cover, angled very wide on the turn and kept on fairly without threatening.
Settled midfield 2 wide with cover, driven out and made some progress, hampered when taken wider over the concluding stages (See Incident Report).
Sat behind midfield on the rail, never involved.
Settled midfield 2 wide with cover, one-paced to the finish (Bled).
Settled behind midfield, driven out and kept on well to finish fourth.
Raced keenly in the middle stages, tracked leader 2 wide, weakened in the Straight before being eased.
Settled midfield 3 wide without cover, hard ridden at the top of the straight but found little and was one-paced to the line.
Travelled wide without cover throughout, shared early pace until the 900M when shifted some 1L back, folded up quickly upon straightening.

Settled about 4L off the pace becoming 6th in a similar position 1000M out, commenced move 3-wide rounding home bend holding every chance early in straight, found winner too strong inside final 200M, lost 2nd late.
Broke well, led or disputed lead to straight, kept on under pressure early in straight until finding no extra inside final 200M.
Crowded at start, not far off until weakening out of contention on straightening.
Never far off on rail, came under pressure upon straightening but unable to quicken to challenge.
Always well there hitting the front 900M out, joined by others upon straightening before headed about 200M out, fought back for 2nd late.
Trailed the field and waited with after crowded at start, angled out for a run upon straightening, quickened well to lead inside the 200M, won easily.
Began fairly settling in last few, saved ground turning in for home, baulked behind runners on rail on straightening, kept on same pace without making any serious impression closing stages.
From draw 13 caught 3-wide no cover chasing leaders, quickened up well under top weight early straight, led near 100M and had every chance, just couldn't hold off winner late.
Made contact with rival at the start and badly unbalanced, settled down behind midfield 7Ls off the pace, still had plenty to do 400M, finished well to claim 3rd just in time.
Moved up to chase the pace from wide draw, came under pressure 500M to hold his position, weakened 250M.
Bumped at the start, eased back to race near the rear 8Ls off leader, had big task in hand 400M, stayed on well but without troubling leaders.
Bumped at the start, obtained a midfield position along the 2-path, 4Ls to make up on leader top of straight, stayed on moderately to the line. Lost out on 4th spot in a photo finish.
Bumped at the start, settled down just behind midfield, badly crowded after the 1000M, over 6Ls to make up 400M before closing off steadily to take 4th last stride.
Crowded on jumping, positioned 3-wide ahead of midfield, raced keenly middle stages, driven to 3rd mid-straight but run ended late stages and lost several places near line.
Taken across to the fence after the start, severely checked 1100M and fell back to detached last, out of contention and wasn't ridden out for the remainder of the race.
Bumped after the start, raced in mid-division on inside, found another gear when driven out 250M, closed off strongly and won going away.
Reserved in midfield 6Ls back, waited with until 400M but kept on only fairly under pressure. Never a threat to leaders.
Stayed prominent to the pace in early and middle stages, came under serious pressure 500M, dropped away quickly on straightening. (Irregular Heart Rhythm.)
Urged to take the lead, set steady pace to the straight, kept on well to 100M, lost lead and weakened to 6th.
From draw 1 moved up to track leaders, 4th going into the turn, driven along to maintain position 450M, couldn't sustain run mid-straight.
From draw 14 taken back to the rear, checked 1000M, 8Ls off the lead 400M, ran past beaten horses only. (Roarer.)
Bumped start, positioned 3 to 4 lengths behind the leader, 2 away from the stands' rail, hard ridden after passing 350M, finished off evenly.
Made contact at start, sent forward to race prominently, 1-3/4L back at 400M, peaked 300M, weakened thereafter. (Roarer.)

Blundered at the start, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead near 700M, led by 1-1/2L in the middle stages, hard ridden approaching 200M, kept on well but unable to hold off the first few final 75M.
Began awkwardly and bumped, raced towards rear on the stands' side, 6-1/2L back in the middle stages, made no progress final 400M.
Made contact shortly after start, taken back to race at rear, 6 lengths or so back, hard ridden from 250M, made some progress thereafter.

Jumped well from gate 14, raced better than midfield on the stands' side, 2 lengths or so back at 400M, unable to obtain clear run until approaching final 150M, finished off well without threatening the first few.
Began only fairly, raced in midfield on the stands' side, ridden after passing 300M but only showed limited response, no clear run near 100M, one-paced thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slightly slow out and crowded, raced at rear on the middle track, failed to make any progress final 400M.

Jumped with them, raced slightly better than midfield, 2 away from the stands' rail, commenced move 350M, showed very good response, took the lead 75M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner late.
Moderately away from gate 13, raced in midfield on the stands' rail, 3-1/2L back at 400M, hard ridden from 200M, finished off well to take a place.
Crowded shortly after start, raced at tail on the middle track, 8 lengths or so back at 400M, hard ridden approaching 300M but showed no response, weakened thereafter.
Out with rest, raced behind midfield on the stands' side, 4 to 5 lengths back at 400M, hard ridden after passing 200M, finished off very strongly to score by a narrow margin.
Made contact at start, took the early lead, headed near 700M, 1-1/2L back at 400M, hard ridden approaching 300M, kept on evenly to the line.

Bumped shortly after start, raced towards rear, 2 away from the stands' rail, 5 to 6 lengths back in the middle stages, hard ridden approaching 300M but only showed limited response, weakened final 150M.

Shifted out abruptly at the start and made heavy contact, raced prominently on the inside, allowed rival to cross after passing 750M, sat right behind the leader on turn, kept to inside after straightening and finished off evenly.
Jumped well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, kept on well in evenly in straight.
On jumping made contact with the left side of its barrier and lost ground, positioned 2 wide, 3 lengths or so back, there to turn, showed limited response in straight, no clear run close home.
Bumped shortly after start, raced behind midfield on outer, moved closer in the middle stages, 2 lengths or so back turning in, closed off well to take a place without threatening.
Crowded start, raced behind midfield on the inside, 4 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Bumped shortly after start, raced at rear, 6 lengths back, same margin back on turn, made no impression in straight.
Average to begin, raced in midfield on the outside, moved closer on turn, showed very good response in straight, took the lead 200M, kept on strongly to the line and scored.
Began smartly from the widest draw, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 200M, finished 2nd.

Bumped start, raced better than midfield but trapped wide, moved closer after passing 950M, 2nd on turn, 2 wide, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M, eased inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began only fairly from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response in straight, no clear run final 100M.
Slightly slow out and crowded, raced towards rear on the outside, 3-1/4L back turning in, finished off evenly.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, raced at rear on the inside, angled out 500M, 5 lengths back turning in, made some headway in straight.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths back, 3 wide from 450M, finished off evenly.
Crowded start, raced at tail, 8 lengths or so back, moved closer after passing 600M, 5 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Taken back to race at rear on the inside, 7 lengths or so back, last turning in, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Began well, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off strongly, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Began only fairly from gate 1, raced behind midfield on the inside, 5 to 6 lengths back, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened 150M, eased final 100M.
Jumped with them, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/4L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, raced in midfield on the outside, 3 lengths or so back, very wide turning in, finished off very strongly, led close home.

Bumped start, raced in midfield on the inside, angled out approaching 400M, 4 lengths back turning in, showed very good response in straight, took the lead 50M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner close home.
Shifted in at start and made contact, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)

Taken back from gate 9, raced 2 wide towards rear, 6 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, made minor progress early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened and eased thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened thereafter.
Away well, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, wider turning in, finished off well to make frame, always just held.
From draw 1 stayed close enough to leaders, shifted lane 200M to obtain clear running, kept on nicely under top weight to take 4th .
In midfield early stages, struggled for pace home turn, soon weakened on straightening.
Away awkwardly and lost ground, taken to a rail spot behind midfield, had 4Ls to make up on leader / eventual winner 400M, closed off fastest to be beaten just over 1L at the line.
Obtained a 3-wide position in mid-pack, came under pressure home turn, gave further ground in a weak run to the line.
Jumped on terms, soon took up the running and led uncontested, travelled strongly into the straight, continued on well final 200M to score giving rivals no chance.
Away well enough, stayed in touch with leaders making home turn, lacked a finishing response when asked, soon no threat.
Positively ridden to chase leader, kept on one pace passing 300M and out of contention for the minor placings in the late stages.
Bounded on jumping and lost ground, ended up at the back of the field 5-6Ls off the pace, responded fairly on straightening and never able to challenge leaders.
Dropped back from wide draw and raced at the rear 3-wide, plenty to do top of straight, made some ground down outsider without posing serious threat.
Settled down near last, raced greenly throughout the race and failed to finish off in the straight.
Caught racing wide no cover outsider leaders, fought hard early straight to stay in contention, no extra final stages.
Not hurried after the start, settled behind midfield along the 3-path, ran home well down outside on straightening to claim 3rd.
Settled in front of midfield, rolled forward and shared the lead from 900M, raced keenly in the early stages, failed to respond in the Straight (See Incident Report).
Settled in front of midfield, traveled nicely, switched out rounding the Turn, made good progress when asked.
Ridden hard to lead until 900M, checked entering the Straight, weakened slightly over the concluding stages.
Made contact on jumping, failed into stride, eased down and retired from the event before the first turn (See Incident Report).
Sat towards rear, traveled smoothly, responded nicely under whip.
Sat midfield, traveled okay on the rail, ran on evenly.
Sat rear, traveled rear, limited response when asked.
Sat handy, dropped to 5th entering the Back Straight, switched out making the Turn.
Sat towards rear, traveled greenly, gave ground quickly (See Incident Report, Unacceptable Performance, Must BT).
Sat worse than midfield, traveled fairly, made the Turn wide, minor progress made.
Sat on pace and took the lead from 900M, gave ground quickly entering the Straight (See Incident Report).
Recovered from sluggish start to race mid-field, stayed on but lacked pace to challenge.
Slowly into stride, towards rear, ran on well through horses final 150m.
Made running, hung right and headed over 200m out, weakened.
Tracked pace, quickened to lead 150m out, eased closing stages, won cosily.
Raced prominently, effort and in share of lead briefly 200m out, faded.
Rail position in mid-field, angled out early in home straight, stayed on.
Three wide towards rear, struggling and left behind from top of home straight.
Dropped in from wide draw, had to wait for run briefly on bend and again 150m out, unable to get on terms with leaders.
Rear of mid-field, good headway from 200m out, finished off strongly despite hanging right.
Tracked leaders, in share of lead and every chance 200m out, no extra final 50m.
Raced wide, in touch with leaders, lost ground quickly off bend, held when eased 200m out.
Waited with in rear, pushed along 350m out, no impression.
Away well, raced 2 wide, 2 to 3 lengths back, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.) (Blood in trachea.)
Made contact at start, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, 3 lengths back, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Bumped start, raced better than midfield but trapped 3 wide, peaked 500M, weakened 450M, eased early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Out with rest, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length in the middle stages, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 50M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made contact at start, raced in midfield on the inside, angled out 500M, 4 lengths back turning in, made minor progress early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Began fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, 5 lengths back turning in, one-paced in the run home.
Began well from gate 1, raced in 2nd, a length or so back in the middle stages, kept on evenly in straight.
Taken back to race 2 wide at rear, angled out 400M, very wide turning in, made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from gate 9, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on same pace in straight.
Away with them, raced in midfield on outer, 4 lengths back turning in, finished off evenly.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angle out after passing 400M, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to score.
Bumped start, taken back to race at tail, 8 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, made very good progress in straight to make frame.
Settled rear on the rail, one-paced to the finish.
Tracked leader 2 wide with cover, ridden entering the straight and proved one-paced to the line.
Showed clear intent to lead, weakened quickly in the Straight and eased inside final furlong.
Settled midfield 2 wide with cover, driven out rounding the turn, stayed on well to score.
Settled in the box seat; had every chance in the straight but made limited headway and never threatened.
Settled rear of midfield, 3 wide with no cover, ran on evenly to finish fourth.
Settled midfield on the rail, responded only fairly in the Straight.
Sat in front of midfield 2 wide with cover, took the lead near the 200M but was narrowly headed on the line.
Sat rear, angled out rounding the turn, kept on evenly without making no impression.
Began moderately settling in worse than midfield in 9th on rail, came under pressure entering home straight, ran on under pressure and did best work late.
Quickly recovered from a moderate start to 5th or 6th 2-wide in forward of midfield, found nothing in straight.
Gradually settled in last few, commenced 3-wide inside the 400M and swinging widest into straight, made no further impression in the run to the line.
Taken back from a poor draw, trailed the field most of the way, ran past well-beaten horses closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly before settling in 6th or 5th on rail in forward of midfield, angled out for a run into straight, ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Began awkwardly before settling one back on rail in 3rd, chased leaders into straight but unable to quicken under pressure to threaten.
Never better than midfield racing keenly middle stages, one-paced in home straight.
Attempted to make all holding narrow advantage on rail until headed inside final 100M.
Soon crossed from a wide draw to track outside leader, gained upper hand under pressure inside the 100M.
Lost ground at start from the widest draw settling in last few on rail, saved ground turning in for home but never seen with a chance.
Gradually picked up to midfield in 7th 3-wide, lost position swinging wider into straight, made no further impression.
Prominent travelling mainly 2-wide in 4th within 2L of pace, kept on same pace without making any serious impression in straight.
Bumped at the start, restrained to race near the rear, had 6Ls to make up top of straight, ran on well under big weight. Nearest finish.
Settled just ahead of midfield and never far off from leaders, switched to center of track 350M, came with a good run to claim 4th.
Settled down in midfield 4-5Ls off the pace, brought wide on straightening but never going the pace to challenge leaders.
From wide draw taken back to last, pressed along home turn and had 7Ls to make up on leader 400M, took time to get going and commenced to finish off well final 200M.
In midfield early, raced keenly when the pace steadied in middle stages, forward move from 800M to join leaders 3-wide, had tough run and couldn't sustain effort mid-straight.
Obtained a midfield position 5-6Ls off pace, little change in position middle stage, kept on steadily final 300M without making any serious impression.
From draw 12 obtained a trailing position behind leaders, swung to center of track for his challenge, fought hard and dup deep to get past leaders late stages.
Took up an on-pace position, came under pressure 600M and didn't finish the race off, weakened mid-straight.
Crossed to the lead 1300M, slowed down the tempo once in the lead, quickened up pace again home turn, vied for lead with rival on straightening, caught by winner late.
Taken back from wide draw, settled towards the rear early stages, moved closer to midfield 600M, ran home moderately final 300M.
Slow to begin, settled back in the field along the inside, still 6-7Ls off leaders home turn, made limited progress on towards the line.
Went forward from draw 1, tracked leader from 1300M, joined leader early straight vying for the lead, caught by winner late and just missed out on 2nd.
Crowded shortly after start, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.
Bumped shortly after start, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Crowded shortly after start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3-1/2L back turning in, no clear run early in straight, cleared 150M, finished off well to take 2nd.

Shifted in at start and bumped, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, angled out 350M, showed some response early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened gradually thereafter. (Jockey dropped whip 150M.)
Crowded shortly after start, raced 2 wide at rear, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Jumped well from the widest draw, raced in 3rd, no cover throughout, a length or so back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Crowded shortly after start, raced behind midfield on outer, dropped towards rear 700M, very wide into straight, one-paced in the run home.
Clean jump, raced in midfield on the outside, 3 lengths back, same margin back on turn, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 150M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Shifted out abruptly at start and bumped, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, wider turning in, made some progress in straight.
Knuckled on jumping and made contact, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weakened final 100M.
Slightly slow out and bumped, slightly better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, wider turning in, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening.
Jumped with them, tracked leaders, 2 lengths back at 400M, hard ridden approaching 300M, finished off evenly.
Away well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L in the middle stages, peaked and headed 200M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Away well, raced better than midfield, 2-1/2L back at 400M, peaked on run 250M, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away with them, raced slightly behind midfield, nearer to the middle track, hard ridden from 350M but only showed limited response, weakened final furlong.
Slightly slow out, raced in midfield on the stands' side, 3 to 4 lengths back at 400M, finished off well to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Shifted out at start and bumped, sent forward to race prominently, hard ridden approaching 250M, took the lead near 200M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Bumped start, raced towards rear on the stands' side, hard ridden from 300M but showed no response, weakened final furlong.
Began well from gate 12, raced better than midfield on the stands' side, 2-1/2L back at 400M, finished off strongly to take 2nd.
Began well from gate 13, raced slightly behind midfield on the stands' rail, kept on evenly final 400M.
Jumped only fairly, raced at tail, 7 lengths or so back in the middle stages, one-paced final 400M.
Began fairly and bumped, raced in midfield, 2 away from the stands' rail, 3 to 4 lengths back at 400M, hard ridden approaching 300M but only showed limited response, weakened final 100M.
Bumped shortly after start, raced at rear on the stands' rail, 6 lengths or so back at 400M, finished off evenly.
Bumped on jumping, raced towards rear, 2 away from the stands' rail, 6 lengths or so back at 400M, hard ridden 350M, failed to make any progress, finished last.
Soon took up running setting a steady pace on rail, came under pressure to maintain position upon straightening but headed over 150M out.

Began fairly from the one draw, gradually picked up to one back position within 2L of pace in 4th or 3rd on rail, gained closer turning in and clear passage 2-wide inside the 400M, hit the front under pressure over 150M out.
Settled mainly in better than midfield, baulked for a run upon straightening and hung in a difficult ride until the 100M, finished off the race well.
Soon dropped to last few and never seen with a chance, had difficulty getting a run approaching the 250M.
Travelled very wide prominently down back straight, some 3L back in 5th 3-wide without cover coming onto home bend, one paced under pressure in straight.
Pressed forward from the widest draw travelling very wide, obtained 2nd position alongside the leader about 1050M out, dropped away quickly shortly after straightening.
Soon taken back to last few from a poor draw, never a factor.
Travelled 3-wide in midfield, slightly worse coming onto home bend, found nothing in straight.
