Began well from a poor draw eventually settling one-out-one-back, some 2L back in 4th rounding home bend, kept on same pace without quickening in straight until finding no extra closing stages.
Settled in midfield in 7th after moderate start, gained closer to pace rounding home bend, baulked for a run in straight until about 100M out.
Jumped awkwardly losing ground settling wide without cover in last few, inconvenienced briefly after straightening, kept on well down the centre of the track.

Gradually taken back from a poor draw travelling wide in last few, reached last after the first 400M and trailed the field on rail to straight, did not find much room early in straight until about the 200M, finished off the race well.
Jumped awkwardly losing ground, gradually picked up to just worse than midfield on rail, did not find much room between runners in straight and steadied 250M out, made no impression thereafter.
Soon dropped to last few after moderate start, well behind on rail when checked about 600M out, did not find much room the length of straight.
Showed clear intent to settle towards the rear, 2 wide with cover, had difficulty obtaining clear running in the Straight but kept on well late to finish fourth.
Sat midfield 2 wide with cover, weakened in the final furlong.
Raced on the rail alongside the leader, kept on fairly and was one-paced to the line.
Settled towards rear of midfield, raced keenly, weakened in the Straight, never involved.
Settled behind midfield on the rail, had difficulty obtaining clear running when angling out in the Straight and kept on fairly.
Settled midfield on the rail; driven out on the turn and made good ground in the Straight but was unable to challenge.
Settled in front of midfield on the rail; had some difficulty obtaining clear running in the Straight, but surged home once clear to win.
Held up at the rear on the rail, kept on fairly in the Straight but was never in contention.
Led, two wide and raced keenly; kept on well but was headed close to the line.
Showed intent to settle at the rear from a wide draw, switched very wide on the turn and made some ground late.
Settled behind midfield, caught wide and without cover, weakened in the Straight.
Tracked the leader, 2 wide with cover, hard ridden but never posed a threat.
Pressed leader, led 300m out, headed 150m out, no extra.
In rear after shifting left at start, still plenty to do 250m out, finished strongly.
Bounded as stalls opened and lost ground, recovered and tracking leaders by halfway, challenged 300m out, unable to sustain effort.
Chased pace, improved into lead 150m out and ran on strongly to gain first win.
Forced pace, headed 300m out, weakened quickly.
Towards rear, wide on bend, late progress but never a threat.
Mid-field, unable to improve under pressure from 400m out, weakened final 150m.
Rear of mid-field, pushed along early in home straight, stayed on steadily.
Mid-division, headway early in home straight, unable to sustain and no extra final 150m.
In rear, last and wide turning into home straight, stayed on and made up several places final 150m.
Tracked pace, chased along off bend, soon weakened, eased, found to have bled.
Wide throughout, mid-field, weakened 250m out.
Jumped well, trapped wide in midfield, slightly improved on turn, 1 to 2 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, kept on same pace to the line.

Taken back from a wide draw, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared after passing 200M, finished off strongly to take 2nd, just beaten by a neck. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped on jumping, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made no impression in straight.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, one-paced in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.) (Roarer.)
Bumped on jumping, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked approaching 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Away with them, raced 3 wide in midfield, difficult to settle in the early stages, inconvenienced near 800M, 2 to 3 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Jumped well from gate 12, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first two late.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 wide from 550M, 4 lengths back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Commenced well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 2 lengths or so back, there to turn, closed off well to make frame, just beaten by a neck.
Made contact at start, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, finished off strongly, led close home.
Jumped with them, raced behind midfield on outer, 5 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, showed no response early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Moderately away, raced 3 wide behind midfield early, dropped towards rear 900M, 7 lengths back on turn, showed no response early in straight, eased final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowly away, raced at tail, 8 lengths or so back, saved ground throughout, still 6 lengths back turning in, made some progress in straight.
Made contact at start, taken back to race at rear on the inside, 2 wide from 500M, made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled in front of midfield on the rail, hard ridden in the Straight but was one-paced to the finish.
Settled midfield 3 wide without cover, driven out and only kept on fairly.
Slow to begin, sat rear on the rail, kept on fairly in the Straight, never dangerous.
Showed clear intent to lead from a wide gate, kept on well to score comfortably.
Sat in front of midfield 2 wide with cover, tracked leader, weakened over final furlong.
Raced at the rear throughout, eased in the Straight, never involved.
Settled rear 2 wide with cover, failed to respond under pressure, never a threat.
Sat midfield on the rail, weakened before being eased in the Straight (Substantial blood in trachea).
Tracked leader 2 wide, weakened before being eased inside final furlong.
Sat midfield 2 wide with cover, angled out very wide rounding the turn, made some ground but never threatening.
Settled behind midfield 2 wide with cover, was steadied when driven out on the turn, stayed on well thereafter, narrowly denied second (See Incident Report).
Showed clear intent to settle at the rear, wide entering the Straight, ridden along but failed to make an impression.
Sat box seat, angled out rounding the turn, had every chance but had to settle for second behind the winner.
Slow to begin, gradually recovered and settled behind midfield on the rail. Had some difficulty obtaining clear running in the Straight but made good progress thereafter to finish fourth.
Shared pace from a poor draw, taken about 2L back to 2nd onto home bend, tracked leader into straight, quickened well to hit the front from tiring pacemaker 100M out, ridden out.

Travelled very wide without cover in forward of midfield early stages, taken slightly backward for cover 3-wide approaching first bend, lost cover shortly after before making short-lived effort entering straight, soon weakened.

Ridden along on rail from the one draw before settling over 3L back in 7th, shuffled further back on rail 900M out but snuck back up saving ground on home turn, kept on same pace in straight without quickening.
Niggled along wide and just worse than midfield after beginning from a poor draw, commenced move 4-wide around home bend reaching 3rd some 3L back 300M out, never threatening.
Prominent early before settling in midfield, drifted further back about 1100M out towards rear, fought on steadily in straight without threatening.
Ridden forward from sluggish start to prominent position after first 200M, became some over 3L back in 3rd in quickened tempo rounding home bend, folded up quickly upon straightening.
Soon taken back towards rear from a poor draw, remained wide in last few before making a move very wide 600M out, fought on steadily in straight without threatening.

Broke well settling just off the pace in 5th 2-wide, drifted backward to some 5L 7th when held up behind runners rounding home bend, renewed pressure soon after straightening but unable to quicken to make any impression.

Soon taken back to last from a poor draw travelling keenly in back straight, commenced move 600M out and one of the widest turning in for home, made good progress down the centre of the track to be nearest at finish.
Shared pace early stages, shuffled backward to 4L 4th inside the 900M in quickened tempo, kept on same pace from 3rd into straight until over 250M out.

Settled in rear of midfield on rail, drifted further off the pace when tempo increased around home bend, didn't find much room behind runners early in straight until 150M when hung in and difficult to ride, made no further impression.
Always well behind and never seen with a chance.
Shared pace very wide from the widest draw, gained narrow advantage 1100M out, obtained rails run 900M out kicking over 2L clear rounding home bend, led until finding no extra 100M out.
Crowded at start dropping to last few, baulked for a run behind runners in home straight until the 200M, made no impression thereafter.
Jumped only fairly, recovered to a midfield position along the inside, held up 400M-300M before running on well under top weight to claim 2nd.
Shaken up after the start, moved up to chase leader on the inside, kept battling well in the straight to take 3rd.
Chased leader on outside in a race run at good tempo, soon weakened on straightening and quickly dropped out of contention.
Went forward from draw 10, led at good pace to the straight, continued on well from 400M, headed near 100M, no extra late stages faded to finish 4th.
Began well from draw 1, stayed close enough behind leaders, ran on strongly to lead near 100M before continuing on well late stages to win.
Began only fairly, settled towards the rear, 6Ls to make up 400M, stayed on without posing serious threat to leaders.
Jumped on terms, dropped back to race at the back of the field, 10Ls to make up 400M, ran past beaten horses only.
Settled close enough to leaders, 4th at 500M, kept on steadily under pressure in the straight but always held by leaders.
Reserved in second half of the field 5-6Ls back, responded mildly to pressure 400M, stayed on without threat.
Jumped only fairly, didn't sufficient pace to cross runners on its inside, caught wide no cover to straight then weakened rapidly passing 400M.
From draw 11 switched off to the rear of the field, had big task in hand turning for home, failed to get involved.
Jumped well from a wide draw, sent forward to race prominently, shared lead from 650M, peaked 250M, headed approaching 200M, weakened final 100M.
Began well, raced better than midfield on the inside, a bit closer in the middle stages, one-paced in the run home.
Jumped awkwardly, raced 3 wide towards rear, 2 wide from 900M, 4 to 5 lengths back on turn, showed limited response early in straight, checked near 300M, eased final furlong.
Taken back from gate 10, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress early in straight, no clear run 200M to 100M, one-paced thereafter.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, found rail near 900M, saved ground on turn, angled out early in straight, checked near 300M, made no progress final furlong.
Away well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, angled out after passing 550M, 3 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, made contact and unbalanced 300M, eased thereafter.
Taken back from gate 11, raced 2 wide at rear, 6 lengths back turning in, made some headway in straight.
Bumped start, raced 3 wide better than midfield, peaked on turn, weakened early in straight.
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced better than midfield but trapped wide, moved closer after passing 900M, a length back turning in, kept on evenly in straight.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, shared lead with rival from 650M, peaked early in straight, headed approaching 200M, weakened 150M, eased thereafter.
Jumped with them, raced 3 wide slightly behind midfield, angled out 500M, 5 lengths or so back turning in, made very good progress in straight to take 2nd.

Moderately away, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 lengths or so back, there to turn, angled out 400M, hard ridden 350M, showed very good response, took the lead approaching 200M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Slightly slow out, raced behind midfield on the inside, a bit closer in the middle stages, angled out after passing 400M, finished off evenly.
Crowded start, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, closed off well to take 2nd.
Began only fairly and made contact, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off very strongly to score.

Jumped with them, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, 5 lengths or so back turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame without threatening the first few. (Lame right front leg next day morning.)
Fast into stride, in touch, inconvenienced and dropped to midfield near 700M, 4 lengths back turning in, kept on same pace in straight.
Away well, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, kicked clear early in straight, kept on well but unable to hold off the first two close home.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 4 lengths back turning in, no clear run early in straight, made good progress thereafter.
Average to begin, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, checked near 700M, 1-1/2L back turning in, kept on evenly early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 8 lengths back, same margin back on turn, made some progress in straight.
Moderately away, raced in midfield on outer, dropped towards rear 450M, weakened early in straight, eased thereafter. (Roarer.)
Moderately away from gate 1, tracked leaders on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked 450M, weakened early in straight, eased final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began fairly and made contact shortly after start, positioned 2 wide, 2-1/2L back, 3 wide from 450M, finished off evenly.
Crowded shortly after start, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed some response early in straight, no clear run near 250M, made no progress thereafter.
Waited with in rear, last and plenty to do entering home straight, never dangerous but stayed on and made up several places final 250m.
Mid-field, tight for room at 900m mark, lost place entering home straight and soon struggling.
Pressed leader, pushed along over 200m out, no extra.
Held up, pushed along 300m out, never a factor.
Made running, headed 200m out, no extra final 100m.
Raced wide towards rear, under pressure 400m out, little impression.
Dropped in from wide draw, still in rear entering home straight, some headway down the outside final 300m, never dangerous.
Mid-field, pushed along over 300m out, stayed on but lacked pace to trouble leaders.
Mid-field, quickened to lead very readily 200m out, just nudged along to assert and soon in command, easily.
In touch with leaders, challenged 300m out, no match for easy winner but stayed on to fare best of rest.
Mid-field, unable to improve under pressure 300m out, weakened.
Keen early, tracked leading pair, hung right home straight, faded.
Slowly away, keen towards rear, no impression.
Bumped start, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the stands' side, hard ridden after passing 350M but only showed limited response, ran on evenly to the line.
Jumped only fairly, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Bumped start, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length, peaked and headed near 300M, kept on same pace to the line.
Began smartly, raced in 2nd, a length or so back, took the lead 350M, peaked and headed 150M, kept on evenly to the line.
Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the stands' side, made no impression final 400M.
Began awkwardly and made contact, positioned 2 to 3 lengths behind the leader, nearer to the middle track, hard ridden from 400M but only showed limited response, weakened gradually final furlong.
Bumped start, raced better than midfield on the middle track, made minor progress after passing 400M, peaked 200M, weakened thereafter.
Began well from gate 1, raced towards rear on the middle track, passed some tired runners final 400M.
Out with rest, raced towards rear on the stands' rail, slightly improved in the middle stages, hard ridden after passing 350M, kept on evenly to the line.
Began only fairly, raced behind midfield, 2 away from the stands' rail, hard ridden from 400M but showed limited response, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, raced behind midfield, nearer to the middle track, 4 to 5 lengths back at 400M, weakened final 300M.
Bumped on the hindquarters soon after the start, raced better than midfield, peaked on run 500M, weakened 300M, eased final 150M.

Commenced well, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on the stands' side, hard ridden after passing 300M, showed very good response, took the lead approaching 150M, kept on very well to the line, easily scored.
Blundered on jumping and became unbalanced, raced in midfield on the stands' rail, hard ridden from 300M, made some progress to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Tracked pace, three wide from halfway, stayed on but lacked pace to reach winner.
Dropped in from widest draw, still plenty to do 400m out, stayed on well final 150m and made up several places.
Waited with towards rear, tight for room when trying to improve from 400m out until 150m out, never dangerous.
Wide until chased leader from just before halfway, weakened 300m out.
Made running, pressed on off final bend, over 3 lengths clear 200m out, pushed out.
Mid-division, keen mid-race, no clear run and shuffled back 300m out, unable to recover.
Across to track pace from wide draw, weakened over 200m out.
Mid-field after shuffled back early, towards rear and wide final bend, ran on well for second but never reaching winner.
Three wide in mid-field, pushed along 400m out, stayed on until no further impression final 100m.
Keen early, waited with in rear, lot to do 400m out, tended to hang right under pressure, never nearer.
Held up, pushed along over 500m out, lost touch home straight.
Rail position, tracked pace, chased winner 300m out, unable to go with that rival, no extra final 150m.
Mid-field, keen early, pushed along when tight for room 200m out, one paced.
Slowly away, recovered and mid-division, pushed along off final bend, unable to quicken, weakened 150m out.
Sat in front of midfield, traveled comfortably, made good ground to grab 2nd.
Sat on pace, traveled okay, gave ground slightly over the concluding stages.
Settled worse than midfield, raced ungenerously, lay in badly in the Straight.
Settled worse than midfield, made steady progress under whip.
Sat towards rear, traveled at the back, not much impression made.
Settled in front of midfield, responded fairly well when asked.
Ridden along to lead, traveled strongly, kept one well to win.
Settled in front of midfield, raced very wide, dropped off quick in the Straight.
Sat on pace, raced wide throughout, weakened slightly in the Straight, ran on evenly.
Sat behind midfield, traveled keenly in the early and middle stages, could not make up ground (See Incident Report).
Sat towards rear, traveled fairly, one pace to the finish.
Settled rear, lay in rounding the Turn, no contention.
Settled midfield, no clear run entering the Straight, minor progress made.
Settled handy, raced keenly entering the first Turn, limited response when asked (See Incident Report).
Tracked leaders, quickened to lead 250m out, edged right in front, just held on.
Wide towards rear, never dangerous.
Bumped shortly after leaving stalls, held up, still in rear and wide entering home straight, never dangerous.
Sluggish start, mid-division, short of room 250m out, one paced once clear.
Rail position, in touch with leaders, briefly looked dangerous 300m out, one paced.
Tracked leading pair, tight for when trying to challenge 300m out to 200m out, ran on well.
In rear after crowded leaving stalls, still plenty to do top of home straight, some headway but never a threat.
Mid-field, headway 300m out, unable to sustain and no extra final 100m.
Waited with in rear, tight for room when improving 300m out, ran on strongly, just failed.
In touch with leaders, challenged from 300m out, stuck to task.
Across from wide draw to lead, headed under 300m out, short of room when weakening, eased.
Wide in mid-field, stayed on for pressure but lacked pace to trouble leaders.
Wide early, across to press leader, pushed along 300m out, weakened 200m out.
Towards rear, struggling from 400m out, bled.
Began fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, angled out early in straight, kept on same pace to the line.
Taken back from gate 9, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made no progress in straight.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 4 lengths back, same margin back on turn, finished off well to take a place without threatening.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 150M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Jumped well from a wide draw, taken back to race 3 wide towards rear, 6 lengths or so back turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.
Away well, raced 3 wide in midfield, angled out and made contact 500M, 5 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Began well from a wide draw, raced prominently on the outside, 1/2L back turning in, showed no response early in straight, weakened 300M, eased final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped awkwardly, raced in midfield on outer, made contact 500M, 5 lengths back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from the widest draw, raced towards rear on the outside, 6 lengths or so back turning in, made very good progress in straight to take 2nd, nearest on line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, raced 2 wide, 1-1/2L back, there to turn, finished off evenly.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide at rear, 7 lengths back turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Out with rest, raced better than midfield on outer, peaked on turn, weakened early in straight, eased final furlong.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Sat in front of midfield 2 wide with cover, ridden along in the straight but weakened gradually.
Tracked leader on the rail, kept on fairly in the Straight.
Held up towards the rear, made no impression and was never in contention.
Settled midfield on the rail; angled out in the straight and pressed the eventual winner, but was narrowly denied.
Settled behind midfield 2 wide with cover, driven out and kept on well to finish fourth.
Settled rear of midfield 2 wide with cover, switched wide into the straight and stayed on well without threatening.
Showed clear intent to lead; challenged strongly from the 200M but kept on to score narrowly.
Settled towards the rear of midfield on the rail, one-paced to the finish.
Settled at the rear, 2 wide with cover; switched very wide on the turn and stayed on fairly without threatening.
Ridden along in 5th some 4L off the pace, kept on same pace without quickening in home straight.
Jumped fairly settling in rear of midfield 2-wide, kept on same pace under pressure from a similar position early in straight, produced some late impression.

Settled just worse than midfield on rail after beginning from the one draw, saved ground turning in for home, baulked for a run early in straight until the 300M, finished off the race well, did best work late.
Soon took up running from a wide draw, ceded advantage for 2nd 2-wide from the 900M, soon dropped out from a similar position into straight. (Bled)
Prominent from a poor draw travelling keenly one-out-one-back in 3rd or 4th, soon faded out of contention after straightening.
Crowded at start settling in last few, fought on steadily without threatening in straight.
Well there, obtained rails run over 1100M out, gained narrow advantage 950M out and led until headed by eventual winner over 100M out, held on under pressure for a placing.
Began fairly but gradually shifted back to last few travelling wide without cover.
Gradually settled some 4L back in 6th on rail, angled out for a run upon straightening gaining upper hand under pressure 150M out, hung on well.
Settled wide in last few dropping to last about 900M out, made no further impression from a similar position into home straight.
Broke well from the widest draw gradually taken back to rear of midfield 3-wide without cover, weakened badly out of contention into straight.

Jumped fairly gradually picking up to 4th some 2L back, gained 3rd rounding home bend travelling keenly on rail, chased leaders into straight gaining 2nd shortly afterward, unable to sustain effort inside final 150M.
Settled well back on rail from moderate start, gained second last position 900M out and further closer saving ground on the home turn, fought on under pressure in straight to be nearest at finish.
Jumped only fairly, settled down in second half of the field, failed to quicken on straightening. Never dangerous.
Taken back from wide draw, held up last 7-8Ls off leader, brought wide into straight before closing off strongly to claim 3rd just in time.
Pressed leader on outside, fought hard early straight and had every chance, couldn't sustain run passing 150M.
Towards the rear 6Ls off leader, came very wide home turn, couldn't go on 350M. Never dangerous.
Caught racing 3-wide in midfield, couldn't quicken when asked 400M, out of contention mid-straight.
In midfield, saved ground on the inside, had difficulty obtaining clear running 400M-300M before staying on to the line fairly.
Caught wide no cover chasing leaders, fought hard to stay in contention mid-straight, faded late stages.
Jumped only fairly, given a waiting ride near last, 6-7Ls off leader home turn, came with a strong finish passing 300M, got up 100M and won going away.
Held up towards the rear, switched very wide from 600M, responded only fairly when asked. Never a factor. (No Vet findings.)
Began on terms, moved up to chase leaders, found nothing when asked top of straight, weakened away. (Jockey : no explanation for the disappointing performance.)
Chased leader on inside, not quickened turning for home, outpaced by rivals mid-straight.
Obtained running in midfield, brought wide 600M to challenge, picked up well and challenged for the lead mid-straight, just couldn't hold off winner final 100M.
Sent to the lead as expected, pressed by rivals early straight, lost lead 200M but refused to give in, battled hard to the line for 4th.
Reserved in midfield, briefly held up 400M, kept on steadily towards the finish but not going the pace to challenge leaders.
Began well, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 4 lengths back turning in, finished off well to take 2nd.
Jumped with them, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Moderately away from the widest draw, taken back to race 3 wide behind midfield, difficult to settle in the early stages, 7 lengths back on turn, kept on evenly in straight.
Fast into stride, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened close home.
Jumped well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, led by 2-1/4L turning in, kept on very well in straight, won by a length.
Began only fairly, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 6 lengths or so back turning in, made no impression in straight.

Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, 5 lengths back, same margin back on turn, made good progress early in straight, no clear run 300M, cleared near 150M, finished off well to make frame without threatening.
Bumped start, raced 3 wide in midfield, wider turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 200M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away from gate 1, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Taken back to race 2 wide at rear, 8 lengths or so back turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Average to begin, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, hard ridden approaching 300M, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.) (Blood in trachea.)
Taken back to race at rear on the inside, 8 lengths back, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, very wide into straight, made minor progress in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide turning in, made some progress in straight.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out after passing 600M, 2-3/4L back turning in, finished off well to take 2nd, always held.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 wide from 550M, 2-1/2L back turning in, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 250M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Moderately away, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, one-paced in the run home. (Lame right hind leg next day morning.)
Bumped start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, wider turning in, 5 lengths back at 400M, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced better than midfield on the outside, 2 lengths or so back turning in, made some progress early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened gradually final 150M.
Jumped with them, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead near 1250M, led by 2-1/4L turning in, peaked early in straight, headed 250M, weakened inside final furlong.
Taken back to race 2 wide towards rear, angled out 600M, very wide into straight, made some progress in the run home.
Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, unbalanced near 750M, 2 wide approaching 500M, peaked 300M, weakened gradually final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, sent forward to take the early lead, headed near 1250M, 2nd in the middle stages, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 11 lengths or so back, commenced move 650M, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame without threatening.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced behind midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Taken back to race at rear on the inside, 2 wide turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Out with rest, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, made no progress thereafter.
Moderately away, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, angled out after passing 600M, 3 wide turning in, no clear run until 75M, finished off well to take a place. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced wide, keen up with pace, led into home straight, headed under 300m out, weakened.
Dropped in from wide draw, struggling and held from 400m out.
Dropped in from wide draw, pushed along 500m out, no real impression.
Waited with towards rear, hampered against rail 400m out, stayed on but unable to reach leaders.
Mid-field, gave ground under pressure from 300m out.
In touch with leaders, good headway on bend into share of lead, weakened 200m out.
Mid-division, good headway from 400m out, staying on when running out room final 50m.
Held up in rear, had to wait for run briefly 350m out, no impression.
Disputed lead, weakened 300m out.
Mid-field, challenged over 200m out, responded to pressure to edge ahead 50m out.
Wide towards rear, stayed on well final 350m and not beaten far.
Tracked pace, short of room on heels of leaders 300m out, stuck to task, ran out of room closing stages.
Across from wide draw to dispute lead, weakened quickly home straight.
Tracked pace, pushed along to lead 200m out, headed 50m out.
Began smartly, raced prominently on the outside, 1/2L back turning in, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start and unbalanced, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, kept on well in straight to hold off the challengers.
Bumped start, raced 3 wide with no cover, a length or so back, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 3 wide towards rear, hard ridden from 400M, very wide turning in, made some progress in straight.
Crowded start, raced towards rear on the inside, 5 lengths or so back, saved ground throughout, one-paced in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away, raced 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually thereafter.

Bumped shortly after start, raced towards rear on the outside, moved a bit closer after passing 700M, no cover throughout, very wide turning in, weakened early in straight when hard run took toll. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from gate 1, positioned 1-3/4L behind the leader on the inside, same position on turn, finished off well to take 2nd, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced 3 wide in midfield, 2 to 3 lengths back, wider turning in, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Bumped start, raced in midfield on the inside, 3 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, kept on evenly in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 6 lengths or so back, very wide into straight, made no impression in the run home.
Began only fairly, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 3 wide turning in, made no progress in straight.
Jumped well from draw 1, tracked leaders into the straight, kept on well under top weight to take 3rd.
Stayed in touch with leaders racing in a position ahead of midfield, kept battling over final 300M but was always held by leaders. Raced tight late and not ridden out close home.
On jumping was checked, raced ungenerously in midfield throughout the race, checked 600M, didn't finish off the race. (Warning placed on the racing manners of the horse.)
From wide draw given a conservative ride towards the rear, last turning for home, failed to run on.
Began well, soon in front and led at steady pace, headed top of straight, fought hard but not going the pace of leaders final 250M.
From wide draw taken across behind runners, settled near last 5-6Ls back, brought wide on straightening but failed to gain ground on leaders.

From wide draw taken across behind runners, settled last 6-7Ls back, had task in hand 400M, responded well but met traffic final 150M and was not ridden out to the finish. Could have finished in top three.
Obtained a midfield spot along the 3-path, given a patient ride until nearing 400M, closed off strongly in the straight to get up last stride.
Crowded after the start, raced 2-wide in the group chasing leaders, came under pressure 450M, soon weakened. (Blood in trachea.)
Prominent behind leader, took over 250M, kept on well to the finish only to be caught by the winner last stride.
Shifted in abruptly at the start, raced 3-wide without cover in the leading group, fought on well over final 300M for a creditable 4th.
Bumped at the start and became unbalanced, raced very wide without cover in midfield, failed to quicken on straightening, left behind by the principals final 200M.
Shared the lead, traveled comfortably, just missed.
Jumped only fairly, settled behind midfield, ran on evenly (See Incident Report).
Ridden along to lead, traveled strongly, had every chance.
Settled handy, slightly held up near the 250M, one pace to the finish.
Sat worse than midfield, never a threat.
Knuckled in jumping, sat midfield, gave ground slightly near 200M (See Incident Report).
Sat worse than midfield, raced keenly in the middle stages, made good ground from the back over the concluding stages.
Sat rear, raced rear, not much impression made.
Sat in front of midfield, switched out rounding the Turn, hit the line strongly.
Settled rear, switched out rounding the Turn, minor progress made when asked.
Settled towards rear, raced greenly, never a danger.
Sat on pace, traveled fairly, weakened quickly passing 100M (See Incident Report).
Held up, headway from 300m out, angled wide 150m out, never nearer.
Held up last from wide draw, good headway towards inside rail home straight, stayed on.
Waited with in rear, taken wide off final bend, strong run to lead 100m out, ran on well and decisive winner.
Never far away, tracked pace and every chance from 200m out, no extra final 50m.
Mid-division, headway wide final bend, on heels of leaders 150m out, no extra.
Mid-division, headway 300m out, short of room 200m out to 100m out, unable to recover.
Raced wide in mid-field, struggled to hold position from 600m out, dropped to rear, well held from top of home straight.
Rail position, in touch with leaders, effort 200m out, no extra final 100m.
Wide early, chased leader, weakened quickly 300m out, eased once well held.
Tracked leaders, pushed along 300m out, weakened 200m out.
Made running, headed over 100m out, no extra.
Mid-field, pushed along 400m out, stayed on but lacked pace to trouble winner.

Jumped well from a wide draw, sent forward to race in 2nd, 1-1/4L back turning in, showed good response in straight, took the lead near 100M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner close home.
Began only fairly, raced at rear on the outside, 10 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, 4 lengths or so back turning in, finished off well to take a place.

Moderately away from a wide draw, raced behind midfield on the outside, 5 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, badly hampered by the fallers and dislodged rider near 75M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out 350M, made some progress early in straight, went amiss and fell near 75M.
Began well, raced in 3rd, 2-1/2L behind the leader turning in, angled out early in straight, finished off strongly to score.

Moderately away, raced in midfield on outer, no cover for the majority of the race, showed limited response in straight, badly hampered by the fallers and brought down near 75M. (Lame left front leg next day.)
Jumped well, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, badly hampered by the faller approaching 50M.
Jumped with them, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress in straight.
Slightly slow out, raced at rear on the inside, still well back on turn, made no impression in straight.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced towards rear, 7 lengths or so back turning in, very wide into straight, made some progress in the run home.
Began smartly, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/4L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made clear intention to lead, weakened inside final furlong.
Slow to begin, settled at the rear, 2 wide with cover, angled very wide on the turn and showed a good turn of foot under pressure to take second.
Settled at the rear on the rail, ridden along but made no progress and was never in contention.
Settled at the rear, 2 wide with cover, never a factor in the Straight.
Jumped well but showed intent to restrain and settle midfield on the rail, ridden along and scored comfortably.
Tracked the leader, 2 wide with cover, bumped at the top of the Straight and weakened thereafter.
Sat in front of midfield 2 wide with cover, made some ground in the Straight to take fourth.
Settled in front of midfield, 3 wide with cover; raced keenly and weakened in the Straight.
Settled midfield 4 wide with no cover, one-paced to the finish.
Settled behind midfield 3 wide with cover, driven very wide on the turn and stayed on well.
Settled in the box seat; bumped a rival when angling out in the Straight and showed limited response under pressure (see Incident Report).
Settled midfield 2 wide with cover, kept on only fairly and was never dangerous.
Settled in rear of midfield, commenced move 3-wide inside the 500M swinging one of the widest into straight, kept on steadily without quickening.
Pressed forward from a poor draw, restrained one-out-one-back in 3rd in back straight, dropped quickly out of contention on home turn. (Blood in trachea)

Settled in midfield on rail after moderate start, tightened and lost position over 1100M out dropping to 9th into back straight, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, kept on at the one pace without threatening.

Prominent early from poor draw, taken backward to midfield but remained wide without cover first bend, improved inside 1150M to join leader early in back straight, unable to sustain effort after straightening for home.
Gradually settled about 3L off the pace in 5th 2-wide, became 6th in a similar position 600M out, ran on under strong pressure down the inside of home straight, did best work late.
Soon took up running setting a sound pace on rails, joined in lead in back straight and challenged upon straightening, held on well under pressure.
Settled well behind from a wide draw, trailed the field to the 400M, snuck 2L closer on rail turning in for home, fought on steadily to the line.
Settled in last few, went wide for a run into straight, ran on under pressure inside final 150M, did best work late.

Broke well before shifting backward just off the pace on rail sharing 3rd in back straight, in similar position rounding home bend, angled out for a run turning in for home, fought on steadily without threatening.
Settled towards rear mainly 3-wide, made forward move from 9th when without cover about 850M out reaching 2L 5th 600M out, sustained run from wide into straight to reach 3rd inside final 50M.
Broke well from the one draw, gradually settled over 3L back in 6th, drifted slightly backward to midfield in back straight, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, ran home one-paced.
Settled in last few after beginning from the widest draw, made short-lived effort 4-wide 800M out, went wider in last into home straight, made no further impression.
Went forward from wide draw, tracked the pace on settling, pushed along 400M but failed to quicken under big weight. (Jockey : raced keenly early stages and didn't run on in the home straight.)
Crowded after the start, rushed forward to track leaders, 5th at 300M, couldn't go on and dropped out of contention.
Settled towards the rear, had over 6Ls to make up 400M, stayed on moderately to the line without troubling first few.
Chased leaders early, moved up to press the pace from 900M, took over entering home turn before keeping on well and holding off rivals final stages.
Dropped back to near the rear over 10Ls off the pace early stages, still plenty to do 400M, couldn't quicken and failed to get involved.
Switched off to last after the jump, well off the pace early stages, still over 8Ls to make up home turn, stayed on final 300M without threatening leaders.
From draw 12 sent forward to lead, pressed by rival on outside from 900M, unable to finish off strongly in the straight, faded final 200M.
Settled towards the rear, 7Ls off the pace entering home turn, brought wide on straightening but failed to run on.
Held up behind midfield, 5Ls from leaders 800M, responded well in the straight to claim 2nd near line.
Jumped on terms then obtained a midfield position on settling, moved closer to leaders home turn then ran on well in the straight. Chased leader final 200M, lost 2nd close home.
Settled down in midfield 6Ls off the pace, couldn't sprint enough entering home straight to challenge first few but kept on steadily to take 5th.
Stayed in touch with leaders in the first half of the race, weakened rapidly home turn and finished tailed out. (Unacceptable Performance / Roarer.)
Began well from gate 1, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on the inside, saved ground throughout, kept on evenly in straight.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, taken wide in straight and finished off strongly to make frame, nearest finish.
Out with rest, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 4 lengths or so back, 3 wide from 700M, hard ridden after passing 400M, very wide into straight, finished off strongly to take a place, nearest on line.

Jumped with them, raced 2 wide, 3 lengths or so back, difficult to settle in the early and middle stages, same margin back on turn, showed limited response early in straight, no clear run final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away well, sent forward to race prominently, 2 wide, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Began smartly, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, 2 lengths back, same position on turn, angled out early in straight, finished off strongly to take 2nd.
Away with them, raced in midfield on the outside, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M. (Blood in trachea.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 6 to 7 lengths back, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear run until final 50M, made some progress thereafter.
Moderately away, raced 3 wide, 1-1/2L back, no cover for the majority of the race, moved a bit closer after passing 450M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Average to begin, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L on turn, kept on very well in straight and scored.
Jumped awkwardly and made contact, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Bumped shortly after start, raced behind midfield on the inside, 4 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.

Jumped well, raced prominently early, positioned 2 wide better than midfield after passing 900M, 2 lengths back turning in, hit the front 250M, kept on very well in straight to hold off the challenger late.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress in straight.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, similar position on turn, kept on same pace in straight.
Shifted in at start and bumped, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead near 950M, led by 1-1/4L turning in, peaked and headed 250M, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Out with rest, raced 2 wide towards rear of midfield, 6 lengths back turning in, made minor progress early in straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Away with them, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 3 wide turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Away well, sent forward to take the early lead, headed near 950M, 2nd in the middle stages, showed some response early in straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Average to begin, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, no clear run early in straight, cleared approaching 200M, finished off very strongly to take 2nd, just beaten by a head.
Began awkwardly, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made no progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, raced at rear on the outside, 8 lengths or so back, same margin back turning in, made no impression in the run home.
Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped shortly after start, trapped wide in midfield, no cover on turn, weakened early in straight when hard run took effect.
Jumped awkwardly, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight.
Made contact at start, raced 3 wide at rear, 7 lengths or so back turning in, weakened early in straight, eased final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.) (Blood in trachea.) (Roarer.)
Soon taken back from a poor draw, saved ground on inside making home bend, inconvenienced approaching final turn, produced good late impression inside final 150M.
Soon taken back from the widest draw, made headway under pressure out wide early on home bend and one of the widest into straight, ran on steadily under pressure inside final 250M.
Niggled along in midfield in 7th on rail, angled off rail for a run entering straight and but did not find much room and forced to steady 250M out, fought on steadily to the line closing stages.
Began moderately settling some 3L back in 6th 2-wide, commenced move 550M out obtaining a run on straightening, made short-lived effort before finding no extra inside final 100M.
Amongst leaders briefly before taken back to midfield 2-wide, in similar position into straight but unable to make any impression inside final 200M.

Jumped well to share early pace 3-wide, obtained 2-wide position alongside race leader rounding home bend holding every chance early in straight, unable to sustain effort and outlasted inside final 100M.
Soon taken back from a poor draw reaching last on home bend 700M out, baulked between 400 and 300M, made no impression thereafter.
Taken back to last few from a poor draw travelling 3-wide with cover, one of the widest in last into straight, ran on under pressure down the centre of the track inside final 250M.
Well there, restrained one back in joint 3rd on rail rounding home bend, obtained a tight run between runners 350M out and quickened well to hit the front 200M out for a game win.
Improved steadily early stages to be up with the pace travelling wide, carried backward behind restraining runner on the bend 750M out, forced wide into straight and folded up quickly under pressure.
Jumped awkwardly losing ground, remained towards rear throughout, baulked behind runners in straight until the 200M, made no further impression.

Bounded on jumping losing considerable ground, soon recovered to last few along rail, checked on heels when racing freely 950M out, remained keen behind midfield around the bend, made no impression in straight.
Began well sharing pace on rail, gained slender advantage rounding home bend before joined again on straightening, unable to sustain effort and swamped inside final 200M.
Jumped well ridden along to share the pace 3-wide, restrained one back for cover in joint 3rd rounding home bend, folded up quickly inside final 350M.
Jumped awkwardly, settled worse than midfield, not much impression made.
Ridden along to lead, traveled strongly, gave ground quickly over the concluding stages (See incident Report).
Sat towards rear, traveled nicely, made good ground from the back, stayed on well.
Sat towards rear, lay out slightly rounding the Turn, one pace to the finish.
Slow to jump, settled midfield, failed to respond when asked.
Chased the leader, traveled comfortably, made good progress when asked.
Settled in front of midfield, traveled nicely, commenced to improve rounding the Turn, showed some dash over the concluding stages.
Sat on pace, weakened inside 250M, closed off fairly.
Sat rear, raced rear, no contention.
Sat handy, traveled okay, switched out rounding the Turn, ran on evenly.
Raced in rear, pushed along early in home straight, no impression.
Tracked leaders three wide, effort 300m out, no extra final 100m.
Tracked leading pair, chased winner 300m out, unable to go with that rival, no extra final 100m.
Mid-field, pushed along 400m out, stayed on well final 200m.
Wide in mid-field, under pressure 300m out, weakened.
Widest throughout from high draw, weakened from mid-field early in home straight.
Prominent, under pressure 300m out, faded.
Held up, still in rear 400m out, late headway into mid-field, never a threat.
Raced wide towards rear of mid-field, headway 300m out, stayed on well final 200m.
Made running, quickened 300m out and soon asserted, won readily.
Held up, last into home straight, well held from 300m out.
Tracked pace, briefly tight for room 400m out, stayed on but lacked pace to reach winner.
Towards rear after crowded early, keen, ridden 300m out, no impression.
Rail position in mid-field, headway early in home straight, unable to sustain and weakened 200m out.
Bumped on jumping, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out 500M, 5 lengths back turning in, made some headway in straight. (See Racing Incidents.) (Blood in trachea.)
Commenced well, raced behind midfield on the outside, peaked on turn, weakened early in straight, eased thereafter.
Jumped with them, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked early in straight, kept on evenly in straight.
Began smartly, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 600M, made some progress in straight.
Began only fairly, taken back to race at rear on the outside, very wide turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Away with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, wider on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Began well, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, kept on strongly in straight, easily scored. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, 2 wide from 450M, made no impression in straight.
Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, kept on well early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened gradually close home. (Blood in trachea.)
Slowly away, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight to take 2nd.
Began well from gate 12, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide turning in, peaked early in straight, ran on same pace to the line.

Jumped only fairly and bumped, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide after passing 800M, 3 wide from 600M, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped only fairly, settled towards rear, ran on smoothly to score.
Sat midfield, traveled nicely, made good ground to grab 2nd.
Settled on pace, making the Turn wide, weakened slightly after 150M (See Incident Report).
Settled in front of midfield, traveled fairly, disappointed for clear running, not fully tested.
Sat midfield, traveled fairly, limited response when asked.
Sat towards rear, traveled greenly, never a threat.
Sat rear, held up making the Turn until 400M, closed off nicely after obtaining clear running (See Incident Report).
Ridden along to lead, traveled okay, weakened notably inside 100M (See Incident Report).
Chased the leader, traveled smoothly, ran on evenly.
Sat behind midfield, lay in slightly in the Straight, failed to respond under whip.
Settled worse than midfield, gave ground quickly in the Straight.
Sat towards rear, held up until 200M, closed off fairly.
Jumped only fairly, settled in front of midfield, minor progress made in the Straight.
Sat towards rear, switched out rounding the Turn, one pace to the finish.
Settled well behind from a poor draw, saved ground turning in for home, kept on at the one pace past well-beaten horses closing stages.
Gradually taken back from a poor draw settling towards rear of strung-out field, finished off the race well down the centre of the track, did best work late without threatening the winner.
Settled well back on rail from a poor draw, saved ground turning in for home sneaking up to 5L 8th early in straight, ran home one-paced.
Travelled off the rail in last few, swung the widest into home straight and tailed-off before running past well-beaten runners closing stages.
Always prominent in 3rd drifting just over 3L off the pace approaching home bend, renewed effort entering final straight reaching within 1.5L of pace 200M out but lost 2nd late.
Unbalanced at start settling behind midfield near the rail, commenced move entering home straight, fought on readily under pressure between runners without threatening.

Pressed forward from the widest draw travelling wide around first bend, disputed lead 2-wide into back straight hitting the front into the final stretch only to be overhauled by the eventual winner inside final 200M.
Travelled wide towards rear after moderate start from a poor draw, one of the widest turning in for home, made no impression thereafter.
Settled just better than midfield in 5th or 4th on rail, soon weakened under pressure from 7th into home straight.
Settled 3-wide without cover in midfield or slightly worse, lost position from around home bend.
Settled just worse than midfield, in similar position rounding home bend and into straight, kept on one pace without quickening.
Soon took up running to lead on rail after moderate start from the one draw, held narrow advantage until headed into home straight, weakened noticeably under pressure.

Broke well settling just off the pace, drifted further back to 3L 5th into back straight and some 5L back onto home bend, commenced move entering final straight and hit the front inside the 200M, won readily.
Prominent behind leader, driven out 300M, kept on well but was always by first two.
Jumped well, chased leaders in 4th on settling, put in a strongly challenge 250M, tried hard but was just held.
Crossed to the stand's rail racing just off leader, responded well and gained lead nearing 200M, kept fighting late stages to hold off runner-up for a game win.
In 5th on settling, came under pressure 500M, soon out of contention.
Towards the rear 3-4Ls off the lead, failed to run on from 500M.
Jumped only fairly, raced as the back-marker early stages, improved position halfway, driven 400M but not going the pace to challenge first four. (No Vet findings.)
Towards the rear 3Ls off leader, outpaced halfway. (Jockey concerned action / No Vet findings.)
Soon took up the lead and set even pace, held narrow lead going into 300M, couldn't hold off first three final 200M.
Began well from a wide draw, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, wider turning in, finished off well to take a place without threatening.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide better than midfield, found rail approaching 700M, saved ground on turn, not enough room early in straight, cleared 300M, kept on same pace to the line.
Bumped start, positioned 3 wide, 1-1/2L back, no cover for the majority of the race, peaked 450M, weakened and eased early in straight.
Bumped start, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run until final 100M, made no progress thereafter.
Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the outside, sent forward after passing 950M, 1-1/4L back turning in, kept on well in straight to take 2nd, no threat to the winner. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped with them, showed no early speed, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared approaching 100M, made minor progress thereafter.
Jumped well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, took the lead 300M, kept on very well to the line and scored.
Bumped start, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, peaked and headed 300M, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.) (Roarer.)
Moderately away, raced 2 wide id midfield, a bit closer on turn, no clear run early in straight, made no progress thereafter.
Crowded start, raced behind midfield on outer, moved a bit closer after passing 600M, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, kept on same pace to the line.
Began awkwardly and bumped, raced at tail, 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, finished off evenly.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced at rear, 4 lengths or so back turning in, very wide into straight, made good progress early in straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Jumped only fairly, raced 2 wide towards rear, moved a bit closer on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 150M, finished off evenly.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the inside, angled out 500M, very wide turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Quickly into stride, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead near 1100M, led by 1/4L turning in, kept on very well in straight and scored.
Taken back from gate 13, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Began well, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 lengths or so back, there to turn, kept on same pace in straight.
Slowly away, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out 450M, made some headway in straight.
Jumped awkwardly, raced behind midfield on the outside, 6 to 7 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame, nearest on line.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5 to 6 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, failed to make any progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made contact at start, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out early in straight, finished off evenly.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, raced at rear, 8 to 9 lengths back on turn, peaked 400M, weakened early in straight, eased final furlong.
Began well from gate 1, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off well to take 2nd. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away from the widest draw, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, slightly improved on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened and eased thereafter.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 1-1/2L back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M. (See Racing Incidents.)

Commenced well, sent forward to take the early lead, 2 wide, headed near 1100M, 1/2L back turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened gradually close home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from a wide draw, raced better than midfield on the outside, no cover throughout, peaked 450M, weakened early in straight, eased final furlong.
Rear of mid-field, stayed on for pressure final 200m.
Tracked leaders, pushed along over 300m out, weakened.
Mid-field, angled off rail 300m out, strong run to lead 100m out, on top from there.
In touch with leaders, checked briefly when ridden early in home straight, soon weakened.
Held up, wide into home straight, some late headway but never dangerous.
Raced in last place after awkward start, plenty to do top of home straight, stayed on out wide final 200m and passed plenty of field.
Tracked pace, effort 300m out, weakened final 200m.
Wide early and keen, across to press leader, led over 300m out, headed 200m out, no extra final 100m.
Mid-field, ran out of room when making headway 200m out, switched and lost all chance, not fully extended.
Disputed lead early, led after 400m, pressed in front, headed over 300m out, stuck to task until no extra final 100m.
Mid-field, headway alongside winner 300m out, edged left when challenging 100m out, stayed on.
Wide in mid-field, one paced under pressure, unable to challenge.
Rear of mid-division, little impression under pressure final 300m, bled.
Held up, pushed along top of home straight, stayed on final 200m, unable to reach leaders.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear throughout, never a factor. (See Racing Incidents.)
Crowded shortly after start, raced behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide on turn, made good progress in straight to take 2nd, nearest on line.
Jumped well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, travelled comfortably in the middle stages, took the lead early in straight, kept on well to the line and scored.
Jumped well from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L on turn, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped awkwardly, raced in midfield on the outside, there to turn, made some headway in straight to take a place.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide, 6 lengths or so back, 4 lengths or so back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.) (Lame right hind leg next day.)
Bumped start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Jumped well from a widest draw, raced better than midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, kept on evenly early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Began only fairly, raced towards rear, 5 lengths back turning in, taken wide in straight and made good progress to make frame, no threat to the first few.
Jumped well, raced behind midfield on outer, 4 lengths or so back turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Bumped start, positioned a length behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Shifted in at start, raced 2 wide in midfield, 2-1/2L back turning in, no clear run early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Slightly slow out and crowded, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 200M.
Jumped only fairly and bumped, raced towards rear on the inside, angled out 450M, kept on same pace in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Tracked pace, pushed along 400m out, weakened from 300m out.
Raced in touch, stayed on at the one pace.
In touch on outside, weakened 300m out.
Mid-field, ridden 400m out, stayed on well final 200m, no match for winner but clear second.
Started well and soon across to lead against stand rail, set good pace, ran on strongly and won unchallenged.
Raced in touch, briefly tight for room over 300m out, stayed on.
Slowly away and lost several lengths, always behind.
Awkward start, raced on outer in mid-field, unable to quicken over 300m out, no extra final 100m.
Hampered early, raced in last trio and well behind, never involved.
Slowly away, towards rear of field and adrift of main body of runners, no impression.
Outpaced and detached from main body of runners, ran on and made up ground final 150m.
Chased leader, tended to hang right under pressure, no extra final 150m.
Chased leader, unable to close gap to that rival under pressure from 300m out, no extra closing stages.
Hampered from stalls, raced in last trio and well behind, never involved.
Sat behind midfield, failed to respond when asked (See Incident Report)
Sat towards rear, traveled strongly, made ground from the back.
Sat on pace, traveled okay, ran on evenly.
Sat on pace, weakened entering the Straight (Heart irregularity, Must BT, See Incident Report).
Settled in front of midfield, raced wide throughout, not much when asked.
Sat towards rear, dropped back making the Turn, gave ground in the Straight.
Settled in front of midfield, under restraint early, ran on nicely inside 150M.
Settled rear, raced rear, traveled keenly then commenced to improved rounding the Turn, closed off fairly.
Settled midfield, raced keenly in the early stages, held up near 350M, could not make ground (See Incident Report).
Settled midfield, traveled only fairly, faded in the Straight (See Incident Report).
Jumped only fairly, sat midfield, traveled smoothly, held up in the early Straight, closed off well thereafter.
Settled behind midfield, gave ground quickly in the Straight, unimpressive.
Settled midfield, traveled fairly, one pace to the line.
Ridden along to lead, stretched out okay, weakened slightly over the concluding stages (See Incident Report).
Made running, pressed on 400m out, over 2l clear 150m out, kept going.
Waited with in rear, headway into mid-field home straight but never dangerous.
Tracked leading pair, stayed on for pressure but lacked pace to challenge.
Mid-field, headway early in home straight, ran on well final 150m, unable to reach winner but clear of rest.
Pressed leader, under pressure and unable to stay with that rival 300m out, weakened.
Tracked leaders, keen early, weakened home straight.
Crowded leaving stalls, held up, some headway final 250m but never dangerous.
Ran green, always in rear.
Started well from wide draw but soon unable to hold position and dropped to rear, stayed on final 200m, never a threat to leaders.
Rear of mid-division, edged right under pressure over 300m out, stayed on.
Mid-field, unable to pick up under pressure 300m out, weakened.
Tracked pace, struggled to hold position from halfway and dropped back through field, eased once well held 200m out.
Made contact shortly after start, positioned 2 wide, 3 lengths back, similar position on turn, no daylight early in straight, steadied near 150M, eased thereafter.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 150M, made little progress thereafter.
Moderately away from the widest draw, raced slightly better than midfield on outer, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back to race at rear on the inside, angled out 550M, 4-1/2L back turning in, finished off strongly to take 2nd, just beaten by a head.
Made contact at start, sent forward to take the lead, found rail after passing 900M, led by 3/4L turning in, peaked and headed 200M, kept on evenly to the line.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.
Began only fairly, raced 2 wide at rear, 3 wide on turn, commenced move 500M, very wide turning in, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 100M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Jumped only fairly, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, there to turn, peaked early in straight, kept on same pace to the line.

Bumped start, sent forward to race prominently, allowed rival to cross near 900M, a length behind the leader on turn, 2 wide turning in, took the lead 200M, peaked and headed 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Taken back from gate 11, raced 3 wide behind midfield, 3 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide, a length or so back, 3 wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)

Began well from a tricky draw, unable to slot in, trapped wide behind midfield, 3 lengths or so back turning in, peaked early in straight, kept on same pace to the line. (See Racing Incidents.) (Roarer.)
Ridden along to lead, traveled okay, kept on to hold 2nd.
Settled handy, traveled comfortably, raced wide and without cover, responded nicely under whip.
Settled midfield, traveled okay in the rail, one pace to the finish.
Settled worse than midfield, traveled smoothly, ran on evenly to the finish.
Settled in front of midfield, weakened in the Straight, could not find much.
Settled worse than midfield, failed to respond when asked (See Incident Report).
Sat towards rear, making the Turn switched out and improved, made ground from behind.
Sat on pace, limited response when asked, closed off fairly.
Sat worse than midfield, raced keenly in the middle stages, could not be ridden out.
Sat rear, raced rear, held up in the early Straight, closed off okay after obtaining clear running.
Sat on pace, gave ground gradually in the Straight, needs time (See Incident Report).
Jumped only fairly, sat rear, crowded inside 150M, made steady progress thereafter.
Slow to jump, sat towards rear, no contention.
Settled midfield, traveled reasonably well, dropped back quickly in the Straight (See Incident Report).
Prominent, came under pressure to hold position inside the 400M, kept on until swamped final 150M.
Settled in last few, fought on steadily without threatening.
In last few on stands rail most of the way, produced good late impression under pressure closing stages despite a tight run.
Jumped awkwardly settling about 2L off the pace in 5th, commenced move about 300M out and hit the front under pressure 150M out only to be denied in the bobbing of heads.
Well there in stands rail, weakened out of contention inside final 300M.
Bumped at start, travelled in midfield about 3L off the pace without cover, fought on steadily under pressure inside final 300M to just get up at finish.
Ridden to take up running over 800M out, led on stands rail until finding no extra 150M out.
Settled just worse than midfield on rails, came under pressure inside final 300M, kept on at the one pace without threatening.
Began moderately and crowded losing ground, in last few until commenced move 400M out but not much room, obtained clear passage over 200M out, ran on without threatening.
Held up in last few from a low draw, came to challenge under pressure inside final 300M, fought on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Began moderately, unbalanced when rider had to regather the rein early stages, gradually faded under pressure inside final 350M.
Gradually settled in last few from the one draw, dropped away quickly inside final 200M. (Irregular heart rhythm)
Settled in midfield some 3L off the pace, came under pressure inside final 400M, produced some late impression closing stages.
Settled down behind midfield, driven out 450M, quickened up smartly under top weight to hit the lead 150M, peaked on its run couldn't hold off winner late stages.
Obtained a midfield spot 4Ls off the pace, held up for some distance top of the straight but failed to finish off after.
Began well, went forward to press leader on outside, ran on well early straight to take lead from 300M, couldn't hold off first two passing 150M, lost 3rd last stride.
Always at the rear, beaten top of straight and finished tailed out on the second consecutive occasion. (Vet : abnormal breathing noise.)
From wide draw obtained a 3-wide position in midfield, ran home moderately final 400M for 5th but never going the pace to challenge first two.
Close up chasing leaders, travelled well into straight, strongly challenged passing 300M, led 100M out keeping on well late stages.
Moved forward to race in the group chasing the pace, struggled to keep up with rivals 450M, soon beaten.
Led from 1400M, set steady pace to the straight, couldn't hold off rivals passing 300M, weakened towards the line.
Jumped only fairly, held up at the rear, failed to pick up pace on straightening. Never involved.
Chased leaders in a 3-wide position without cover, driven out 500M but soon couldn't keep up with leaders, dropped out of contention mid-straight.
Settled towards the rear, 5Ls to make up top of the straight, responded only fairly in the run home.

Bumped at the start, saved ground on the inside and stayed close enough to leaders, lacked a strong response on straightening, had difficulty obtaining clear running 150M but couldn't gain ground on leaders late.
From wide draw dropped back to near the rear as per riding instruction, swung wide for home and had 5Ls to make up 400M, ran past beaten horses only.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, held up behind midfield along the fence, had no clear running from 450M to 300M before staying on well final stages to claim 3rd near line.
Taken back to race 2 wide at rear, 6 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, made very good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, made good progress in straight to take a place. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped with them, taken back to race 2 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths or so back turning in, one-paced in the run home.
Away with them, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 2 lengths or so back, found rail 500M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from the widest draw, raced better than midfield on the outside, 1 to 2 lengths back turning in, kept on evenly in straight.
Jumped well, raced in midfield on the outside, 2 to 3 lengths back turning in, finished off strongly to take 2nd, just beaten by a head.
Made contact at start, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first few final 50M.
Made contact shortly after start, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, one-paced in straight.

Began smartly, raced better than midfield on the inside, slightly improved along the rail on turn, showed very good response in straight, took the lead approaching 50M, kept on well to hold off the challengers.
Made contact shortly after start, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, one-paced in the run home.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, 5 lengths or so back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Made contact at start, sent forward to race prominently, a length or so back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made contact at start, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, closer on turn, carried wider approaching 500M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced behind midfield on the inside, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, finished off well to take a place without threatening.
Commenced well, raced better than midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 550M, kept on well early in straight, peaked 200M, ran on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from a wide draw, raced 2 wide better than midfield, wider 550M, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Jumped well, raced 2 wide, 3 lengths back, angled out 550M, same margin back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Jumped only fairly, raced towards rear on the inside, moved a bit closer on turn, no daylight early in straight, made some progress thereafter.
Slow to begin, raced towards rear on the outside, 7 to 8 lengths back turning in, made some headway in straight.
Made contact at start, raced better than midfield on the outside, moved closer on turn, took the lead early in straight, kept on very well to the line and scored.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide behind midfield, wider turning in, made good progress in straight to take 2nd.
Began well, raced in midfield on the inside, slightly improved along the rail on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced prominently, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked 300M, weakened final 250M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped only fairly, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 7 lengths back, same margin back turning in, showed no response early in straight, eased final 300M.
Away with them, sent forward to take the lead, peaked and headed 450M, weakened early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowly away, raced at tail, 10 lengths back, a bit closer in the middle stages, 7 to 8 lengths back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Jumped well from a wide draw, took the early lead, headed near 800M, 2nd on turn, 3/4L turning in, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away well, raced prominently, 2 wide, allowed rival to cross near 600M, 2 lengths back turning in, angled out 350M, peaked early in straight, kept on same pace to the line.

Bumped shortly after start, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead near 800M, led by 3/4L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner close home. (Lame right front leg next day morning.)
