Moderately away from a wide draw, raced in midfield on outer, no cover throughout, made minor progress in straight.
Out with rest, raced in midfield on inner, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, no clear run near 150M, weakened gradually close home.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide towards rear, wider turning in, made no impression in the run home.
Jumped only fairly, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, finished off well, led close home.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside, very wide into straight, made no impression in straight.
Taken back from gate 9, raced at tail, 5 lengths or so back, same margin back turning in, made good progress in straight to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Away with them, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, travelled keenly in the early stages, steadied near 600M, very wide turning in, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slightly slow out, raced behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide on turn, unable to obtain clear run until final 100M, made minor progress thereafter.
Jumped with them, raced 3 wide in midfield, wider turning in, made some progress in straight.
Always well back, saved ground turning in for home, never seen with a chance.
Slightly slow out settling in midfield on rail, saved ground turning in for home, kept on one pace in the run to the line.
Settled wide without cover behind midfield, dropped back rounding home bend, made no impression in straight.
Chased leader to straight, faded gradually.
Settled mainly in 4th over 2L back wide without cover, faded out of contention into straight.
Held up in last few travelling keenly early, gained slightly closer to 9th early in back straight, obtained a run over 200M out, ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Settled over 3L back in 5th dropping to midfield rounding final bend, produced some late impression in home straight.
Settled mainly 3-wide in midfield, shifted ground approaching home turn and was eased out of contention. (Jockey reported horse hung out and a difficult ride.)
Made all, just held off challenges under pressure.
Settled 3-wide in last few from the widest draw, swung widest into home straight, ran on well past well-beaten horses in the run to the line.
Settled just off the pace, switched out to challenge into straight holding every chance but unable to peg back the winner throughout.
Never better than midfield, kept on steadily in straight.
Settled handy, traveled okay, failed to respond when asked (See Incident Report).
Ridden along to lead, traveled nicely, kept on well to hold 3rd.
Sat on pace, hung in rounding the Turn, ran on evenly.
Sat towards rear, had difficulty obtaining clear running in the Straight, held up again over the concluding stages.
Settled handy, raced wide and without cover, did not finish off after being crowded near 150M (See Incident Report).
Jumped awkwardly, settled midfield, was checked when being crossed near 150M, closed off fairly
Sat worse than midfield on the rail, switched out rounding the Turn, briefly held up until 150M, not fully tested.
Sat rear, traveled strongly, made good ground under whip.
Chased the leader, weakened notably in the Straight, finished last.
Settled in front of midfield, raced wide and without cover, not much impression made (See Incident Report).
Jumped only fairly, settled worse than midfield, traveled smoothly, dashed on inside 150M.
Settled midfield, held up between 400M to 250M, closed off okay.
Mid-field, wide from halfway, under pressure over 300m out, weakened.
In touch, chased leaders from 300m out, stayed on.
Mid-division, pushed along 300m out, soon dropped away.
Mid-field, unable to hold position and dropped back to rear entering home straight, soon well held.
Mid-field, stayed on final 200m, unable to reach leaders.
In touch with leaders, one paced under pressure and unable to challenge.
Showed good pace to lead from wide draw, headed entering home straight, battled back well to regain lead 50m out.
Slowly away and outpaced in rear, stayed on into mid-division final 200m.
Prominent, led into home straight, headed and no extra 50m out.
Held up, stayed on but lacked pace to reach leaders.
Tracked pace, weakened 300m out.
Held up from wide draw, unable to get a run from 300m out to 200m out, stayed on well once clear.
Away well, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide better than midfield, commenced move 400M, finished off very strongly to score.
Shifted in at start, raced 2 wide towards rear, 6-1/4L back turning in, no clear run early in straight, cleared 150M, kept on evenly to the line.
Made contact shortly after start, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out 350M, 4-1/2L back turning in, made some progress in straight.
Jumped only fairly, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Made contact shortly after start, raced in midfield on the inside, 3 lengths back, 2 wide from 350M, no clear run early in straight, cleared after passing 200M, finished off evenly.
Moderately away from the widest draw, raced behind midfield on outer, very wide into straight, failed to make any progress in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear throughout, never a factor. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made contact shortly after start, raced in midfield on outer, no cover for the majority of the race, 4 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, raced 2 wide in midfield, 4 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Bumped heavily shortly after start, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 50M.
Bumped heavily shortly after start, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened gradually close home. (Lost left front plate.)
Showed clear intent to lead but was caught very wide from a wide draw, kept on only fairly in the Straight.
Showed clear intention to lead, weakened quickly in the final 150M and was eased near finish.
Settled in front of midfield 2 wide with cover, bumped and had difficulty securing clear running in the Straight (see Incident Report).
Urged along at the start, but caught 3 wide with cover, had every chance in the Straight but was one-paced to the finish.
Settled midfield 2 wide with cover, angled wide entering the Straight, stayed on well to score.
Sat rear, dropped to last on the turn, ridden along in the Straight and produced a strong finish in the final 100M.
Settled rear of midfield on the rail, ridden along in the Straight but never dangerous.
Tracked leader on the rail, kept on well but headed near the final 50M.
Settled at the rear, had difficulty securing clear running in the Straight but made good progress when clear in the final 100M.
Settled at the rear on the rail, outpaced early, switched wide in the Straight and kept on only fairly.
Settled behind midfield 3 wide with cover, had some difficulty securing clear running in the Straight but ran on well when clear in the final 100M to take third (see Incident Report).
Gradually settled wide in last few, swung widest turning in for home, kept on steadily without threatening.
Soon taken back from a poor draw, trailed the field into straight saving ground on the rail, baulked for run until 150M out, made up some late ground.
Settled at the back from a poor draw and waited with, quickened well between runners in straight to assert authority inside final 100M.
Close up on rail early stages, restrained early in back straight dropping to midfield, saved ground turning in for home, checked and unbalanced over 250M out, made no further impression.
Soon took up running, obtained rails runs into back straight, led until finding no extra inside final 200M.
One of the best to jump, gradually settled some 3L back in 5th 3-wide, hampered and lost position about 700M out, bumped and unbalanced early in straight, kept on same pace without quickening.

Niggled at early settling in rear of midfield, steadied and lost position about 750M out, swung one of the widest into straight, quickened well to hit the front briefly 100M out only to be overshadowed shortly.
With leaders early, gradually settled over 2L back in 4th on rail hugging inside rail, held every chance early in straight before finding no extra inside final 100M.
Ridden after moderate start but soon dropped to last few, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, did not find much room behind runners early in straight.
Ridden along very wide with leaders after beginning from a poor draw, obtained 2-wide position into back straight, folded up quickly shortly after straightening.
Midfield early stages settling towards rear on rail from 850M out, snuck up on the inside turning in for home, making ground when baulked for a run about 150M out, made no further impression.
Very wide without cover in midfield, allowed to stride forward to 3-wide in 2L 3rd over 800M out, kept on in straight before fading inside final 150M.
Took up a forward position, vied for early lead before easing back near 1000M to track leaders, struggled to keep up top of straight under a big weight, soon weakened out of contention.
In touch with leaders early stages, drifted back to a position ahead of midfield middle stages, kept on steadily from 300M but always held by leaders
Reserved towards the rear along the fence, 5Ls off leader home turn, switched wide on straightening to challenge, kept on but lacked a strong finishing response.
Caught 3-wide chasing leaders, left with no cover from back straight, going one-paced before being checked 200M, soon left behind by rivals.
Obtained a midfield spot along the fence, kept to inside on straightening but failed to close off the race.
Switched off to race at the rear 7-8Ls back, saved ground along the inside, stayed on steadily final 300M to claim 5th, not beaten far.
From the outside draw taken across behind runners, 6Ls towards rear on settling, swung wide into straight then ran on well final 300M.
Went forward as anticipated, was pressured in the lead throughout the race, hard driven to maintain position 400M, no extra mid-straight weakened away.
Jumped awkwardly, reserved at the back of the field, still plenty to do home turn, attacked the line strongly closing off final 400M in 22.26s. Got there last stride.
Settled down in a trailing spot behind leaders, unleashed a strong finish passing 300M, led nearing 100M only to be headed by fast finishing winner last stride.
Caught 3-wide until reaching the front 1000M, disputed lead on outside, established narrow lead top of straight, fought hard to 150M couldn't hold off rivals late.
Restrained in mid-division, raced keenly middle stages, swung wide into straight before keeping on fairly well to take 3rd.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide at rear, 4 lengths back turning in, finished off well to make frame without threatening.

Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, travelled keenly in the middle stages, 1-1/2L back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened and eased final 100M. (Lame left front leg next day morning.)
Began awkwardly, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, no clear run 100M, one-paced thereafter.
Jumped with them, sent forward to take the lead, 2 wide, shared lead with rival turning in, peaked and headed early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Away well, tracked leaders on the inside, moved a bit closer on turn, shared lead from 400M, kept on well early in straight, peaked 100M, headed 50M, weakened thereafter.
Quickly into stride, took the early lead, headed 1100M, raced 3 wide slightly better than midfield, 1-1/2L back turning in, kept on same pace in straight.
Away well, raced better than midfield on the outside, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Bumped shortly after start, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, finished off well to take 2nd without threatening the winner. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 3 wide behind midfield, 3 lengths back, same margin back turning in, finished off evenly.
Began fairly, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, unable to maintain position 500M, eased final 350M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside, commenced move 450M, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to score.
Jumped only fairly, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out 350M, 3 lengths back turning in, made minor progress in straight.

Shifted out shortly after start and made contact, raced better than midfield on the inside, sat right behind the leader turning in, no clear run early in straight, cleared after passing 200M, made no progress thereafter.

Shifted in at start and made contact, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length in the middle stages, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened 300M, eased final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slightly slow out, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made minor progress early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened gradually final 150M.
Began awkwardly, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, moved a bit closer on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out 500M, made little progress early in straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Jumped well from a wide draw, sent forward to race prominently, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, showed some response early in straight, peaked 150M, kept on same pace to the line.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced 3 wide at rear, very wide turning in, failed to close off in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made contact shortly after start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide from 700M, took the lead early in straight, kept on very well to the line and scored.
Away well, raced 3 wide in midfield, commenced move 650M, 4 wide turning in, finished off well to take 2nd, always held.

Jumped only fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared approaching 150M, made good progress thereafter to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Made contact at start, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, wider turning in, made some progress early in straight, peaked on run 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Slowly away, raced 2 wide at rear, angled out after passing 600M, very wide into straight, made no impression in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.) (Epiglottic entrapment.)
Jumped well, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 wide turning in, showed some response early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened gradually final 50M.
Wide early from high draw, across to dispute lead, led outright over 300m out, responded gamely after headed 200m out to get back on top final 75m.
Waited with, pushed along 300m out, still towards rear 200m out, stayed on late.
Made running, joined halfway, weakened over 300m out.
Hampered and shuffled to rear of mid-field early on, well held from early in home straight.
Tracked pace three wide, effort early in home straight, no extra final 200m.
Rail position in mid-field, chased leaders from top of home straight but lacked speed to challenge.
Dropped in from high draw, rear of mid-field, headway amongst horses 300m out, stayed on.
Held up, not going well in last place off bend, passed a few late on, never dangerous.
Mid-field, hung right under pressure from 400m out and unable to pick up.
Held up, under pressure over 300m out, no impression.
Mid-field, pushed along 400m out, stayed on, unable to reach front two.
Tracking leading pair, went past eventual winner to lead 200m out, tended to edge right and headed by that rival 75m out.
Tracked leaders, weakened quickly over 300m out.
Ridden hard to lead, traveled okay, weakened inside 150M (See Incident Report).
Sat towards rear, raced keenly rounding the Turn, no clear running between 350M to 250M, closed off fairly.
Settled midfield, held up in the early Straight, closed off nicely (Substantial blood in trachea).
Jumped only fairly, settled towards rear, switched out in the Straight to obtain clear running, one pace to the finish.
Sat on pace, traveled fairly, limited response when asked, weakened near 150M.
Settled behind midfield, switched out making the Turn, made good progress from the back, battled to the finish.
Sat towards rear, raced wide, failed to respond when asked (See Incident Report).
Settled in front of midfield, traveled okay, ran on evenly.
Sat handy, raced wide and without cover throughout, gave ground quickly in the Straight (Substantial blood in trachea, See Incident Report).
Settled in front of midfield, weakened entering the Straight, unimpressive.
Settled in front of midfield, traveled okay, steady progress over the concluding stages.
Blundered on jumping, sat rear, held up for clear running until 100M, could not be fully tested.
Settled behind midfield, traveled smoothly, dashed on from 200M.
Settled midfield, disappointed for clear running near 300M, unbalanced near the 200M when raced tight, could not be fully ridden out.
Raced in touch, one paced under pressure and unable to challenge.
Tracked leader, challenged alongside winner from 300m out, unable to get past that rival.
Raced wide in rear from high draw, struggling and well held from top of home straight.
Forced pace, keen early, two lengths clear top of home straight, headed over 200m out, weakened.
Mid-field, in touch with leaders turning into home straight, weakened.
Waited with towards rear, pushed along 400m out, some late headway but never dangerous.
Tracked leaders, hung right under pressure home straight, no extra final 150m.
Chased leader, ridden to lead 200m out, responded to hold off runner-up by narrow margin.
Held up, under pressure over 200m out, little impression.
Dropped out last from high draw, still plenty to do 200m out, stayed on well closing stages.
Keen in mid-field, one paced and always around same position.
Rail position in mid-field, improved between horses over 300m out, stayed on but lacked pace to challenge.
Three wide in mid-division, weakened 300m out.
Rear of mid-field, wide into home straight and four lengths to make up on front two, stayed on well.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out 650M, very wide turning in, finished off evenly.

Jumped awkwardly, made contact with the right side of its starting gate and lost ground, raced at rear on the inside, angled out after passing 700M, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home.

Out in line, raced better than midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, 2 lengths or so back turning in, showed very good response in straight, took the lead 200M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Bumped shortly after start, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, 2 wide approaching 900M, a length back turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened final 50M.
Bumped start, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, weakened early in straight, eased final 300M. (See Racing Incidents.) (Irregular heart rhythm.)
Slightly slow out and crowded, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, dropped towards rear 650M, showed no response early in straight, weakened and eased thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Shifted out at start and made contact, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed near 200M, weakened final 100M.
Away well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Began fairly, raced 2 wide towards rear, 3 wide from 500M, 6 lengths back turning in, made little progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped only fairly and made contact, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear, wider from 700M, moved closer on turn, finished off strongly to take 2nd, nearest on line.
Away well, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, no clear run early in straight, cleared 250M, finished off well to take a place.

Bumped on the hindquarters shortly after start, raced at rear on the outside, made contact and carried wider after passing 700M, very wide into straight, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 200M.
Jumped well from gate 10, raced behind midfield on the outside, slightly improved on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Moderately away, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Sat box seat, had every chance, ridden along but weakened in final furlong.
Settled midfield on the rail, weakened quickly in the straight.
Sat behind midfield 3 wide with cover, outpaced and made no impression.
Always rear, never in contention, eased in final furlong.
Settled in front of midfield, 2 wide with cover, driven out in the Straight and stayed on well to score.
Settled midfield 3 wide with cover, driven wide on the Turn and made good progress in the Straight but never threatened.
Sat midfield 2 wide with cover, had to check when opponent shifted out in the Straight, no extra thereafter.
Showed clear intent to go forward from a wide draw, tracked the leader and kept on well but was headed in the final 50M.
Raced at the rear throughout, switched wide but found nothing in the Straight.
Sat rear 2 wide with cover, switched wide in the Straight, stayed on well but never dangerous.
Took a keen hold while tracking leader 3 wide without cover, had every chance, but weakened in the final 100M.
Settled behind midfield, switched wide on the turn but weakened in the final 200M.
Slow to begin, settled towards the rear of midfield on the rail, switched wide for clear running, checked in the Straight and kept on fairly thereafter (see Incident Report).
Led the race, was one-paced in the Straight and narrowly took fourth.
Broke well settling within 3L of pace in 6th on rail, remained in a similar position into home straight, kept on before fading out of contention inside final 200M.
Settled just off the pace in 5th on rail, gradually drifted some 3L back rounding home bend, kept on until finding no extra inside final 150M.
Soon taken back to last few from a poor draw, remained in a similar position into home straight, soon dropped out of contention.
Settled in midfield in 7th travelling keenly rounding home bend, ran on inside final 250M reaching 2nd 150M out but found winner too strong.
Niggled along in 4th one-out-one-back, remained in a similar into straight holding place chance over 200M out, unable to quicken under pressure closing stages.
Soon ridden to be up with the pace after a fair start, taken one back to 3rd coming onto home bend, baulked for a run until the 300M, unable to sustain effort inside final 150M.
Restrained to one from last and waited with, angled out for a run entering home straight, ran on under pressure without threatening.
Soon taken back from the widest draw, niggled along at the back rounding home bend, ran on under pressure past beaten horses in the run to the line.
Settled towards rear on rail sharing 10th, baulked early in straight and switched to the rail for a run over 300M out, made no further impression.
Soon taken back towards rear in 10th after beginning from a poor draw, responded well inside final 300M to assert authority shortly afterwards for a convincing victory.
Settled in rear of midfield from moderate start, switched out for a run into straight, fought on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.

Prominent near the centre of back straight after beginning from a poor draw, pressed forward to gain 2-wide position in 2nd coming onto home bend, held every chance early in straight until the 200M, kept on well for 3rd.
Broke well to lead obtaining rails run coming onto home bend, led the field until headed under pressure over 250M out, soon weakened.

Slightly slow out, gradually recovered along the rail to midfield in 8th, some 6L off the pace rounding home bend, baulked for a run in straight until the 250M, produced good late impression closing stages.
Held up near last over 10Ls off the lead, plenty to do top of straight, closed off strongly under top weight to claim 3rd near line.
Raced in midfield along the fence, made some progress from 500M but outpaced by rivals mid-straight.
Chased leaders in 3rd spot, 4Ls off runaway leader 400M, ran on steadily from 300M but was outstayed by pursuing rivals late stages.
Positioned ahead of midfield, ran on strongly early straight to take lead inside 200M, but run ended nearing 100M and had no extra close home.
Went forward tracking leader, couldn't go on passing 300M, weakened to last. (Jockey - no explanation for the disappointing run / Blood in trachea.)
Settled towards the rear, 7Ls to make up 400M, closed off well and briefly led inside 100M, headed by winner late.
Jumped only fairly, restrained to race behind midfield, responded well on straightening to be challenging for the lead 200M, not going the pace of first two final stages.
From wide draw taken back and reserved near last, over 10Ls off leader middle stages, driven 450M and ran to the line well without troubling first few. Pleasing return after long absence.
Taken back to last from a wide barrier, over 10Ls off the pace early and middle stages, still last at 400M then came with a strong finish down the outside, got up inside final 50M.
Away only fairly, settled in mid-division, gave good initial response early straight, challenged for the lead 200M and went 2nd briefly, edged out to 5th late but not beaten far.
Commenced well and held the lead early stages, soon raced keenly setting pace that was inside of standard time, had a good lead over rivals home turn, driven 500M but didn't last home. Weakened 200M.
Taken back from gate 12, raced at tail, 8 lengths or so back, moved closer on turn, very wide into straight, made some headway in the run home.
Taken back to race at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made minor progress early in straight, peaked 200M, ran on evenly to the line.
Commenced well, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, angled out 600M, 4 wide turning in, took the lead 300M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner final 150M.
Crowded shortly after start, raced 2 wide towards rear, wider from 650M, very wide turning in, made no impression in straight.
Jumped well from the widest draw, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, shared lead on turn, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened 300M, eased final furlong.
Taken back from gate 10, raced at rear on the outside, very wide into straight, made some progress early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out approaching 550M, finished off evenly. (Lost left front plate.)

Began well from gate 1, sent forward to race prominently on the inside, allowed rival to cross near 950M, sat right behind the leader on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (Roarer.)
Crowded start, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out after passing 600M, 2 lengths or so back turning in, finished off well to take a place without threatening the first two.
Away with them, raced behind midfield on the outside, improved after passing 650M, very wide turning in, kept on well early in straight, no extra final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Out with rest, raced 2 wide in midfield, commenced move 550M, very wide turning in, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 150M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Began well from a wide draw, sent forward to race prominently, found rail near 950M, shared lead on turn, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Moderately away, raced better than midfield on the inside, 2 to 3 wide turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.

Began well, raced better than midfield but trapped wide, moved a bit closer after passing 1250M, positioned 1 out 1 back in the middle stages, 3 wide from 550M, took the lead 400M, peaked and headed 300M, ran on evenly to the line.
Shifted out at start and bumped, sent forward to race prominently on the inside, allowed rival to cross approaching 650M, 2 wide turning in, kept on well in straight without threatening.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide in midfield, travelled keenly in the early stages, 4-1/2L back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Crowded start, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Made contact with the right side of its starting gate on jumping and lost ground, raced at rear, 7 to 8 lengths back, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, virtually pulled up near 1000M. (Small laceration to left hind leg) (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, 4 lengths back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.

Began smartly, positioned 2 wide, a length back, found rail near 750M, 2 lengths back turning in, showed very good response in straight, took the lead 150M, kept on well but unable to hold off the first two close home.
Bumped start, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear, 6 lengths or so back turning in, finished off very strongly to score, won by a narrow margin.

Began awkwardly, sent forward to race prominently early, raced better than midfield on outer in the middle stages, 3 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened 100M, eased final 50M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Shifted in at start and made contact, raced 3 wide with cover slightly behind midfield, 5-1/2L back turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame, nearest on line.
Crowded start, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, angled out after passing 550M, unable to obtain clear run until 200M, finished off very strongly, just beaten by a narrow margin.

Shifted out at start and made contact, sent forward to take the lead, found rail approaching 650M, led by 2 lengths turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed near 150M, weakened gradually close home.
Slightly slow out and bumped, raced 2 wide behind midfield, checked near 550M, 7 lengths or so back turning in, made some progress in straight.
Shifted out at start, raced in midfield on outer, no cover for the majority of the race, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Slowly away, held up, stayed on final 300m but unable to reach leaders.
Close up, raced keenly, took narrow lead 300m out, headed 100m out, no extra.
In touch with leaders, wide on bend, soon weakened home straight.
Waited with in rear, headway from 300m out, stayed on well.
Waited with in rear, no cover and keen, headway 300m out, unable to sustain and one paced final 150m.
Tracked pace, challenged and every chance from top of home straight.
Wide early, across to lead after 400m, headed entering home straight, weakened.
Mid-division, one paced under pressure and unable to challenge.
In touch with leaders, hung left bend, challenged top of home straight, no extra final 200m.
Mid-field, steady headway to reel in leaders and lead final 50m, won cosily.
Unable to hold mid-field position and dropped back to rear by halfway, well held home straight.
Mid-field, pushed along 500m out, unable to quicken, weakened 200m out.
Taken back from wide draw and raced in last pair, wide off bend, stayed on into mid-field but never dangerous.
Rear of mid-division, failed to pick up for pressure and no impression.
Away well, raced better than midfield, 2 wide, angled out 350M, failed to close off in straight. (See Racing Incidents.) (Blood in trachea.)
Taken back from gate 11, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide into straight, made some progress in the run home.
Began smartly, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, kept on well in straight to hold off the challengers.
Made contact shortly after start, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced 2 wide in midfield, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.) (Blood in trachea.)
Slightly slow out, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, raced in 2nd, 1/2L back turning in, kept on well in straight to take a place, always just held.

Bumped shortly after start and unbalanced, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on rail, slightly improved along the rail on turn, angled out 350M, finished off strongly, just beaten by a nose. (See Racing Incidents.)

Began awkwardly, raced 3 wide with cover at rear, difficult to settle in the early and middle stages, very wide into straight, made no progress in the run home. (A small laceration to the right front leg.)
Taken back from gate 12, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, there to turn, finished off evenly.
Crowded start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, found rail near 850M, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, kept on well in straight to make frame, always held.
Settled ahead of midfield, responded well from 250M but was held up for clear running over final 100M. Could be right there at the finish.
From draw 1 quickly moved to the front, set fast pace to straight, fought hard when challenged by rivals on both sides final 200M, headed near line.
Instructed to go forward on jumping from wide draw, tracked leader in a fast run race, gave ground passing 300M, weakened to last.
Jumped awkwardly, from wide draw taken back to second half of the field, stayed on final 300M without threat. (Jockey - unsuited by the pace of the event being run inside of standard time.)
Reserved in mid-division 5Ls off the good pace, closed off steadily final 300M but not reach leaders.
Chased leader on inside, responded well under a vigorous ride in the straight, wrestled the lead late after a fierce duel with rival.
Jumped only fairly and was severely checked after the start, ended up at the rear 8Ls back, proved difficult to ride when racing greenly in the straight and hung in. Never a threat to leaders.
Jumped fairly, obtained a 2-wide spot in midfield, driven 400M and responded fairly, steadied 150M then faded final stages.
Crowded shortly after the start, raced greenly in midfield throughout, failed to run on in the straight. (Mucus).
Chased leaders in the 4th spot, came with a strong looking run passing 300M, fought hard to the line and was beaten a short head only.
On jumping was checked, settled near last 7Ls off the pace, had big task in hand top of straight, closed off fastest to claim 4th beaten a head.
Pushed along to lead, traveled okay, slightly weakened passing 200M.
Settled handy, traveled strongly, made good ground when asked, hit the line strongly.
Shared the lead, traveled wide and without cover throughout, gave ground inside 150M (Replated left front plate at the Start, See Incident Report).
Settled worse than midfield, closed off fairly, unimpressive.
Sat towards rear, improved making the Turn, raced tight in the early Straight and again near 200M, made some progress thereafter.
Settled behind midfield, traveled comfortably on the rail, had every chance.
Sat rear, traveled only fairly, very limited (See Incident Report).
Jumped only fairly, settled in front of midfield, bumped and became unbalanced near the 400M, limited response (See Incident Report).
Settled handy, traveled wide, weakened passing 200M.
Sat midfield, traveled fairly, one pace to the finish.
Sat midfield, hung out rounding the Turn, gave ground quickly and faded passing 350M (Unacceptable Performance, Must BT, See Incident Report)
Sat on pace, traveled okay, crowded rounding the Turn, responded nicely under whip.
Waited with towards rear, pushed along to make ground final bend, strong run to lead 100m out, well on top at line.
Disputed lead and keen, started to lose position 700m out, dropped back quickly through field final bend, eased.
Wide early, forward move from mid-field 700m out, led or disputed lead until headed by winner 100m out, just held onto second.
Made running, joined 700m out, hung right under pressure home straight when still disputing lead, no extra final 150m.
Mid-division, caught behind rival and shuffled back to rear 450m out, unable to challenge.
In rear after crowded at start, made big move out wide to press leading pair 700m out, soon faded home straight.
Dropped in from wide draw, good headway up rail early in home straight to chase leaders, had to squeeze between horses 100m out, stayed on.
Wide early, tracked pace, weakened over 200m out.
Rail position, tracked pace, effort 300m out, unable to sustain and no extra final 100m.
Mid-field, caught wide from halfway down back straight, under pressure and dropped to rear final bend, stayed on but never dangerous home straight.
Waited with in rear, wide off final bend, stayed on well final 150m.
Mid-field, one paced under pressure, unable to challenge.
Shifted in at start and made contact, raced towards rear on the outside, moved a bit closer on turn, very wide into straight, made minor progress in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.)

Lifted front feet on jumping and away tardily, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well, sent forward to take the lead, found rail near 700M, led by 3/4L turning in, peaked and headed 200M, weakened gradually final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, raced 2 wide in midfield, 2 to 3 lengths back turning in, showed good response early in straight, peaked on run 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Away well, raced in 3rd, 2 lengths behind the leader, commenced move 450M, kept on well in straight to take a place, always just held.
Clean jump, raced better than midfield on the inside, 2 lengths or so back turning in, kept to inside after straightening and finished off strongly, led close home.
Bumped shortly after start, taken back to race at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made no impression in straight.
Jumped well, raced better than midfield on outer, 2-1/2L back, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.
Made contact shortly after start, raced in 2nd, 3/4L back turning in, hit the front 200M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner close home.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide at rear, 7 lengths back turning in, made no progress in straight.
Bumped on jumping, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 4 lengths or so back turning in, kept on same pace in straight.
Settled in front of midfield 2 wide with cover, ridden along in the straight but made no impression.
Sat rear 2 wide, limited response in the Straight, never involved.
Tracked leader 2 wide, one-paced under pressure in the Straight.
Sat box seat, kept on at the same pace in the final furlong.
Settled towards rear on the rail, never a factor.
Sat midfield on the rail, made some ground in the Straight but never threatened the winner.
Settled midfield 3 wide without cover, began to give ground on the turn and was soon eased in the straight.
Sat rear of midfield on the rail, kept on only fairly in the Straight.
Sat midfield 2 wide, took the lead on the turn when ridden along but was headed near the finish.
Showed clear intention to lead from a wide gate, came under pressure on the turn and weakened quickly after being steadied in the Straight (see Incident Report).
Sat rear, driven very wide on the turn and stayed on well to finish 4th.
Settled behind midfield 2 wide, switched out on the turn and responded well under pressure to score.
Settled some 3L off the pace in 5th, in similar position into straight, bumped about 300M out, soon weakened.
Trailed the field throughout.

Pressed forward from a wide draw, 3-wide in joint 4th into first bend, remained without cover in back straight, made headway 800M out to join the leader onto home bend, unable to sustain effort and weakened inside final 100M.
Began well in front briefly, ceded advantage for one back rail position onto first bend, drifted some 2L back to 4th inside the 700M, weakened further over 150M out.
Settled in last few mainly in 10th on rail, angled out on top of home bend 400M out, obtained a clear run near the centre of the track over 150M out, finished off the race well.
Settled in rear of midfield in 8th on rail, switched out to be one of the widest into home straight, kept on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Settled just over 2L off the pace on rail early, drifted over 3L back into back straight and 4L back for home, angled out for a run entering straight, ran home one-paced.
Soon dropped to last few, never seen with a chance.
Pressed forward from the widest draw to soon take up running, just held on from runner-up's strong late challenge.
Ridden forward from a poor draw, prominent until losing touch after straightening.
Settled in midfield, commenced move rounding home bend, one of the widest into straight, ran on well to miss narrowly.
Settled in last few, commenced move 3-wide at the 600M and the widest into straight, ran on well to be nearest at finish despite hanging in and a difficult ride.
Jumped well from draw 2, chased leader on inside, raced keenly in the middle stages, battled hard early straight and held 3rd to 200M, faded late stages.
Away awkwardly and lost ground, settled back in the field, last turning home, failed to run on under pressure.
Jumped only fairly from draw 1, settled down in midfield about 3Ls off pace, kept on one paced in the straight. Never a serious threat.
Travelled in a 2-wide spot behind midfield, ran on fairly final 300M. Never likely.

Jumped only fairly, settled back in the field about 6Ls off the good pace, waited with until a gap opened up at 300M, made some progress without threatening. (Jockey - not too disappointed with the performance.)
Soon led, set good pace to straight before quickening up impressively from 250M, opened up a big lead and maintained the advantage to the line. (New Track record.)
Jumped well and ended up more forward than intended, raced wide no cover chasing leaders throughout, 4th top of straight, couldn't sustain run 200M and weakened.
Jumped on terms, guided to a rail spot in second half of the field, briefly held up for clear running approaching top of straight, ran on evenly to take 4th without troubling winner.
From wide draw obtained a midfield position along the 3-path, ran on mildly over final 300M for 3rd. Not reach winner.
In the group chasing leaders, raced keenly early stages, came under pressure nearing 400M, soon weakened out of contention. (Jockey - made respiratory noise during race / Roarer.)
Chased leader on outside in a race run at good tempo, couldn't keep up with leader from 250M but fought on steadily to hold 2nd.
Bumped at the start, dropped back to a 3-wide spot towards the rear, brought widest home, responded only fairly to the line.
Away with them, raced better than midfield on the outside, a bit closer after passing 700M, 2nd on turn, took the lead 200M, peaked and headed 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.

Commenced well, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, 3 lengths back on turn, steadied near 300M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, there to turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, finished off very strongly to snatch victory in a ding-dong finish.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, finished off well to take a place.
Began well from gate 1, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and made some progress.
Taken back to race, raced at rear on the inside, angled out and made contact near 500M, 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, made little progress in straight.
Jumped well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, similar position on turn, showed limited response early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened thereafter.
Jumped with them, took the early lead, headed after passing 900M, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened and eased thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide in midfield, travelled keenly in the middle stages, 3 lengths back turning in, finished off evenly.
Made contact shortly after start, raced at rear on the outside, bumped near 500M, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Made contact shortly after start, raced in midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, showed good response in straight, led narrowly 100M, peaked and headed 50M, ran on evenly to the line.

Began well from a tricky gate, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead after passing 900M, travelled well to turn, peaked and headed 200M, weakened 150M, eased final 50M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Commenced well, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from gate 11, raced at tail, 5 to 6 lengths back in the middle stages, very wide into straight, made minor progress in straight.
Moderately away from the widest draw, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, 3 lengths or so back, wider turning in, kept on same pace in straight.
Taken back to race 2 wide at rear, angled out 350M, finished off evenly.
Moderately away from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length, travelled well to turn, peaked and headed 150M, weakened gradually final 50M.
Bumped start, raced towards rear on the inside, 5 lengths back turning in, made no progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Out with rest, raced 2 wide behind midfield, commenced move 450M, 3 lengths or so back turning in, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 100M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide in midfield, similar position on turn, weakened early in straight.

Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the inside, 4 lengths back, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 150M, closed off well to take a place without threatening the first two.

Away well, raced better than midfield on the outside, 2 lengths or so back, no cover throughout, challenged the leader early in straight, took the lead 150M, peaked and headed 100M, weakened gradually final 50M.
Jumped well, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on the inside, saved ground to turn, unable to obtain clear run in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made contact at start, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on the inside, 2 wide turning in, unable to obtain clear run early in straight, cleared 150M, finished off well to take 2nd.
Tracked leader, effort from top of home straight, no extra final 100m.
Wide early from high draw, across to lead after 300m, ridden over 200m out, ran on strongly to maintain advantage.
Mid-field, under pressure over 400m out, weakened early in home straight.
Tracked pace, chased along 400m out, gradually weakened.
Waited with towards rear, driven along final bend, no impression.
Slowly away, recovered to race mid-field, stayed on under pressure, lacked speed to challenge.
Taken back to race behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response in straight, no clear run near 50M, ran on evenly to the line.
Rail position, in touch with leaders, short of room behind winner over 200m out, stayed on well.
Slowly away, raced in last place, chased along over 500m out, passed a few late on but never dangerous.
Sat on pace, traveled nicely, raced in restricted room over the concluding stages, closed off reasonably well.
Sat towards rear, limited response when placed under pressure, never a threat.
Ridden along to lead, weakened inside 150M, faded.
Sat behind midfield, briefly held up in the early Straight, closed off fairly.
Settled midfield, traveled okay, crowded near the 200M, had every chance.
Settled midfield, traveled smoothly, could not be fully tested when held up over the concluding stages.
Settled worse than midfield, switched out rounding the Turn, responded okay when tested.
Sat on pace, raced keenly in the middle stages, raced in restricted room over the concluding stages.
Sat towards rear, limited response when asked (See Incident Report).
Sat handy, raced wide, one pace to the finish.
Jumped awkwardly, sat rear, raced rear and keenly, no contention.
Tracked the leader, traveled strongly, kept on well to win.
Made running, pressed in front, headed 150m out, weakened.
Raced in mid-division, headway out wide final bend, good progress to lead 150m out, stayed on to maintain narrow advantage.
In touch with leaders, lacked pace to hold position from top of home straight.
Across to press leader, from wide draw, quickly lost place early in home straight, weakened.
Towards rear of mid-field, had to wait for run turning into home straight, followed winner through 200m out, stayed on but lacked pace to challenge.
Held up, still in rear top of home straight, one paced and unable to challenge.
Tracked pace against rail, challenged and every chance from 200m out, stayed on.
Waited with towards rear from wide draw, widest into home straight, stayed on, never nearer.
Dropped out from wide draw, headway up rail early part of home straight, unable to sustain.
Raced in mid-division, had to wait for run turning into home straight, stayed on for pressure, unable to quite challenge leading pair.
Tracked pace, three wide and keen, chased along final bend, weakened over 200m out, eased final 100m.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, 6 lengths back, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight to make frame, nearest on line.
Jumped with them, positioned 2 wide, 5 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, finished off well to be nearest on line.
Moderately away, raced behind midfield on the outside, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began smartly from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably in the middle stages, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner late.
Average to begin, raced behind midfield on the inside, 4 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, finished off strongly, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, made no progress in straight.
Out in line, positioned 2 wide, 3 to 4 lengths back, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened and eased final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away well, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, angled out approaching 400M, 2 to 3 lengths back turning in, made some progress in straight.
Moderately away, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, peaked early in straight, kept on evenly to the line. (Blood in trachea.)

Out with rest, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, moved a bit closer after passing 750M, 1 to 2 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Away with them, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, finished off strongly, won by a narrow margin.
Settled worse than midfield on the rail, made good ground on the rail in the Straight, ran out of room final 100M, unlucky.
Sat on pace, weakened final 150M.
Sat last, made no impression.
Sat midfield on the rail, never a threat.
Sat towards the rear, stayed on.
Sat off pace, showed some dash top of the Straight, nothing extra final 150M.
Sat near the rear, never involved. (Substantial blood and lame right front) (See Incident Report)
Settled midfield 2 wide, travelled a bit keen, no luck in the Straight.
Settled worse than midfield 2 wide, stayed on fairly.
Sat in front of midfield, ran on strongly to score.
Sent forward from a wide gate, led, kept on nicely.
Sat in front of midfield 2 wide, one pace when asked.

Gradually moved up along the rail to midfield after moderate start, drifted over 2L back in 7th rounding home bend, angled out for a run entering straight, fought on steadily under pressure without threatening
Settled in last few in 9th, commenced move inside the 400M but did not find much room early in home straight, finished off the race well inside final 150M.
Crowded at the start settling well back, saved ground on the rail turning in for home, did not find much room on rail early in straight, found no extra inside final 100M.

Well there from the widest draw travelling very wide without cover, taken 2-back early in back straight gaining 3rd 3-wide onto home bend, sustained effort in straight to hit the front 200M out, won convincingly.
Soon took up running, obtained run near the rail early in back straight, led until headed about 350M out, weakened in home straight.

Gradually taken back to last few in 8th 3-wide with cover, commenced move swinging one of the widest turning in for home, quickened well to reach 3rd briefly inside the 100M only to be caught for 3rd close to home.
Broke well, gradually shifted one back in joint 2nd early in straight, became 4th rounding home bend, dropped away quickly under pressure after straightening.
Prominent early, gradually drifted to 2L back in 5th into back straight, remained similar but wide turning for home, unable to quicken to challenge the length of straight.
Settled well back, shifted wide into straight, ran on past well-beaten horses in the run to the line.
Settled in midfield 3-wide, swung one of the widest turning in for home, held place chance under pressure early in straight but unable to sustain effort inside final 50M.
Settled prominently 3-wide without cover after beginning from a wide draw, came to join race leader 2-wide inside the 600M, hit the front briefly on straightening, plugged on for 2nd.
From draw 12 made some early use to go forward, vied for the lead on outside passing 1000M, took narrow lead 250M but couldn't sustain run final stages under top weight 135lb.
Dropped back to race near the rear 5Ls off the pace, saved ground on the inside before switching out on straightening, closed off nicely to claim 3rd near line.
Crowded after the start, 3Ls back in mid-division on settling, responded well early straight to be challenging for the lead but no match for the winner inside 200M. Lost 3rd near line.
Began well enough, raced keenly behind leaders, badly held up from 350M to 100M and lost every chance. (Jockey fined for weighing in 2 lbs overweight.)
Not hurried after the start, settled near last 5Ls away from leaders, brought wide for home before finishing off final 300M mildly.
Began well from draw 1, tracked leaders into straight, badly held up over final 350M and could not be tested.
Driven forward, vied for the lead from 1000M, held slim lead early straight, headed near 250M then weakened to finish last.
Began awkwardly, settled down towards the rear along the 3-path, ran on well enough over final 300M to take 2nd but no match for the runaway winner.
Jumped on terms, restrained to race in second half of the field, picked up strongly top of the straight and surged to the lead 150M out. Won going away.
Settled down in midfield along the inside, held up at a crucial stage from 300M to 150M. Failed to pick up speed closing stages.
Crowded after the start, caught wide no cover chasing leaders throughout, fought hard to stay in contention early straight but run ended passing 150M and faded towards the finish.
From wide draw dropped back to last, 6Ls off the pace middle stages, brought widest into straight before staying on moderately towards the finish. (No Vet findings.)
Moderately away, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 4 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, no clear run until 200M, weakened gradually thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began only fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared near 200M, finished off very strongly, led close home.
Jumped well from gate 11, tracked leaders, 3 wide, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, moved a bit closer after passing 550M, 4-1/2L back turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out early in straight, cleared 200M, made some progress thereafter.
Average to begin, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, same position on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear run until approaching 100M, closed off well to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Away well, positioned a length behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run until near 200M, kept on evenly to the line.
Made contact at start, sent forward to race prominently, 2 wide, there to turn, took the lead approaching 300M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner late.
Began well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/4L in the middle stages, peaked and headed 300M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced behind midfield on the outside, 3 lengths or so back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 lengths back, there to turn, no clear run early in straight, made no progress thereafter.
Bumped start, positioned 3 wide slightly behind midfield, 3 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)

Began well from a wide draw, trapped 4 wide with in midfield in the early stages, found a 3 wide spot near 750M, 2 lengths or so back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Dropped back to a rearward spot 6Ls away on settling, wide into straight before running on nicely under top weight to claim 3rd.
Obtained a midfield position 4-5Ls off the fast pace, ran on one paced final 400M. Never a winning hope.
From wide draw guided to a 3-wide spot in midfield, had no cover until 700M, couldn't go on final 400M.
Given a waiting ride near last, over 7Ls off the pace rounding home turn, dropped to last 600M then switched to outside of track in the home straight. Made some progress without threatening.
Bumped shortly after the start, restrained to race at the rear, commenced his move 600M on outside, run ended mid-straight and posed no threat to leaders thereafter.
Reserved in midfield along the inside, just over 3Ls off leader 400M, kept on steadily to the line but always held by first few.
Jumped only fairly, settled towards the rear along the inside, didn't find much under pressure from 400M. (Bled 2nd time - compulsory retirement.)
Switched off to race at the rear, had plenty to go top of straight but failed to run on. (Bled.)
Went forward, chased leaders in 3rd, all out challenging for the lead from 400M before being outpaced by first two inside 150M. Lost several places near line.
From draw 1 stayed close enough behind leaders, into clear running 400M, responded well to lead nearing 200M, couldn't hold off winner final stages.
From wide draw moved up to track leaders early stages, settled 3-wide without cover ahead of midfield, fought on well under 10lb claimer to take lead nearing 100M, kept on closing stages.
Made some use to obtain a position outside the lead, set fast pace middle stages, held slim lead early straight but run ended passing 300M and weakened.
Vied for lead on the inside setting fast pace middle stages, outsprinted by pursuing rivals from 300M, weakened mid-straight.
Jumped well enough, up with early pace before settling down ahead of midfield, kept on fairly well final 400M to take 4th not beaten far by first few.
Shared the lead until 800M, traveled nicely, hit the line strongly.
Ridden along to lead, weakened quickly rounding the Turn, faded (Lame left front leg)
Sat handy, failed to respond when asked, never a factor.
Lunged forward when the start was effected, settled midfield, made good progress when asked.
Chased the leader, weakened quickly over the concluding stages.
Jumped awkwardly, settled worse than midfield, closed off fairly.
Sat on pace, switched out rounding the Turn, responded well when asked.
Settled towards rear, one pace to the finish.
Sat rear, angled out passing 600M, minor progress made in the Straight.
Settled midfield, traveled smoothly, closed off reasonably well.
Held up, good headway widest to lead 200m out, stayed on well to hold on.
Tracked pace out wide, challenged and every chance 300m out, no extra final 150m.
Ridden along from stalls to lead, headed early in home straight, weakened quickly, well beaten.
Waited with in rear, headway going well home straight but unable to secure clear run until near 100m line, closed on winner but ran out of time, unlucky.
Mid-field, pushed along to chase leaders 300m out, stayed on.
Chased leader, share of lead and every chance over 300m out, weakened final 250m.
Mid-division, chased along bend, headway early part of home straight, unable to sustain and weakened 200m out.
Tracked leader, narrow lead 400m out to over 200m out, no extra.
Impeded exiting stalls, in rear, briefly short of room towards rail over 300m out, soon outpaced.
Mid-field, chased leaders into home straight, had to wait for a run over 300m out, challenged up rail, stayed on but outpaced final 100m.
Raced wide, chased along early, unable to hold position and dropped to rear by halfway, lost touch from bend and eased off.
Moderately away, trapped wide in midfield, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually thereafter.
Began well from gate 9, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening.
Began fairly, raced 2 wide towards rear, there to turn, failed to make any progress in straight, eased final 100M.
Taken back to race at rear on the outside, very wide into straight, made no progress in straight.
Began smartly, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, peaked and headed 300M, weakened 200M, eased final 100M.
Away well, raced better than midfield on the inside, easy run on turn, angled out early in straight, finished off strongly to score.
Jumped well from gate 11, raced prominently on the outside, 1/2L back turning in, hit the front 300M, peaked and headed 150M, kept on evenly to the line.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide behind midfield, similar position on turn, kept on same pace in straight.
Slightly slow out, raced towards rear on the inside, moved a bit closer along the rail in the middle stages, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear, 6 lengths or so back, saved ground in the middle stages, no clear run early in straight, made some progress final 200M to make frame.
Moderately away, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, commenced move 500M, made some progress in the run home.
Settled in front of midfield 2 wide, ran on nicely.
Settled worse than midfield 2 wide, no luck in running, never tested.
Sat one pace, weakened in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
Sat last, stayed on strongly to score. (See Incident Report)
Sat towards the rear on the rail, held up in the Straight, never seriously tested. (See Incident Report)
Jumped on terms, ridden along to lead, kept on well.
Settled midfield 3 wide, made little impression.
Caught 4 wide no cover in front of midfield, just kept on.
Settled midfield on the rail, never a threat.
Sat towards the rear, passed only weakened rivals.
Sat outside lead, weakened final furlong.
Sat handy 3 wide, eased down in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
Settled behind the leaders, one pace when asked.
Sat worse than midfield, never involved.
Held up in midfield about 4L off the pace in 7th, commenced move coming onto course proper, ran on under pressure despite tightened just inside the 150M.
Settled in midfield, gave ground steadily under pressure after reaching the course proper.
Well there and wide without cover, came under pressure to hold place coming onto course proper, dropped out tamely inside final 200M. (Blood in trachea)
Jumped awkwardly before taken back to share last on stands rail, crowded about 450M out, never a danger. (Irregular heart rhythm)
Bumped and unbalanced at start settling in last few, shifted in into the clear to challenge over 300M out but unable to make any impression under pressure throughout closing stages.
Settled well back from the one draw, briefly baulked 400M out, produced good late impression under pressure closing stages.
Jumped well from a low draw but soon taken back behind midfield racing without cover, fought on well without threatening closing stages.
Not far off the pace on stands rail in early stages, tightened for a stride over 450M out before coming under pressure to hold place, kept on same pace closing stages.
Ridden up with the pace from moderate start, came under pressure to hold place coming onto course proper, kept on until swamped for 2nd 50M out.
Prominent on stands rail in early stages after inconvenienced at the start, drifted backward gradually reaching midfield onto course proper, weakened noticeably closing stages.
Made all along stands rails, ridden clear inside final 150M.
Went forward from draw 12, soon led at good pace, had 1.5L lead early straight, caught by winner near 150M before losing two places near line.
Stayed close enough behind leaders, 4th at 400M, quickened up smartly to lead 150M out, kept on strongly late and won going away.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, raced near last 7Ls off the pace, had plenty to do top of straight but made only limited progress.
From wide draw switched off to race in last 8-9Ls back, proved difficult to ride out when hung in in the home straight, failed to quicken and only ran past a couple of beaten horses.
Caught racing 3-wide in midfield, 5Ls to make up top of straight but ran home only fairly. Never a threat.
Settled down in mid-division, kept on evenly passing 400M but was always held by leaders.
Jumped only fairly, restrained to race towards the rear 6Ls off the pace, steadied 200M when shifting out for clear running, closed off well late to go 3rd just before line.
Chased leaders, raced 3-wide until 600M, kept on same pace early straight, faded final 150M.
From wide draw given a waiting ride towards the rear 3-wide, had 6Ls to make up 400M, closed off fastest and not far behind the minor placegetters.
From draw 1 settled down in midfield along the inside, driven passing 500M but never going the pace to challenge leaders.
Bounded on jumping, lost ground and hence settled further back in the field than intended, behind mid-division making the turn, responded only fairly final 400M. Never involved. (No Vet findings.)
Went forward chasing leader, under pressure to hold his position 500M, soon weakened in the straight. (No Vet findings.)
Began well to be chasing leader on the inside, no match for winner's acceleration 300M, kept battling to the line to take 2nd close home.

Towards the rear 6Ls off the good pace, didn't respond to riding final 400M. Never dangerous. (Jockey : intended to hold a more forward position but his mount failed to show sufficient pace in early stages. / No Vet findings.)
Slowly away, raced at tail, 9 lengths or so back turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.
Bumped shortly after start, raced in midfield on the outside, 5 lengths or so back turning in, finished off strongly to take 2nd, nearest on line.
Moderately away from gate 12, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, peaked 400M, weakened early in straight, unacceptable performance.
Jumped awkwardly and made contact with the left side of the starting gate, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Out in line, raced prominently, 2 wide, allowed rival to cross near 600M, 3 lengths or so back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Fast into stride, sent forward to take the early lead, headed near 1050M, retook the lead 800M, led by 3 lengths turning in, kicked clear early in straight, kept on well to the line and scored.
Taken back from gate 11, raced behind midfield on the outside, 6 lengths or so back turning in, made some progress in straight.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made little progress in straight.
Away with them, raced behind midfield on the inside early, 2 wide on turn, no clear run early in straight, one-paced thereafter. (Lame right front leg.)
Bumped shortly after start, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Shifted out at start, raced towards rear on outer, 8 lengths back turning in, made very good progress in straight to take a place, nearest finish.
Hampered start, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, similar position on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared approaching 200M, kept on same pace to the line.
Began only fairly and crowded, raced 2 wide towards rear, 6 lengths back, same margin back on turn, made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.) (Roarer.)
Slightly slow out, raced behind midfield on the inside, 5 lengths back, 2 wide on turn, finished off evenly.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Began well from gate 13, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked on run approaching 200M, weakened gradually final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Away with them, raced at rear on the outside, 7 lengths or so back turning in, made minor progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Blundered on jumping, raced better than midfield on the outside, 2 lengths or so back turning in, kept on well in straight to take 2nd, always held.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out approaching 500M, finished off well to take a place without threatening.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 7 lengths or so back turning in, made some headway in the run home.
Fast into stride, positioned a length behind the leader on the inside, saved ground throughout, hard ridden after passing 300M, kept on well to make frame without threatening.
Jumped with them, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 3 wide on turn, made little progress early in straight, peaked on run 150M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/4L turning in, kept on very well in straight and scored.
Began only fairly, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, 3/4L back turning in, hampered by loose horse near 200M, ran on well to the line, always held.
Began fairly, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening.
Began awkwardly, taken back to race at rear on the outside, last turning in, showed some response early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened thereafter.
Made contact with the right side of the starting gate on jumping, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed some response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Began smartly, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, kept on very well in straight and scored.
Away well, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 4 lengths or so back turning in, kept on same pace in straight.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, finished off evenly.
Unseated rider at start. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, kept on well early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened gradually thereafter. (Lame left front leg.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide towards rear, 5 lengths or so back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Began well, raced behind midfield on outer, very wide turning in, kept on same pace to the line.
Soon dropped to rear, never seen with a chance.
Settled just better midfield in 5th, improved from 700M to be one-out-one-back around home bend, fought on steadily in straight without threatening.
Began well from the widest draw, travelled wide without cover in midfield to straight, dropped out under pressure.
Ridden after awkward start to soon take up running on rail, led the field until narrowly headed on straightening, folded up quickly inside final 100M.
Towards rear early before improving to midfield about 900M out, quickened well to take charge 150M out, won convincingly.
Settled well back on rail from a poor draw, carried backward over 450M out, tightened after straightening 300M out, made no further impression.
Crowded shortly after start losing ground settling in midfield on rail, slightly worse about 700M out, saved ground turning in for home, fought on steadily without threatening.
Settled within 3L of pace in 4th or 5th on rail, switched off rail for a run approaching home turn, did not find much room early in straight, kept on steadily to the line.
Well there, taken just over 1L back to 3rd about 900M out, held every chance in home straight but outsprinted by eventual winner inside final 50M.
Settled in last few after checked shortly after start, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, switched out for a run over 200M out, kept on steadily without threatening.
Well there 3-wide without cover, refused to settle in further back but persisted in racing alongside race leader in back straight, faded under pressure inside final 200M.

Ridden after moderate start, crowded 1100M out, taken slightly further back early in back straight 3-wide without cover, renewed effort 4-wide home bend, made modest shirt-lived impression after widest into straight.
Sat on pace, one pace to the line.
Settled behind midfield, traveled fairly, raced in restricted room over the concluding stages.
Settled in front of midfield, weakened inside 200M, never a factor.
Settled handy, traveled fairly, gave ground quickly when asked (See Incident Report).
Settled towards rear, angled out at the Turn, made steady progress when asked.
Jumped only fairly, sat worse than midfield, slightly held up entering the Straight, closed off reasonably well.
Settled midfield, traveled smoothly, no clear run in the Straight, could not be ridden out (See Incident Report).
Ridden along to lead, traveled okay, weakened rounding the Turn, failed to respond (See Incident Report).
Settled midfield, traveled smoothly, ran on evenly.
Jumped only fairly, settled towards rear, held up in the early Straight, no clear run until 100M.
Slow to begin, sat rear, traveled okay, switched out rounding the Turn, responded well when placed under pressure.
Sat midfield, minor progress made in the Straight.
Held up last, ridden from top of home straight, no impression.
Tracked pace, stuck to task under pressure final 250m, didn't quite have speed to challenge.
Tracked leader, pushed into narrow lead 200m out, headed close home.
Slightly impeded leaving stalls, towards rear, stayed on final 200m but unable to reach leaders.
Settled in mid-field, 5 lengths to make up on leaders at top of home straight, strong run to lead close home, won cosily.
Made running, keen, responded when challenged from over 200m out, no extra closing stages.
Mid-division, pushed along into home straight, one paced and no impression on leaders, eased close home.
Waited with towards rear and keen, wide into home straight, some headway but never dangerous.
Raced in touch, ridden on bend to chase leaders, weakened 200m out.
Began well from gate 1, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on rail, crowded near 550M, saved ground on turn, finished off strongly to score.
Jumped with them, raced behind midfield on outer, moved closer after passing 600M, very wide turning in, made some headway in straight.
Jumped well from gate 10, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/2 turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 50M.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced 2 wide in midfield, 4 lengths back turning in, made some progress early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened gradually final 50M.
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced in 2nd, a length or so back, similar position on turn, weakened early in straight, eased final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped heavily at start and unbalanced, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on the inside, same margin back turning in, finished off well to take a place.
Away with them, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, checked near 550M, 2 lengths or so back on turn, angled out 400M, kept on same pace in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped with them, raced 3 wide, 2 lengths or so back, no cover from 450M, very wide into straight, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Crowded shortly after start, raced behind midfield on the inside, save ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened and eased thereafter.
Began awkwardly and made heavy contact, raced at tail, 7 to 8 lengths back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside, 7 lengths back, same margin back turning in, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Out with rest, raced slightly behind midfield, 2 wide, 4 lengths or so back, there to turn, kept on well in straight to make frame without threatening. (Lame left front leg next day morning.)
Settled worse than midfield on the rail, picked off some weakened rivals.
Caught 3 wide no cover in front of midfield, weakened in the Straight.
Sat in front of midfield 2 wide, closed off fairly.
Sat behind midfield, never a threat.
Settled midfield on the rail, closed off strongly.
Sat behind the pace on the rail, ran on.
Sat midfield 2 wide, never impress.
Settled towards the rear, stayed on.
Settled behind the lead, one pace when asked.
Sat last, made some late ground.
Led, kept on fairly.
Sat on pace, kept on nicely.
Settled just over 2L back on 4th on rail, became some 4L back around home bend, responded well under pressure to assert authority over 100M out.
