Settle in last few on rail from a poor draw, tightened about 600M out and checked shortly after, folded up quickly after straightening.
Settled in midfield in 5th about 5L off the pace, fought on steadily under pressure in home straight without threatening.
Vied for lead from the widest draw, obtained rails run in lead about 600M out holding a 2L break coming onto home bend, unable to sustain effort and swamped inside final 100M.
Soon taken well back from a poor draw, made up good late ground down the centre of the straight to be nearest at finish.

Jumped fairly, gradually recovered to one-out-one-back in 3rd travelling keenly at times, some 3L back making home bend, made modest headway in straight while shifting ground early on to just fail to reach 2nd on line
Gradually taken back to last few from a poor draw, last into straight, baulked behind runners until the 100M, made no further impression.
Soon recovered from moderate start towards rear in 7th 3-wide without cover, unable to quicken under pressure in home straight.
Settled on rail in rear of midfield, came under pressure to hold place inside the 600M, ran home one-paced.
Broke well to lead on rail early stages, ceded advantage for 2L 2nd leaving the 700M, gained closer to pace when saved ground on rail turning for home, unable to sustain effort inside final 100M.
Towards rear, tight between runners early in straight until the 200M, beaten one-paced when tightened again 50M out.
Up with early pace before easing back to a position ahead of midfield, 3Ls off the pace 400M, kept battling to the line but was always held by leaders.

From draw 1 stayed close enough behind leaders, switched to 2-wide 800M, picked up nicely leaving home turn, hit lead inside 200M and kept on well to the finish. Held off runner-up comfortably late stages.

Jumped only fairly, settled in second half of the field 8-9Ls off the fast pace, travelled well enough into straight but the finishing response was only fair. Crowded for room 100M but not going to trouble leaders.
Failed to show usual early pace, ended up racing towards the rear, eased down by jockey from 600M. (Jockey : concerned with the horse's action behind from 700M. / Lame next day.)
Bumped at the start, driven forward to take lead going into the first turn, set fast pace to 800M before slowing down the tempo, came under pressure 400M, soon weakened.
Went forward chasing leader, pace fast for the first half of the race, came up empty passing 300M, weakened rapidly towards the finish.
Restrained in a position behind midfield about 7Ls off the pace, driven nearing 400M, closed off fastest in the straight, went 2nd near 100M but couldn't down reel in the winner.
Switched off to last on jumping from wide barrier, over 10Ls off leader on settling, always well behind and never got into the race.

Pressed forward tracking leader along the 2-path, pace fast for the first half of the race, took over near 400M and was all out to win, caught by winner inside 200M before losing 2nd spot 100M from home.
Reserved in mid-division, made his move passing 500M, responded well initially and went 3rd early straight, became one-paced final 200M.
Eased back to a rearward position about 8Ls off the fast pace, brought widest into straight for his challenge, stayed on moderately without threatening first two.
Held up in midfield along the inside, 4-5Ls off the fast pace, moved closer home turn but kept on at same pace only over final 400M.
Bumped start, positioned 3 wide, a length or so back, similar position on turn, kept on evenly in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made contact shortly after start, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off well to take 2nd, always held.
Began well from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, peaked and headed 300M, weakened final 150M.
Crowded start, raced 3 wide better than midfield early, moved a bit closer approaching 1300M, 2nd in the middle stages, 2 wide, took the lead 300M, kept on very well to the line and scored.

Jumped well, raced 2 wide better than midfield early, taken back after passing 1200M, positioned 2 wide behind midfield in the middle stages, 3 to 4 lengths back turning in, made minor progress in the run home.
Made contact shortly after start, raced behind midfield on outer, 4 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, made some progress in straight.
Moderately away, raced 3 wide slightly behind midfield, a bit closer in the middle stages, finished off well to take a place without threatening.

Made contact at start, positioned 2 wide, a length back early, allowed rival to cross near 1100M, 2 lengths or so back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter, eased inside final furlong.
Slowly away, raced at rear on the inside, 4 lengths back turning in, made little progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, raced at rear on the outside, 5 lengths back turning in, failed to close off in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made running, headed 200m out, no extra, lost three places late on.
Jumped awkwardly, held up, last entering home straight, passed a few under pressure late on.
Slightly impeded leaving stalls, towards rear, unable to quicken early in home straight, stayed on late, never a threat to leaders.
Tracked leaders, quickened to front 200m out, soon in control, won readily.
Mid-field, pushed along from top of home straight, no impression.
Raced wide in rear of mid-field, ridden along bend, one paced home straight and never dangerous.
Tracked pace, chased winner home from over 200m out, hung in behind that rival final 100m and always held.
Dropped in from high draw, headway from over 300m out, stayed on, never nearer.
Mid-field, keen early, ridden over 300m out, stayed on to edge third close home.
Raced prominently, keen, weakened over 300m out.
Towards rear, pushed along after halfway, no impression.
Jumped only fairly, sat towards rear, held up inside 150M (See Incident Report).
Settled behind midfield, limited response when asked, weakened inside 300M (Substantial blood in trachea, See Incident Report).
Made contact with the starting gates on jumping, sat rear, failed to respond and detached from the field.
Sat in front of midfield, had difficulty obtaining clear running entering the Straight and over the final 200M (See Incident Report).
Sat on pace, traveled okay, one pace to the finish.
Settled midfield, traveled only fairly, raced greenly, gave ground in the Straight.
Sat on pace, raced keenly in the early stages, minor progress made in the Straight.
Sat towards rear, traveled smoothly, ran on evenly.
Settled towards rear, switched out rounding the Turn, responded nicely when placed under pressure (See Incident Report).
Settled in front of midfield, traveled nicely, raced wide and without cover, made good ground when asked.
Ridden hard to lead, weakened inside 150M (See Incident Report).
Jumped only fairly, sat behind midfield, could not obtain clear running at the early Straight, closed off only fairly.
Raced in touch with leaders, well placed into home straight but unable to quicken, no extra final 150m.
Very wide throughout from high draw, mid-field, lost place final bend, well held.
Held up, pushed along over 400m out, never going pace to get competitive.
Mid-field, rail position throughout, headway from top of home straight, no extra late on and lost third.
Rail position in mid-field, pushed along to chase leaders into home straight, stayed on, closed on winner late on but always held, clear of rest.
Sightly hampered leaving stalls, in rear, pushed along after halfway, some headway into mid-field home straight, never a threat.
Mid-field, pushed along into home straight, stayed on final 200m but never going pace to trouble leaders.
Wide throughout, mid-field, lost place turning into home straight, soon well held.
Tracked pace three wide, pushed along 400m out, weakened quickly.
Held up, still in rear entering home straight, stayed on in wide position but never dangerous.
Raced prominently, pushed along 300m out, faded final 200m.
Raced in touch with leaders, chased leaders into home straight, soon no extra, weakened final 150m.
Made running, kicked two lengths clear 300m out, margin reduced closing stages but always doing enough.
Began well from the widest draw, unable to slot in, raced 4 wide in midfield, no cover throughout, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Crowded shortly after start, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, 5 lengths or so back turning in, failed to close off in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well, raced in midfield on the inside, a bit closer on turn, kept on evenly in straight.
Away well, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, made no progress in straight.
Jumped with them, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, 3 lengths back turning in, kept on same pace in straight.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, there to turn, one-paced in the run home.
Bumped start, raced at rear on outer, 6 lengths or so back, very wide into straight, failed to make any progress in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowly away, raced behind midfield on the inside, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, unable to obtain clear run early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground throughout, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, kept on same pace to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, there to turn, made good progress in straight to take a place, nearest on line.
Taken back to race 2 wide towards rear, 6 lengths or so back turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced 3 wide, 1-1/2L back, no cover throughout, finished off well to take 2nd, just beaten by a neck.
Began awkwardly, sent forward to take the early lead, headed near 1000M, 2nd on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Fast into stride, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead near 1000M, led by a length on turn, kept on well in straight to hold off the challengers.
Settled just behind the leaders on the rail, ran on strongly.
Settled in front of midfield 2 wide, made little impression.
Settled midfield on the rail, never a threat. (Unacceptable Performance, must trial)
Sat behind midfield on the rail, never impress.
Caught 3 wide no cover in front of midfield, weakened in the Straight.
Sat outside the lead, travelled keenly, weakened in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
Not the quickest out, ridden along to led, kept on until weakened final 100M.
Settled worse than midfield 3 wide, stayed on.
Settled midfield 2 wide, one pace when asked.
Sat towards the rear, made some late ground.
Sat behind midfield 2 wide, never involved.
Crowded at start, sat last, passed some weakened rivals. (See Incident Report)

Travelled very wide without cover in midfield, gained slightly closer to joint 5th some 3L back about 1000M out, 3-wide rounding home bend and into straight, loomed up to hold some chance over 200M out, effort short-lived.
Broke well sharing early pace on the rail, shifted one back to 4th coming onto home bend, switched off rail for a run for short-lived effort about 350M out, soon faded.
Shared early pace very wide, gained outright lead on rail over 950M out, came under pressure to hold place after straightening, swamped for lead inside final 200M.

In rear early before making steady headway along the rail reaching rear of midfield in 9th rounding home bend, saved ground turning into straight but tight on rail early on, forced to steady 150M out but fought on to the line.
Amongst leaders, shifted one back to share 3rd coming onto home bend, remained 3-wide into straight, kept on before weakening under pressure inside final 250M.
Prominent briefly after beginning from a poor draw travelling 4-wide, remained wide around home bend and into straight, fought on steadily without threatening.
Settled well back, saved ground on the inside turning in, forced to steady 350M out and baulked until the 200M, produced good late impression closing stages.
Moderate start, gradually recovered to prominent position, one back in 2nd 2-wide rounding home bend, faded under pressure inside final 350M.

Remained in last few despite ridden early, about 8L back in 12th rounding home bend, saved ground on the inside turning for home, baulked behind runners early in straight, produced good late impression inside final 150M.
In rear early, gradually improved along the rail to midfield in joint 7th, saved ground turning for home, baulked for a run in straight until late.

Settled well back from a poor draw, trailed the field rounding home bend, switched wide passing 600M for a run into straight, finished off the race well down the centre of the track to gain upper hand 200M out.

Not far off on rail early stages, drifted back steadily to worse than midfield onto home bend, dipped for a stride 600M out, ran on well under pressure inside final 300M to just fail to get up on line.

Prominent and wide early stages before taken back towards rear in 11th, 3-wide when dipped for a stride passing the 600M, dropped to last few into straight and tight between runners early on, ran on under pressure inside final 100M.
In rear early before making steady headway reaching joint 5th some 3L off the pace over 900M out, faded steadily from a similar position into home straight.

Went forward tracking leaders, pushed along 500M but couldn't pick up pace to challenge, weakened rapidly 250M.

Bumped shortly after start, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, kept on same pace to the line.

Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide towards rear, 6 lengths or so back, angled out 500M, made no progress in straight.

Moderately away from the widest draw, raced better than midfield but trapped wide, moved a bit closer after passing 1000M, 2nd on turn, 2 wide, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Jumped awkwardly and made contact, raced 3 wide in midfield, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.

Sat on pace, traveled strongly, responded nicely when asked.

Sat in front of midfield on the rail, never impress.
Sat outside the lead, weakened final furlong.
Sent forward to lead, weakened and faded in the Straight.
Sat on pace, weakened in the Straight.
Sat at the rear, stayed on.

Taken back from its wide draw, never involved.

Sat worse than midfield on the rail, no clear run in the Straight.
Settled worse than midfield 2 wide, ran on nicely.
Sat midfield 3 wide, never a threat.

Crowded after the start, settled down in midfield, steadied 650M, wide into straight before running on nicely for 3rd under a big weight.

Slowly into stride and shuffled back, detached and pushed along widest 500m out, late headway.

Sat behind midfield, failed to respond, never a threat.
Settled midfield, no impression made.

In touch with leaders, improving to challenge when bumped by runner-up 200m out, ran on well.
Held up from wide draw, some late headway, never dangerous.
Prominent, in share of lead 400m out, no extra and faded final 150m.
Across to lead from wide draw, joined and under pressure 400m out, weakened quickly home straight.
In touch with leaders, briefly short of room turning into home straight, stayed on but lacked pace to challenge.
Mid-field, tight for room when making headway 200m out and bumped third, ran on strongly once clear, just failed.
Waited with after sluggish start, short of room in rear 150m out, no impression.
Tracked pace, chased leaders three wide into home straight, ridden to lead 150m out, just held on.
Made contact shortly after start, raced 2 wide towards rear, 3 wide approaching 700M, 5 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, one-paced in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, raced 3 wide in midfield, very wide turning in, finished off evenly.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight to take 2nd.
Taken back from gate 11, raced at tail, 6 lengths or so back on turn, made minor progress in straight.

Jumped with them, raced prominently, 2 wide, allowed rival to cross after passing 700M, unable to maintain position 500M, eased early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.) (Small lacerations to the left hind pastern and heel.)
Moderately away from the widest draw, raced 3 wide behind midfield, commenced move 450M, very wide turning in, one-paced in the run home.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, headed near 750M, 2nd on turn, retook the lead early in straight, peaked and headed 200M, weakened gradually final 100M.

Began smartly from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, travelled keenly in the middle stages, angled out 450M, 3 wide turning in, hit the front 150M, kept on very well to the line and scored.

Moderately away from a wide draw, trapped 4 wide in midfield early, sent forward 1100M, 3 wide after entering the back straight, took the lead 750M, 2 wide from 600M, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened final 50M.
Made contact shortly after start, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, dropped to midfield 700M, angled out 400M, kept on evenly in straight.
Away with them, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, showed good response early in straight, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening.
Commenced well, raced 2 wide in midfield early, dropped towards rear 600M, 4 lengths or so back turning in, closed off well without threatening.
Settled midfield 2 wide, held up top of the Straight, closed off strongly once in the clear, just missed.
Settled behind midfield 2 wide, ran on okay.
Sat in front of midfield, limited response in the Straight.
Sat towards the rear, stayed on.
Sat on pace, nothing extra in the Straight.
Sat outside the leader, kept on okay.
Crowded at the start, sat last, made some late ground.
Jumped well, showed good speed to lead, kept on nicely, just held on.
Sat behind the leaders, one pace to the line.
Sat at the rear, never a threat.
Caught 3 wide near the rear, nothing extra.
Settled worse than midfield, still very green.
Travelled 3-wide without cover in midfield, weakened under pressure from around home bend. (Lame)

Pressed forward from a poor draw before settling one-out-one-back, remained just over 2L back in 4th most of the way to 500M, commenced move 3-wide rounding home bend but could find nothing in straight.
Began well from the one draw settling just off the pace on rail, angled out approaching final turn to challenge, ran on well to hit the front momentarily before caught a stride later near the line.
Began awkwardly settling in last few, commenced move 3-wide over 400M out and widest into straight, finished off the race strongly down the apparent fast strip inside final 200M.

Pressed forward from a wide draw to join the leader passing the winning post the first time, remained in 2-wide 2nd before hitting the front from the tiring pace-setter 400M out, led until swamped close to home.
Travelled keenly at the back after beginning from a wide draw, came under pressure about 400M out running wide into straight, only ran past well-beaten runners.
Niggled at early before tightened and settled in midfield on rail, came under pressure from 700M out and given reminders 400M out, saved ground for 6th into straight but soon found no extra.
Gradually took up running from a middle draw, held slender lead until headed over 400M out, weakened under pressure after straightening.

Began moderately settling at the back and waited with, commenced move on the bend over 400M out, tight between runners upon straightening, ran on well inside final 200M to gain upper hand final strides.
Prominent early, gradually settled in rear of midfield 2-wide between runners, commenced move entering home straight and ran on well inside final 150M to be nearest at finish.
Taken back from wide draw, settled last 7Ls off the pace, driven wide into straight then closed off fastest under top weight, just missed.
Away well from draw 2, sat 2-wide in mid-division, stayed on moderately over final 300M but not able to pose serious threat to first three.
Off to a good start, sat behind leaders 4th on settling, always in touch, kept battling to the line but never going the pace to challenge first three.
Jumped on terms, restrained to race in midfield along the fence, in touch behind leaders 400M, kept on steadily to the line but couldn't find an extra gear to challenge.
Caught racing wide without cover in midfield, failed to respond when placed under pressure 350M, eased when final 200M. (Lame LF leg.)
Jumped only fairly, settled in second half of the field holding 8th spot, wide into straight before running home fairly. (Jockey could offer no explanation for the disappointing performance.)
Chased leader, held 3rd from 400M, tried hard but flattened passing 150M, lost several places near line.
Taken back to a rearward spot from draw 12, hung in throughout the event and made contact with the running rail several times, couldn't run on passing 400M.
From draw 1 moved up to track leader, quickly took over on straightening, kept going final 200M and pulled out all the stops to hold off runner-up late stages.
Restrained to race near the rear 6Ls back, closed off one paced. Never dangerous.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, ended up near last racing keenly, shuffled to last turning home, failed to run on.
Fast away and soon crossed to the lead, set good pace early and middle stages, headed early straight but kept battling to finish a creditable 3rd.
Out in line, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared approaching 100M, finished off evenly.
Shifted out at start and made contact, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made no impression in straight.
Commenced well, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually close home.
Away well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Began awkwardly and crowded, raced 2 wide at rear, 7 lengths or so back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Began well from a wide draw, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide, same position on turn, peaked early in straight, kept on same pace to the line.
Moderately away from gate 12, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, peaked early in straight, weakened and eased final 150M.
Bumped start, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Away with them, raced behind midfield on the outside, commenced move 400M, 4 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to take 2nd, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Began well from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 50M, weakened gradually close home.
Out with rest, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out 350M, finished off strongly to score, won by a narrow margin.
Slightly slow out, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and finished off well to take a place.
Away well, raced better than midfield on the inside, moved closer on turn, angled out approaching 400M, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening.
Out with rest, trapped wide in midfield early, found a 2 wide spot near 500M, angled out 350M, very wide into straight, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Jumped awkwardly, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out 400M, very wide into straight, made some headway in straight.
Out with rest, raced 3 wide with no cover, 1 to 2 lengths back, wider turning in, weakened gradually in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced 3 wide in midfield early, 2 wide from 500M, unable to obtain clear run until final 100M, kept on evenly to the line.
Taken back from gate 12, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress in straight.
Began only fairly from gate 1, raced behind midfield on the inside, unbalanced near 600M, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Began well, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 150M.
Jumped awkwardly and crowded, raced 2 wide better than midfield, carried wider 400M, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Away with them, raced towards rear on outer, very wide into straight, failed to make any progress in the run home.
Jumped with them, raced at tail, 7-1/2L back turning in, made some headway in straight.
Crowded shortly after start, raced 2 wide in midfield early, found rail near 500M, showed very good response in straight, took the lead 150M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Bumped out of stall, settled in mid-field, ridden from top of home straight, never a factor.
Dropped out from wide draw, pushed along wide into home straight, ran on well final 200m.
Checked briefly on first bend, three wide in mid-field, struggled to hold position on final bend, no impression.
Bumped shortly after start, waited with in rear, outpaced on the bend, some late gains.
Bumped exiting stalls, caught up to press leader on first bend, ridden 300m out, shifted out and weakened final 200m.
Shifted out and bumped leaving stalls, tracked leaders, pushed along to chase leaders on final bend, stayed on but no threat to winner.
Bumped shortly after leaving stalls, raced in rear, pushed along widest into home straight, no impression.
Shifted in and bumped leaving stalls, raced wide throughout from wide draw without cover, weakened final 200m.
Sluggish start, settled in rear of mid-field, headway from top of home straight, stayed on for pressure from 200m.
Tracked pace, well placed into home straight, gave ground final 200m and eased.
Showed good speed to lead, pressed in front after first bend, headed by winner 150m out and soon weakened.
Crowded at start, rail position in mid-field, strong run to lead 200m out, on top from there, won readily.
Ridden along to lead on the rail, weakened inside 150M.
Began well, gradually settled on-pace on the rail after the leader, saved ground on turn, quickly took over on straightening, kept on very strongly to the line.
Jumped awkwardly, sat in front of midfield on the rail, travelled keenly in the middle stages, minor progress made in the Straight.
Sat on pace 2 wide, travelled keenly, limited response when asked. (See incident Report.)
Sat towards the rear 2 wide, brought widest into the straight, closed off strongly to claim 3rd. (Lame left front.)
Settled midfield 2 wide, angled out approaching 400M, stayed on fairly.
Sat at the rear 2 wide, never a threat.
Settled midfield 3 wide without cover, commenced move near 700M, 3rd in the turn, challenged from 300M out, kept on well in straight but no match for the runaway winner.
Sat on pace 2 wide, weakened in the straight.
Sat midfield 2 wide, moved 3 wide in the turn, stayed on for pressure.
Sat midfield on the rail, never involved.
Was crowded shortly after the start, sat at the rear on the rail, little progress made in the Straight.
Mid-division, drifted left under pressure from 300m out, stayed on but lacked pace to challenge.
Tracked leaders, weakened 200m out.
Made running, joined halfway, led outright again 300m out, headed 50m out, no extra.
In touch with leaders, pushed along and wide off bend, one paced.
Mid-field, outpaced 300m out, stayed on final 150m, unable to reach leaders.
Tracked pace three wide, forward move bend, weakened home straight.
Raced in last after sluggish start, badly hampered when improving up rail over 200m out, lost all chance and allowed to coast home.
Mid-field, headway up rail when short of room behind leader 200m out, ran on well once clear over 100m out.
In rear after hampered leaving stalls, bumped rival when switched over 200m out, one paced and unable to challenge.
Very wide early from high draw, pushed up to join leader halfway, chased that rival from top of home straight, no extra closing stages.
Held up from high draw, still plenty to do 300m out, ran on well final 150m, unable to reach leaders.
Tracked leaders, checked briefly 300m out and switched, challenged soon after, led 50m out.

Away well, raced 2 wide in midfield, sent forward after entering the back straight, took the lead near 650M, led by 2Ls turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened final 50M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began awkwardly and made contact, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 3 wide after passing 500M, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Began only fairly, raced 2 wide towards rear, bumped near 1000M, 3 wide after passing 850M, moved a bit closer in the middle stages, very wide turning in, made no impression in straight.
Jumped with them, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, 2 lengths behind the leader turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, took the lead, headed 650M, unable to maintain position 500M, weakened and eased early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Commenced well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, angled out 500M, finished off very strongly to score.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, very wide into straight, made some progress in the run home.
Bumped start, raced at rear on the outside, bumped near 1000M, 9 lengths or so back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, eased final furlong.
Jumped well, raced in midfield on the inside, angled out 400M, finished off well to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Bumped on jumping, raced at rear, 8 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced towards rear on the inside, 7-1/2L back turning in, made some headway in straight.
Taken back from gate 11, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made very good progress in straight to take 2nd.
Settled at the rear on the rail, 2 wide in the turn, made good ground from the back in last 150M.
Sat midfield 2 wide, was steadied near 400M, angled out for a run turning in for home, kept on fairly.
Settled on pace 2 wide, limited response when asked, weakened in the final 150M. (See incident report.)
Sat on pace on the rail, pushed along 350M out, stayed on well final 200M to take a place.
Settled towards the rear 2 wide, closed off strongly after obtaining clear running.
Sat in front of the midfield on the rail, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, not much impression made.
Sat in front of the rear on the rail, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, ran home one-paced.
Sat slightly in front of midfield 3 wide without cover, turned very wide into the Straight, was never dangerous. (See incident report.)
Sent forward to take the lead on the rail, led by 2L turning in and all the way to score.
Travelled wide without cover in last few from a poor draw, commenced move out wide rounding home bend and the widest into straight, ran on well down the centre of the track to snatch 3rd late.
Ridden from a poor draw to soon take up 2nd 2-wide alongside race leader, came to challenge under pressure upon straightening but unable to peg back the winner throughout.
Remained in last few after moderate start, saved ground turning in for home, unable to quicken under pressure and made no further impression inside final 150M.
Soon taken to the back from the widest draw for rails run, trailed the field to the 200M, ran on well for very good late impression.
Settled towards rear on rail after moderate start, unable to make any impression under pressure in straight, beaten when hampered over 50M out.
Travelled wide without cover in midfield after beginning from a poor draw, made headway inside the 850M reaching 4th some 2L back, soon weakened in home straight.
Tightened at start gradually settling over 3L 4L back on rail in 6th in midfield, saved ground on the inside turning in, ran home one-paced.
Settled in rear of midfield 3-wide without cover, tight between runners upon straightening early in straight, ran home one-paced.
Began well settling within 2L of pace in 3rd on rail, saved ground in a similar position turning into straight, ran home one-paced.
Settled better than midfield holding 5th over 2L back, kept on same pace from a similar position into home straight.
Made all from the one draw, shifted off the rail turning into straight, hung on well.
Settled in worse than midfield, saved ground turning in for home but dropped out tamely.
Jumped only fairly, settled further back in the field than intended, pressed along 450M but failed to run on in the straight.
Strode forward, checked 1500M by a rival who was crossing to the lead, sat outside leader throughout in a fast run race, run ended 250M and weakened away.
Settled down 2-wide in midfield, 5Ls off leader in a race run at good tempo, responded well on straightening and moved up to 3rd briefly, peaked on its run 150M.
Reserved in mid-division along the inside, little change in position to the straight, ran home steadily to go 4th near line.

Driven forward, tracked leader going into the first turn, remained in same position heading into home straight, outsprinted by rivals from 250M, no extra final stages. (Jockey reminded to ride out to the finish.)
From wide draw taken across behind runners, reserved in last 8Ls off the good pace, swung wide into straight, closed off fastest to claim 2nd close home. Nearest finish.
From draw 1 settled down nicely behind first four in a race run in good tempo, quickened up impressively on straightening, led near 200M and kicked clear for a comfortable victory.
From draw 11 rushed forward to take the lead, set good pace middle stages, led to nearing 200M, no extra and dropped out rapidly to finish last.
From wide draw take across behind runners, given a waiting ride at the back 7Ls off the good pace, driven along 500M, wide into straight but failed to pick up. Never threatened.
Jumped only fairly, dropped back to race in a rearward position 7Ls off the good pace, ran on only fairly final 300M. Never looked likely.
Jumped only fairly, chased leaders 2-wide, kept going well turning home, no match for winner's acceleration, went 2nd briefly near 150M but couldn't hold off runner up late stages.
Made contact at start, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on evenly in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Away well, raced prominently, 2 wide, allowed rival to cross near 700M, 1-1/2L back turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside, 5 lengths back, same margin back on turn, made no impression in straight.
Shifted in at start and made contact, raced 3 wide in midfield, there to turn, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.
Made contact at start, raced behind midfield on the outside, 4 lengths back turning in, kept on same pace in straight.
Jumped well from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/4L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 50M.
Began well from gate 10, trapped very wide in midfield early, moved a bit closer after passing 850M, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Moderately away, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, 5 lengths back, saved ground on turn, made good progress early in straight, peaked 100M, ran on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Crowded start, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, 1/4L back turning in, finished off strongly to score.
Away with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, difficult to settle throughout, 4 lengths back turning in, finished off well to make frame.
Shifted in at start and made contact, raced in midfield on the inside, angled out 600M, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, made some progress thereafter.
Jumped awkwardly, raced better than midfield on the outside early, moved closer 1000M, took the lead 900M, led by 1/2L turning in, kept on very well in straight and scored.
Taken back from gate 12, raced at rear on the inside, 5 lengths or so back turning in, no clear run until final 100M, made some progress thereafter.
Fast into stride, sent forward to take the lead, headed near 900M, 2nd on turn, weakened early in straight, eased final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Crowded start and stumbled, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out 500M, made minor progress early in straight, peaked 150M, kept on same pace to the line.
Jumped with them, raced prominently, 2 wide, allowed rival to cross 850M, angled out 550M, 1/2L back turning in, kept on evenly in straight.

Began well from a wide draw, taken back to race towards rear on the outside, moved closer after passing 950M, made contact 600M, 2 lengths or so back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Jumped well, raced better than midfield on the inside, angled out 550M, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Taken back from gate 13, raced at rear on the outside, hard ridden after passing 500M, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Crowded start, raced behind midfield on the outside, 5 lengths or so back turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.
Out with rest, positioned 2 wide slightly better than midfield, angled out 600M, 1 to 2 lengths back turning in, made minor progress early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, wider from 600M, 3 lengths back turning in, no clear run until final 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Began only fairly and made contact, raced behind midfield on the inside, 3 lengths back turning in, unable to obtain clear run until approaching final 100M, finished off strongly to take 2nd.
Tracked leaders, took the lead on bend against rail, pressed on 300m out, headed by winner 100m out, stayed on for pressure.
Bumped shortly after leaving stall, outpaced in rear, unable to improve position.
Bumped shortly after start, keen early, settled in rear of mid-field, effort 400m out, never a factor.
Shifted out and bumped leaving stalls, held up, under pressure on the bend, pushed along widest 200m out, little impression.
Raced in mid-division, lacked pace to hold position from top of home straight, dropped away quickly 200m out.
Mid division, chased leaders on bend, clear run final 300m, stayed on well but no threat to leaders.
Tracked leaders, ridden on bend to go second, lacked pace to challenge leader in home straight, weakened final 200m.
Showed speed to get across, ran green, ran out abruptly 550m out and lost ground, strong run in home straight, won comfortably.
Sluggish start, rail position throughout, ridden on bend to chase leaders, no extra final 100m.
Settled in mid-field, pushed along into home straight, lost balance 200m out, never on terms with leaders.
Prominent, badly hampered when taken wider by winner 550m out and lost ground, ran on well final 200m.
Bumped out of stall, dropped out from wide draw, still in rear top of home straight, no impression.
Slowly away, under pressure to race in touch, briefly tight for room 300m out, unable to get on terms with leaders.
Shifted out and bumped at start, waited with in rear, hampered top of home straight, ran on strongly but too late.
Settled on pace on the rail, hit the front under pressure early in the straight, had every chance.
Settled in front of the rear on the rail, save ground in the turn, no contention.
Ridden along to lead 3 wide, gradually dropped to 3rd in the turn, weakened and faded in the last 200M.
Sat in front of the rear 3 wide, never a threat.
Sat in front of the rear 2 wide, angled out 350M, finished off strongly to take 2nd, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Ridden along to sit behind the leader 2 wide, weakened in the straight.
Sat midfield 2 wide, was held up between 400M to 300M, no room for clear running near 150M, not fully tested in the majority of the straight.
Sat midfield 3 wide, ran on well under pressure inside final 350M, kept on well to hold off the challenger.
Jumped fairly, settled rear 2 wide, no clear run early in straight, closed off nicely in the final 100M
Sat handy 2 wide, was held up between the 400M to 300M, one pace when asked.
Sat midfield on the rail, failed to respond in the home straight. (See incident report.)
Sat rear 3 wide, raced 4 wide in the turn, ridden along in the straight, kept on evenly.
Settled rear on the rail, no clear run early in the straight, passed some weakened rivals.
Sat midfield 4 wide, raced very wide and without cover throughout, closed off nicely to take fourth
Mid-division, had to wait for run 300m out, angled out after again short of room 150m out, stayed on.
Held up last after slow start, had to wait for run up rail 300m out, staying on when bumped by rival 75m out.
Raced prominently, keen, led over 200m out, no extra after headed 150m out, hampered 75m out.
Waited with in rear, angled wide 400m out, strong run to lead close home.
Made early running, headed after 400m, remained handy, weakened 300m out.
Raced wide, in touch with leaders from halfway, effort turning into home straight, fading when badly hampered 75m out.
Mid-field, improved to challenge 200m out, outpaced by leaders when hampered and tight for room final 100m.
Soon prominent, led after 400m, headed over 200m out, weakened.
Rear of mid-division, headway wide over 400m out, sustained run to lead over 100m out, headed close home.
Mid-field, didn't travel with much fluency, outpaced and left behind home straight.
Tracked leaders, pushed along into home straight, weakened.
Jumped in the air as stalls opened and unseated jockey.
Keen and bumped twice early, three wide in mid-division, headway to challenge 150m out, every chance when hung right final 100m, hit on head by rival rider's whip 50m out and became unbalanced.
Held up from high draw, widest and still in rear into home straight, stayed on well final 200m.
Jumped well from gate 12, raced in midfield on outer, similar position on turn, kept on well early in straight, no extra final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, showed good response in straight, took the lead 50M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner close home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Crowded start, raced 2 wide towards rear, there to turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, finished off evenly.
Taken back to race 3 wide behind midfield, very wide turning in, weakened early in straight, eased thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out 500M, finished off well to make frame, nearest finish.
Began well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Bumped start, raced at rear on the outside, 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, kept on evenly in straight.
Jumped well, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, angled out early in straight, cleared 300M, took the lead 100M, peaked on run 50M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Average to begin, positioned 2 wide in midfield, 3 lengths or so back turning in, finished off strongly, led close home.
Bounded on jumping and lost ground, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on same pace in straight.
Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run in straight, not able to test properly.
Jumped awkwardly from the widest draw, raced prominently on the outside, there to turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Jumped with them, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.
Sat midfield 2 wide, angled out near 550M, kept on well early in the straight, ran on evenly. (See incident report.)
Settled midfield on the rail, switched out rounding the turn, ran on well in the straight.
Sat 3 wide close behind leader, failed to response when asked.
Sat behind midfield 2 wide, raced very wide in to straight, finished off nicely.
Sat in front of midfield 2 wide, saved some grounds on the home turn, angled out in the straight to obtain clear running, finished off strongly in the final 150M, won by a short head.
Sat in front of the rear, made some ground.
Settled at the rear, never impressed.
Settled on pace 2 wide, badly crowded near 350M, kept on evenly.
Settled handy on the rail, checked near 350M, not much impression made. (See incident report.)
Jumped awkwardly, sat behind midfield on the rail, one pace to the finish.
Led on the rail, weakened in the early straight, faded. (Performance was unacceptable, must trial.) (See incident report.)
Sat handy 2 wide, angled out in the turn to obtain clear running, responded nicely when asked, stay on well, just beaten by a short margin.
Jumped fairly, sat worse than midfield 2 wide, minor progress made in the Straight.
Crowded at start settling towards rear in 10th in strung-out field, switched very wide into straight, ran on dourly under pressure but found the winner too strong.

Soon took up running 3-wide, obtained rails run 1600M out before ceded advantage for 3rd 1400M out, chased leader into straight holding good chance early on, unable to sustain effort and folded up inside final 120M.

Well there on rail gradually settled in 1L 2nd around first bend, strode forward to take up running in fast pace 1400M out, led until narrowly headed 500M out, soon weakened out of contention after straightening. (Tactic questioned)

Pressed forward from the widest draw, 4-wide in midfield onto first bend, further headway to be just over 3L back in 5th 3-wide without cover in back straight, dropped away quickly from approaching home straight 500M out.

Broke well from a poor draw shuffled back to 7th into back straight over 3L away, gained slightly closer to 5th on top of home bend, kept on same pace without quickening early in straight and faded inside the 150M.
Settled in worse than midfield, commenced move entering home straight swinging very wide, ran on steadily under pressure to hold every chance 150M out, unable to sustain effort late.
Prominent in 3rd becoming 4th over 2L back in back straight, commenced move when one-out-one-back position rounding home bend, held every chance early in straight until overhauled 150M out.
Jumped awkwardly losing ground, travelled in last few and waited with, commenced move 3-wide 650M out swinging one of the widest into straight, ran on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Began well before settling just some 4L back in 6th on rail, became 7th but in a similar spot over 1000M out, kept on under pressure early in straight until eased quickly out of contention 200M out.

Sat towards rear 3 wide with cover, made steady progress in the straight, closed off well.

Unseated rider soon after start.
Slightly slow out and crowded, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.

Bumped start, raced 2 wide in midfield, travelled keenly throughout the early and middle stages, angled out 550M, 2 to 3 lengths back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.

Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, made some headway in straight.
Taken back from gate 7, raced towards rear, 4 lengths back turning in, finished off well to take 2nd without threatening the winner.

Sat handy on the rail behind the leader, travelled well in the home turn but failed to respond in the straight when asked, not much impression. (Substantial blood in trachea.) (Mild abrasion to left front leg.) (See incident report.)
Sat behind midfield on the rail, angled out in the home turn, took the lead at 150M, only to be caught in final strides.
Sat behind midfield on the rail, saved ground in the home turn, lay out near 150M, stay on ok.
Raced on pace 3 wide without cover, limited response when asked under whip.
Was checked in the beginning stages, sat midfield 2 wide, ran on evenly.
Settled in front of midfield 3 wide with cover, responded well in the early home straight, kept on despite laying out final furlong.
Sat handy 2 wide, badly held up in the home straight, no clear room for running until the final furlong, never seriously tested.
Sat last 2 wide, failed to make progress in the straight.
Ridden along and chased leader 2 wide, weakened and faded in the final 200M.
Sat towards rear on the rail, made steady progress in the home turn, ran on strongly under pressure to get the win in final strides.
Ridden along to take the lead on the rail, weakened and faded in the final 100M.
Settled rear 3 wide, made some late ground.
Sat behind midfield 3 wide with cover, turned very wide into the home straight, ran on evenly.
Settled towards rear 2 wide, was able to pass some weakened rivals in the straight.
Led or disputed lead after beginning from a wide draw, swamped for 2nd place passing the 200M, faded under pressure.
Soon taken back from a poor draw, raced freely between runners and checked leaving the 600M, tight between runners early in straight, produced some late impression inside final 100M.

Began awkwardly losing ground, soon recovered to just worse than midfield mostly in 9th on rail, travelled keenly home bend and forced to steady 600M out, not much room early in straight, obtained a clear run 260M out, did best work late.
Travelled keenly in midfield, 4-wide without cover when slightly worse rounding home bend, soon weakened under pressure in straight.
Broke well before settling about 2L off the pace in 5th, slightly further back on rail rounding home bend, saved ground turning in for home, faded under pressure in straight.
Taken well back from the widest draw, snuck up on rail entering home straight, no clear run between the 300 and 200M and forced to steady and switch in for a run, finished off the race well.
Settled within 3L of pace in midfield, in similar position entering home straight, commenced move inside the 350M and ran on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Began fairly and soon came to join the leaders on rail, taken one back passing the 900M, did not find much room early in straight, ran home one-paced inside final 250M.
Well there early but gradually dropped towards rear despite niggling along, 5-wide without cover in last few making home bend, kept on steadily without quickening near the centre of the track.
Began moderately travelling towards rear, raced freely behind runners on top of home bend over 500M out, not much room in straight and checked inside the 150M, made no impression thereafter.
Raced 3-wide without cover just better than midfield, weakened out of contention inside final 250M.
Prominent, held slender lead from about 1000M out, joined in the front after straightening, folded up quicky inside final 300M.
Soon dropped to last few, picked up to just worse than midfield 1000M out racing 3-wide around home bend, one-paced under pressure in straight.
Settled one-out-one-back, commenced move entering straight, hit the front inside the 300M kicking over 1L clear shortly afterwards, held on to the line.
Taken back to race towards rear, 11 lengths back in the middle stages, commenced move 600M, 5 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame, no threat to the first few.
Slightly slow out, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress in straight.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out 500M, made no progress in straight.
Moderately away, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, crowded near 200M, weakened final 100M.
Began well, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, 2 wide turning in, showed some response early in straight.
Taken back from gate 13, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside, 7 lengths or so back turning in, failed to make any progress in straight.
Away well, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, 6 lengths or so back, moved closer along the rail on turn, kept on well in straight to take 2nd.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 8 lengths or so back turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.
Jumped awkwardly, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, 2 to 3 lengths back turning in, made some progress early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened thereafter.
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced in midfield on the outside, 3 to 4 lengths back turning in, closed off well to take a place without threatening the first two.

Average to begin, raced better than midfield on the inside, angled out 500M, 2 lengths or so back turning in, showed very good response in straight, took the lead 100M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Jumped with them, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed approaching 100M, weakened thereafter.
Away with them, raced prominently, 2 wide, 1 out 1 back on turn, no clear run early in straight, weakened final 300M. (Roarer.)

Made contact at start, raced better than midfield on the outside, moved a bit closer after passing 1000M, shared lead from 700M, hard ridden after turning in, kept on well in straight but still headed 150M, finished 2nd.

Bumped start, trapped wide, a length or so back, sent forward after passing 1250M, took the lead 1150M, shared lead with rival from 700M, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 200M, weakened gradually final 150M.

Began well from a poor draw travelling prominent 3-wide early, dropped to 5th over 3L back first bend before gaining to 4th in back straight, came under pressure to hold some chance early in straight, lost 2nd late.

Jumped well, restrained to race in mid-division, driven along 450M, closed off nicely final 200M to take 3rd close home.
Quickly into stride, chased leaders along the 2-path, lay out making the home turn and in the straight, fought on final 300M but couldn't quicken enough to challenge winner.
Driven forward to be chasing leader, fought hard to stay in contention early straight, couldn't sustain run 200M, weakened.
Jumped only fairly, settled down in midfield along the fence, 5Ls to make up 400M, kept on steadily for 4th.

Taken back to race 2 wide towards rear, 3 wide after entering the back straight, angled out 400M, very wide turning in, made very good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, there to turn, made good progress early in straight, peaked on run 50M, ran on evenly to the line.
Taken back to race at tail, 5 lengths or so back turning in, very wide into straight, finished off strongly, nearest finish.
Crowded start, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off very strongly to score by a neck.

Taken back from the widest draw, raced 3 wide towards rear early, moved a bit closer after passing 1000M, 4 lengths back in the middle stages, angled out 400M, very wide turning in, finished off evenly.
Bumped start, raced in 2nd, a length or so back, shared lead from 600M, peaked and headed 200M, weakened and eased final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began only fairly and bumped, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, made minor progress early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened gradually final 100M.

Jumped well, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, a bit closer on turn, angled out 400M, took the lead 200M, kept on well but unable to hold off the first two final 50M.

Began well from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length turning in, kept on well in straight to hold off the challenger.

Fast into stride, raced in midfield on the outside, 4 lengths or so back turning in, one-paced in the run home.

Three wide in mid-field, forced to steady on heels on bend, effort 350m out, no extra final 150m.
Crowded at start, dropped to rear on bend, pushed along wide into home straight, no impression.
Held up, had to wait for run turning into home straight, switched 200m out for clear running, stayed on for pressure.
Raced three wide without cover, chased along early, struggled to hold position on bend, soon well held.
Improved to race in touch with leaders before halfway, good progress on bend, quickened 400m out, strong run to lead close home.

Sat behind the leader 2 wide, took the lead near 300M, finished off nicely under whip and scored.
Ridden along to lead, one paced when asked.
Settled towards rear 3 wide, raced keenly near the 1200M, made good progress in the final furlong.
Sat towards rear on the rail, saved ground on the turn, kept on fairly in the straight.

Settled handy on the rail, stayed on evenly.
Ridden along to lead, weakened in the straight. (See incident report.)
Settled midfield 2 wide, hung out in the turn, not much impression made. (See incident report.)
Jumped awkwardly, sat toward rear 3 wide, raced keenly near 800M, ran on evenly.
Pressed forward from the widest draw eventually crossing in fast tempo to 2-wide position 1000M out, came to join the leader from 600M out but unable to sustain effort inside final 300M.
Soon taken well back for rails run from a poor draw, saved ground on the inside turning into straight but did not find much room early on, made no further impression.
Very slowly away, trailed the field virtually throughout.
Settled mainly in 5th on rail, did not find much room between runners early in straight, kept on same pace under pressure without quickening inside final 200M.
Jumped awkwardly settling in midfield, hampered 600M out and lost ground, made no impression in home straight.
Soon taken back from a poor draw, widest runner turning into home straight, ran on down the centre of the track to be nearest at finish. (Blood in trachea)
Settled in midfield on rail, switched off rail approaching home turn over 500M out but baulked in straight until inside the 200M, finished off the race well to snatch race final strides.

Soon recovered to 6th from moderate start travelling keenly at times in back straight, in similar position turning in for home, tight between runners early on, made up some late ground inside final 100M.
Restrained in 4th just over 2L back, became some 5L off the fast pace over 1000M out, about 1L back 3-wide turning in for home, ran on to hit the front over 200M out only to be headed 50M out.
Settled towards rear on rail, saved ground turning in for home, snuck up to within 2L of leaders 200M out but unable to sustain effort close to home.
Ridden to lead, quickened up the tempo inside the 1200M when challenged, steadied up the pace on top of home bend and joined approaching home turn, folded up quickly inside final 200M.
Settled wide in rear from a poor draw, made good headway around the field home bend swinging 5-wide in 1.5L 5th into straight, ran home one-paced.

Well there from a poor draw settling in 3rd, over 4L behind pacemakers about 1000M out, back within 2L of speed in 3rd when pace slackened home bend, ran on in straight to hit the front 50M out only to be caught final strides.
Soon taken back towards rear, ran home one-paced under pressure.
Out with the line, drifted back to a rearward spot on settling, had difficulty obtaining clear running 250M and finished the race off only fairly thereafter.
Towards the rear early stages, failed to pick up passing 400M, soon out of contention.
Raced in midfield, left flat footed when the race got serious from 400M. Never threatened.
Stayed close to the pace, led nearing 200M, kept on well but no match for the fast finishing winner final stages.
Away in line, dropped back to race at the rear, closed off nicely final 300M to claim 4th.
Shortly after the start became unbalance when bumped with rival, raced in mid-division throughout, kept on one paced final 300M. Never a serious threat.
Chased the pace, hard driven 400M but not going the pace to challenge leaders. (Jockey - may be better suited by being stepped up in distance for its next race start.)
From draw 14 chased the pace along the stands' rail, couldn't quicken enough final 400M and was always held by leaders.
Dropped back after the jump and moved across to the stand's rail immediately, waited with near last, quickened up impressively passing 300M to get past leader near 50M. Won going away.
Crowded after the start, raced in mid-division towards the stand's side, ran home one paced.
Fast away, raced just off the pace, challenged for the lead inside 400M, not going the pace of winner final 150M. Held on for 3rd just.
Jumped on terms, stayed close to leader but couldn't quicken passing 400M, weakened away mid-straight.
In midfield 3Ls off the pace, kept on steadily final 300M but lacked the extra gear to challenge leaders.
Set steady pace up front, couldn't hold off rivals nearing 200M, no extra and weakened rapidly closing stages.
Quickly into stride, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, kept on well in straight to hold off the challengers.
Jumped only fairly, raced 3 wide in midfield early, 2 wide on turn, no daylight early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened thereafter.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide better than midfield, made contact near 900M, 2 lengths or so back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong. (Roarer.)

Bumped start, sent forward to race prominently, inconvenienced shortly after passing 1300M, 3 wide in the middle stages, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong. (Blood in trachea.)
Taken back to race at rear on the inside, wider turning in, no clear run early in straight, cleared approaching 200M, finished off well to be nearest on line.

Jumped awkwardly, raced 2 wide behind midfield, found rail near 750M, 3 lengths or so back turning in, not enough room early in straight, cleared 150M, finished off strongly to take 2nd, nearest finish.

Jumped well from a wide draw, raced better than midfield but trapped wide, slightly taken back after passing 900M, 3 wide in midfield on turn, hard ridden from 300M, closed off well to make frame without threatening.

Made contact shortly after start, raced prominently, 2 wide, travelled keenly in the early and middle stages, 3/4L back turning in, showed no response early in straight, weakened and eased thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)

Bumped shortly after start, raced in midfield on the inside, hung out and made contact near 900M, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place, not quite able to challenge.
Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run until 150M, made minor progress thereafter.
Taken back to race 2 wide towards rear, a bit closer on turn, 3 wide turning in, made some progress in straight.
Taken back from gate 12, raced at rear on the outside, 5 lengths or so back turning in, made no impression in straight.
Away well, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide from 550M, showed very good response after turning in, took the lead approaching 250M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner late.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 8 lengths back, moved a bit closer on turn, very wide into straight, failed to make any progress.
Bumped on jumping, raced 2 wide towards rear, 6 lengths or so back, wider on turn, 3 to 4 lengths back turning in, kept on evenly in straight.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out near 550M, kept on well in straight without threatening the first few.
Taken back to race towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, no daylight early in straight, ran on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, kept on very well in straight to take a place, just beaten by a head.
Jumped well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.

Began well from the widest draw, trapped wide in midfield, no cover throughout, a bit closer turning in, finished off strongly, led close home.
Jumped only fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.

Began awkwardly and lost ground, raced at tail, 7 lengths or so back on turn, angled out early in straight, made contact near 200M, made very good progress final 100M to be nearest on line.
Began well from the widest draw, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, took the lead near 800M, led by a length turning in, peaked and headed 150M, weakened final 100M.

Began smartly from gate 9, took the early lead, headed near 800M, a length back on turn, showed some response early in straight, peaked on run 150M, weakened gradually final 100M.

Towards rear, ridden along to try to improve 700m out, one paced under pressure, passed a few tiring rivals late on.

Wide in mid-field, forward move bend, tended to hang right final 300m, one paced.

Led as anticipated, led slowly early before quickening up tempo middle stages, kept going well in the straight, headed by winner near 50M and just held on for 2nd.

Jumped only fairly, reserved in midfield along the fence, responded mildly on straightening, kept on without threat to first three.

Held up last from widest draw, pushed along wide into home straight, some late gains.

Sluggish start and crowded leaving stalls, rail position in mid-field, switched for clear run 200m out, stayed on but unable to reach leaders.

Raced in rear, still in rear top of home straight, lacked pace to challenge.

Settled in front of midfield, gave ground quickly near 300M (See Incident Report).
Sat midfield, traveled okay, ran on evenly to the line (See Incident Report).
Shared lead, weakened inside 200M, not much impression made.
Sat worse than midfield, one pace to the line.

Bumped start, raced 2 wide towards rear, moved a bit closer on turn, made some progress early in straight, no clear run 200M, cleared approaching 100M, finished off well to take a place.
Moderately away from gate 13, trapped wide in midfield, no cover for the majority of the race, 3 lengths or so back turning in, weakened early in straight when hard run took effect.
Taken back to race at rear on the inside, slightly improved along the rail on turn, kept to inside after straightening and made some progress.
Jumped awkwardly, raced behind midfield on outer, struck heels and blundered near 1000M, 4-1/2L back turning in, failed to close off in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)

Made contact at start, raced behind midfield on the inside, moved a bit closer after entering the back straight, angled out 500M, 3Ls back turning in, closed off strongly but just lost out to the winner in a ding-dong finish.

Made contact shortly after start, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out 300M, cleared approaching 200M, finished off strongly to win narrowly in a ding-dong battle.
Bumped on jumping, raced 3 wide towards rear, checked near 700M, 5 lengths or so back turning in, made no impression in straight.

Bumped start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, travelled keenly in the middle stages, moved closer 1000M, shared lead from 800M, peaked and headed early in straight, kept on evenly to 100M, weakened thereafter.

Moderately away from gate 14, raced prominently on the outside, travelled keenly in the early and middle stages, allowed rival to cross 800M, a length or so back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Jumped with them, raced at rear on the outside, 5 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Jumped well, raced in 2nd, bumped near 1100M, 1/2L back on turn, hit the front 300M, kept on very well to the line and scored.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, bumped and unbalanced near 1100M, 1 to 2 lengths back turning in, finished off evenly.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on outer, 6 lengths or so back turning in, failed to make any progress in straight.
Bumped shortly after start, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear run in straight.
Bumped start, taken back to race at tail, 6 lengths or so back turning in, no clear run early in straight, made good progress after passing 300M, blocked approaching final 50M.
Crowded shortly after start, raced 2 wide in midfield, travelled keenly in the middle stages, made contact 700M, 3 lengths back turning in, finished off well to take a place without threatening.

Began only fairly, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, moved a bit closer after passing 900M, made contact 700M, 1 to 2 lengths back turning in, closed off well to take 2nd without threatening the winner.

Shifted out at start and bumped, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed some response early in straight, made contact near 250M, weakened gradually final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Shifted out at start and bumped, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, peaked and headed 300M, weakened final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began awkwardly and crowded, raced 2 wide behind midfield, there to turn, one-paced in the run home.

Began well from a tricky draw, raced better than midfield on the outside, moved closer after passing 900M, a length or so back on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked on run 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Moderately away from a wide draw, trapped 4 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths or so back, 3 wide on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made contact shortly after start, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, same position on turn, one-paced in straight.
Began well from a wide draw, raced 2 wide, a length or so back, peaked on run 500M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from gate 9, raced at tail, commenced move 650M, took the lead 500M, led by a length turning in, peaked and headed near 150M, weakened thereafter.
Began smartly, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length, headed near 500M, 2nd turning in, took the lead 150M, kept on well but unable to hold off the first two close home.
Made contact at start, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened thereafter.
Taken back to race behind midfield on the outside, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, failed to make any progress in straight.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide approaching 500M, 2 lengths back turning in, finished off well to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground throughout, made little progress in straight.
Taken back to race at rear, 6 to 7 lengths back, last turning in, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, angled out 400M, kept on well until final 50M, ran on evenly to the line.
Away well, raced 3 wide in midfield, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Shifted in at start and made contact, raced 2 wide in midfield, awkwardly placed near 450M, 4 lengths back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Average to begin, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out approaching 500M, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, finished off very strongly to score.
Bumped heavily out of stalls, settled in mid-field, angled out wide on bend for clear run, no extra final 100m.
Pressed leader, pushed along to chase leader on bend, challenged and every chance from 300m out, stayed on at the one pace.
Three wide in mid-field without cover, struggled to hold position and taken widest on bend, eased once well held.
Ridden along to track leaders, keen under restraint, forced to steady on heels and shifted out 600m out, strong run to lead 150m out, on top from there.
Mid-field in rail position, angled off rail 500m out, reluctant to switch when hung in 300m out, stayed on for pressure from 200m.
Waited with towards rear, ridden top of home straight, angled out for clear run 150m out, stayed on steadily.
Dropped out from widest draw, forced to steady on heels 900m out, improved to rear of mid-field 700m out, lost balance on bend and 250m out, faded final.
Settled in rear of mid-field, angled out wide to make run 300m out, ran on well final 200m.
Shifted in and bumped heavily out of stalls, tracked leaders against rail, tight of room 200m out, stayed on well but no match for winner.
Made running, pressed on bend, responded to pressure top of home straight, headed 150m out, weakened final 50m.
Held up last after got its head up and lost ground at start, still in last place top of home straight, passed a few tiring rivals late on.
Sluggish away, ridden along from 800m out to hold position, rail position throughout, left behind home straight.
Settled midfield, traveled smoothly on the rail, responded well under whip (See Incident Report).
Settled behind midfield, improved into tight run near the 100M, made good ground thereafter.
Jumped awkwardly, sat rear, failed to respond.
Sat in front of midfield, traveled fairly, not much impression made.
Jumped only fairly, sat rear, traveled fairly, switched out rounding the turn, one pace to the finish.
Sat towards rear, improved from 400M, closed off nicely.
Settled towards rear, held up at the early straight, ran on evenly.
Ridden along to lead, near the 100M became unbalanced, gave ground slightly.
Settled midfield, traveled ordinarily, gave ground in the Straight (Bled).
Chased the leader, limited response when asked (See Incident Report).
Sat in front of midfield, weakened quickly inside 150M.
Sat worse than midfield, traveled okay, made steady progress.
Held up from wide draw, taken to outer 200m out, stayed on well.
Outpaced in rear, never competitive, passed some tiring rivals final 50m.
Waited with in rear, strong run from 200m out to lead close home despite edging right and making contact with runner-up near line.
Pressed leader, led briefly 150m out, weakened.
In touch with leaders, headway to challenge 200m out, no extra final 100m.
Towards rear, stayed on final 150m, lacked pace to reach leaders.
Mid-field, unable to get competitive under pressure home straight, short of room closing stages.
Made running, headed 200m out, weakened, eased final 50m.
Mid-field, under pressure 300m out, one paced and no real impression, checked briefly 150m out.
Raced in touch, on heels of leaders when running out of room 150m out, lost all chance.
Tracked leading pair, led 150m out, edged left final 100m, headed close home.
Mid-field, ridden turning into home straight, stayed on between horses, lacked pace to challenge.
Average to begin, raced better than midfield on the outside, 2-1/2L back turning in, kept on well in straight to take a place.

Jumped with them, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide, sat right behind the leader after entering the back straight, 2 wide turning in, kept on well early in straight, weakened final 100M. (Lame right front leg next day morning.)
Bumped start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, there to turn, finished off evenly.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, 2 lengths or so back on turn, angled out after passing 350M, finished off well, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Taken back to race behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M. (Bled.)
Began well, sent forward to take the lead, enjoyed the easy lead in the middle stages, led by 1-1/4L turning in, kept on well in straight, just able to hold off the challenger late.
Began only fairly and made contact, raced in midfield on the inside, 3 lengths back on turn, kept to inside after straightening and made some progress.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 7 to 8 lengths back on turn, made no impression in straight.
Moderately away, raced in midfield on the outside, 3 lengths or so back turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame.
Taken back from gate 11, raced at rear on the inside, 8 lengths back, a bit closer on turn, angled out 350M, finished off evenly.
Bumped start, raced towards rear on the outside, 6-1/2L back turning in, made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away with them, raced 3 wide in midfield, no cover for the majority of the race, very wide turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Sat on pace 2 wide, raced keenly, weakened in the Straight.
Jumped nicely and sent forward to lead, kept on nicely for 3rd.
Sat midfield on the rail, never threatened.
Sat outside the lead, weakened final 75M.
Sat just behind the leaders, just one pace when asked.
Sat last on the rail, made little impression.
Sat midfield 2 wide, closed off nicely, just couldn't hold off the winner
Settled midfield 3 wide, never involved.
Caught 3 wide no cover on pace, gave ground in the Straight.
Settled behind midfield 2 wide, angled out top of the Straight, stayed on strongly to score.
Not the quickest out, sat at the rear, made good ground on the inside early part of the Straight, held up final 100M and not tested. (See Incident Report)
Settled worse than midfield 3 wide, made minor progress.

Pressed forward from the widest draw travelling 3-wide around first bend, came to join race leader turning into back straight, disputed lead into home straight holding every chance until inside the 100M
Settled in midfield, lost ground when wideset into straight, ran about and a difficult ride early in straight, baulked for a run inside the 100M.
Settled wide with cover in last few, one of the widest turning for home at the back, went past a few well-beaten horses.

Shared early lead before taken some 3L back to 3rd onto first bend, 4L 5th into back straight and further away when pace quickened later on, came under pressure home bend and widest into straight, no extra inside final 150M.
Held up in midfield on rail, commenced move approaching home straight off the rail, ran on to hit the front briefly over 100M out only to be collared in final few strides.
Settled in last few, came under pressure to challenge entering straight, obtained a clear passage 200M out, quickened well to snatch victory near the line.
