Soon taken back to last few from a low draw, gained slightly closer early in back straight, came under pressure to hold place rounding home bend and saved ground into straight, one-paced.

Settled just over 2L off the pace in joint 3rd on rail, slightly further off the speed when pace quickened in back straight, commenced move under pressure turning for home, steadied for a run 200M out, kept on steadily to the line.
Taken well back and waited with, commenced move entering home straight, finished off the race well inside final 150M, did best work late.
Settled towards rear 3-wide without cover, gave ground on home bend.

Jumped well from the 2 draw, gained outright lead passing the winning post the first time and rails run shortly after, travelled keenly from the 1100M in back straight, maintained narrow advantage around home bend, swamped

Shared early pace on rail before taken one back onto first bend, drifted 2-wide to become one-out-one-back in joint 3rd into back straight, quickened inside the 200M to hold every chance only to be overhauled inside final 50M.
From wide draw taken across behind runners, raced at the rear along the inside, was finishing well but got held up between 150M-50M. Would have finished closer. (Lame next day.)
Settled towards the rear 6-7Ls back, closed off moderately on straightening but couldn't quite get to the leaders.
Bumped after the start then dropped back to race at the rear, had big task in hand leaving home turn before closing off strongly to take 3rd close home.
Chased leaders along the 2-path, responded well passing 300M and put in a strong challenge mid-straight, no match for fast finishing winner final stages.
Jumped fast then restrained to race in midfield, responded well early straight but peaked on its run 150M, in restricted room final 50M could not be fully ridden out.
Raced keenly early stages and ran wide making the first turn, continued to race wide without cover in a rearward spot for the remainder of the trip, unable to finish off in the straight.
Began fairly, sent forward to take the lead passing 850M, had 2Ls lead early straight, caught near 150M, no extra late stages
Settled behind midfield along the inside, made good headway between runners from 250M but was held up for clear running final 100M. Had more to offer.
Crowded after the start, raced keenly in a position behind midfield, ran on steadily final 300M to claim 5th.
Taken back to near last, saved ground along the inside before unleashing a strong turn of foot final 200M to win it in fine style.
Bumped at the start, settled ahead of midfield in 4th spot, couldn't finish off in the straight, (Jockey - would be better suited by being ridden in a more conservative manner.)
From draw 1 took up early running before relinquishing the lead near 800M, retook the lead 150M but lay in forcing jockey to stop riding momentarily. Edged out to 4th near line.
Out in line, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, commenced move approaching 400M, very wide turning in, failed to close off in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 200M, ran on evenly to the line.
Away with them, raced 2 wide at rear, 5 lengths or so back, very wide turning in, failed to make any progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began only fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out 350M, made minor progress early in straight, no clear run final 100M.
Slightly slow out, raced at rear on the inside, angled out approaching 350M, 6 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame, no threat to the first few.
Moderately away from gate 1, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, angled out after passing 350M, finished off very strongly to score.
Made contact shortly after start, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Out with rest, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Jumped with them, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on evenly in straight.
Began well, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 lengths or so back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Out with rest, raced 3 wide, a length or so back early, positioned 2 wide, 1/2L back after passing 1000M, took the lead 200M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner final 100M.
Made contact shortly after start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide turning in, kept on evenly until crowded near final 50M, eased thereafter.
Taken back from gate 12, raced at rear, 6 lengths or so back turning in, no clear run early in straight, found daylight 150M, finished off well to take 2nd.
Average to begin, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide after passing 650M, 5 lengths back turning in, finished off very strongly to score.
Slightly slow out, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 wide after passing 700M, 4 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to take a place.
Jumped well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 300M, ran on evenly to 150M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Taken back from gate 11, raced towards rear on the outside, 5 lengths or so back turning in, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Taken back from gate 13, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, a bit closer on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly to the line.

Jumped well, raced prominently on the inside early, allowed rival to cross near 900M, sat right behind the leader on turn, showed no response early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped with them, raced 3 wide, a length or so back, 2 wide on turn, hit the front 300M, peaked and headed 50M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on evenly in straight.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 150M.
Bounded on jumping, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, peaked and headed 300M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.) (Roarer.)
Began well from gate 1, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, dropped towards rear 600M, 5 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Reared as stalls open, missed break, raced at tail, 9 lengths back, still well back on turn, weakened early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.) (Irregular heart rhythm.)

Began well from the widest draw, races slightly better than midfield on the outside, no cover in the middle stages, kept on evenly early in straight, weakened gradually approaching final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced in last pair after sluggish start, ridden along widest into home straight, tended to hang in throughout in home straight, ran on strongly final 200m.
Settled in mid-field, keen and switched three wide 700m out, taken wider on bend, short-lived effort 400m out, no extra final 200m.
Track leaders in rail position, short of room early in home straight, unable to pick up for pressure from 250m out.
Raced in mid-division, moved smoothly into contention 300m out but pressed by winner, stayed on well but no match for winner.
Ridden along from stalls to share of lead, raced prominently 700m out, dropped away quickly in home straight, eased once well held.
Raced in touch with leaders, good headway top of home straight to narrowly lead 300m out but soon joined by winner, weakened final 150m.
Awkward start, settled in mid-field, short of room early in home straight, passed a few tiring rivals late on.
Dropped out in rail position from wide draw, pushed along wide for clear run 500m out, quickened early in home straight, hung in but strong run to lead 200m out, on top from there.
Across from wide draw to share of lead, took the solely lead 700m out, joined 300m out, weakened quickly final 200m.
Raced in last pair after slowly away and lost ground, still in rear into home straight, not best of runs in the straight.
Waited with towards rear, pushed along wide into home straight, stayed on but lacked pace to reach leaders.
Rail position in mid-field, angled off rail 600m out but unable to secure clear run until 250m out, one paced under pressure.
Across from widest draw to track leaders, challenged leader top of home straight but lacked pace to hold position, weakened final 150m.
Ridden along to lead, weakened passing 150M (See Incident Report).
Sat on pace, shifted ground in the Straight, still green (See Incident Report).
Settled in front of midfield, raced wide throughout, weakened over the concluding stages.
Sat rear, raced rear, limited response when asked.
Chased the leader, traveled okay, responded reasonably well when asked.
Settled midfield, switched out and pressed on rounding the Turn, had every chance.
Settled towards rear, one pace to the finish.
Sat on pace, traveled on the rail, held up in the early part of the Straight, lay out over the concluding stages.
Settled in front of midfield, traveled okay, made steady progress from 250M.
Settled in front of midfield, weakened gradually, no impression made.
Sat towards rear, traveled fairly, failed to make ground (See Incident Report).
Jumped only fairly, sat behind midfield, gave ground entering the Straight, no contention.
Sat behind midfield, traveled comfortably, showed some dash over the last 100M.
Sat worse than midfield, raced keenly in the early stages, held up at the top of the Straight, closed off fairly.
Tracked pace, pressed leader from 700m out, no extra final 300m.
Held up, headway 400m out, no further impression and held final 200m.
Held up, well held from top of home straight, passed a few tiring rivals late on.
Towards rear after sluggish start, headway wide turning into home straight, every chance from 300m out, stuck to task.
Keen in mid-field, followed winner through going smoothly 400m out, stayed on but held by winner final 100m.
Mid-field, challenged over 300m out, stayed on but lacked pace of winner.
Raced in touch, keen early, quickened to challenge 400m out and soon led, ran on well and always holding placed horses final 100m.
Keen under restraint, steady headway to lead halfway, headed 400m out, weakened.
Tracked pace, shuffled back to mid-field 700m out, ridden and left behind final 400m.
Made running, headed halfway, remained close up, weakened tamely 500m out.
Keen under restraint in mid-field, brief headway under pressure early in home straight, soon held.
Began well from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-3/4L turning in, kept on strongly in straight, won very easily.
Bumped on the hindquarters at the start, positioned 5 lengths behind the leader on the inside, same margin back turning in, finished off well to take 2nd without threatening the winner.

Moderately away, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, angled out 500M, 4-3/4L back turning in, showed some response early in straight, inconvenienced shortly after passing 200M, kept on same pace to the line.
Began smartly, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final furlong.
Jumped only fairly, raced in midfield on the outside, dropped towards rear 800M, eased early in straight. (Lame right hind leg.) (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped awkwardly and made contact, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Jumped only fairly, raced behind midfield, 2 wide, angled out approaching 500M, made good progress in straight to make frame.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 wide approaching 600M, carried wider turning in, kept on evenly in straight.
Out with rest, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Commenced well, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked on run 150M, weakened gradually close home.
Shifted out abruptly on jumping and rider lost irons, always in rear. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from gate 12, raced at rear, 7 lengths back, very wide turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.
Jumped well, raced 3 wide, a length or so back, travelled keenly in the early stages, steadied near 900M, 2 lengths or so back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Sat on pace, limited response in the Straight.
Sat midfield wide and without cover, weakened and gave ground in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
Settled midfield 2 wide, showed some dash early part of the Straight, weakened final 100M.
Sat behind the leaders, weakened in the Straight.
Sat towards the rear 2 wide, stayed on.
Sat last, never a threat. (See Incident Report)
Sat behind midfield on the rail, made no impression. (See Incident Report)
Sat in front of midfield 2 wide, one pace when asked.
Settled towards the rear 2 wide, stayed on fairly. (See Incident Report)
Sat outside lead, kept on strongly to score.
Sat worse than midfield 3 wide, made good late ground.
Sent forward to lead, kept on nicely, just got pass final 50M.
Settled midfield 3 wide, closed off nicely.
Settled midfield on the rail, under pressure from 600M, gave ground in the Straight.
Niggled along wide in midfield after moderate start, made headway past 1000M to travel alongside eventual winner in 3rd 3-wide, hit the front under pressure 250M out only to be collared 50M out.

Settled in forward of midfield, drifted slightly backward to rear of midfield when pace quickened onto home bend, shifted wide for a run but slightly inconvenienced upon straightening, fought on steadily without threatening.

Began fairly, soon recovered along the rail to just over 2L back in 4th, drifted from 1L off to over 2L back when pace quickened around the bend, gave ground steadily under pressure from approaching home turn.

Taken well behind from a poor draw, travelled keenly in last on rail before pulling his way forward to 11th onto home bend, shifted wide for home straight but did not find much room early on, kept on same pace in the run home.
Settled wide in last few after beginning from the widest draw, one of the widest into home straight, never seen with a chance
Travelled wide just behind midfield, gained slightly closer to midfield onto home bend, one of widest turning into straight, made no further impression.
Broke well from a poor draw, settled one off the lead and gradually shifted across for 3-wide position over 1100M out, came to challenge upon straightening and gained upper hand 50M out.
Always prominent racing keenly at times in early stages, drifted over 2L back to 5th coming onto home bend, fought on steadily under pressure in straight but never able to peg back the place-getters.
Settled behind midfield, lost position 1000M out dropping to third last, fought on steadily under pressure near the centre of home straight but never threatening.
Travelled 3-wide in last few, shifted widest for a run into straight, ran on quite well but unable to sustain effort inside final 100M.
Well back to straight, saved ground on the inside turning in, made significant progress reaching within 3L of pace 200M out but unable to sustain effort inside final 100M.

Took up running wide in lone furrow from a poor wide, crossed to one off the rail in front coming onto first turn setting a fast pace on the bend, joined over 300M out before overhauled inside final 150M.

Broke well before settling 3-wide in forward of midfield mainly in 6th, gained closer rounding home bend and wider into straight, fought on steadily under pressure to reach 3rd inside the 100M but never threatening.
Settled in midfield on rail, soon weakened after straightening.
Settled in 3rd place in a slowly run race, soon found the lead on straightening, driven clear mid-straight to win his fourth Hong Kong Cup in great style.
Had a smooth trip in midfield, bided his time when some other rivals were getting serious passing 500M, chased eventual winner final 400M but was always held. Clear from rest.
Settled last 6Ls off leader early and middle stages, made his move 650M, wide into straight before staying on moderately to the finish.
Made some use over the first turn to find the lead, had uncontested lead middle stages, headed near 400M, battled hard to the line for 4th.

Settled near last in a slowly run race, checked 700M, moved up to race alongside leaders leaving home turn but couldn't sustain run passing 300M. (Jockey - raced keenly throughout the early and middle stages.)

Vied for the lead first turn before easing back to sit in 2nd, kept on well to chase winner early straight, no extra final stages and lost several places near line. (Jockey - distance is a little far for him.)

Settled behind midfield in a slowly run event, patiently ridden and drifted back to last leaving home turn, badly crowded for room top of the straight before running on well to claim 3rd without troubling first two.
Began well from a wide draw, raced in 2nd, 2 lengths or so back, there to turn, kept on well until approaching final 50M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Taken back from gate 12, raced at rear, 7 lengths or so back turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.
Away well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 2-1/2Ls turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first two close home.
Began well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Bumped shortly after start, raced at rear on the inside, angled out 500M, failed to make any progress in straight.
Jumped with them, taken back to race towards rear on the outside, very wide turning in, finished off very strongly to score by a nose.
Clean jump, raced 3 wide in midfield, there to turn, ridden after passing 300M, showed very good response, led close home but unable to hold off the winner on line.
Began only fairly, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Out in line, trapped wide in midfield, no cover for the majority of the race, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away from the widest draw, raced better than midfield but trapped wide, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began awkwardly, raced behind midfield, 6 lengths back turning in, made little progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Shifted in shortly after start and made contact, raced 2 wide in midfield, 4 lengths or so back turning in, finished off evenly.
Jumped only fairly, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Taken back from gate 10, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, similar position on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 300M, finished off well to make frame without threatening.
Made contact shortly after start, raced 4 wide with cover towards rear, checked near 1200M, steadied near 900M, 4 lengths back turning in, failed to make any progress in straight.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside, very wide turning in, made no impression in straight.
Taken back from gate 13, raced at tail, steadied near 900M, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Bumped shortly after start, sent forward to race in 2nd, challenged the leader from 600M, kept on well in straight but always just held.

Began only fairly, taken back to race behind midfield on the outside, checked near 1200M, steadied off heels near 900M, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, moved a bit closer turning in, unable to obtain clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, finished off well to make frame.
Moderately away, raced in midfield, 1 to 2 lengths back turning in, no clear run early in straight, made no progress thereafter.
Began awkwardly, raced at rear, 3 to 4 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from gate 1, positioned a length behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well in straight but always just held.
Began well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, challenged by rival from 600M, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner close home.
Slightly slow out and bumped, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on evenly early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Jumped with them, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, wider turning in, finished off evenly.
Out with rest, raced slightly better than midfield, no cover throughout, 1-3/4L back turning in, finished off very strongly, led close home.
Clean jump, raced better than midfield, moved closer turning in, hard ridden after passing 300M, kept on evenly until short of room close home.
Began only fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out after passing 500M, 4 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to take 2nd.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide towards rear, commenced move approaching 800M, very wide on turn, made some headway in straight.
Jumped awkwardly, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground to turn, angled out 400M, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Jumped well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 lengths back on turn, finished off well to make frame.
Began well from a wide draw, raced 2 wide in midfield, moved closer after passing 750M, 3 wide turning in, showed good response in straight, took the lead 150M, peaked and headed 50M, ran on evenly.
Away well, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader, peaked on turn, weakened final furlong.
Began only fairly and made contact, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 wide after passing 800M, moved closer 600M, 2-1/2L back turning in, finished off well to score.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, peaked on turn, weakened and eased inside final furlong.
Jumped with them, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Made contact at start, took the lead, led by 3/4L, challenged by rival on turn, peaked and headed approaching 150M, weakened and eased thereafter.
Bumped start, raced in 2nd, 3/4L back, pressed leader on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened thereafter.
Taken back from gate 12, raced at tail, made progress on outer after entering the back straight, peaked on turn, weakened final 400M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced in rear, rail position throughout, quickened early in home straight and ran on well final 200m, just failed.
Three wide in mid-field, did not travel with much fluency, taken widest on bend, no extra final 200m.
Three wide in mid-field, pushed along wide into home straight, lacked pace to challenge, never dangerous.
Raced prominently, good headway to challenge leader on bend, pushed ahead over 200m out, held on in tight finish.
Tracked leader against rail, forced to steady 400m out, well placed into home straight, stayed on but lacked pace to reach leaders.
Rail position in mid-field, challenged and every chance from 300m out, closed on winner late on but always held.
Awkward start, showed speed to get across, challenged by winner 400m out and headed by that rival 200m out, forced to steady 100m out and bumped 50m out.
Settled in mid-field, bumped 350m out but soon ridden, stayed on but never going pace to get competitive.
Held up last after slowly into stride and lost ground, still in last place top of home straight, struggling.
Ridden along from stalls but unable to lead, tracked leaders out wide without cover, struggled to hold position on bend, bumped 350m out and dropped away quickly.
Dropped out from wide draw, headway from top of home straight, short of room final 100m and bumped 50m out.
Three wide in rear of mid-field, keen under restraint, hung in early in home straight, unable to quicken.
Sat rear, traveled comfortably, switched out and pressed on rounding the Turn, dashed on.
Settled midfield, raced tight in the early Straight, one pace to the line.
Sat in front of midfield, hung in and gave ground passing 200M.
Ridden along to lead, traveled okay, slightly weakened over the final 150M.
Settled midfield, traveled ordinarily, limited response under whip.
Sat towards rear, raced tight on the rail until 200M, closed of fairly.
Sat towards rear, traveled smoothly, responded well when asked.
Chased the leader, very limited when asked, no contention.
Sat worse than midfield, traveled fairly, lay in over the final 150M (See Incident Report).
Settled behind midfield, raced wide, weakened quickly entering the Straight.
Sat in front of midfield, weakened entering the Straight, not much impression made.
Jumped awkwardly, sat worse than midfield, ran on evenly.
Towards rear, had to sit and wait for run final bend, stayed on amongst horses from 150m out, lacked pace to challenge winner.
Mid-field, quickened to challenge 150m out, unable to match winner final 150m.
Tracked pace, challenged 200m out, soon hung right, weakened final 100m.
Held up last from high draw, forward move around field after halfway to race in touch, one paced under pressure home straight.
Towards rear, had to wait for run briefly final bend, followed winner through on outer of field, stayed on to snatch second.
Three wide in mid-field, lost place quickly turning into home straight, soon well held.
Mid-field, keen early, wide from before halfway, stayed on.
Tracked pace, pushed along 400m out, stuck to task but one paced.
Held up, switched wide final bend, strong run to lead 100m out and soon on top, won readily.
Made running, challenged from 400m out, faded final 100m.
Mid-field, unable to quicken 300m out, looked held when checked 150m out.
Chased leader, challenged turning into home straight, no extra final 100m.
Bumped start, sat right behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, kept on well early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Average to begin, raced behind midfield on outer, 4 lengths or so back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (Lame right hind leg next day.)
Began only fairly, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made no progress in straight.

Made contact shortly after start, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield early, found rail after entering the back straight, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and finished off strongly to score.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out approaching 400M, unable to obtain clear run in straight.
Made contact shortly after start, raced 3 wide with no cover in midfield, 3 wide, moved closer on turn, very wide turning in, kept on evenly in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide towards rear, 5 lengths or so back turning in, made no progress in straight.
Bumped start, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, headed early in straight, kept on well, missed 3rd on line.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, angled out approaching 400M, 2 lengths or so back turning in, unable to obtain clear run in straight.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced 2 wide better than midfield, commenced move after passing 500M, 3 wide turning in, finished off well to take a place.
Began well, raced prominently, 2 wide, there to turn, took the lead early in straight, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner final 50M.
Moderately away from the widest draw, taken back to race at tail, 6 to 7 lengths back turning in, made very good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Sat near the rear, never a threat. (See Incident Report)
Sat last, never involved. (See Incident Report)
Sat behind the leaders, weakened in the Straight.
Sat outside the lead, kept on until weakened final 100M.
Sat midfield 2 wide, one pace when asked.
Sat on pace 2 wide, kept on nicely.
Settled in front of midfield 2 wide, closed off okay.
Slow to jump, settled towards the rear, made no impression. (See Incident Report)
Sat at the rear on the rail, slightly held up top of the Straight, stayed on fairly. (See Incident Report)
Settled midfield on the rail, saved ground on the turn, closed off nicely, just held on.
Sat in front of midfield on the rail, angled out rounding the Home Turn, ran on strongly, just missed.
Sent forward to lead, kept on okay, weakened final 75M.
Travelled at the back after beginning from a poor draw, wide around home bend and widest into straight, made up good ground near the centre of track, did best work late.
Broke well sharing early pace, shifted 1L back to 2nd early in back straight, soon faded out of contention after home turn.
Restrained to midfield from a poor draw, in similar position turning into home straight, fought on steadily without quickening.
Settled within striking distance in 4th on rail, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, fought on dourly to gain upper hand narrowly over 50m out.
Began fairly, gradually recovering just worse than midfield when steadied 1000M out, swung wide into straight and ran home one-paced.

Began from the widest draw holding 3L 5th early stages, made headway inside 750M reaching 1.5L 3rd, remained wide without cover rounding home bend and into straight, ran on dourly under pressure to just fail to get up on line.
Taken back to last few from a poor draw, commenced move rounding home bend and one of the widest into straight, ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Pressed forward to lead from a poor draw, obtained rails run in front 900M out setting a steady pace to straight, headed under pressure inside final 50M.
Taken back to last few from a poor draw, travelling freely when steadied passing the 1000M, steadied and lost ground inside the 200M, made no further impression.
Began fairly travelling keenly in midfield on rail, saved ground on the inside turning in for home reaching 5th some 2L back, kept on steadily behind runners in the run to the line.
Jumped awkwardly losing considerable ground, gradually recovered along the rail to last few, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, faded under pressure inside final 150M.
Began well travelling keenly just over 2L back in 3rd, drifted slightly backward to 5th over 700M out, swung wide into straight and weakened under pressure.
Caught racing wide no cover in midfield from draw 12, failed to run on final 400M.
Began well from draw 2, restrained to race in midfield, couldn't go on entering home straight, soon left behind by leaders.
Settled in midfield along the inside, ran home only fairly from 300M. Never a threat to leaders.
Jumped on terms, with leaders early stages before dropping back for cover, close enough leaving the home turn, kept on steadily to the line and just missed out on 3rd.
From wide draw ended up chasing leaders in a 3-wide spot without cover, couldn't quicken enough on straightening, always held by leaders in the run home.
Showed good speed to lead, kept going well early straight, headed near 200M and no extra late losing 2nd close home.
Became badly unbalanced when bumped after the start, raced in mid-division, failed to respond on straightening, soon beaten and eased. (Jockey - concern with the horse's action in the Home Straight.)
Badly unbalanced when bumped by rival after the start, ended up racing 3-wide towards the rear, brought widest to the straight then made limited progress to the line.
Severely checked after the start when crowded between rivals, ended up in last spot 4-5Ls back, ran on final 300M without seriously threatening leaders.
From draw 1 always in touch behind leaders, ran on well final 300M but couldn't get near to the winner.
Shortly after the start was crowded, raced keenly in a position towards the rear, lacked finishing effort final 300M.
Went forward pressing leader on outside, driven top of straight and hit the lead nearing 200M, kicked clear late stages to win it pleasingly.
Taken back to race 2 wide towards rear, 7-1/2L back turning in, made some headway in the run home.
Bumped shortly after start, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and made some progress.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, very wide into straight, made no progress in straight.
Shifted out at start, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/2L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first two final 100M, finished 3rd.
Average to begin, raced in midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.) (Bled.)
Out with rest, raced behind midfield on the outside, 7 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slightly slow out, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off very strongly to score.
Bumped and unbalanced shortly after start, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, a length or so back, there to turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line. (Lame right hind leg next day morning.)
Jumped well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, very wide turning in, kept on well in straight to make frame, no threat to the first few.
Crowded start, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened gradually close home.

Began well from gate 1, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed good response in straight, took the lead 100M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner final 50M.
Crowded start, raced at rear, 8 lengths or so back, set impossible task on turn but chased strongly to make up considerable ground.
Clean jump, raced prominently, 2 wide, there to turn, hit the front 400M, kept on very well to the line, won comfortably.
Began only fairly, positioned 3 wide with cover, 4 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, finished off well to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Away well, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on same pace in the run home.
Began awkwardly and made contact, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the outside, 7 lengths back turning in, failed to make any progress in straight.
Shifted in at start and made contact, raced 2 wide in midfield, same position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, there to turn, made contact near 350M, unable to obtain clear run in straight.
Bumped at start, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made no impression in straight.

Began well from the widest draw, raced slightly better than midfield but trapped wide, 3 lengths or so back, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, kept on same pace to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped shortly after start, positioned 2 wide, 1 to 2 lengths back, there to turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line. (Lame right front leg next day morning.)
Began well, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off well to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
Taken back from gate 10, raced behind midfield on outer, bumped near 1200M, 5-1/2L back turning in, made no progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.) (Blood in trachea.)
Bumped shortly after start, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, peaked and headed 400M, weakened final 150M.
Slowly away, raced at tail throughout, never a factor.
Dropped out from wide draw, raced wide throughout, still in last place top of home straight, no impression.
Awkward start, rail position in mid-field, unable to secure clear run until 300m out, stayed on but lacked pace to reach leaders.
Tracked leaders out wide without cover, struggled to hold position from 500m out, flattened out final 200m.
Tracked leading pair against rail, had to wait for run turning into home straight, secured clear run 300m out, ran on well final 200m to lead close home.
Bumped out of stalls, settled in mid-field, ridden from top of home straight, ran on strongly final 200m to close on leaders but always held.
Three wide in mid-field, bumped 1000m out, under pressure on bend to chase leaders, left behind home straight, well beaten.
Three wide in rear of mid-field, forced to steady 1100m out, pushed along wide into home straight, never a threat.
Shifted in at start and lost ground, raced in rear, looked green and did not respond to pressure from 800m out, no impression.
Ridden along from stalls to lead, soon headed top of home straight and dropped away quickly, eased once well held.
Held up last after slowly away, good headway on bend and pushed along widest into home straight, stayed on for pressure.
Tracked pace, well placed into home straight, challenged and every chance from 400m out, stayed on well but no match for winner.
Pressed leader from wide draw, improved to lead top of home straight, pressed on 300m out, headed 200m out and soon weakened.
Jumped only fairly, sat midfield, made steady progress.
Jumped awkwardly, settled towards rear, lay in inside 200M, closed off okay.
Sat on pace, traveled fairly, held up at the early Straight.
Sat on pace, traveled smoothly, responded reasonably well under whip (See Incident Report).
Settled in front of midfield, traveled nicely, switched out entering the Straight, closed off well.
Chased the leader, weakened inside 300M, gave ground.
Sat towards rear, failed to respond, no contention.
Jumped only fairly, settled towards rear, responded nicely when asked.
Settled in front of midfield, limited response when asked.
Sat midfield, held up at the top of the Straight, no clear run over the final 50M, could not be fully tested.
Settled worse than midfield, failed to respond (Unacceptable Performance, Substantial blood in trachea, Must BT, See Incident Report).
Sat rear, raced rear, limited hen asked, never a threat.
Jumped only fairly, raced keenly, angled out at the Turn, minor progress made.
Ridden along to lead, lay out inside 300M, gave ground quickly passing 200M.
Tracked leading pair, weakened quickly 200m out, reported to be displaying irregular heart rhythm.
In touch towards centre of course, outpaced from halfway.
Mid-field, switched off rail 300m out, stayed on.
Made running, headed 250m out, weakened final 100m.
In rear after awkward start, under pressure halfway, well held when twice checked final 200m.
Outpaced in rear, switched 150m out, stayed on and passed several rivals final 100m.
Tracked pace, under pressure 300m out, stuck to task but one paced.
Stumbled early and soon behind, well adrift of rest of field before halfway, never involved.
Ran green in mid-field, stayed on late.
Raced on outer in mid-field, one paced under pressure and unable to challenge.
Held up after sluggish start, short of room 250m out to 100m out, never competitive.
Started well and prominent towards centre of course, faded from halfway.
Tracked leaders, no match for winner final 200m but stuck to task to do best of remainder.
Pressed leader, led 250m out, well in control final 100m, won eased down.
Bumped start, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-3/4L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 50M.
Bounded on jumping and lost ground, raced at rear, badly hampered near 900M, 7 lengths or so back turning in, made no impression in straight.
Made contact shortly after start, raced in midfield on the outside, 4 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually thereafter.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, raced at rear, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, made some progress thereafter.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 3 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, closed off well to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Began smartly from a tricky draw, raced better than midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Fast into stride, positioned 2 wide, 1 to 2 lengths back, there to turn, showed very good response in straight, took the lead 50M, won by 3/4L.
Shifted out at start, raced behind midfield, 2 wide, hampered near 900M, 5 lengths back on turn, no clear run early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.

Slightly slow out, raced behind midfield on the inside, severely checked near 900M, positioned 2 wide towards rear on turn, showed no response early in straight, eased inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, raced towards rear on the outside, steadied near 900M, 7 lengths back turning in, failed to close off in straight. (Lame left front leg next day morning.)
Average to begin, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked approaching 200M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Out with rest, raced 2 wide in midfield, bumped near 900M, found rail 800M, saved ground on turn, finished off well to make frame without threatening.
Taken back from the outside barrier, sat last, had to navigate through traffic in the Straight, run peak final 100M.
Sat one pace 2 wide, kept on nicely.
Sat midfield 2 wide, unable to quickened in the Straight.
Settled worse than midfield on the rail, took some time to respond, ran on nicely final furlong.
Sat at the rear, never a threat.
Sat midfield on the rail, closed off okay.
Sat in front of midfield 2 wide, made no impression.
Sat on pace, limited response when asked. (See Incident Report)
Sat towards the rear, stayed on fairly. (See Incident Report)
Sat towards the rear, never involved.
Sat near the rear 2 wide, never a factor.
Sat in front of midfield, angled out rounding the Home Turn, ran on nicely, won comfortably.
Sent forward to lead, weakened final furlong.
Sat behind midfield 2 wide, stayed on.
Soon taken well back from the widest draw, never seen with a chance.
Began well from a poor draw settling in midfield 3-wide without cover, remained in a similar position to straight and could find no extra under pressure. (Blood in trachea)
Began fairly and ridden along in midfield or slightly worse, in a similar position into straight when hung in a difficult ride, produced good late impression.

Niggled along for a prominent position on rail, tracked behind leader coming onto home bend but switched 2-wide 800M out, hit the front into straight only to be narrowly headed 200M out, fought on dourly to the line.
Pressed forward from a poor draw to lead ploughing a lone furrow down the back straight, crossed for rails run onto home bend and led the field until narrowly headed into straight, folded up quickly.
Held up in 4th on rail some 3L back, slightly closer to pace onto home bend, baulked and switched for a run past the 400M, folded up quickly shortly afterwards.
Held up in 3rd 2-wide just over 2L off the pace, commenced move passing the 400M gaining upper hand 200M out, fought on under pressure to the line.
Crowded at start settling well back 3-wide with cover, switched and obtained a clear passage 300M out, finished off the race well. (Tactic questioned)

Soon taken back to last few for inside run, made steady headway on rail approaching home bend reaching 9th briefly over 6L back, saved ground turning in for home but dropped away quickly inside final 300M.
Held up over 4L back in 5th, slightly closer to pace in a similar position rounding home bend, made modest progress under pressure in straight without threatening first few.
Began moderately but soon picked up on rail to midfield, remained similar into straight, kept on until finding no extra inside final 100M.

Jumped awkwardly losing ground travelling keenly in last few early, tightened between runners onto home bend, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, produced good late impression inside final 250M.
Settled towards rear 3-wide with cover, soon came to challenge upon straightening, ran on steadily near the centre of the track until finding no extra inside final 100M.
Began from a poor draw and gradually taken back to last few, dropped to tail-end onto home bend, kept on past well-beaten horses down the centre of the straight.
Jumped on terms, reserved in midfield along the fence, lacked the turn of foot to capitalise from 400M. Always held by leaders.
Tracked the pace in 3rd, was handy enough on straightening but didn't go on with it, weakened badly mid-straight.
Stalked the lead in 2nd, kept battling early straight to stay in touch with leader, no extra late stage and weakened.
Jumped cleanly, held up behind midfield but couldn't quite finish off on straightening. (Jockey - would derive a fitness benefit from today's performance. / No Vet findings.)
Settled down in midfield along the 2-path, was severely checked 500M and ran wide, couldn't quicken enough after the interference.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, ended up in last spot, checked 500M and had task in hand top of straight, ran past beaten rivals only.
Jumped awkwardly, settled near last, was severely checked 500M and ran wide, worked home only fairly after the interference. Never a threat to leaders.
Bumped at the start, from draw 11 moved forward chasing leaders, checked 500M to avoid rival, recovered and ran on well towards the line, just missed 2nd.
Jumped only fairly, held up towards the rear, saved ground along the inside, came from well back and made solid inroads towards the line. Pleasing debut.
Driven forward to find the lead, set steady pace middle stages, kept going well in the straight, headed by winner passing 200M, faded late stages just held onto 2nd.
Tracked leaders in 4th, raced keenly middle stages, blundered and shifted out abruptly 500M causing interference to rivals, let down nicely from 400M and drew clear late stages to win pleasingly.
Jumped with them, raced 3 wide in midfield, slightly improved on turn, hard ridden after passing 250M, kept on well to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Began awkwardly, taken back to race at rear, very wide turning in, made some progress in straight.
Made contact at start, raced better than midfield but trapped wide early, 2 wide on turn, showed good response in straight, took the lead 200M, kept on very well to the line and scored.
Made contact at start, sent forward to race prominently, travelled well to turn, took the lead 300M, peaked and headed 200M, weakened final 100M. (Bled.)
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 wide from 650M, 3 lengths back turning in, no clear run early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Away with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, 2 to 3 lengths back turning in, no daylight until approaching final 150M, kept on well to take a place without threatening.
Bumped start, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, peaked and headed 300M, weakened inside final furlong.
Began only fairly, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on same pace until no clear run final 50M.
Taken back from gate 9, raced behind midfield on outer, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.
Bumped start, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on evenly early in straight, no clear run final 150M.
Began well from gate 1, raced prominently on the inside, travelled keenly in the early stages, saved ground throughout, kept on evenly in straight.

Began well from the widest draw, sent forward to race prominently, 2 wide, there to turn, took the lead near 250M, peaked and headed 100M, weakened gradually final 50M. (Lame right front leg next day morning.)
Began only fairly, raced 2 wide in midfield, similar position on turn, showed limited response early in straight, steadied near 200M, eased thereafter.
Slightly slow out and bumped, raced towards rear on the outside, 5 lengths or so back turning in, made some headway in straight.
Commenced well, sent forward to take the lead, travelled keenly in the early stages, led by 1/2L turning in, peaked and headed 250M, weakened final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)

Began only fairly, taken back to race at rear on the inside, moved a bit closer after passing 1050M, angled out 500M, 4 lengths or so back turning in, no clear run early in straight, made minor progress thereafter.
Began well from a wide draw, raced 3 wide in midfield, there to turn, finished off very strongly to score by a narrow margin.

Blundered on jumping and made contact, trapped wide in midfield early, sent forward after passing 1100M, raced prominently in the middle stages but still 3 wide, weakened early in straight when hard run took effect.
Began well, raced 2 wide towards rear, there to turn, no clear run early in straight, made no progress final furlong.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide better than midfield, wider turning in, showed good response early in straight, peaked on run 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Taken back to race at rear, 8 lengths back in the middle stages, moved closer turning in, made some progress early in straight, no clear run inside final furlong.
Began awkwardly and made contact shortly after start, raced 2 wide at rear, found rail 900M, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened gradually thereafter.

Moderately away from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, easy run to turn, unable to obtain clear run early in straight, cleared 150M, kept on well to take a place, not quite able to challenge.
Made contact shortly after start, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 500M, no clear run early in straight, cleared 250M, finished off strongly, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced 3 wide with cover slightly behind midfield, 2 wide on turn, angled out 500M, made some progress in straight.
Tracked pace, stuck to task final 300m but lacked pace to challenge.
Keen towards rear, one paced under pressure and unable to reach leaders.
In touch with leaders, ridden into home straight, weakened 300m out.
In touch with leaders, keen, angled out for a run 400m out, quickened to challenge 200m out, winner too strong final 100m.
In rear after slow start, under heavy pressure 400m out, no impression.
Prominent, ridden turning into home straight, weakened 300m out.
Tracked leading pair, keen, ridden to challenge 200m out, no extra final 100m.
Mid-field, little impression under pressure final 300m.
Rear of mid-field, wide into home straight, headway onto heels of leaders 200m out, run flattened out when a bit tight for room closing stages.
Rail position in mid-field, quickened between horses to lead 150m out and soon on top, won readily.
Made running, headed 200m out, faded.
Held up last from wide draw, plenty to do turning into home straight, never on terms with leaders.
In rear, keen early, angled wider for run 300m out, stayed on well.
Wide in mid-field, short of room top of home straight, soon held once clear 300m out.
Out with rest, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, failed to make any progress in straight.
Bumped start, raced in midfield on the inside, angled out after passing 450M, 3 lengths or so back turning in, finished off very strongly to score.
Bumped start, raced 3 wide in midfield, no cover throughout, very wide turning in, one-paced in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, travelled keenly in the early stages, found rail near 700M, saved ground on turn, made some progress in straight, no threat to the first few.
Slowly away, raced at tail, 8 lengths back, same margin back turning in, made some progress in straight.
Fast into stride, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 75M, ran on evenly to take 2nd.
Jumped awkwardly, raced 2 wide better than midfield, carried out 450M, very wide turning in, kept on same pace in straight.

Taken back from the widest draw, raced 2 wide at rear, 7 lengths or so back turning in, made some progress early in straight, blocked approaching 150M, cleared 100M, finished off well to take a place.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide in midfield, similar position on turn, showed limited response early in straight, blocked near 100M, eased thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well, raced 3 wide behind midfield early, 2 wide from 700M, angled out 400M, very wide turning in, made very good progress in straight to be nearest on line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed no response early in straight, eased final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped with them, sent forward to race prominently, 2 wide, 3/4L back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Bumped at start, three wide in mid-field without cover, driven 500m out, one paced and unable to get on terms with leaders.
Shifted out and checked leaving stalls, settled in rear of mid-field, tight of room 400m out when avoiding a rival that was giving ground, no impression.
Waited with towards rear from wide draw, still plenty to do top of home straight, ran on well final 200m to close on winner.
Driven along and outpaced early stages, in rear after forced to steady 1500m out, taken widest into home straight, never a threat.
Bumped out of stalls, showed good speed to lead and set strong pace, headed 200m out and flattened out.
Ridden along from wide draw to track leaders, switched wide 600m out to avoid a rival that was giving ground, ridden along to chase leaders on bend, stayed on.
Rail position in mid-field, good headway to chase leaders final bend, rail position throughout, headed by winner 100m out, stayed on for pressure.
Dropped out from wide draw, pushed along final bend to chase leaders, ran out of room final 200m, not fully extended.
Bumped out of stalls, tracked leaders in rail position, good headway to press leader final bend, took a narrow lead 200m out but soon headed by winner, weakened final 100m.
Settled in mid-field, forced to steady 500m out to avoid a rival that was giving ground, pushed along wide into home straight, strong run to lead 100m out, on top from there.
Bumped at start, improved to press leader after 1300m, dropped away quickly to last final bend, well beaten.
Raced in rear after awkward start, good headway final bend and moved smoothly into contention top of home straight, unable to sustain.
Settled in front of midfield, briefly held up at the Turn, ran on evenly.
Settled in front of midfield, held up at the early Straight, no clear run until 150M, finished off okay.
Sat towards rear, switched out and pressed on rounding the Turn, stayed on nicely to grab 3rd.
Settled worse than midfield, shifted out when the pace steadied, hung in over the concluding stages (See Incident Report).
Sat rear, raced wide from 800M, commenced a forward move near the 800M, closed off nicely (See Incident Report).
Jumped only fairly, settled midfield, held up at the Straight, could not be fully ridden out.
Sat on pace, traveled fairly, not much impression made.
Sat behind midfield, raced wide, gave ground quickly.
Tracked the leader, raced keenly in the early stages, gave ground passing 200M (See Incident Report).
Sat worse than midfield, limited response when asked.
Sat midfield, traveled fairly, steadied when the pace reduced, one pace to the finish.
Ridden along to lead, weakened passing 200M, gave ground thereafter.
Mid-field, tight for room briefly up rail over 300m out, stuck to inside, stayed on strongly to lead late on.
Tracked leading pair, chased leader from top of home straight, briefly tight for room 75m out, no extra.
Mid-field, pushed along over 400m out, one paced and unable to make any real progress.
Raced towards rear, one paced under pressure and unable to challenge.
Held up, stayed on final 200m out wide, never dangerous.
Disputed lead to halfway, chased leader from there, no extra and faded final 150m.
Raced in touch with leaders, wide into home straight, quickened to challenge 150m out, every chance.
Tracked pace, ridden 300m out, weakened.
Dropped out from wide draw, last and plenty to do 300m out, stayed on between horses and never nearer, ran out of room briefly closing stages.
Waited with towards rear, pushed along turning into home straight, left behind final 200m.
Disputed lead, led outright and pressed on halfway, headed only late on.
Held up from wide draw, keen under restraint, no impression.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, taken back to race at rear on the outside, 8 lengths or so back turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide behind midfield early, found rail near 600M, saved ground on turn, finished off well to make frame without threatening.
Shifted in abruptly at start, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, angled out approaching 350M, closed off well to take a place.

Shifted out at start and bumped, raced better than midfield but 3 wide with no cover, 2 wide from 550M, carried wider turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away from a wide draw, unable to slot in, trapped wide in midfield, no cover for the majority of the race, very wide into straight, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from gate 9, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead 850M, led by 1-1/2L turning in, kept on well in straight, just able to hold off the challenger late.
Out with rest, raced 2 wide in midfield, 4 lengths or so back turning in, taken wide in straight and finished off strongly, just beaten by a head, good debut.
Slightly slow out and inconvenienced, raced towards rear on the inside, 7 lengths back turning in, made good progress until blocked final 75M.

Began only fairly, sent forward to take the early lead, headed near 850M, allowed rival to cross 600M, sat right behind the leader on turn, 2 wide into straight, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Shifted out at start, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Made contact at start, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.) (Roarer.)
Sat towards the rear, never involved. (See Incident Report)
Sat box seat, limited response when asked.
Slow to jump, settled behind midfield, closed off okay, no threat to top 2.
Sat handy 2 wide, closed off strongly, just got there on the line.
Sat outside the leader, under pressure from the 600M, weakened soon after. (See Incident Report)
Jumped well and led, kept on nicely, just got caught on the line.
Settled in front of midfield on the rail, stayed on. (See Incident Report)
Sat last, never a threat.
Sat midfield 2 wide, one pace when asked
Sat towards the rear on the rail, made no impression.
Sat near midfield 3 wide no cover, gave ground from the 500M. (See Incident Report)
Sat worse than midfield 2 wide, showed some dash early part of the Straight, nothing extra final furlong.
Hampered at start and soon taken back towards rear, obtained a clear passage between runners upon straightening, ran on well under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Soon took up running, obtained rails run over 800M out setting a standard pace, held over 1L advantage turning into home straight, hung on well under pressure.

Pressed forward to vie for lead very wide, keen without cover into back straight when jostled and drifted a few lengths back to 8th 3-wide past the 700M, last turning for home and only ran past well-beaten runners.
Jumped awkwardly losing ground, 3-wide in 2L 4TH early in back straight improving to 1L back 2-wide 700M out, faded gradually under pressure inside final 200M. (Blood in trachea)
Began fairly, sharing 1L 2nd 3-wide when hampered and lost position rounding the 1000M turn dropping to 3L 6th briefly, remained 3-wide without cover afterwards until weakening in home straight.
Settled well back from the widest drew travelling 2-wide most of the way, kept on same pace without quickening under pressure in straight.
Wide in last few early stages, made headway past 1000M to 4L 7th over 750M out, ran on under pressure from wide into straight, nearest at finish.
Crowded at start, niggled at in midfield on rail, lost position when crossed drifting towards rear over 950M out, saved ground on the inside turning in for home but soon found no extra.
Checked at start and taken well back, saved ground with rails run throughout, kept on same pace without quickening under pressure in straight.
Began fairly from the one draw, soon picked up to 2nd some 1L back, became 3rd in a similar position past the 600M, faded under pressure inside final 200M.
Began well from a poor draw settling some 4L back in 7th, became 6th in a similar position on rail 800M out, saved ground making final turn, ran on closing stages to be nearest at finish.

Broke well, settled just off the pace 2-wde, inconvenienced and lost position about 650M out, soon renewed effort for 2L 5th rounding home bend, fought on steadily in straight to reach 3rd briefly 150M out but lost it late.
Made heavy contact with rival after the start, went forward from wide draw, came under pressure home turn and weakened away in the straight. (Jockey - had some concerns with its action after 600M.)

Became unbalanced at the start, ended up 6Ls back towards the rear of the main group, made good progress in the straight finishing off final 200M fastest. (Jockey reprimanded for failing to ride out to the end of the race.)
Began well enough, settled in 5th within 3Ls of leader, gave good response on straightening, took lead near 150M and bounded away to win by good margin.
Hard driven to find the lead setting a good pace throughout, kept on well early straight, headed 150M, lost 2nd close home.
Always prominent chasing leaders, nudged along 500M and moved up to 2nd 250M, run ended late stages then weakened to finish 6th
From draw 1 stayed in touch with leader, battled for the lead early straight before turning one-paced final 200M.
Jumped on terms, reserved in mid-division 4-5Ls away, came under pressure 600M and failed to make ground on straightening. (No Vet findings.)
Settled 5Ls off leader, responded only fairly in the straight running on one-paced. (Bled.)
Reared at the start and lost considerable ground. Never in the picture after the poor start. (Barrier Manners Unacceptable.)
Caught racing wide without cover in midfield 4-5Ls away, stayed on well final 300M to claim 2nd just before line.
Badly unbalanced after the start, soon detached from the field over 10Ls away. Never involved. (Jockey - Failed to travel at any stage after being contacted heavily after the start.)
Steadied after the start, ended up racing 8Ls away from leader, got back to the tail of the field 450M but lacked further response in the straight.

Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield in the early stages, 3 wide after entering the back straight, sent forward 900M, raced 4 wide, a length or so back on turn, finished off strongly to score. (Dead-heat winner.)
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened final 200M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from gate 9, raced behind midfield on outer, a bit closer turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Jumped with them, raced at rear on the inside, 6 lengths or so back, angled out after passing 500M, very wide turning in, made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 wide turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened gradually close home.
Began well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide from 700M, moved a bit closer on turn, took the lead early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, ran on evenly to the line.

Shifted in at start and made contact, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out and moved a bit closer after passing 600M, 3Ls back turning in, not much room early in straight, cleared 200M, finished off well to take a place.

Out with rest, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, a bit closer on turn, angled out 400M, showed good response in straight, took the lead 100M, kept on well to the line. (Dead-heat winner.)
Began well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, challenged by rival 550M, headed 500M, weakened early in straight.
Away with them, raced in 2nd, a length or so back, challenged the leader 550M, took the lead 500M, peaked early in straight, headed 200M, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began awkwardly from gate 12, taken back to race at tail in the early stages, moved a bit closer after passing 700M, very wide turning in, made some progress in the run home.
Began only fairly, raced 2 wide towards rear, 3 wide on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, similar position on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Out with rest, raced 3 wide better than midfield, a length back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Slowly away, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.

Made contact with the right side of the starting gate on jumping, taken back to race towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run until approaching final 50M, made no progress thereafter.
Average to begin, raced in 2nd, 3/4L back turning in, hard ridden from 300M but only showed limited response, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, kept on strongly in straight, won comfortably.
Began well from a wide draw, taken back to race towards rear on the outside, 4 lengths or so back turning in, made good progress in straight to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Away with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 lengths or so back turning in, unable to obtain clear run until approaching final 100M, weakened thereafter.
Jumped with them, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 wide turning in, made some progress early in straight, peaked on run 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced better than midfield but trapped wide, no cover for the majority of the race, weakened early in straight when hard run took effect.
Jumped only fairly from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, unbale to obtain clear run in straight.

Began only fairly from a wide draw, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out 450M, unable to obtain clear run early in straight, hampered near 200M, made minor progress final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Dropped out from wide draw, taken wider into home straight, passed a few tiring rivals late on.
Raced in mid-division, ridden top of home straight, ran on well but no threat to winner, challenged for second but just failed.
In rear after slowly away, pushed along wide into home straight, unable to quicken.
Rail position in mid-field, struggled to hold position on bend, outpaced and left behind in home straight.
Held up last from widest draw, still in last place top of home straight, no impression.
Showed good speed to lead, keen under restraint and set strong pace, two lengths clear top of home straight, headed by winner 150m out, faded final 100m.
Tracked leaders in rail position, switched for clear run 600m out, strong run to lead 150m out, soon asserted and won going away.
Blundered shortly after start, waited with towards rear, keen 800m out, ridden top of home straight, never a factor.
Settled in mid-field, found rail and under pressure top of home straight, ran out of room final 50m, never dangerous.
Tracked pace, hampered and taken wider 600m out, dropped away quickly 300m out, eased once well held.
Held up after shifted out and forced to steady at start, switched for clear run 500m out, lacked pace to challenge.
Raced in touch with leaders, travelled smoothly to follow winner through 400m out, one paced and unable to get on terms with leaders.
Prominent, chased leader into home straight, soon crossed by winner 300m out, one paced under pressure.
Raced in touch with leaders, tended to hang in throughout in home straight, switched for clear run 300m out, stayed on well but no threat to winner.
Chased the leader, gave ground at the top of the Straight (Unacceptable Performance, Must BT).
Settled in front of midfield, failed to respond when asked, weakened (See Incident Report).
Settled midfield, traveled fairly, one pace to the finish (See Incident Report).
Sat on pace, switched out near the 500M, could not make ground when asked.
Ridden along to lead, traveled smoothly, led all the way to score.
Sat rear, improved from 650M, had every chance.
Jumped awkwardly, sat on pace, slightly weakened entering the Straight.
Sat behind midfield, minor progress made in the Straight.
Sat worse than midfield, switched out rounding the Turn, closed off fairly well.
Mid-field, ridden 600m out, one paced and unable to improve position.
Wide throughout, mid-field, stayed on and some headway home straight, never dangerous.
Tracked pace, stuck to task under pressure but lacked pace to challenge winner.
Held up from wide draw, ridden 400m out, no impression.
Dropped out from wide draw, never out of rear.
Waited with in rear, struggling and well held from top of home straight.
Mid-field, struggling from over 400m out and well held.
Waited with in rear, wide into home straight, stayed on late, never dangerous.
Pressed leader, unable to stay with that rival from top of home straight, no extra final 150m, lost second close home.
Mid-field, limited headway under pressure 300m out, no further impression and held final 100m.
Tracked pace, ridden final bend, weakened home straight.
Made running, pressed on early in home straight, soon well on top, eased final 150m.
Rear of mid-field, under pressure turning into home straight, no impression.
Recovered from sluggish start to race in touch with leaders, ridden over 500m out, stayed on and got up for second close home, no threat to winner.
Commenced well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide after passing 600M, a length back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail on outer, 9 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, made no progress in straight.
Began only fairly and made contact, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made no impression in straight.
Moderately away, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and made minor progress.
Began only fairly, raced 2 wide towards rear, there to turn, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Made contact at start, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, very wide into straight, made good progress early in straight, peaked 100M, ran on evenly to the line.

Began well from a wide draw, trapped 3 wide with no cover, a length or so back, hampered near 600M, 4 wide turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began awkwardly and made contact, raced prominently, 2 wide, same position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened and eased final furlong.

Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out after passing 500M, 4 lengths back turning in, no daylight early in straight, cleared 150M, finished off very strongly to score. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from the widest draw, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, 4 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, finished off strongly to take 2nd.
Began well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first two final 50M.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced behind midfield on outer, travelled keenly throughout, 6 lengths back on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Began only fairly, raced at tail, 9 to 10 lengths back, still well back on turn, failed to make any progress in straight.
Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, angled out approaching 550M, 2 lengths or so back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Sat outside the lead, weakened and gave ground final 200M. (See Incident Report) (Disappointing Peformance, must trial)
Sat on pace, nothing extra in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
Sat towards the rear, never a threat.
Sat in front of midfield on the rail, no clear run most of the Straight, never seriously involved. (See Incident Report)
Sat in front of midfield 2 wide, only one pace when asked.
Settled at the rear 2 wide, made some late ground.
Not the quickest out, sat at the rear, held up early part of the Straight, stayed on strongly once in the clear, always held.
Sat in front of midfield 3 wide no cover, weakened final furlong.
Sat midfield 3 wide with cover, ran on nicely, no threat to the top 2.
Sat behind midfield 4 wide no cover, stayed on.
Sat midfield 2 wide, angled out in the Straight, closed off strongly to score.
Sat worse than midfield on the rail, held up and never tested in the Straight.
Sat behind midfield 2 wide, never impress.
Jumped nicely and led, kept on fairly.
Settled wide in last few from a poor draw, commenced move around the field home bend swinging widest into straight, made no further impression.
Soon dropped to tail-end, only ran on past well-beaten horses in home straight.
Pressed forward from a poor draw travelling wide around first bend, settled 2-wide just outside race leader in back straight, fought on steadily under pressure but lost 2nd late.
Settled not far off the slow pace in 5th or 4th, obtained a run 3-wide into straight, found nothing under pressure.
Broke well, gradually settled 3-wide in forward of midfield, gained slightly closer to 3L 6th rounding home bend before swinging 5-wide into straight, soon weakened under pressure.
Virtually made all, obtained rails run on top of first bend about 1300M out setting a steady pace in back straight, quickened up the tempo in front rounding home bend, hung on well to the line.
Very wide around first bend after beginning from the widest draw, gradually settled in 4th or 5th 3-wide without cover in back straight, dropped out of contention quickly inside final 400M.
Blundered at start losing ground, gradually recovered along the rail to midfield some 4L back, kept on same pace under pressure early in home straight until finding no extra inside final 200M.
Soon taken well back from a poor draw, remained in last few before sneaking closer on rail turning in for home, ran on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Began well from the one draw, settled just off the slow pace in 3rd on rail, fought on steadily in straight to claim 2nd late.
Settled towards rear, came under pressure rounding home bend, ran on well in straight to grab 4th late.
Ridden along wide in midfield early stages, lost position about 950M out and given reminders shortly afterwards, yielded ground approaching final turn despite coming under strong pressure.
Settled mainly towards rear on rail, angled out to challenge entering straight but unable to have a clear run until about the 200M, finished off the race well.
In midfield throughout, kept on steadily under pressure.
Vied for lead with 3 other rivals early stages, travelled the best halfway, shook off rivals passing 300M before keeping on strongly to score under big weight on seasonal reappearance.
Settled just off the pace in 5th, responded well to pressure 400M and moved to 2nd 250M, fought hard but peaked on its run 150M from home.
Jumped only fairly, settled towards the rear but not too far away, held up for clear running 350M-100M and lost every chance. Inconclusive run.
Jumped awkwardly, settled in mid-division and never far off from pace, gave limited response when asked 400M. Not reach leaders.
Crowded shortly after the start and was taken across behind runners to race near the stand side, held up for clear running 300M-200M before closing off the race moderately.
Began well, restrained to race in midfield 3Ls back, couldn't accelerate enough passing halfway. Never a threat to leaders. (Blood in trachea.)
Vied for the lead early and middle stages, couldn't sustain run from 350M, soon out of contention.
From draw 13 tracked leaders along the stand rail, put in an honest effort chasing winner from 400M but was comfortably held.
Stayed within striking distance from leaders, briefly held up 250M but lacked a strong response in the final stages. (Blood in trachea.)
Jumped fast from draw 2 but soon restrained to race in last 4Ls off leaders, ran home one paced along the stand rail. Posed little threat to leaders.
Jumped cleanly, vied for lead first half of the race, couldn't quicken passing 400M, faded away final 200M. (No Vet findings.)
Crowded after the start, went forward vying for the lead down the center of track, couldn't sustain run passing 500M, weakened rapidly.
Jumped awkwardly, ended up at rear, came under pressure 600M,soon weakened and finished tailed out. (Unacceptable Performance.)
From draw 1 dropped back to race 3Ls off leaders, failed to run on passing 400M. Never threatened.
Clean jump, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/2L turning in, kept on very well in straight and scored.
Began awkwardly and bumped, raced towards rear on the inside, 5 lengths or so back turning in, one-paced in the run home. (Right front tendon injury reported following day.)

Moderately away from a wide draw, trapped wide in midfield, sent forward after passing 1200M, raced prominently, 3 wide in the middle stages, weakened 600M, eased early in straight. (Blood in trachea.)
Shifted out at start and made contact, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well, positioned 2 wide, 4 lengths or so back, there to turn, no clear run early in straight, ran on evenly thereafter.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear, 6 to 7 lengths back, very wide turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced at rear on the outside, very wide turning in, showed nothing in straight.
Bumped start, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off well to take 2nd.
Moderately away, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, 4 wide from 750M, 4 lengths back turning in, finished off evenly.
Bumped start, raced better than midfield on the inside, angled out 500M, 2-1/2L back turning in, kept on well in straight to take a place.
Began well from the widest draw, raced better than midfield but trapped wide, dropped towards rear after passing 700M, emptied early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began only fairly, positioned 4 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and made some progress.
Jumped well, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, angled out 450M, raced tight early in straight, showed limited response early in straight, bumped approaching 200M, weakened final 100M.
Began well from a wide draw, raced prominently, 2 wide, 1-1/2L back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Began only fairly and made contact, raced behind midfield on the outside, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to take a place, nearest on line.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide at rear, made no impression in straight.
Taken back from gate 14, raced at tail, 7 lengths back turning in, made some progress in straight.
Jumped only fairly, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 lengths or so back, same margin back turning in, one-paced in the run home.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, no clear run in straight.
Bumped start, raced towards rear on outer, 6 lengths or so back, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.
Moderately away from gate 9, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, kept on well in straight but always held.
Stumbled shortly after start, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on well in straight to hold off the challenger.
Jumped with them, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear run in straight.
Began well from a wide draw, raced in midfield on the outside, there to turn, finished off strongly to take 2nd. (See Racing Incidents.)
Out with rest, raced 2 wide better than midfield, steadied near 900M, 3 wide turning in, finished off evenly.
Began only fairly, positioned 6 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began only fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on same pace in straight. (Lame right front leg next day morning.)

Commenced well, raced 3 wide slightly better than midfield, no cover for the majority of the race, showed some response early in straight, unbalanced and blundered near 200M, ran on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
